| | Friend, I want to personally thank you for making 2023 a successful year for our campaign. Together, we garnered wins across the board for our community, our state, and our country—none of which would have been possible without your unwavering and steadfast support. Now that it is officially election year, I am as determined as ever to keep up the fight for you, and build upon everything we have accomplished thus far.
Our race is one of the most-watched in the country. The Radical Democrats are already courting our next extreme opponent, and it’s going to take **_all of us_** to fight off the attacks they have coming our way. **🚨[I am going to need all the help I can get to make sure we win this fight for our families—and I’m calling on you to fight alongside me.](https://link.tomkean.com/u/click?_t=9b7a451def6d4254858fc869cf07cd48&_m=df902689996e4f5a8502c86fe7dda154&_e=N1YIAPiYjAxcfumWg2ZnJ-aOhmL9cZ7tkPvN7mVeNpHZegCIfT8SsQmITI4wWp-jdnSd8oG8SvNNBm3vlEHhjyvYVRvpTuE1wTAeDjTYOp_nMQEj1koMboUVp8gYbVCvZQZoum-hU8tfiOdeIHKdceUvD3OYHUceutLJaE-xCGNxm6gzyWvM10eRli8YaM2FTeXv3TvSdcm5OzvuRQLQQ2vxU3-T7C9c-PaK4FlT44qhkSrDQQWu8FVpGwBXzUJjI40j_7Dy6OZLsvpAf6ISdwnTR-Ku4NTByntNYjFrWGQD52NYF_35fg9TCCtqo-u4ljm1DzjNOWrMN-vz0HAAKLPP6KSH7tUj4mpov6wKr-oxBSPdStZHq0dMbFdNdV2R) 🚨**

Peter, my 2024 goal is to put Americans first and secure our border. But before we talk about that I want to share all of the great things we achieved in 2023:
**✅ Passed the strongest border security bill in history

✅ Lowered costs for Americans

✅ Lowered reckless Government spending

✅ Passed legislation to support our Veterans

✅ Fought for legislation to support Israel**
This wouldn’t have been possible without dedicated supporters like you.

Roger Williams is a Christian, conservative, pro-life, and second amendment supporter taking Texas values to Washington, D.C. He is a small business owner with over 45 years of experience and is running for Congress to create economic growth, jobs, and provide strong leadership. Roger worked alongside President Trump to fight against high taxes, rising energy prices, and soaring healthcare costs. His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. Roger serves on the Board of Trustees for the Bush School of Government and Public Service at Texas A&M University, the Texas Christian University Board of Trustees, and the National Football Foundation and College Football Hall of Fame Board of Directors.

clean_body: | | | | We truly couldn’t have done this without you... Peter, my 2024 goal is to put Americans first and secure our border. But before we talk about that I want to share all of the great things we achieved in 2023: ✅ Passed the strongest border security bill in history ✅ Lowered costs for Americans ✅ Lowered reckless Government spending ✅ Passed legislation to support our Veterans ✅ Fought for legislation to support Israel This wouldn’t have been possible without dedicated supporters like you. If you approve of the job I did in 2023 – please take a moment to ensure I can continue the hard work in 2024, and make a small contribution, right now. | Thank you, Rep. Roger Williams TX-25 | | Roger Williams is a Christian, conservative, pro-life, and second amendment supporter taking Texas values to Washington, D.C. He is a small business owner with over 45 years of experience and is running for Congress to create economic growth, jobs, and provide strong leadership. Roger worked alongside President Trump to fight against high taxes, rising energy prices, and soaring healthcare costs. His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. Roger serves on the Board of Trustees for the Bush School of Government and Public Service at Texas A&M University, the Texas Christian University Board of Trustees, and the National Football Foundation and College Football Hall of Fame Board of Directors. | "Facebook" | "Twitter" ---|--- | | ⬇DONATE BY CHECK⬇ ROGER WILLIAMS FOR U.S. CONGRESS 10 N. name: Hilary Franz
subject: Stepping into 2024 together
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Hilary Franz
body:
The challenges are large, but I’ve never shied away from tough fights, and I’m committed to delivering results.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76786555/448466966/-1503679382?refcode=BLU_EM_HFFC_2024-01-09_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2ZjODkxMzEtNGJhZi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=q7cXnBPcD7FovTyEGYrCHsQpYKq-gJSkovAgzqcPuCE=)
---
| Hi Peter,

As we step into 2024, I wanted to express my heartfelt gratitude for your support. I'm truly thankful to have you standing with me.

Together, we've already achieved remarkable progress in Washington state – strengthening unions, expanding workforce development and creating good-paying jobs; protecting communities and restoring our lands and waters; and developing clean energy, rural broadband, and housing to help address the growing need in every community.

I’m running for Congress to build on this progress. To build housing, protect our environment, strengthen unions and our communities, and create economic opportunities in every community in the 6th Congressional District. The challenges are large, but I’ve never shied away from tough fights, and I’m committed to delivering results.

Once again, thank you for your steadfast support. Here's to the progress we've achieved and what we can continue to achieve together!

Gratefully,

Hilary
---

Friend,
On a dark rainy day in our nation’s capital where I appeared in court to face the Biden Special Counsel, I received GREAT NEWS in our ongoing battle to stay on the ballot in all 50 states.
_**The case to STRIKE my name from the ballot in the important battleground state of Nevada was DISMISSED.**_
That means we REMAIN **UNDEFEATED** in federal court against these cynical efforts to interfere in the 2024 election and STEAL _your_ right to vote.
After my very first sham arrest in April of last year, I delivered a speech to the nation saying, _“With a dark cloud over our beloved country, I have no doubt, nevertheless, that we will Make America Great Again.”_
And as we continue to rack up wins, I still have COMPLETE and TOTAL FAITH that we will prevail against the vicious witch hunts, we will win back the White House, and we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!
**[Please make a contribution to keep up the FIGHT against the cheating Democrats – and together we will peacefully save America once and for all.](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kUGPmzAQhX-NuYGGsYPNgUNTix6y2kp7aW-RY0-S2cUGgSna_vqKNO31e0-j92lcnAa-fnZCHwXincMiEIX8IhBP6vjztTn9ONnyu345lbY5qG1P8atAzJ8T_a8-r1QUHQ871bYIHXqD3hfU1RqUUQcAKO6durRXFZyHcPChkUCIrg4eqHGmuYRDwR0CKqhrAACJUJExbR2MproxWqtWKNg4VWFMbgjveV7jVPkxFkN3z3laHpN6gf1Cfp2p2jjNFPbGztwvKl2kmb0r30dOubyuKcyOF0630o8xcs5EAvvkB6Daeee9c2gu6mqE7Nccz5ECr1FI-_RtdriM6-xJSOv57J7Muzg5viUh7V8naP8lY8qUspC2Bt3u9JwGDkLaj3k9fnt7u9zDAz5eIq190bb_-P16LOYuTBsPAy-NFgpu-4Rd7k8AAAD__-uljhI)**

clean_body: UNDEFEATED in federal court! | | | Friend, On a dark rainy day in our nation’s capital where I appeared in court to face the Biden Special Counsel, I received GREAT NEWS in our ongoing battle to stay on the ballot in all 50 states. The case to STRIKE my name from the ballot in the important battleground state of Nevada was DISMISSED. That means we REMAIN UNDEFEATED in federal court against these cynical efforts to interfere in the 2024 election and STEAL your right to vote. After my very first sham arrest in April of last year, I delivered a speech to the nation saying, “With a dark cloud over our beloved country, I have no doubt, nevertheless, that we will Make America Great Again.” And as we continue to rack up wins, I still have COMPLETE and TOTAL FAITH that we will prevail against the vicious witch hunts, we will win back the White House, and we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! | | Thank you, | Donald J. body:
Did you hear?! A very important date is approaching in 7 DAYS, Fellow American. Here's what you need to know.

| | | | | | | | | | [](http://links.electionsupdates.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ebced9103fcc4317993b5e6709cf6e78&_e=baEjMSOYVv137lkAeKruBLuGvtmvqFnG8oR9x9Jh7XSi-FlMwsY29w_cJiPRJxE1RwHQ1t4cF0BnzfkMxXAnXcd2SdH5HjWat9AKoBlQX-lnwmActf5gVif6w8BGxjT6Wttpz8yqpKnY5iwTLDqlZza34iNQwRAn8YCAJ2FSYVns96NBUeZRBvcO5idw5wD6CFcUBV0LkH7UTcPMGMfz6JV2AanwHh2QjwI2ziTA1551y0H_HXBTR9c_BEBn34h2Ji0Xao6I-6j22BHOO2EJ0Z3a-ZHfOvn4zCZiVLSlEQa4b-JMBG2IpTTUsqa_0RapeTNWR5uI_q-s0kZzf_aKrwvL0IeFoiQP2AKuRXZumodNdJh7A2dt-Le99nO1TpzM_L6GYMO5_YnrWnM5wKo2B4d5viwW9g41U2en2s4FxhWA8uOA72RH4jTtXKK1fMdl)

Fellow American! Did you hear?! **WE ARE LESS THAN 6 DAYS AWAY FROM THE IOWA CAUCUS!** You need to see this ASAP! **We have 0 days to waste**. The _entire nation_ will be watching this caucus to see what happens... but we have just over a week to pour every effort into winning this critical Iowa nomination. If there's ever been a time to step up for a candidate,**this is it**. Nothing matters more than supporting the candidate this nation needs NOW. _**Can you help us?**_ **[>>> RUSH IN ANY AMOUNT TO HELP! <<<](http://links.electionsupdates.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ebced9103fcc4317993b5e6709cf6e78&_e=baEjMSOYVv137lkAeKruBLuGvtmvqFnG8oR9x9Jh7XSi-FlMwsY29w_cJiPRJxE1RwHQ1t4cF0BnzfkMxXAnXcd2SdH5HjWat9AKoBlQX-lnwmActf5gVif6w8BGxjT6Wttpz8yqpKnY5iwTLDqlZza34iNQwRAn8YCAJ2FSYVns96NBUeZRBvcO5idw5wD6CFcUBV0LkH7UTcPMGMfz6JV2AanwHh2QjwI2ziTA1551y0H_HXBTR9c_BEBn34h2Ji0Xao6I-6j22BHOO2EJ0Z3a-ZHfOvn4zCZiVLSlEQb_mfYTIbgyMMMCwx4OvxnUsaviNuwmXYxqyHIzqTDPqXSvHDpLSaOWZhBf9Ofal6roxvZom0yGBdOUQLBTWFJDsTu00yRo5xom89li1_qyDi1H4jPrs6CWcMVXNSxbYqsf9_2PfhJXm0YZGpdOBZwa ">>> RUSH IN ANY AMOUNT TO HELP! <<<")** \- Lexi Team DeSantis \---------------------------Forwarded Message-------------------------
Hi Fellow American, We'll cut to the chase. We have just 6 days before we--
* Prove to the radical Left that we have what it takes to win.

* Shock every person who has bought into the fake narratives of the liberal media throughout this race.

* Take a giant leap forward toward winning for the American people.

With your support, we can make sure that January 15th, 2024 goes down as the most incredible day of our campaign yet. _But we only have 6 DAYS to do it._ We promise you, that we are putting in the work to win the Iowa Caucus. However, we're fighting against $40,000,000 that has been spent against Ron DeSantis. **This is where you come in.** What you can give today is what will drive our actions tomorrow and the final 6 days before ballots are cast.
---
| | [CONTRIBUTE NOW!](http://links.electionsupdates.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ebced9103fcc4317993b5e6709cf6e78&_e=baEjMSOYVv137lkAeKruBLuGvtmvqFnG8oR9x9Jh7XSi-FlMwsY29w_cJiPRJxE1RwHQ1t4cF0BnzfkMxXAnXcd2SdH5HjWat9AKoBlQX-lnwmActf5gVif6w8BGxjT6Wttpz8yqpKnY5iwTLDqlZza34iNQwRAn8YCAJ2FSYVns96NBUeZRBvcO5idw5wD6CFcUBV0LkH7UTcPMGMfz6JV2AanwHh2QjwI2ziTA1551y0H_HXBTR9c_BEBn34h2Ji0Xao6I-6j22BHOO2EJ0Z3a-ZHfOvn4zCZiVLSlEQYZeIJsiamtWUoSl1wy4tf8vQqW0Rj76RR9hJ48WRy2sswmNPF2hDxmdoFwau1KpCzM_vQaUdJc6CvN_II7qMidXyWgmBafARDU1xydvm6CGUhnElCTVrnRHIGByRspCUsfWtm349j2RxToNPz4Zj3L)

We've reached out for your support because WE ARE COUNTING ON YOU to help us take this fight to the finish line. Our 6-DAY SPRINT starts now. Any small amount helps, Fellow American. Please, **___[_give what you can_](http://links.electionsupdates.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ebced9103fcc4317993b5e6709cf6e78&_e=baEjMSOYVv137lkAeKruBLuGvtmvqFnG8oR9x9Jh7XSi-FlMwsY29w_cJiPRJxE1RwHQ1t4cF0BnzfkMxXAnXcd2SdH5HjWat9AKoBlQX-lnwmActf5gVif6w8BGxjT6Wttpz8yqpKnY5iwTLDqlZza34iNQwRAn8YCAJ2FSYVns96NBUeZRBvcO5idw5wD6CFcUBV0LkH7UTcPMGMfz6JV2AanwHh2QjwI2ziTA1551y0H_HXBTR9c_BEBn34h2Ji0Xao6I-6j22BHOO2EJ0Z3a-ZHfOvn4zCZiVLSlEQakYRepkttTtOvD8zwjHDFQQT5jMFSXfOy5GKagCHQdku506LnhBzUSNw-bTWRC55veUEt-9TJsE9_a43htoAnXG7U6W8KCIdzYf55iV70bhWM1rO6uao-Hz3CyVZ2wT20gkOxUIRNv6uQkstjx5AOP)___** __ before we take on the caucus. Thank you for your support,
Team DeSantis

---
| | |
_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [](http://links.electionsupdates.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ebced9103fcc4317993b5e6709cf6e78&_e=baEjMSOYVv137lkAeKruBLuGvtmvqFnG8oR9x9Jh7XSi-FlMwsY29w_cJiPRJxE1RwHQ1t4cF0BnzfkMxXAnXcd2SdH5HjWat9AKoBlQX-lnwmActf5gVif6w8BGxjT6Wttpz8yqpKnY5iwTLDqlZza34iNQwRAn8YCAJ2FSYVns96NBUeZRBvcO5idw5wD6CFcUBV0LkH7UTcPMGMfz6JV2AanwHh2QjwI2ziTA1551y0H_HXBTR9c_BEBn34h2Ji0Xao6I-6j22BHOO2EJ0Z3a-ZHfOvn4zCZiVLSlEQZDlucUoGi5bNqzvqigG4WVMoXxYVOZ6Ohn9GoWnnUKVevES7VUI6AWM_N37JjzC_YsmZE-YIEATwVXOg69m1_v4eEMR6s2H9hdI9UNUU_BHv0Adj-MDozgssKv25pihvo36Fq5GjMtsZaJEirh23oO)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](http://links.electionsupdates.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ebced9103fcc4317993b5e6709cf6e78&_e=baEjMSOYVv137lkAeKruBLuGvtmvqFnG8oR9x9Jh7XSi-FlMwsY29w_cJiPRJxE1RwHQ1t4cF0BnzfkMxXAnXcd2SdH5HjWat9AKoBlQX-lnwmActf5gVif6w8BGxjT6Wttpz8yqpKnY5iwTLDqlZza34iNQwRAn8YCAJ2FSYVns96NBUeZRBvcO5idw5wD6CFcUBV0LkH7UTcPMGMfz6JV2AanwHh2QjwI2ziTA1551y0H_HXBTR9c_BEBn34h2Ji0Xao6I-6j22BHOO2EJ0Z3a-ZHfOvn4zCZiVLSlEQbTOB7i2zILlTyWhY1O_diMyuFNENB8voJCRQlbsbNW719wiWfkxuCplWfdt0hiMc1H_oeSNqYqNPJ4nr_vNU6QL36OHO7NbWq8tABMal6fJEgEs17ferWHdKpQ4pS-JZ1uxGOJTir_Pl1GqQsgjdMY)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

Take a giant leap forward toward winning for the American people. With your support, we can make sure that January 15th, 2024 goes down as the most incredible day of our campaign yet. But we only have 6 DAYS to do it. We promise you, that we are putting in the work to win the Iowa Caucus. However, we're fighting against $40,000,000 that has been spent against Ron DeSantis. This is where you come in. What you can give today is what will drive our actions tomorrow and the final 6 days before ballots are cast. | | We've reached out for your support because WE ARE COUNTING ON YOU to help us take this fight to the finish line. Our 6-DAY SPRINT starts now. Any small amount helps, Fellow American. Please, __ before we take on the caucus. Thank you for your support, Team DeSantis | | | Get to Know Ron DeSantis | | | Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children. | On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. That's why he's running for President of the United States. **TODAY'S HEADLINE**
---
Ron DeSantis called the police on journalist Laura Loomer and Marni Hockenberg, the daughter of Iowa U.S. Senator Chuck Grassley’s Committee and a founding member of the Republican Jewish Coalition and Iowans Supporting Israel. DeSantis called the police on Loomer and Hockenberg because they attended his Ankeny, Iowa, event. Hockenberg will be caucusing for President Trump. Nikki Haley also called the police on Loomer over the weekend. Calling the police on journalists and activists to remove them from events is a tactic straight out of the DNC playbook.

**_BREAKING NEWS:_ The Supreme Court heard a case that could END Social Security! **
Friend, Republicans have spent years scheming to destroy Social Security. **And now, Trump's far-right majority on the Supreme Court could be preparing to OVERTURN this critical legislation.**
Over the past 88 years, Social Security has helped hundreds of millions of Americans pay their bills and retire with dignity. Today, 67 million people receive benefits — _that's 1 in every 5 Americans!_
Social Security is, without a doubt, one of the most important — and popular — pieces of legislation ever passed. **But now, the future of this vital program rests in the hands of far-right radicals on the Supreme Court. **
These extremists have already made it clear that they have no respect for precedent or the will of the American people. We cannot sit on the sidelines and watch as they strip away our benefits.**We have to make our voices heard NOW. Please, respond before 11:59 p.m. tonight to tell us:**

NEW EPISODE!
[| The Insidious Truth about January 6th with Brandon StrakaThe Kathy Barnette Show55:58
---|---](https://substack.com/redirect/9586419b-bf9d-4d0a-a900-119d59a3b218?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Dear Friends,
Kathy Barnette is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9rYXRoeWJhcm5ldHRlLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.Ozuq8fj8rkzDGOWBy-V4n54S8yQOfV-WEeMhb611nc0?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=140394448)
Entrapment Day came and went with very little acknowledgment. Yes, there were some tweets and memes. But real people, with real lives and who are Americans will never experience life the same after one of the darkest days in the history of our great Republic... according to Democrats. This has been the story, for the past three years, rammed down our throats by the UniParty and the complicit media. Who can forget when Kamala Harris shamelessly compared January 6th to 9/11 and Pearl Harbor??
Why was so much effort put into making us *buy* this story? Could it be there was something they tried to hide? Could it be there was an *insidious plot* that they wanted to bury under a never-ending flow of distorted information and images?
This week, to counter the narrative that will be pushed, I am releasing a conversation with Brandon Straka, an America First Patriot whose life was turned upside down simply for being on the US Capitol grounds on January 6, 2021.
Brandon Straka used to be a Democrat. Formerly a hairstylist in New York, Brandon is the founder of the #WalkAway campaign, one of the largest Conservative Grassroots Movements in America, designed to encourage liberals to leave the Democratic Party ahead of the 2018 midterms.
During this conversation, we went through Brandon's political transition and his inspiration in founding the #WalkAway campaign.
We also covered Brandon's legal trouble and *TRIUMPH* on charges filed against him because of his presence on Capitol grounds. We went into the detail of his cases and discussed the political persecution through prosecution that so many Americans are victims of.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/a1705178-01b6-4aef-b9f8-0e8cb18b8460?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
We tried to discern the forces guiding these prosecutions, including the many lawsuits filed by Soros-funded DC nonprofit law firm, and the goal behind those prosecutions.
Brandon is a fighter, he put his future on the line, both in terms of exposure and legal expenditures, because he REFUSED to be INTIMIDATED into silence. Those who sit high and look low want you to shut up and sit down. Don't let them win.
How about, as a start, we rename "Jan 6." I like "Entrapment Day" better. Let me know your suggestions.
Happy Entrapment Day, y'all.
Blessings,

Who can forget when Kamala Harris shamelessly compared January 6th to 9/11 and Pearl Harbor?? Why was so much effort put into making us buy this story? Could it be there was something they tried to hide? Could it be there was an insidious plot that they wanted to bury under a never-ending flow of distorted information and images? This week, to counter the narrative that will be pushed, I am releasing a conversation with Brandon Straka, an America First Patriot whose life was turned upside down simply for being on the US Capitol grounds on January 6, 2021. Brandon Straka used to be a Democrat. Formerly a hairstylist in New York, Brandon is the founder of the #WalkAway campaign, one of the largest Conservative Grassroots Movements in America, designed to encourage liberals to leave the Democratic Party ahead of the 2018 midterms. During this conversation, we went through Brandon's political transition and his inspiration in founding the #WalkAway campaign. We also covered Brandon's legal trouble and TRIUMPH on charges filed against him because of his presence on Capitol grounds. We went into the detail of his cases and discussed the political persecution through prosecution that so many Americans are victims of. We tried to discern the forces guiding these prosecutions, including the many lawsuits filed by Soros-funded DC nonprofit law firm, and the goal behind those prosecutions. Brandon is a fighter, he put his future on the line, both in terms of exposure and legal expenditures, because he REFUSED to be INTIMIDATED into silence. Those who sit high and look low want you to shut up and sit down. Don't let them win. How about, as a start, we rename "Jan 6." I like "Entrapment Day" better. Let me know your suggestions. Happy Entrapment Day, y'all. Blessings, Kathy Barnette is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. | | | | | | | (C) 2024 Kathy Barnette Be Better America, P.O. Box 659, Huntingdon Valley, PA 19006 ? ?

We’ve identified CA-9 as a seat we can **flip from blue to red** and grow our majority, and Kevin Lincoln is the conservative who can get that done.

Thank you,

_**Mike Johnson**_
Speaker of the House

| **Meet Kevin Lincoln
**
My name is Kevin Lincoln, and my story, is the Valley’s story. I am a 3rd generation Stocktonian, raising a 4th generation in the city I love. I’m the grandson of Mexican immigrants, and my stepfather is an Army veteran.

Like many Stocktonians, my family has overcome economic setbacks. My own father struggled to survive on these streets, and was at one time, homeless. But I never let adversity define me. I joined the Marines and served in the White House Military Office, assigned to Marine One. I graduated college while working full-time and raising a family. I’ve worked in corporate America and served our community as a pastor, and as a non-profit leader.

I’m blessed with a beautiful wife, Bonnie, and two amazing children. I’ve lived a life of service, but the greatest honor of my life has been giving back to my community, through serving as Mayor of my hometown, Stockton.

Team, Janelle’s track record speaks for itself. She’s defeated Lori Chavez-DeRemer not once, but twice. And now, she’s ready to do it a third time.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76787755/448489261/476240478?amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2024.01.09_b1_tb_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODI0Y2RhZTItNTFhZi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2t1A987px8sG2ZMV17h4Ztkc0RXr-D8M7UDpLh39NWM=) **Team, Janelle’s track record speaks for itself.** She’s defeated Lori Chavez-DeRemer not once, but _twice_. And now, **she’s ready to do it a third time**. **Janelle isn’t just a winner at the polls: Just take a look at the rest of her track record.** Throughout her time in the Oregon Legislature, Janelle has fought to:
* Defend reproductive freedom
* Safeguard our civil rights
* Expand affordable housing
* Lower the cost of healthcare and prescription drugs
* Create pathways to success for the next generation so everyone has a fair shot

Our community deserves a Representative who puts them first and delivers results. **Janelle is ready to get to work and deliver for Oregon’s working families in Congress on day one, just like she’s done in the State Legislature.** **[When you give to our campaign, you’re investing in a proven winner who fights for Oregon and with your help, Janelle will take that fight to Congress. Oregon's 5th District is one of the most competitive – and most flippable – seats in the country. Janelle has what it takes to win, but she can't do it without you. name: =?utf-8?Q?Jared=20Lovelace?=
subject: March 5th is MAGA Critical
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texas for Jared Lovelace
body:
How your 20-year Congressman is hindering America First. | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/c8e3d5c964e5/march-5th-is-maga-critical?e=d03ae83678)
---
|
---
[](https://jared2024.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=24ab0ae566056870479dadd16&id=c3592e8fa8&e=d03ae83678)
|
---
## Our Career Congressman needs to go.
Howdy Peter,

Here’s why:
1. After 20 years in office, **illegal immigration** is out of control.
2. After 20 years in office, **federal spending** is out of control.
3. After 20 years in office, the **national debt** is out of control.
4. After 20 years in office, **you have probably never spoken to him**.

That’s why the primary is so critically important for this moment in America’s history. We must challenge the establishment within our own party. We must put the right people in office at the right time. We must avoid fitting into the oft-quoted definition of **“insanity” - Doing the same thing repeatedly expecting different results.**
He doesn’t stand up for individual liberty, fiscal accountability, and limited federal power because**he likes the status quo.** It’s what got him his chairmanship.
It’s time for change. We need more people who**respect the U.S. Constitution and YOUR TAXDOLLARS.**
I’m running for Congress to SERVE YOU. I’m not afraid to make bold promises and keep myself accountable to them. Here they are:
1. **I will not seek re-election after 4 terms as your representative.**
2. **I will post a public explanation for every vote that I cast.**
3. **When you come to visit me, YOU sit in the big chair behind the oak desk, not me.**
4. **I will not vote for any bill that regulates the 2nd Amendment.**
5. **I will only vote for federal budgets that reduce the deficit from the previous year by at least 10%.**
6. **I will not vote for any budget CR.**
7. **I will only vote for federal budgets that prioritize border security.**
8. **I will hold public town halls in every county every year.**

God Bless America!
Jared Lovelace
|
---

name: Biden-Harris Update
subject: $25, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
This grassroots movement is made up of folks like you who believe in this fight and chip in what they can, when they can. | | |
---
**$25, Peter.** That’s how much we’re asking you to donate to help reelect Joe and Kamala and keep Donald Trump (or any other MAGA Republican) out of the White House. [**If you’re with us, will you chip in your first $25 today?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yEOQgSlkg29MQMFLkzVkhZEd6HzJiSlCo2cOeIST-sD6k6SNxMammXzV9jJkqu67qioqEC-9vVV7up1-TEWBjuv29bhONKEhuYzbgE4jDlvbmlA7Bl8ElFk55zKRQOiedBMOIa0FI7iMQ9esurIPGR8xajbdbvCBItedvYjxIzhLrQcUPZyH0Ub3S2ZwcBHZcGkHUM4X2IBmaJFIugqug3i0Cme6XvorBawmJiJg50J1zLykWd7AGYjHmVAq8V-jXNrbfLftb85JVCoKGHpr0EgVZXgxqrVjItgF30_QRRIbQ13hu0s-9mofdejOOGr41hKzxzdF-Iu7zqzIByET2FxX1bamttiUoDmiSSh-3sSFAK0DonYW9Ij7tMhMF1qUmHwWWmgpFpQs8qCKfkSo9xkH34ZPxriGcym5dw-BtAyVdNYqH5ShfiZvZixk16vUuKDsa4Eo4-wNlUh5UGPoR5CbQymELnWKKVPPX_jLOKmoKwAeO7youuEmEKDTc_DiC0cCwCFw_7ChzzfyahebiEMnLvcKw6JDrCytzUDgdJ1PpNeWcaQDmPE5yMF8B4a3UQnvQJ0DkSHPBChqzy1ob-rXcisR5IoPuyPT7KEUIgHQ_-RF4xmst-z0LLV8yjWIt8g_hUS0RulRZ8b9iQiqqhQLy_SOrLUY_UrbSunUHOOvEDfAMLhdZCU-6hQRhlo3yiYZ96bru4rAxr-7mtybdi-1s93zIcdqNETIzT5GCAUg9-ZME-qSZMY4XE0362BgOoiVg-75ASaBjl0kdJx18fWZnJEHFvkx4-l3DZjiHfuzkJMELeiXcWSdIufIdREJ9Cho0RTfrqfrCcCEQtpoRROY9muRzgimt7oxKiYqiXwRCHvFNQFg8BMqxtWWV3KvZbp5yRJVHQwZ35ZHBkHhBDcSomlokzAbK3DSj0BWzd1bsn6e_O0_b4secXn90ml3k/42v/ubCkdwXBRFuNPe4giHW_Yg/h0/L0nxHwdamiS5Bti6xAhnX0RLwTqzG8W_vg-XWpFz8-Y) We know that might not seem like much when you think about the number of ads we’ll have to run, voters we’ll have to mobilize, and states we’ll have to invest in to spread Joe and Kamala’s message of progress. But that's the power of this grassroots movement -- it's made up of folks like you who believe in this fight and chip in what they can, when they can. This movement is how we're going to defy the pundits who doubt us, win in battlegrounds around the country, and secure another four years in the White House. **But here's the problem: We just launched new TV ads to reach as many voters as possible with our message, and we’re falling a bit short of what we need to keep them on the air.** If everyone reading this email chipped in $25, we could get back on track before the end of the day. But not everyone will, so we’re hoping we can count on you, Peter. clean_body: This grassroots movement is made up of folks like you who believe in this fight and chip in what they can, when they can. | | | $25, Peter. That’s how much we’re asking you to donate to help reelect Joe and Kamala and keep Donald Trump (or any other MAGA Republican) out of the White House. We know that might not seem like much when you think about the number of ads we’ll have to run, voters we’ll have to mobilize, and states we’ll have to invest in to spread Joe and Kamala’s message of progress. But that's the power of this grassroots movement -- it's made up of folks like you who believe in this fight and chip in what they can, when they can. This movement is how we're going to defy the pundits who doubt us, win in battlegrounds around the country, and secure another four years in the White House. But here's the problem: We just launched new TV ads to reach as many voters as possible with our message, and we’re falling a bit short of what we need to keep them on the air. If everyone reading this email chipped in $25, we could get back on track before the end of the day. But not everyone will, so we’re hoping we can count on you, Peter. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thank you for all you do for this team, Team Biden-Harris

body:
Time for Republicans to buck up and boot Biden off the ballot | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/billeigel/joe-biden-is-allowing-our-country-to-be-invaded?e=c00a6982d2)
---
| |
---
| [Support Bill Eigel](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=27bd810003&e=c00a6982d2 "Support Bill Eigel")
---
| [ ](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=fcc5e9fd8c&e=c00a6982d2)
---
| | **Bill Eigel Files Bill to Disqualify Joe Biden from the Ballot in Missouri**
* * *
**In the wake of formal efforts in 34 states to remove President Donald J. Trump from the ballot, I announced last week that I would be filing [SB 1307](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=6c66b563ce&e=c00a6982d2) to disqualify Joe Biden from the ballot in Missouri.**
**By the Democrats’ own standard, Joe Biden should be immediately disqualified and removed from the ballot for the "aid and comfort" he has given our enemies. Our country is being invaded because Joe Biden has swung our southern border wide open. President Biden has allowed more than 8 million people to stroll across our border illegally, causing more harm to this country than any other president in American history.

My legislation exposes the absolute absurdity of Colorado and Maine’s decisions to remove President Donald J. Trump from the ballot. If radical leftists continue to push lies and fairytales in an attempt to kick Trump off the ballot in their states, Republicans have no choice but to buck up and fight back — use the facts to remove Biden from the ballot before he destroys this country even further. Democrats only believe in democracy when it favors them - let’s expose their double standard hypocrisy. We must stand our ground to protect the security of our nation and the sovereignty of our people.**
**I am the only Missouri gubernatorial candidate to endorse President Trump in his 2024 re-election bid. **
---
| [ ](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=7f017b7e18&e=c00a6982d2)

Grassroots supporters just like you are the key to our success in November. My success has always been powered by Oregon, now I need it to be powered by supporters like YOU! Thank you, Lori Chavez-DeRemer Congresswoman OR-05 | | | | | | | | | Even as a Congresswoman, Lori’s most important title is mom. That’s how she knows the issues your family faces, and that’s why she fights everyday to make life better for every Oregon family, and every American. Aside from that, all you need to know are the issues she’s fighting for in Congress: If that sounds like the kind of agenda you can get behind, If you’d prefer to give by check, please use the below address: Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Congress 13203 SE 172nd Ave Suite 166 #399 Happy Valley, OR 97086 Forward This message to FIVE FRIENDS AND FAMILY to spread the word on how to achieve a better future for Oregon and America → ** Also text “LORI” to 71800 or click here to receive all of Lori’s messages | | | | Lori Chavez-DeRemer (Personal) 13203 SE 172nd Ave, Suite 166 #399, Happy Valley, OR 97086 = \- ==

Fellow Conservative,

THIS IS BIG NEWS.

In a MAJOR turn of events, the Cook Political Report has shifted its rating of the 2024 Montana Senate race from [**“LEAN DEMOCRAT”**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=3683499f76174180810e8dc3a12fc75b&_e=bmMYeCaOSCJKzZh6FHCOPR1vMmeK3Y4bo2Nwz02662P2gK03ihOLnYlNrVq_ujcis69kFNdzzBRtngwM-fpXEKwgTT_9ykC1ig68NEtFQDc_OvvOc5nK4nk46bRqnGMEnyyVPsgpKQk9GCldE0MNx-X9-g9GPd4buYBBxHCkSQnGe-looh1wDNK_xLJHaCmPZrEdd69Ro_MiJGglWJCGhkhmwukyj8iTUZEZpsH8-QOfSRgiNEJdflwCStMRpvNFCZ5dvtqiFkWlnXumuOecL3vGDcqnyTFiJVYdWp48cQjx0EUw-xE1a3c5ePPPa2Tly_Rmg-o1jXQoZkiH-6i-ra82CJrzzaB9H9jApDc4l4xDltdo8vYI0uFnn146qzrkA3yPLa9vqfTQ1iPM1Joelg%3D%3D) to [**“TOSS UP.”**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=3683499f76174180810e8dc3a12fc75b&_e=bmMYeCaOSCJKzZh6FHCOPR1vMmeK3Y4bo2Nwz02662P2gK03ihOLnYlNrVq_ujcis69kFNdzzBRtngwM-fpXEKwgTT_9ykC1ig68NEtFQDc_OvvOc5nK4nk46bRqnGMEnyyVPsgpKQk9GCldE0MNx-X9-g9GPd4buYBBxHCkSQnGe-looh1wDNK_xLJHaCmPZrEdd69Ro_MiJGglWJCGhkhmwukyj8iTUZEZpsH8-QOfSRgiNEJdflwCStMRpvNFUbAxe9AZ8i9zDg_72g8J5jc5VED64D_N30reZWMpBav4VWrSwJAa1SH58gUrUcNn6ajDbd6JdaCRG_HCWsMTY4Tm4oDmJX2hdtiyThXYaia_ORFrNg1oRyg1n3LqQZizdt6iK_lvHX16CgHjc0J9OQ%3D%3D) This means the Liberal establishment in Washington, DC is PANICKING.

Fellow Conservative, Montana represents **[one of the best pickup opportunities](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=3683499f76174180810e8dc3a12fc75b&_e=bmMYeCaOSCJKzZh6FHCOPR1vMmeK3Y4bo2Nwz02662P2gK03ihOLnYlNrVq_ujcis69kFNdzzBRtngwM-fpXEKwgTT_9ykC1ig68NEtFQDc_OvvOc5nK4nk46bRqnGMEnyyVPsgpKQk9GCldE0MNx-X9-g9GPd4buYBBxHCkSQnGe-looh1wDNK_xLJHaCmPZrEdd69Ro_MiJGglWJCGhkhmwukyj8iTUZEZpsH8-QOfSRgiNEJdflwCStMRpvNFUg1tAzyrJL2WdBf5oBviCWctezbg07b8pckBtPFXE69s5rmFdAirfMK_fX4sdYXTjGoUU-mDkntzRIqrqkyvouMfZLxArDgw0jQw3kSzU2pdr4wpWzOH80msKPnXrVEKb9MxoBKTvrSqJaqyf_7AxQ%3D%3D)** for Republicans this election cycle. If the GOP wins this race, conservatives are _**practically GUARANTEED**_ to take back the Senate Majority.

But it gets even better. Our Party has the _**PERFECT CANDIDATE**_ running to take down Liberal Democrat Jon Tester: _**Former Navy SEAL and American patriot Tim Sheehy.**_

name: Kristan Hawkins, Students for Life Action
subject: who’s your pick?
body:
Dear Pro-Life Friend,

With the 2024 elections creeping up around the corner, it’s important we have a pro-life champion in the White House who will speak up for the preborn.

**[Will you click here to take _Students for Life Action’s_ 2024 Presidential Supporter Straw Poll immediately](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sikhkhk-duchtdja-y/)?**

With the Abortion Lobby going all in to support President Biden, 2024 may be the most important year for the pro-life movement in my lifetime.

So please, **[click here](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sikhkhk-duchtdja-j/)** to tell us who has your support for President in 2024!

For Life,

Kristan Hawkins
President, _Students for Life Action_

Any donations raised above or short of the goal will be used in the next area of greatest need towards our mission, as determined by the organization.

name: Deandra
subject: re: There will be another January 6th
body:
If we can’t defeat MAGA this election, myself, and many experts far more knowledgeable than I fear it will be our last. | Friend, I'm making sure you saw the message that Ike sent out this past weekend on the anniversary of the January 6th attack on the Capitol. Lauren Boebert played a key role in the attack three years ago and the message that Ike wrote describes **why _another January 6th is coming_ (this time it could be successful) unless we take decisive action in 2024. ** Sorry to message you about such a dark topic but it's important that you read what Ike has to say. [You can support our campaign to defeat Lauren Boebert by making a donation of whatever you can spare here.](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w89kKB5u2yVtf13KRofeKJjIGcUUFIb47bCH1kRoaQtyefmNeP23WWADwReH7foIf2iqpnT60iwLY3oekZZGGkCxgJqA5IPkpDAGvZg9_rkhP6b9EVIfYL0JFfsBVjykWK2-5lAOWqLLlJaLwByqMZvSP21XMRSVZiAxQ8UY4ClkbGfF3DeH_ZgY0rr-4EjxLPVadtXdcrpd1hiK8qcr5bdc6EUtg6Y6uGMMaWs0H5zJI6tu7mp3S7ihKUvhyIkkhQBP4ZYrLxiPldV0ppU6pDo-6b9YquFzKx5Frj40e2cdhUHarGum8A6r_Okw2pA7XLlq6oRpi2BgJaFJg7-yOs/42v/jGpgPPD7R96mNCHx9ZKDAQ/h0/kXxOibLzO11pSdrF15pXl1dmYcElVpmDFrixFh6aH04) Scroll down and check out the email I am forwarding from Ike. Deandra Finance Director \---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Ike McCorkle**
Date: Sat, Jan 6, 2024
Subject: There will be another Jan 6th
---
| [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w89kKB5u2yVtf13KRofeKJjIGcUUFIb47bCH1kRoaQtyefmNeP23WWADwReH7foIcZBlmHiQUb62A7Xjou2cABe_Ax2GlVh-u2kQ7wRPIQ8TxSifgkK8B6wN1FlbMOF0uXN5B6n1soXCdQsPw7fHnP_ViYpU1GnGqa21KnSvbP-vTpnXDiUiKGRoADGRjRxdU8hfE2CRavzB7lFIHO3nP06JLxvY5F92z6RPZ-eO6pu1jQCZnA8b2n4ufncvsiqvircY0Hk71KFKgqVmJg4rYmF3kXapuyrmQnxnwFBXSutbIduP3xarPE4VLoHkhOpFjKviOfMlMGXK7t04Duhbjv/42v/jGpgPPD7R96mNCHx9ZKDAQ/h1/tXAEX4vb9tRPGcH7VEPyVBaea6aBmfyiYTydm-oqpuk)
---
Friend, Today marks three years since the attack on our Capitol on January 6th, 2021. A dark day, but an important reminder of the fragility of our democracy. I remember what I was doing on that day three years ago. I was doing work on finishing my basement and hadn’t even been checking my phone. When I took a break and turned on the news my _heart sank_. Watching the videos playing I could tell that many of the rioters storming and infiltrating the capitol were using tactics eerily reminiscent of those that I had learned in the military. **What I was watching was not just a riot, but a carefully planned operation executed by operators with advanced training.**
---
| [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w89kKB5u2yVtf13KRofeKJjIGcUUFIb47bCH1kRoaQtyefmNeP23WWADwReH7foIfQXBHPgG8d0pSm5aFlD-rYVzTXSGJi69GzLl1hybMn5FyX1T01w7MOqJRErfuGc0s8yCeB7apYBx-usqG10yL3ELfKh-dLeaeHGIo_PKlryEkIxX7xDsIDnLUNLUJFBMANpoa3349WYTNOi06Vn_y7maG7JHWYIzR_GpY8zMGIC3LpV1dB18fM9Qp2m6Zffs0tL1_tEUuMnyFY3yN2rjekgFs7H3epwir2LhWx4_uLow83pn7E7BKwJI30OBICrafhN-vpLL_sKjLdxP1q0wll/42v/jGpgPPD7R96mNCHx9ZKDAQ/h2/T2yViJ19a6HKL-yyXoRxq-KVzbo3fjnGnDKxEt-0xOE)
---
_Don’t let the Q-Anon shaman’s from that day fool you. Many of the individuals on the ground that day were organized, armed, well trained, and extremely dangerous._
---
I was sick to my stomach with a feeling that our democracy might be falling apart before my very eyes. On the day after 9/11, I volunteered to return to active duty in the US Marines. _On January 6th and the days following I remember a similar feeling in my heart that I had to do something._
The previous year I had just finished up my first Congressional Campaign. It was a long race in which **my family and I received death threats and my home was vandalized by partisan extremists similar to those that stormed the capitol**. When we finished after election day I was ready to take a long and much needed break from campaign life. Yet, when I saw the videos of the police officer being killed, of masked men kitted out in military gear climbing up the Capitol terraces, and brave capitol police holding the line, I knew that now was not the time to stand idly by. I relaunched my 2022 campaign that same week and have been going at it non-stop to flip this seat ever since. The force driving me was not what I witnessed that day but the constant reminder that **there will be another January 6th unless we take decisive action to stop it.** My opponent Lauren Boebert was one of the _key planners and instigators of the January 6th attack_. She went so far as to give reconnaissance tours of the Capitol to the men and women who would storm it days later, helping them to identify weak points in the building's security. Preventing the next January 6th means removing its instigators and planners at every level. It will be a national effort from the presidency down to local and state governments and helping me remove Lauren Boebert is a key component of this effort. **If Boebert remains in office come January, 2025, I assure you that she has vengeance on her mind and will work to ensure Trump’s return to power regardless of who wins the election.****

**[ Can you support my campaign with a donation of $25, $50, $100, or whatever you can spare to help us remove Lauren Boebert and the next January 6th? If we can’t defeat MAGA this election, myself, and many experts far more knowledgeable than I fear it will be our last.](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w89kKB5u2yVtf13KRofeKJjIGcUUFIb47bCH1kRoaQtyefmNeP23WWADwReH7foIdcK4wEOMxAHSLTaGeRx4WHD8dMMwQiZy-Pr6stsHkFh-eKrDBxVrzm5Os87Th6O20fOBYSzq5lqTaRJsXFl0UWhEU1hBeYjRWlfhS2yH3FNW7ELa-oYVwfap6FklQKpt0JRyYBm28VYgwR3CAsKWM1U98eUbWZXtMmhQsVB-sxRH0zpwIYiHWo_KxgMLIUwGW0Hcz6j2G5-ebyUjiqk12TMlWx3JNAjFSrYLjylnTUF8SimA_S5jQkMQ6y93QUJDnO6J-bsfxm80QPzgkAzGeE/42v/jGpgPPD7R96mNCHx9ZKDAQ/h3/UWD00exwLeXiDUijda-lGjktwfvq4bpcfMZh4oYz63c)

clean_body: If we can’t defeat MAGA this election, myself, and many experts far more knowledgeable than I fear it will be our last. | Friend, I'm making sure you saw the message that Ike sent out this past weekend on the anniversary of the January 6th attack on the Capitol. Lauren Boebert played a key role in the attack three years ago and the message that Ike wrote describes why another January 6th is coming (this time it could be successful) unless we take decisive action in 2024. Sorry to message you about such a dark topic but it's important that you read what Ike has to say. Scroll down and check out the email I am forwarding from Ike. Deandra Finance Director \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Ike McCorkle Date: Sat, Jan 6, 2024 Subject: There will be another Jan 6th | Friend, Today marks three years since the attack on our Capitol on January 6th, 2021. A dark day, but an important reminder of the fragility of our democracy. I remember what I was doing on that day three years ago. I was doing work on finishing my basement and hadn’t even been checking my phone. When I took a break and turned on the news my heart sank. Watching the videos playing I could tell that many of the rioters storming and infiltrating the capitol were using tactics eerily reminiscent of those that I had learned in the military. What I was watching was not just a riot, but a carefully planned operation executed by operators with advanced training. | Don’t let the Q-Anon shaman’s from that day fool you. Many of the individuals on the ground that day were organized, armed, well trained, and extremely dangerous. I was sick to my stomach with a feeling that our democracy might be falling apart before my very eyes. On the day after 9/11, I volunteered to return to active duty in the US Marines. On January 6th and the days following I remember a similar feeling in my heart that I had to do something. The previous year I had just finished up my first Congressional Campaign. It was a long race in which my family and I received death threats and my home was vandalized by partisan extremists similar to those that stormed the capitol. When we finished after election day I was ready to take a long and much needed break from campaign life. Yet, when I saw the videos of the police officer being killed, of masked men kitted out in military gear climbing up the Capitol terraces, and brave capitol police holding the line, I knew that now was not the time to stand idly by. I relaunched my 2022 campaign that same week and have been going at it non-stop to flip this seat ever since. The force driving me was not what I witnessed that day but the constant reminder that there will be another January 6th unless we take decisive action to stop it. My opponent Lauren Boebert was one of the key planners and instigators of the January 6th attack. She went so far as to give reconnaissance tours of the Capitol to the men and women who would storm it days later, helping them to identify weak points in the building's security. Preventing the next January 6th means removing its instigators and planners at every level. It will be a national effort from the presidency down to local and state governments and helping me remove Lauren Boebert is a key component of this effort. If Boebert remains in office come January, 2025, I assure you that she has vengeance on her mind and will work to ensure Trump’s return to power regardless of who wins the election. I look forward to working alongside you in this last-ditch effort to save our democracy. Yours in the fight, Isaac "Ike" McCorkle US Marine Corps, Retired Democrat for CO-04 | | Our mailing address is: Ike McCorkle for Congress , | | Sent via . name: Katie Porter
subject: Six step plan to shake up the system
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
You’ve got to have a plan!
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=36204%2E3422442%2E6vLRab)
Derek, I’m running for the U.S. Senate to shake up our system through real, substantive legislation. I’ve outlined my plan below, but if we’re going to make it happen, the first step is winning our March election. **[Can you chip in $5 today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240109-2?refcode=em20240109-36204&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36204_3422442_6vLRab&akid=36204%2E3422442%2E6vLRab)**
1. **Ban Federal Lobbyist Contributions:** Right now I’m one of just 11 (out of 435) Members of the House who reject federal lobbyist money. For every industry and company who makes your life more difficult, price gouges you, or stands in the way of real progress—you can bet they have an army of lobbyists to do their bidding.
2. **Ban Corporate PAC Donations:** This is simple. How can Congress oversee corporations if they’re funding our campaigns?
3. **Eliminate Pet-project Funding for Politicians, also known as Earmarks:** Earmarks are a way of politicians directly giving funding to a certain project or entity. They were banned under President Obama because they consistently lead to waste and fraud. Earmarks also tend to benefit whiter, wealthier, more conservative areas rather than communities that could most benefit from federal funding. When Congress brought back earmarks in 2021, I was the only Democrat to oppose them.
4. **Ban Congressional Stocks Trading:** Right now, loopholes allow Members of Congress to trade stock based on information we learn in private briefings. I’ve already introduced the STOCK ACT 2.0, which would create an enforceable and effective ban on these trades.
5. **Abolish the Filibuster and Ban Singular Holds on Nominations:** The filibuster stands in the way of so many real reforms—including codifying the right to an abortion. And we should change the rules so that a single Senator doesn’t have the power to hold up important military promotions for political gain (looking at you, Alabama Sen. Tuberville)
6. **Increase Transparency:** I publicly release a list of every single official meeting I take. Every Congressperson should do the same.

Derek, it’s time to shake up the system. But there’s no way I can do this without your support. **[Every dollar adds up and sends a powerful message to Washington.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240109-2?refcode=em20240109-36204&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36204_3422442_6vLRab&akid=36204%2E3422442%2E6vLRab)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240109-2?refcode=em20240109-36204&refcode2=36204_3422442_6vLRab&akid=36204%2E3422442%2E6vLRab)
Thanks for being a part of it!
Katie

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=em&t=2&refcode2=36204_3422442_6vLRab&akid=36204%2E3422442%2E6vLRab)**
---

* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=36204%2E3422442%2E6vLRab)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=36204%2E3422442%2E6vLRab)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)

name: Zach
subject: I didn’t grow up as a Jew or Arab
body:
| |
---
| [View in browser](https://gvxllm.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjc1ODc0OSxcImxcIjoxMDk5NTE4NDMwMjg2OTg2OTAsXCJyXCI6MTA5OTUxODkwNzgzOTk1NDg1fSIsInMiOiIzZjliMzM0ZjI2MzBiMjdkIn0)
| | | [ ](https://gvxllm.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjc1ODc0OSxcImxcIjoxMDk5NTE4NDMwMzI4OTI5OTUsXCJyXCI6MTA5OTUxODkwNzgzOTk1NDg1fSIsInMiOiJkNGZkYjEzZWFjYmFjOGQwIn0)
---
|
---
Dear ,

Hear me out. I need to share this with you.

I did not grow up in an environment where conversations about Israel and Palestine were commonplace. We were a working-class family in a small community, and foreign policy issues were not frequently discussed. We were neither Jews nor Arabs. My family has been in West Virginia for centuries, and our world was insulated. I didn't have access to the kind of liberal arts education where history is examined from different perspectives. In the Marines, my training did not include a deep dive into the events that led to Nakba in 1948, which, by the way, means "the catastrophe" in Arabic.

I am from the same cloth as most Americans; I am a working West Virginian.

**As a future U.S. Senator, I'm dedicated to deepening my knowledge and understanding of current events' historical and legal context because the responsibility to and the influence this country has over millions of people in faraway lands is enormous. I don't take this power lightly.

** Our media industry often sensationalizes terms like war, self-defense, and human shields to mold public opinion toward the monied interests of their advertisers and influential stakeholders and the system that allows them to rake in incredible profit at the expense of truth and balanced reporting. As I broaden my context, I'm learning what these terms mean under the International Human Rights Law that we as a country claim to support and yet so rarely honor.

* The term "war" is used intentionally to create the impression that what is going on between Israel and Palestinians is a conflict between two autonomous states. That cannot be further from the truth, as Israel is the occupier, and Hamas is the governing body of the occupied territory but not a sovereign government.
* Israel has obligations under international law to provide services and ensure the safety of its occupied population. On October 7th, when Hamas attacked, they had the right to use police powers to apprehend the criminals and prosecute them but not to use their massive military might against an essentially defenseless people. We cannot use the "right to defense" language describing Israel's revenge that has so far killed approximately 23,000 Palestinians, two-thirds of whom are women and children.
* In the context of international law, using human shields means actually putting a civilian in front of a military vehicle or combatants while advancing on the enemy. It doesn't mean having combatants living or even operating in the areas civilians occupy. Using human shields is a war crime. Israel uses the human shield argument to justify their illegal, immoral, massive-scale attacks on civilians and civilian infrastructure. Israel wants to drive the Palestinians out of Gaza.

If you want a U.S. Senator who takes seriously the treaties we as a country signed, stands firmly on the side of human rights for everyone everywhere, and responsibly yields the power vested in his office, **[support our campaign today generously.](https://gvxllm.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjc1ODc0OSxcImxcIjoxMDk5NTE4NDMwMzcwODczMDAsXCJyXCI6MTA5OTUxODkwNzgzOTk1NDg1fSIsInMiOiJmMWVjNjJlZDIyNjA1MGE1In0)
[
](https://gvxllm.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjc1ODc0OSxcImxcIjoxMDk5NTE4NDMwNDEyODE2MDYsXCJyXCI6MTA5OTUxODkwNzgzOTk1NDg1fSIsInMiOiI5Y2ZmYjVmNjA2NzRhYjUxIn0)**[](https://gvxllm.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjc1ODc0OSxcImxcIjoxMDk5NTE4NDMwNDQ0MjczMzUsXCJyXCI6MTA5OTUxODkwNzgzOTk1NDg1fSIsInMiOiJhZTk3Y2VkNDhlMmNhMjEzIn0)**[I'm the only Democrat running for the U.S. Senate in West Virginia. Your contribution today will add a strong voice for human rights in the Senate and protect it from a MAGA Republican majority.](https://gvxllm.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjc1ODc0OSxcImxcIjoxMDk5NTE4NDMwNDg2MjE2NDAsXCJyXCI6MTA5OTUxODkwNzgzOTk1NDg1fSIsInMiOiIyOTEzNTZiODI4MGNkNWRkIn0)
**
With hopes for peace,

Zach Shrewsbury
Candidate for U.S. Senate (D-WV)

We were a working-class family in a small community, and foreign policy issues were not frequently discussed. We were neither Jews nor Arabs. My family has been in West Virginia for centuries, and our world was insulated. I didn't have access to the kind of liberal arts education where history is examined from different perspectives. In the Marines, my training did not include a deep dive into the events that led to Nakba in 1948, which, by the way, means "the catastrophe" in Arabic. I am from the same cloth as most Americans; I am a working West Virginian. As a future U.S. Senator, I'm dedicated to deepening my knowledge and understanding of current events' historical and legal context because the responsibility to and the influence this country has over millions of people in faraway lands is enormous. I don't take this power lightly. Our media industry often sensationalizes terms like war, self-defense, and human shields to mold public opinion toward the monied interests of their advertisers and influential stakeholders and the system that allows them to rake in incredible profit at the expense of truth and balanced reporting. As I broaden my context, I'm learning what these terms mean under the International Human Rights Law that we as a country claim to support and yet so rarely honor. The term "war" is used intentionally to create the impression that what is going on between Israel and Palestinians is a conflict between two autonomous states. That cannot be further from the truth, as Israel is the occupier, and Hamas is the governing body of the occupied territory but not a sovereign government. Israel has obligations under international law to provide services and ensure the safety of its occupied population. On October 7th, when Hamas attacked, they had the right to use police powers to apprehend the criminals and prosecute them but not to use their massive military might against an essentially defenseless people. We cannot use the "right to defense" language describing Israel's revenge that has so far killed approximately 23,000 Palestinians, two-thirds of whom are women and children. In the context of international law, using human shields means actually putting a civilian in front of a military vehicle or combatants while advancing on the enemy. It doesn't mean having combatants living or even operating in the areas civilians occupy. Using human shields is a war crime. Israel uses the human shield argument to justify their illegal, immoral, massive-scale attacks on civilians and civilian infrastructure. Israel wants to drive the Palestinians out of Gaza. If you want a U.S. Senator who takes seriously the treaties we as a country signed, stands firmly on the side of human rights for everyone everywhere, and responsibly yields the power vested in his office, With hopes for peace, Zach Shrewsbury Candidate for U.S. Senate (D-WV) | | | | | | | Zach Shrewsbury (D-WV) is running for the U.S. Senate seat as the only Democrat in the race. A native West Virginian, a Marine Corps veteran, and a grandson of a coal miner, Zach has a passion for making a difference in his community. He has seen firsthand the struggles faced by working families who are just trying to get by. Zach's military service experiences and his work as a community and climate justice organizer shaped his commitment to fighting for social and economic justice, and he's dedicated his career to making a difference in people's lives. | | | | | | Mail checks to: Shrewsbury for Senate** PO Box 82, Fayetteville West Virginia, United States of America

| | | [ ](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=066c0d208ba0e2b702aa582158081d6961ba341781d8692db921f62f563ddf139c05476e87b29b8c631e3fc644490bef7a8154ad4c3bb0f8)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=066c0d208ba0e2b702aa582158081d6961ba341781d8692db921f62f563ddf139c05476e87b29b8c631e3fc644490bef7a8154ad4c3bb0f8)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---

name: Al Franken
subject: the jerk pissing me off...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdc36114d-3047-49d5-bd69-cd5b06f0997b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, I like to think I’ve got pretty thick skin, but I’m offended. [I’m so fired up that I’m going to ask you right at the top to help kick the jerk who’s pissing me off out of Congress. I’ll explain more below, but will you split a donation between Blue Amp Action and Josh Riley’s campaign right now?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfb50f933-c086-4d72-bf6d-4fa0af69f97a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T29b48dd7-f8b0-4404-8a78-4a0136d0af1e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Marc Molinaro, the MAGA Republican representing NY-19 in Congress, voted TWICE to make Jim Jordan the Speaker of the House. When that didn’t work, he found the one guy even crazier than Jordan to actually give the job to. And if putting an anti-abortion extremist in charge of the House wasn’t bad enough, when confronted about supporting these nutsos, this is what Molinaro said: “[Upstate New Yorkers] don’t give a sh*t who the Speaker of the House is... Most of the people I represent wouldn’t know the Speaker of the House if he backed over them with a pickup truck.” Does he think we’re dumb? [I, for one, do give a sh*t who’s running our government... and I know you do, too. If you’re as pissed off as I am, I hope you’ll split a contribution between Josh Riley and Blue Amp Action today to fire both Marc Molinaro AND Mike Johnson.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3cc98c4d-66b4-4e15-a8ee-6f2bd68a5ab5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [CHIP IN NOW >>>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1e3d5a9c-327e-4df7-abcb-886c2b3ecec4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) It’s clear Molinaro doesn’t think much of the people he represents. But you know who does care a hell of a lot about Upstate New Yorkers? My friend and former Senate counsel, Josh Riley. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1396ccd8-e120-44cb-bfa3-508133bffd5c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
(I swear I’m not actually this short... Josh is just REALLY tall.) Josh grew up in a working-class neighborhood in Endicott, NY. When the local factories closed, Josh saw his community struggle – but he worked to put himself through school and graduated from Harvard Law. In the Senate, Josh and I brought Republicans and Democrats together to actually get stuff done (yes, it really is possible)! The bills we worked on together expanded rights for survivors of domestic abuse and provided new funding for addiction treatment and mental health programs. It wasn’t easy, but Josh got them signed into law. Josh DID learn how to drive on a pickup truck, so maybe Molinaro was right about that. But he’s dead wrong if he thinks we’re too stupid to know or care that he’s voting to screw us over at every turn. [This is one of the most competitive races in the country, and Josh isn’t going to get to Congress without our help. Please join me by splitting a contribution between Josh and Blue Amp Action right now.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6b00f7c6-c0a9-4cf1-ac96-e422fd762bc2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfa2d8bc3-ce22-4185-ad7f-5a5242b4c614/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Thanks, Al
P.S. I mean seriously, isn’t this guy such a jerk? [Give to Josh today!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6fd86cfd-ff09-48e2-a2ba-14f2b62d70d4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter) | [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---

name: (1) Ron DeSantis, me
subject: What are we asking people to fight for?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
There's something seriously deranged about what Joe Biden is doing to our country. I'm taking our fight to the debate stage tonight. This can't wait.
---
| | | | | | | | | | [ ](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=66c5637e619264112ca1ce7935f2237d7810234612d14a75537973d663635e08f319bc438d96dda34bd9f2306b754eb991ee33a9c797161d)
---
Friend, Do you remember when we could be proud of our government and all that it stood for? When we could trust our elected officials and candidates to be transparent with the people they serve? _**We have strayed so far, we have a candidate like Nikki Haley running for President who has broken promise after promise to her supporters and constituents, sold out to the highest bidder, welcomed the Chinese Communist Party to her state, and flip-flopped on so many positions, it's hard to determine where she stands on anything.** _ **I am fighting tonight at the debate --and every day--to restore the freedom and glory that our country used to stand for. **Back then, we could ask young men and women to stand up and fight in our proud Armed Forces, and they would volunteer to do it. _What are we asking these young Americans to fight for now?_ A country full of so much woke indoctrination that children are being told genders aren't real and their dad may be their mom? Being taught to question whether they want to stay in the bodies they were born in?**It's disappointing and outrageous.** I'm not okay with it, friend. I am stepping up on that debate stage tonight to fight against it with everything I've got. If there's one point I'll **never** compromise on, it's the annihilation of sanity in my children's future.**I need your help to fight back.** _By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution:_
---
| | [ONE TAP: $20.24 DONATION](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=66c5637e61926411f44208082b762af18eba6b609fe430e4b683b7fd7b6bd1871f2ea03c90221e09742debdec5c9779515955b818f17e589)
---
_If you've saved payment information with WinRed, your donation will go through automatically._ I've got the winning record--and that's why Nikki Haley and the establishment are so terrified. **THIS DEBATE IS CRITICAL to enacting real, necessary change for everyday Americans,** and we're the team that's going to walk off the stage stronger and more ready to get it done than ever.**We are sending a message, and it won't get delivered without our strongest show of support yet. I need YOU,****friend.**
---
| | | | | [Rush in $20 now](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=66c5637e61926411e7b904191d83b6bb4c4fff3f7a1d7d874bcc7836246a32a9a0cab479208281011a5bb5902136ee10db56f6f9f8cc18d2)
---
| | | [Rush in $50 now](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=66c5637e619264119494118ae53dff9c28e80568a5a05f23ce56d46c8bf5b9aae3a31e7257a3bebf5980acb301a701c31b6da2c4dadb3191)
---
| | | | | [Rush in $100 now](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=66c5637e6192641198a58852bcde9260eb7915830df4cb855de3ac81387a487a4a8e4de8b431788b82479c4687ac7d3c6d2d49f47e718e32)
---
| | | [Rush in $250 now](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=66c5637e61926411e564feb8c5c94ef30d2d3f6f77d28c81be0e556a593a10b8c51bb2937349769a42adce0d6c06c7ca34b0596eb87462c6)
---
You won't hear me make excuses. Not on the stage, not from the Oval Office. We will be presidential. We will win. This is what our country is crying out for. **Please, if you can, help me reach our goal of raising $100,000 in donations before this final GOP debate night before the Iowa Caucus comes to an end, I need your support now.** I'll see you from that stage. Yours in Freedom,
---
| [](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=66c5637e619264112ca1ce7935f2237d7810234612d14a75537973d663635e08f319bc438d96dda34bd9f2306b754eb991ee33a9c797161d)

_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [ ](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=66c5637e619264112ca1ce7935f2237d7810234612d14a75537973d663635e08f319bc438d96dda34bd9f2306b754eb991ee33a9c797161d)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=66c5637e619264112ca1ce7935f2237d7810234612d14a75537973d663635e08f319bc438d96dda34bd9f2306b754eb991ee33a9c797161d)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---
|
---
