name: Bob MacGuffie
subject: The Critical National Issues as We Begin 2024
body:
Campaign Update
---
| | | | | |
---
|
---
| Campaign Update
---
| |
---
| | |
---
January 10, 2024 We've clearly turned the corner and campaigns are now actively in the 2024 election cycle. Since this fall's election will be a referendum on Jim Himes' 16-year rule, I spent much of the past ten months illuminating his hypocrisy and duplicitousness on an endless range of important issues. He is NOT the Moderate he asserts to be. Awakening a Congressional District is no easy task, and that pursuit will only intensify as this year progresses. But, to kick off the year I'll level-set, and enumerate what I believe to be the most pressing and consequential issues for CT-4 and indeed the country, as this year begins: Cut Inflation & Restore the Economy: The culprit has been 15 years of heavy deficit spending and Fed Reserve money printing. Budget expenditures must be downsized to match tax revenues. No more votes for budget deficits and debt.
Secure Our Border: The current Biden-Himes policy is a de-facto wide-open U.S. border. Enforce current immigration and border law. Re-institute every measure from the Trump Administration which was nullified by Biden, and then some. We have no national sovereignty without a secure border.
Support Parents' Rights: Parents must be empowered to reclaim their rightful input on, and approval of their children's school curricula. Also, school personnel must be prevented from recommending any student medical procedures or counseling without parental consent and involvement.
Reclaim Our Energy Independence: Lift restrictions on U.S. energy leasing, permitting, exploration and production. Restart critical pipelines and ANWAR production. Encourage fracking, off-shore drilling, and modern nuclear power.
Crush Crime & Restore Public Safety: Though more pronounced in the cities, criminals are emboldened, and our towns have also seen more incidents of violent crime. Cashless bail should be ended and DAs must enforce all laws.
Offer Hope to Our Cities: Expand school choice and Charter Schools. Help small business flourish through tax and regulation cuts. Enact affordable-housing regulations that actually achieve the goals of the programs. At the border, interdict the fentanyl that is poisoning America's youth.
Pursue America's Interests through a Strong National Defense: Biden's politically-correct policies have weakened our military, undercut national defense and led to wars in Ukraine and the Middle East. End the open-ended Globalism promoted by Biden and Himes, and replace it with an attitude of 'America First.' These and additional issues on which I am running are illuminated in greater detail on my website - I shave no positions. Our nation is in a once-in-a-century financial, cultural and political crisis, and the approaches indicated above will help turn the corner, and lead us to a successful resolution. And these are not exclusively Republican approaches - as the months go on, Americans of all stripes are increasingly rallying to these very solutions. As I have illustrated in prior Updates, Mr. Himes has demonstrated, in fact proven through his voting record, that he stands on the OPPOSITE side of each of these critical issues. The citizens of CT-4 need to be made aware of his voting record, and recognize that Jim Himes does not 'represent' their interests, nor those of our Republic. Recirculate these updates.
The 2024 election will be a referendum on Jim Himes' failed 15-year rule.
Jim Himes is NO Moderate
Solid citizens can donate to retire this man right here: [DONATE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012clwteTyHOm-iZ0VmedN3kM4wgaEwgAGOUddVilmHZ38hhOxBE-8LP2HQtgrTksl-97Lj60wJi5cgozBHdo-ICboO3nsjpncM34isEk8LugqXm15lJASVztU-n-psk6aqnqpWTHu8tyTrYJGKhoxe61I6E7_a1DC0NpS-RRWaqgqKgYCtMLTbvtfb7MQX84-_8MdFY_7qAHY1yLElUVOKIekSIZL6YhN2LQ3K58Q_NY=&c=JcXVKHpunZNm6KDTrGXhYV1nXHQFew-qI2FTVGjw6ctN3eb3jZ_oFw==&ch=NiTtTEwgQ-9iL-kSN3plCvn3XxgKaPTKaGbHjedbGL8tOp7zArG03A==) It's critical for my campaign, and would be deeply appreciated. Please re-circulate this message to any and all who are interested...or should be. Help is on the way,
Bob MacGuffie Candidate for Congress [www.BobMacforCongress.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0012clwteTyHOm-iZ0VmedN3kM4wgaEwgAGOUddVilmHZ38hhOxBE-8LH2zcJNAN6qBZ5k6hvA2XDOo2wBnDJEGLKzzYOF0YQHs_bTySU__h2KolhyAtBZvIH8C7_DCpYuxpJsuJ4RUP4mLGDx5m_MqIEc53HMMwUIz&c=JcXVKHpunZNm6KDTrGXhYV1nXHQFew-qI2FTVGjw6ctN3eb3jZ_oFw==&ch=NiTtTEwgQ-9iL-kSN3plCvn3XxgKaPTKaGbHjedbGL8tOp7zArG03A==)

body:
A co-defendant in Donald Trump’s Georgia case accused District Attorney Fani Willis of hiring an alleged romantic partner to prosecute Trump and benefitting financially from that relationship, according to a new court filing.

| | | [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJydjrGOwjAQRL8m7ojWXjsJhYu7gg4aCkrLZ6-JwYlRYpD4eyykk664CmnKN2-GNO_6YeilBGBeByJByKIWIBCQK9hKxWUbgiOUCnvkCEPnGwnkY8lLe8lxLiOF9MwPWlqXJzbqoJzlFVaD66UCua12UATBehS8-2FJj6Xc1ga_GrGr-cdy2pu9jSnO54OdSJeQzW3JqwHccLURaI42FbMSeUNTBfNsXfSVITeSuxrOFn25XyklOzXi21Ow91Tq8V-i_VN7L5YPRl71WWnS)

# WEDNESDAY, JANUARY 10, 2024
---|---
**Good Morning**! On this date in 1776, Thomas Paine's revolutionary pamphlet "Common Sense" was published. The 47-page booklet sold more than 500,000 copies and paved the way for the Declaration of Independence. ([See Pamphlet](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz71uwyAUQOGngQ2LiyG4A0MXb-na0SLmEt-KH8tQW3n7qp07n-Ho-7wvd0-JyvPDZ3Q91sWvnU5cQIAUSi-aBxcRFY4cHVippzdjteKb8yYEMA8LFuM6TdEgKI2rNqONWprAySmptASQII0BM8QoxwhgHw9vJ7jdmJYYqNdj-KpU-oYxveqJx7DWzJPbet8bG9-Zmpmar-saNmq9Hq_fztRc8GpMzX2r2Texeyoo1ppzLaJhaSgOPGv67lQLP1zYL0qJ2s0yLZ_ZU_rb9H_RPwEAAP__g2FaDw)) Have you signed up for _The Flyover_ yet? If not, you can fix that [with one click](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFuszAQAOCnsbdEd-cDh8HDL0VMP107IgNnuNZARNxUffuq6tjs3_S9dn0XNes2v8RVQkl7H8eiD-nxhHAi7tlOIYmQOCsBPfClqTyTXUJq6MKC5AeuvQNJ1ZiGRJHYNc2Ik9VAQAyIgFBVWJ1TApcQ_TBEf8G6NgwyadmP89uuW1kk5a_9Icd53Febw1LK7W7cP0OtofYvMdR2cdbxv27vP8a1Ytx1un1qznqvvWGY16j519YfZTXuymCP8NzY8jTgOwAA___d8Vrx). ## Trump Prosecutor Accused of 'Improper Relationship'
A co-defendant in Donald Trump's Georgia case [accused District Attorney Fani Willis ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskM2uoyAYQJ8GdxhA_Fu4aCchk2ls09l0aRA_9OugEKQ18_Y3t-u7PptzzqMfeo0Ot_mqV-iS9YM2Cd8wcMoZFXKQ2dRZAAFFBh2vmWzaspYiWzpmdGPqUZrRttAWTTVxORUADSvblnGTYSeYkIxzxllZ8jK3lhWW83ocdd3wqiKSwYTJx_zpcUsLWPffvyHmxq-Z65aUwk6KExGKCHUcR66f5psRoYJ3mNDsRKgxgv6H20ztJ4Rq52CGneIaog8QaQSnE_ptXzDQEdIBsFH7cslvdNI0-UBTfK2Bhuh3MK_kIxHqJK7i9vjV10o9_pzvv8Xt7-kizpf-ToTKYjeFA53DvaqJZPOq0X20048TvwIAAP__PXF07w)of hiring an alleged romantic partner to prosecute Trump and benefitting financially from that relationship, according to a new court filing. The "bombshell filing," as the Atlanta Journal-Constitution called it, seeks dismissal of the charges and disqualification of the D.A. from further prosecution of the case. The filing alleges that special prosecutor Nathan Wade has been paid about $650,000 in legal fees authorized by Willis. It claims that she and Wade took vacations together with that money. The motion presents no evidence of the relationship but claims that sources have confirmed it. [Willis' office ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1ugzAURp_GbEa2MTgdGLKwpVKnjuiCr-FW-Ee2CerbV8nc6fuksxyd78f8ADoobJ_gcawuzrBWeuIsuRRc6Vk3dnSICrsGR2mEvn30RqtmH_tODb1cVjM47BC0VTcjlt6KAYQdXNfQqITSQkohRd_LvnVOdE5KsyxgbnIYmBZoqcbc_kQKdUd3_MYn5naNvjnGvdZUWHdnamJquq6r9SW8GFMTBn4WpqaA12ve36LDYCFUToHXfPpU-IYxbwR8hYIc1vUsWLgFnnIsuJ41Zh4dJ59yTJh5xgMqxVB2SkxNkPn9Lv3kv0yTR5suOg4qg2FabB7oeIvWf7P9BQAA__9FnXCC)said they would respond through "appropriate court filings."
## Huge Winter Storm Freezes Much of U.S.
A massive winter storm knocked out power to over 400,000 people in 12 states on Tuesday. [A brutal freeze](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDFzhCAQhX8NduvAisoVFGnsLm1KB2W5I4dyA6iTf58hdbbc9828b97Xfb4bH_z--DQb6eLibNbiT5oFCA4oZ9lY7YiQuoa0GLlUt36U2Dy1dKq3VqEzg0W1jNhxRVYqNAuui7w1XiNHyYXggve96FvneOeEGJfFjEoMA5OcrC8xtd_R7-VJLvzEk1K7xq0J-lnKO7Pug-HEcLquq010FEq55vUTU7AMpyMznDaTsz8JLr8XSpBLTBssplQejgyvPa6vDPEo8I4XJahF0PF6sB65xK2S1Ri4AH5jODVJ2_flQ_B5GJnkj8348CdX_p3qNwAA__8gfWqZ) is expected to blanket the East Coast and bring major snowfalls to the Midwest later this week. Nearly 200 million people are under wind and storm advisories as winter storms impact the eastern half of the country. Nearly 7,000 flights were delayed and over [1,800 flights were cancelled ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1uhDAQhJ_GdEa7xvwVLtLQXdqUyGfWhyODT_YeJG8fEaVMMxppRjPS93GbbzbEsD_e7UaGfZqt43DQjBJBKj3rajGeSFFTkcEe9DC2vVbVapaxG2BpXTfaYWhG5QAHwHs3eud77XwVjAKlAREQ2hbb2ntoPGJ_v9t-wK4TGmgJnHL9mcLOK_n4nQ7KtUtbFc3K_CyieRNqEmo6z7O2XyGVKxVquraFmgAvGa9C2JmyLJzyJkt68Uq2sNxT_nPPdFKW6cX2QUVytgfFKpvleYYYQ-l6oeGx2RB___lfGj8BAAD__5EqYNo)through Tuesday. The political impact will be felt in Iowa, where snow and extreme temperatures are [hindering plans for the Iowa caucuses](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFu7CAQheGnwZ2tAcbALShuQ7dpU1rYHtYTYWN50aK8feTUaU51pE_6Px_TI3Lm4_kRd_I1lSkuld80yV5Cr3DCbvWJSJHuyEsL6P6NFlW3eSBn0OIyj3p20agR0SWg1a0ajQPTsVegEKQECeMoxyEl0ElKO8_ROmmMQKCVa7mGr8JH3Sjl7_Kma1jK3mW_1Xq-hP4vVBAqtNaGs2SuvJT7IFQ4qL2ECrciVAB5jxMqcGmxbxTrRle_xP2M_Dx6AKlRa9tdfj0b58wvYwXCc4-cf8n6Z4CfAAAA___QIVi-). Candidate trips are being canceled, and caucus night could be the coldest since 1972, impacting turnout.
## List: Ranking Retirement Planning Mistakes
A survey of 2,700 financial professionals across 16 countries has produced a list of people's [top 10 retirement planning mistakes](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFurDAQAL_GdCCvz2Be4eI1dJc2JVrM-tjEYGRvDuXvo0udfqQZzft9viMnPh5vuJOXmGcMwk-aoQXdGjvbZvWRyNCtIQ9O2_Ff76xpNj_gugCgRRiXiKBdiI56DOMSQLveNOyNNlYDaNB9D30Xo75FALcs6EYYBmU1rSy5dB-ZD9kopu_8pNKFvDfJbyJnVbf_ykzKTNd1dU-uX5gCniyYuMoLVGYKGxahtZV8vqoLCRfa6ZD2THgcfDzanavgJ1Vlpqb49bw4Ja6DU1Y_duT0q5Q_B_wEAAD__yFkXl8). No. 1 on the list, cited by nearly half of those surveyed, is underestimating the impact of inflation, and No. 2 is underestimating how long you'll live. Experts were divided on the risks posed by investment strategies, but a majority of advisors said investing too conservatively is a bigger risk than investing too aggressively. [The full list is here.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFurDAQAL_GdCCvz2Be4eI1dJc2JVrM-tjEYGRvDuXvo0udfqQZzft9viMnPh5vuJOXmGcMwk-aoQXdGjvbZvWRyNCtIQ9O2_Ff76xpNj_gugCgRRiXiKBdiI56DOMSQLveNOyNNlYDaNB9D30Xo75FALcs6EYYBmU1rSy5dB-ZD9kopu_8pNKFvDfJbyJnVbf_ykzKTNd1dU-uX5gCniyYuMoLVGYKGxahtZV8vqoLCRfa6ZD2THgcfDzanavgJ1Vlpqb49bw4Ja6DU1Y_duT0q5Q_B_wEAAD__yFkXl8)

([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGOgzAQRL_GdKDdxWCncHGNu1x7JXLMOvHJ4Ag7Qfz9idTXzDTzNKP5uU5XF1Nc799uYVNDnpyv8c0TtggtyUk2swnMxH3DBhVIfRmUpOZhLt4Hxd4rRywVkL74cdBKEc2SNPdNNAQkAREQhgGHLgToA6K63ZzSOI5CAs-x5q37zXGtDw7pyG_eOp-XJplHrc8i-i9BVpDd9717FVfz7I4zIMiWmrdDkF15L6e5GvMqyJ61gizgKfpkY0rRLe2T17Ut1dUXtxsv-e2SIKsIB9I9AihBttnM_PwAZVRCwn1xMX0W1X__-QsAAP__9AtjVw)) ➤ **Defense Secretary** Lloyd Austin revealed he was hospitalized last week for prostate surgery and apologized for the delay in telling anyone. The White House and Pentagon have launched reviews of the notification process. On this date in 1776, Thomas Paine's revolutionary pamphlet "Common Sense" was published. The 47-page booklet sold more than 500,000 copies and paved the way for the Declaration of Independence. Today's edition is brought to you by . | Trump Prosecutor Accused of 'Improper Relationship' A co-defendant in Donald Trump's Georgia case hiring an alleged romantic partner to prosecute Trump and benefitting financially from that relationship, according to a new court filing. The "bombshell filing," as the Atlanta Journal-Constitution called it, seeks dismissal of the charges and disqualification of the D.A. from further prosecution of the case. The filing alleges that special prosecutor Nathan Wade has been paid about $650,000 in legal fees authorized by Willis. It claims that she and Wade took vacations together with that money. The motion presents no evidence of the relationship but claims that sources have confirmed it. they would respond through "appropriate court filings." Huge Winter Storm Freezes Much of U.S. A massive winter storm knocked out power to over 400,000 people in 12 states on Tuesday. is expected to blanket the East Coast and bring major snowfalls to the Midwest later this week. Nearly 200 million people are under wind and storm advisories as winter storms impact the eastern half of the country. Nearly 7,000 flights were delayed and over Tuesday. The political impact will be felt in Iowa, where snow and extreme temperatures are -. Candidate trips are being canceled, and caucus night could be the coldest since 1972, impacting turnout. List: Ranking Retirement Planning Mistakes A survey of 2,700 financial professionals across 16 countries has produced a list of people's . No. 1 on the list, cited by nearly half of those surveyed, is underestimating the impact of inflation, and No. 2 is underestimating how long you'll live. Experts were divided on the risks posed by investment strategies, but a majority of advisors said investing too conservatively is a bigger risk than investing too aggressively. My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

clean_body: We need all hands on deck, Friend. | | | | | We need all hands on deck, Friend. Nikki Haley will participate in her first presidential debate of the year TONIGHT. But, before she takes the stage, we need your help to send her a MASSIVE wave of support | Friend, we set a goal of collecting10,000 NEW donations before Nikki takes the debate stage, and we're asking YOU to help us reach it. "Can we count on you? Please rush $5, $10, $15, or more immediately. " | | Nikki is working diligently to spread her vision for America's future to as many hardworking Americans as possible. "But she needs you by her side during her most important campaign milestone yet. " Your response is key to helping us reach this goal and send Nikki a wave of support ahead of her debate! Thank you in advance, Team Haley | | | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. "Will you join me today and help me save our country?" | | "DONATE" | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. **By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. name: Hillsdale College via Trump News HQ
subject: These questions are at the core of what it means to be human
body:
Every Hillsdale College student is required to take a class on the Western heritage in order to graduate.

| | | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z73kr95safis74vv0gipdmallv6gasfrasivk578_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cjg62oj2cjh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Every Hillsdale College student is required to take a class on the Western heritage in order to graduate. And every academic year, I'm reminded of the joy it is to pursue the answers to questions like "_Does God exist? Can we know God?_ " with my students.

These questions are at the core of what it means to be human - both in our relationship with each other and with God. [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zauifi5oehpo3mo99tchrcjqojs5u41df5ienljo_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cjg62oj2cjh2bs) Today, I want to offer you that same experience by sending you [**a limited-edition DVD box set of Hillsdale's popular online course, "Western Heritage - From the Book of Genesis to John Locke,"**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjr9dk8qe8p5gbtkdrgp4ohnpa7q92hm27ln9rfo_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cjg62oj2cjh2bs) as a token of our thanks for a generous contribution in support of Hillsdale's efforts to educate America.

I invite you to study the history of the "big questions" with my colleagues and me.

Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link: **[https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-western-heritage-dvd](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zl77o9793r1j8ffdlqvmhs94o5ar36i9ugbklt40_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cjg62oj2cjh2bs)**

More than 2,000 people have already requested theirs, so make sure to get your set before they are all gone.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
---

Trump Train News

2/3: [Calumet County Lincoln Day Dinner](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xtdhyit-didthutlhu-jy/)

2/13: [Dane County Pints & Politics](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xtdhyit-didthutlhu-ji/)
2/13: [Portage County Membership Meeting ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xtdhyit-didthutlhu-jd/)

2/24: [Eau Claire County Lincoln Day Dinner](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xtdhyit-didthutlhu-jk/) ** **Monroe County**
The Republican Party of Monroe County hosted the amazing Representative VanderMeer at their conservative breakfast. We are excited to see Monroe County continue this tradition in 2024! **St. Croix County**
The Republican Party of St. Croix County has not slowed down in the New Year! Chairman Matthew Rust met with the Baldwin-Woodville Cub Scouts to teach them about our Government, our Flag, Patriotism, and his role in the Community. Moreover, St. Croix GOP has remodeled their Victory Headquarters for success! **Brown County**
The Republican Party of Brown County came together this past holiday season to donate goods to both their local food pantry and Veterans organization. **Kenosha County**
The Republican Party of Kenosha and its members contributed over 150 bundles of hats, scarves, and gloves to keep their fellow community members warm! This was truly and incredible event. The RPKC also a final push to gather and review signatures for nomination papers. **Calumet County**
The Republican Party of Calumet County hosted a successful Salvation Army Toys for Tots Campaign once again! **Outagamie County**
The Republican Party of Outagamie County and its members joined the Veterans and Friends Organization to collect items for local veterans. **Walworth County**
Members of the Walworth County Republican Party jointed State Director Leslie Hubert to kickstart the 2024 election season! We appreciate everyone who attended the training. [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xtdhyit-didthutlhu-ju/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xtdhyit-didthutlhu-tl/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xtdhyit-didthutlhu-tr/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xtdhyit-didthutlhu-ty/) | [ Share ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-fb-xtdhyit-didthutlhu-tt/) | [ Tweet ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-tw-xtdhyit-didthutlhu-ti/) | [ Forward ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.forwardtomyfriend.com/y-didthutlhu-931243C5-xtdhyit-l-td)

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Citizens Fund
subject: Should we endorse??
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEA PARTY PATRIOTS CITIZENS FUND
body:
The Iowa Caucus is right around the corner, on January 15th. We need your input as soon as possible about whether or not we should endorse a candidate, and if so, who that should be. If the grassroots wants us to endorse, it would be best to do it before the Caucus, so please fill out our short survey immediately. COMPLETE MY SURVEY: https://forms.teapartypatriots.org/TPPatriots/form/2024PresidentialPrimaryEndorsement/formperma/P7jdTHmFpkYgwQ7ZobEeQHkfYc3zXLmLHb6ckWFkWZA Please share the survey with your conservative family and friends as well. Thank you! In liberty, Jenny Beth Martin

subject: High poll numbers mean nothing if we can’t do this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
Our campaign is gaining unstoppable momentum.

|

Dear Peter,
Our campaign is gaining unstoppable momentum as we push forward, refusing to be ignored, censored, or caricatured by the Mainstream Media.
**And to achieve our mission of healing the deep divisions tearing our country apart,** [we need your immediate help.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=goal_1_10_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=2)
Just last week, you helped us achieve our ambitious year-end goal of $6M for the quarter. _Now we’re going month to month to ensure we achieve nationwide ballot access._
You see, the high poll numbers we’re celebrating **_won't mean anything_** if we’re not on the ballot in all 50 states. That’s why your support is so crucial right now, to secure our rightful spot so that voters can choose RFK Jr. when it matters... _on election day_!
**So, to renew the American spirit, to unite the nation around the ideals that we hold in common,[we have set a new aggressive funding goal of $3.5 million for January.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=goal_1_10_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=3)**
_Every dollar you donate today_ will play a significant role in this critical endeavor.
[CONTRIBUTE $5 ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=5&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=goal_1_10_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=4)

[CONTRIBUTE $240 >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=240&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=goal_1_10_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=7)
[CONTRIBUTE $1000 >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=1000&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=goal_1_10_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=8)
[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=goal_1_10_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=9)
**We cannot overstate the importance of this moment.**
It's crunch time, and the future of our country hangs in the balance. Now is the time for action, and we are turning to you, our valued supporter, for help.
[Please make your donation now.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=goal_1_10_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=10) **Every dollar brings us closer to achieving our $3.5 million January goal and securing our spot on the ballot.**
_The future of our country is in question today. Now we must stay the course! We hope to hear from you._
Team Kennedy

name: Ron DeSantis (1 unread)
subject: What are we asking people to fight for?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
There's something seriously deranged about what Joe Biden is doing to our country. I'm taking our fight to the debate stage tonight. This can't wait.

| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | | [](http://trk.secureandprosper.-UA)
---
Friend, Do you remember when we could be proud of our government and all that it stood for? When we could trust our elected officials and candidates to be transparent with the people they serve? _**We have strayed so far, we have a candidate like Nikki Haley running for President who has broken promise after promise to her supporters and constituents, sold out to the highest bidder, welcomed the Chinese Communist Party to her state, and flip-flopped on so many positions, it's hard to determine where she stands on anything.** _ **I am fighting tonight at the debate—and every day—to restore the freedom and glory that our country used to stand for.** Back then, we could ask young men and women to stand up and fight in our proud Armed Forces, and they would volunteer to do it. _What are we asking these young Americans to fight for now?_ A country full of so much woke indoctrination that children are being told genders aren't real and their dad may be their mom? Being taught to question whether they want to stay in the bodies they were born in?**It's disappointing and outrageous.** I'm not okay with it, Friend. I am stepping up on that debate stage tonight to fight against it with everything I've got. If there's one point I'll **never** compromise on, it's the annihilation of sanity in my children's future.**I need your help to fight back.**
---
| | [$20.24 DONATION](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
---
I’ve got the winning record—and that’s why Nikki Haley and the establishment are so terrified. **THIS DEBATE IS CRITICAL to enacting real, necessary change for everyday Americans,** and we’re the team that’s going to walk off the stage stronger and more ready to get it done than ever.**We are sending a message, and it won't get delivered without our strongest show of support yet. I need YOU,****Friend.**
---
| | | | | [Rush in $20 now](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
---
| | | [Rush in $50 now](http://trk.secureandprosper._xGd1Q)
---
| | | | | [Rush in $100 now](http://trk.secureandprosper._AG2AisqD9TrGJU5vcPJyw)
---
| | | [Rush in $250 now](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
---
You won't hear me make excuses. Not on the stage, not from the Oval Office. We will be presidential. We will win. This is what our country is crying out for. **Please, if you can, help me reach our goal of raising $100,000 in donations before this final GOP debate night before the Iowa Caucus comes to an end, I need your support now.** I'll see you from that stage. Yours in Freedom,
---
| [](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
---
Ron DeSantis

---
| | |
_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](http://trk.secureandprosper.-YHTP6og1NtGQ)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Madison Horn
subject: Here we go again…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oklahomans for Madison
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jan-9-24 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jan-9-24]
Friend,
For the second time in less than three months, our government is on the verge of a shutdown.
The repeated threats of shutdowns and the label of being the "most ineffective Congress in history" are not just political talking points; they are realities that affect the lives of every Oklahoman.
Critical programs essential to our families and our national security are both being put at risk:
*
Struggling
mothers
still
lack
access
to
WIC
programs.
*
Our
allies
are
on
the
verge
of
losing
support
during
a
time
of
war.
*
Politicians
still
can’t
come
together
on
anything
for
the
border.
It's time we rise above the chaos, will you contribute $12 or whatever you can [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jan-9-24]
to our campaign so we can ensure we have effective leadership? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jan-9-24]
It's time we focus on solving real problems - like modernizing border security, promoting future-minded skills training for our families, and preparing for the geopolitical landscape that lies ahead.
My commitment to you is unwavering. I've led global teams, I've worked hand-in-hand with operators in nuclear power plants, I've built companies from the ground up - I am ready to take on these challenges.
My promise to you is, when our country needs leaders, I'll be the first to step up, not the first to shy away like Bice has.
With urgency and sincere gratitude,
Madison Horn

clean_body: [] Friend, For the second time in less than three months, our government is on the verge of a shutdown. The repeated threats of shutdowns and the label of being the "most ineffective Congress in history" are not just political talking points; they are realities that affect the lives of every Oklahoman. Critical programs essential to our families and our national security are both being put at risk: Struggling mothers still lack access to WIC programs. Our allies are on the verge of losing support during a time of war. * Politicians still can’t come together on anything for the border. It's time we rise above the chaos, will you contribute $12 or whatever you can [] to our campaign so we can ensure we have effective leadership? [] It's time we focus on solving real problems - like modernizing border security, promoting future-minded skills training for our families, and preparing for the geopolitical landscape that lies ahead. My commitment to you is unwavering. I've led global teams, I've worked hand-in-hand with operators in nuclear power plants, I've built companies from the ground up - I am ready to take on these challenges. My promise to you is, when our country needs leaders, I'll be the first to step up, not the first to shy away like Bice has. With urgency and sincere gratitude, Madison Horn [] [] P.S. We have an opportunity now, but we need your support to have the resources to meet this moment. Help us rise to the occasion by donating here. Paid for by Oklahomans for Madison [] [] [] [] Oklahomans for Madison PO Box 2601 Oklahoma City, OK 73101 United States If you need to you can unsubscribe here: unsubscribe: You can also [secure.actblue.com/donate/mhfc-em-footer-23] click here to donate [] .

name: 1600 Daily
subject: These questions are at the core of what it means to be human
body:
Every Hillsdale College student is required to take a class on the Western heritage in order to graduate.

| | | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrlrku5memtkt65dtsqjvnkq4jq9tmogkrsi64g0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cjg69or6c3h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Every Hillsdale College student is required to take a class on the Western heritage in order to graduate. And every academic year, I'm reminded of the joy it is to pursue the answers to questions like "_Does God exist? Can we know God?_ " with my students.

These questions are at the core of what it means to be human - both in our relationship with each other and with God. [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zg9a8vpuou8ldvv55ct5rtsvojv4svneli698l0o_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cjg69or6c3h2bs) Today, I want to offer you that same experience by sending you [**a limited-edition DVD box set of Hillsdale's popular online course, "Western Heritage - From the Book of Genesis to John Locke,"**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmhb2cp1q4c84qq5nfltepe1374u3usk365udkl8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cjg69or6c3h2bs) as a token of our thanks for a generous contribution in support of Hillsdale's efforts to educate America.

I invite you to study the history of the "big questions" with my colleagues and me.

Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link: **[https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-western-heritage-dvd](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zu1otvnitpvnegail1kf5mknek4du7f0o5lt37e0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cjg69or6c3h2bs)**

More than 2,000 people have already requested theirs, so make sure to get your set before they are all gone.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
---

1600 Daily

name: Conservative Intel
subject: The history of capitalism and socialism
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWCedXoiBN

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWCedXoiBN

Dear
Friend,
Over the
last century, free-market capitalism and socialism have provided
the dominant interpretations, and conflicting visions, of
political and economic freedom. In the past few years, we've seen
a growing trend among young Americans in favor of socialism and
against capitalism.

But do
they truly understand the history and outcomes of socialism and
capitalism?

This is
precisely why we put together this brand new eBook, The History
Of Socialism And Capitalism, from Hoover Institution senior
fellows Niall Ferguson and Victor Davis Hanson.

This
eBook consists of two papers-one from each scholar-written in
conjunction with The Human Prosperity Project on Socialism and
Free-Market Capitalism. This project provides objective and
scholarly analyses of free-market capitalism, socialism, and
hybrid systems and provides evidence on the effectiveness of the
various systems on outcomes that affect prosperity and
well-being.

I think
you will find this new eBook particularly important and timely,
given the recent interest in policies that are radical from a US
historical perspective, some of which are advocated by political
leaders.

Simply
click here to request your free copy of The History Of Socialism
And Capitalism.

Thanks,
Greg

Greg
Stamps | Online Development
Hoover
Institution | Stanford University

With its
eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the
Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research
organization that seeks to improve the human condition by
advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national
security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred
years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have
produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the
United States and around the world.

name: Nikky Haley
subject: There’s something on my mind
body:
Ahead of tonight’s debate

| |
---
| | |
Hey, Friend, it's Nikki.

**[I'm now just hours out from taking the debate stage!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfb3f8i4u7fdqu0t347gh2ru3as8qcjrcpaquv98_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cji68ob2c3h2bs "I’m now just hours out from taking the debate stage!")**

As I prepare for **TONIGHT'S** presidential debate, I've been reflecting on an important moment - one of my very first debates as a gubernatorial candidate.

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9nqa0v3qgqvoat39b95g0h99ve8ea6dvals0bag_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cji68ob2c3h2bs)
---

That debate played a huge role in the outcome of my race for governor, and it reminded me of an important story I want to share with you:
_-> I was the underdog when I ran for governor.

-> No one thought I had a shot. But that didn't stop me.

-> I've never lost a race, and I'm NOT starting now._
I know the **MOST** important parts of running a winning campaign comes down to hard work, determination, and a **STRONG** team of grassroots supporters.

Which is why I'm humbly asking for your support today.

**[My team set a goal of adding 10,000 NEW donations before I take the stage tonight. Can I count you in for one of them?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9oa8257ifjpaq9u9bun42j6pcf9jh2kcarorq4g_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cji68ob2c3h2bs "My team set a goal of adding 10,000 NEW donations before I take the stage tonight. Can I count you in for one of them?")**

---
| | [RUSH SUPPORT NOW](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0jerurhbgac7q23soa6r0k66oedgetjqripen68_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cji68ob2c3h2bs)
---

The support we get ahead of this debate will play a key role in making sure we have the resources needed to capitalize on the momentum the moment I step off stage.

Tonight's debate will be a critical chance to change the minds of undecided voters and supercharge our efforts to amplify my message ahead of the first votes taking place on Monday.

**[A gift of just $5, $10, or $15 will help reach this goal, capitalize on our momentum, and WIN the battle for our country.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zni9ivms88ub7n3bo5op1il6jkrqtofgl4s5mf3o_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cji68ob2c3h2bs "A gift of just $5, $10, or $15 will help reach this goal, capitalize on our momentum, and WIN the battle for our country.")**

I look forward to making you and our great nation proud!

---
| | [DONATE](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zm1cufbll9qsoncpd38r48ugnhtislm26jmuntpo_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cji68ob2c3h2bs)
---

My very best,
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbn7gehlot08cr3aa8qcs7382a7bp5urjhsgf9l0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cji68ob2c3h2bs)
---
Nikki Haley
---
| | | | |
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zngus0mi4u9dj410rv2gob58rc6nf0t26qlrfs38_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cji68ob2c3h2bs "NikkiHaley_Merch")
---
| | [GET YOUR HAT NOW](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zloeb3snjivb4ae0ol0jm677eqa419qve7jic4sg_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cji68ob2c3h2bs "Claim Your Mug")
---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrr95d3ngsi8pho56s7mq0flghjsuai4j0aem4a8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cji68ob2c3h2bs "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd0sst7tsjuf7d24gnd0dimr49sigces85hgcg90_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cji68ob2c3h2bs "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

As I prepare for TONIGHT'S presidential debate, I've been reflecting on an important moment - one of my very first debates as a gubernatorial candidate. | That debate played a huge role in the outcome of my race for governor, and it reminded me of an important story I want to share with you: -> I was the underdog when I ran for governor. -> No one thought I had a shot. But that didn't stop me. -> I've never lost a race, and I'm NOT starting now. I know the MOST important parts of running a winning campaign comes down to hard work, determination, and a STRONG team of grassroots supporters. Which is why I'm humbly asking for your support today. "My team set a goal of adding 10,000 NEW donations before I take the stage tonight. Can I count you in for one of them?" | | The support we get ahead of this debate will play a key role in making sure we have the resources needed to capitalize on the momentum the moment I step off stage. Tonight's debate will be a critical chance to change the minds of undecided voters and supercharge our efforts to amplify my message ahead of the first votes taking place on Monday. "A gift of just $5, $10, or $15 will help reach this goal, capitalize on our momentum, and WIN the battle for our country." I look forward to making you and our great nation proud! | | My very best, | Nikki Haley | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. "Will you join me today and help me save our country?" | | "DONATE" | | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. **By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. Texts may be sent via an automated telephone dialing system. Consent not required to contribute. Message frequency varies. Message and data rates may apply. and . You can opt out at any time. Text STOP to end. Text HELP for help. . . Contributions are not tax-deductible. Team Stand For America does not accept contributions from foreign nationals. 186 Seven Farms Drive, Ste F-401 Daniel Island, SC 29492 American Action News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

>From Local to Legendary: Trump's Share Catapults Illinois Review to National Spotlight (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/01/from-local-to-legendary-trumps-share-catapults-illinois-review-to-national-spotlight.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=823ff06359-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

By Illinois Review

On Sunday, President Donald Trump took to his social media website Truth Social and shared an article (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/01/biden-losing-it-dropping-in-polls-now-he-wants-trump-to-sign-a-loyalty-oath-that-claims-hes-a-resident-of-illinois.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=823ff06359-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) published by Illinois Review that called out President Joe Biden for wanting Trump to sign Illinois’ optional candidate “loyalty oath” that claims among other things that he’s a resident of the state despite having a permanent residence at his Mar-a-Lago estate in Palm Beach, Florida.

The presidential share led to millions of hits on the Illinois Review website, as the 18-year-old conservative news source ascended to the national platform. Below are just a few of the shared links.

name: Governor Ron DeSantis
subject: What are we asking people to fight for?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
There's something seriously deranged about what Joe Biden is doing to our country. I'm taking our fight to the debate stage tonight. This can't wait.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c680701%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PN2lF2Ggor8fd%2bccEeqxgQ&sysid=1)
---
Friend, Do you remember when we could be proud of our government and all that it stood for? When we could trust our elected officials and candidates to be transparent with the people they serve? _**We have strayed so far, we have a candidate like Nikki Haley running for President who has broken promise after promise to her supporters and constituents, sold out to the highest bidder, welcomed the Chinese Communist Party to her state, and flip-flopped on so many positions, it's hard to determine where she stands on anything.** _ **I am fighting tonight at the debate --and every day--to restore the freedom and glory that our country used to stand for. **Back then, we could ask young men and women to stand up and fight in our proud Armed Forces, and they would volunteer to do it. _What are we asking these young Americans to fight for now?_ A country full of so much woke indoctrination that children are being told genders aren't real and their dad may be their mom? Being taught to question whether they want to stay in the bodies they were born in?**It's disappointing and outrageous.** I'm not okay with it, Friend. I am stepping up on that debate stage tonight to fight against it with everything I've got. If there's one point I'll **never** compromise on, it's the annihilation of sanity in my children's future.**I need your help to fight back.**
---
| | [$20.24 DONATION](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c680702%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2alGB7Y5xf%2b1TTW6Oipzpw&sysid=1)
---
I’ve got the winning record--and that’s why Nikki Haley and the establishment are so terrified. **THIS DEBATE IS CRITICAL to enacting real, necessary change for everyday Americans,** and we’re the team that’s going to walk off the stage stronger and more ready to get it done than ever.**We are sending a message, and it won't get delivered without our strongest show of support yet. I need YOU,****Friend.**
---
| | | | | [Rush in $20 now](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c680703%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=s0WwldWd5btULb6dpvHA6Q&sysid=1)
---
| | | [Rush in $50 now](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c680704%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cZwTRJ%2bb34fobdwZ1nR1zQ&sysid=1)
---
| | | | | [Rush in $100 now](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c680715%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Mi6cdrl269qepnR%2bKsraig&sysid=1)
---
| | | [Rush in $250 now](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c680716%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fN8NzBQE%2bzO5ikbRBr87IQ&sysid=1)
---
You won't hear me make excuses. Not on the stage, not from the Oval Office. We will be presidential. We will win. This is what our country is crying out for. **Please, if you can, help me reach our goal of raising $100,000 in donations before this final GOP debate night before the Iowa Caucus comes to an end, I need your support now.** I'll see you from that stage. Yours in Freedom,
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c680701%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PN2lF2Ggor8fd%2bccEeqxgQ&sysid=1)
---
Ron DeSantis

---
| | |
_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c680701%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PN2lF2Ggor8fd%2bccEeqxgQ&sysid=1)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c680701%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PN2lF2Ggor8fd%2bccEeqxgQ&sysid=1)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
---
| Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
---

PO Box 3696
Tallahassee, FL 32315

---

Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. name: ICYMI News
subject: These questions are at the core of what it means to be human
body:
Every Hillsdale College student is required to take a class on the Western heritage in order to graduate.

| | | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbpfbif6pqist860virgjuomke02mddc4ftqb8fo_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cji6coj4cjh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Every Hillsdale College student is required to take a class on the Western heritage in order to graduate. And every academic year, I'm reminded of the joy it is to pursue the answers to questions like "_Does God exist? Can we know God?_ " with my students.

These questions are at the core of what it means to be human - both in our relationship with each other and with God. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zf4jboebqch2toqbi3vcqujhvmcjpsjnffdau778_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cji6coj4cjh2bs) Today, I want to offer you that same experience by sending you [**a limited-edition DVD box set of Hillsdale's popular online course, "Western Heritage - From the Book of Genesis to John Locke,"**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3jg9bvv00d22jbmslr7l63j9l3qmgbkebpd2bdg_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cji6coj4cjh2bs) as a token of our thanks for a generous contribution in support of Hillsdale's efforts to educate America.

I invite you to study the history of the "big questions" with my colleagues and me.

Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link: **[https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-western-heritage-dvd](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zt7lc0jc73ckema7pedr7t2v9m53cjvpcnatemao_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cji6coj4cjh2bs)**

More than 2,000 people have already requested theirs, so make sure to get your set before they are all gone.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
---

ICYMI News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

# You're Invited to the
# DOM JONES
# Campaign Kickoff Soiree!
---
| |
---
| | Dear friends, We are thrilled to invite you to the Campaign Kickoff Soiree for Dom Jones' State Assembly run in 2024. Dom Jones has been tirelessly working to bring love and light to our community, and now it's time for us to come together and support her vision for Orange County. JANUARY 11TH, 20243:00PMLOCATION: CORONA DEL MAR, NEWPORT BEACHADDRESS SHARED UPON RSVP WITH INTENTION TO ATTEND:CONTACT@DOMJONES.ORG During the event at this beautiful local coastal Pacific Coast Hwy establishment, Dom Jones will be sharing her platform and the issues that resonate with our community.This is a fantastic opportunity for you to hear her vision firsthand and ask any questions you may have. Best of all, admission is absolutely free!To RSVP and receive the exact location details, please email us at contact@domjones.org. Availability is limited, so secure your spot as soon as possible.We look forward to seeing you at this exciting event! With Care,The Dom Jones for Assembly 2024 Team
---
| |
---
This is your opportunity to be involved in a campaign with purpose for the type of leader we often dream of. Dom Jones is here to lead us to a better future. Born into poverty and having had to fight and sacrifice her way here. Dom is the ultimate leader for whom we can be proud to stand up and volunteer!
| [**I WANT TO BE APART OF HISTORY**](https://www.domjones.org/so/7cOpouuP7/c?w=QAT9JjobHlP81KnWoIM_uiFroJkZwybZJSAhAxkuVNM.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9mb3Jtcy53aXguY29tL2MyMTY2NmY3LWQ2ZTEtNGM4Yi1iMmU4LTg3ZGIzMjdiNmEzYTpjM2E3YzI5My1iZWI4LTRlYmQtOTc4Zi0wNjE5NDdiODI3MWIiLCJyIjoiOGY0MTZjZTEtZDEwYy00Zjk4LWFjZmUtMTlkNTZmM2I1NzRiIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiNTFiYjE3NDQtMmE5My00MzBjLThjNDctMDgwNjgwNmRkMWMyIn0)
---
|
---
Get excited for amazing non-traditional campaign events. Nothing is what you are accustomed to with The Dom Jones movement! Our team invites you to join a movement for love, unity, economic prosperity, acceptance, LGTBQIA+ rights, environmental justice, women's rights, and the rights to our individual freedoms!
| [**THIS IS POLITICS A NEW WAY. I'M READY TO BE THE CHANGE!**](https://www.domjones.org/so/7cOpouuP7/c?w=v97Dsy7Azv3LbvTHcRbmzN69DY5bAzfKkga0IOyDBxc.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9mb3Jtcy53aXguY29tL2MyMTY2NmY3LWQ2ZTEtNGM4Yi1iMmU4LTg3ZGIzMjdiNmEzYTpjM2E3YzI5My1iZWI4LTRlYmQtOTc4Zi0wNjE5NDdiODI3MWIiLCJyIjoiZGEyZTlhN2UtZWU3Zi00YjFlLWJiZTMtNjQxYmE1ZWNhY2RiIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiNTFiYjE3NDQtMmE5My00MzBjLThjNDctMDgwNjgwNmRkMWMyIn0)
---
| | OUR PROMISE TO YOU:In a realm of hope's embrace,Dom Jones Team, a sacred space.Race, creed, and faith entwine,Unity, the heartbeat, divine. No bounds to hold, no walls to bind,In every heart, humanity we find.Political hues, diverse and bright,Together we rise, in shared light. Fear dissipates, love takes flight,A tapestry woven, strong and tight.Abundant future, a collective dream,For in unity, our strength beams. Let this campaign be a call,To break down barriers, stand tall.See the human soul in every face,Dom Jones Team, a boundless grace.
---

name: American Action News
subject: These questions are at the core of what it means to be human
body:
Every Hillsdale College student is required to take a class on the Western heritage in order to graduate.

| | | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh8lg0qad0qfip3v2ig5b2snn9d0vbk9fv9hq588_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cji6ao32chh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Every Hillsdale College student is required to take a class on the Western heritage in order to graduate. And every academic year, I'm reminded of the joy it is to pursue the answers to questions like "_Does God exist? Can we know God?_ " with my students.

These questions are at the core of what it means to be human - both in our relationship with each other and with God. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zffsigtit6gl5mscdltpoe5fm4snqlpsvci83us8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cji6ao32chh2bs) Today, I want to offer you that same experience by sending you [**a limited-edition DVD box set of Hillsdale's popular online course, "Western Heritage - From the Book of Genesis to John Locke,"**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr566j2ht3vl644d6a7hrh6l9ihius69771jg5l0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cji6ao32chh2bs) as a token of our thanks for a generous contribution in support of Hillsdale's efforts to educate America.

I invite you to study the history of the "big questions" with my colleagues and me.

Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link: **[https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-western-heritage-dvd](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zabr85glfumj98j0cm58o8vb3ivqvnu61jfn0q6o_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cji6ao32chh2bs)**

More than 2,000 people have already requested theirs, so make sure to get your set before they are all gone.

clean_body: Every Hillsdale College student is required to take a class on the Western heritage in order to graduate. | | | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | Dear Friend, Every Hillsdale College student is required to take a class on the Western heritage in order to graduate. And every academic year, I'm reminded of the joy it is to pursue the answers to questions like "Does God exist? Can we know God? " with my students. These questions are at the core of what it means to be human - both in our relationship with each other and with God. Today, I want to offer you that same experience by sending you as a token of our thanks for a generous contribution in support of Hillsdale's efforts to educate America. I invite you to study the history of the "big questions" with my colleagues and me. Peter, Ron DeSantis’ fascism is seeping into new territory, and if we don’t stop it right now, every Florida student’s future is at risk.

As a Florida representative, as someone who grew up in public schools in Florida, and as someone who sees Florida youth affected by DeSantis’ fascist policies, this is personal to me.

It’s also undeniable: DeSantis has proven again and again that he _does not care_ about protecting our youth. Instead, he and his extremist buddies are going after education at every school grade level in Florida, depriving students of their basic rights.

**We need to stand as a collective to keep DeSantis and all his far-right extreme cronies from putting Florida youth in danger. But I have to be able to fund this fight – and I’m falling short of my weekly goal.**

[**_This is the perfect time to show the Florida GOP we're ready to fight back at full force. Please, Peter: Help me stand against Ron DeSantis and his fascist agenda by donating $27 >>_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/0grGk0TwgjvAWUXIir0-OA~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRngTNQP0TMaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MDEwOV9lbV9mcl9iMV9mbHlvdXRoX2VuLXJzJmFtb3VudD0yNyZjZG1jPTJhamF4c3F0bDcwV2dVYVRyVDlxSU1LNTNacSZyZWZjb2RlMj0yYWpheHNxdGw3MFdnVWFUclQ5cUlNSzUzWnEmcmVmY29kZWNkbWM9MmFqYXhzcXRsNzBXZ1VhVHJUOXFJTUs1M1pxVwNzcGNCCmWeUK6eZT2SHghSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAABp) Peter, DeSantis has implemented _ruthless_ policies that directly impact students across all of Florida - starting in elementary and making its way up to universities in the state:
* He’s banned books in all public schools that erase Black and Brown history - even the books you’d least expect.
* He’s directly attacking LGBTQ+ youth, with his “Don’t Say Gay” bill - and specifically attacking trans youth, by prohibiting them to get the gender-affirming care they need.
* And of course, proposed a permitless carry bill - that will put hundreds of thousands of Florida students in immediate danger.

This list goes on and on – but these issues alone are enough to take a stand against DeSantis and get him out of office, along with all his far-right MAGA buddies, who are only in it for themselves.

Peter, I ran for Congress because I’ve been fighting people like DeSantis for years, but I know I could not do it alone. So I am asking you to support our movement to fight back against these horrific policies that hurt students and undermine our Democracy. [**_My weekly deadline is approaching. I need you to donate $27 toward my goal so when word of our fundraising efforts come out, the far-right extremists squirm at our results and realize we have strength in numbers they lack. clean_body: | Peter, Ron DeSantis’ fascism is seeping into new territory, and if we don’t stop it right now, every Florida student’s future is at risk. As a Florida representative, as someone who grew up in public schools in Florida, and as someone who sees Florida youth affected by DeSantis’ fascist policies, this is personal to me. It’s also undeniable: DeSantis has proven again and again that he does not care about protecting our youth. Instead, he and his extremist buddies are going after education at every school grade level in Florida, depriving students of their basic rights. We need to stand as a collective to keep DeSantis and all his far-right extreme cronies from putting Florida youth in danger. But I have to be able to fund this fight – and I’m falling short of my weekly goal. Peter, DeSantis has implemented ruthless policies that directly impact students across all of Florida - starting in elementary and making its way up to universities in the state: He’s banned books in all public schools that erase Black and Brown history - even the books you’d least expect. He’s directly attacking LGBTQ+ youth, with his “Don’t Say Gay” bill - and specifically attacking trans youth, by prohibiting them to get the gender-affirming care they need. * And of course, proposed a permitless carry bill - that will put hundreds of thousands of Florida students in immediate danger. This list goes on and on – but these issues alone are enough to take a stand against DeSantis and get him out of office, along with all his far-right MAGA buddies, who are only in it for themselves. Peter, I ran for Congress because I’ve been fighting people like DeSantis for years, but I know I could not do it alone. So I am asking you to support our movement to fight back against these horrific policies that hurt students and undermine our Democracy. | | | | ~~ | ~~ ~~ In this fight together, Maxwell Frost ~~ ~ | PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS Maxwell Frost for Congress PO Box 772671 Orlando, FL 32877-2671 United States | Maxwell is an organizer representing Florida's 10th Congressional District in Congress. He isn't taking any corporate PAC, big sugar, or fossil fuel contributions. He needs your help to protect this seat for poor and working-class people. That’s why Jahana wants to hear from you, because you are the reason she does this work.
And you’ve pitched in whatever you’re able, no matter how small — a few dollars, some of your time, your vote, or even just your attention — to help change that.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Nancy=20Dahlstrom=20for=20Alaska?=
subject: Speaker Mike Johnson Endorses Lt. Governor Nancy Dahlstrom for Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Dahlstrom for Alaska]()
body:
Johnson cites Dahlstrom as the only Republican who can win this crucial battleground seat | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/a09c71bb140b/ak-al-moves-towards-republicans-after-lt-governor-nancy-dahlstroms-entrance-into-the-race-10224081?e=a20d8ad2ed)
---
**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** Contact: [press@nancyforalaska.com](mailto:press@nancyforalaska.com)
**Speaker Mike Johnson Endorses Lt. Governor Nancy Dahlstrom for Congress** _Johnson cites Dahlstrom as the only Republican who can win this crucial battleground seat_
**Anchorage, AK** \- Nancy Dahlstrom, Lt. Governor for the state of Alaska, announced today that Speaker of the House Mike Johnson has endorsed her campaign for U.S. Congress.
“**Lt. Governor Nancy Dahlstrom is a principled conservative who is the only candidate who has what it takes to win this critical seat for Republicans and our House majority. Her record of fighting for Alaska is unmatched - from reducing crime to unleashing American energy. I’m proud to offer her my support and excited to campaign with her to flip this seat and grow our strong conservative majority in Congress** ,” stated Speaker Johnson.
Dahlstrom’s entrance into the race [shifted](https://nancyforalaska.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b2d5cc6ac5f5c7539b4b1d46&id=59e5aaefed&e=a20d8ad2ed) the _Inside Election_ ratings towards Republicans and she has already been [included](https://nancyforalaska.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b2d5cc6ac5f5c7539b4b1d46&id=6dcb41ae99&e=a20d8ad2ed) in national fundraising efforts by the Speaker.
“I am honored to have the backing of Speaker Johnson. This race is crucial for the future of Alaska, and I will not back down from this fight. Alaska needs leadership in D.C. that will stand up to an overreaching government and stand strong for the values that define our state,” said Lt. Governor Dahlstrom.
_Nancy Dahlstrom currently serves as the Lt. Governor for the state of Alaska. The Dunleavy-Dahlstrom ticket was reelected in 2022 on the first ballot with over 50% of the vote. Nancy was first appointed to serve as a State Representative in 2003 and then served as a Senior Advisor for Military Affairs. In 2018, Nancy took on the role to serve as the Commissioner of Corrections and was a leader in cracking down on crime and ensuring criminals serve their time. As Lieutenant Governor, Nancy has prioritized public safety, energy security, and emergency preparedness._

|

name: Kimberly Peeler-Allen
subject: 3 p.m. call with AG James
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY 2026
body:
Peter, did you get AG James’ last message?

We’re just two days out from our _critical public filing deadline_ _,_ and we’re STILL $13,582 short of our $25,000 goal. **If we don’t make up at least $3,582 of the difference by 3 p.m., I’ll have to tell Letitia that we’re not on track to meet her most important goal of the election year so far.**
---
Peter, we can’t let Letitia fall short. With so many of our fundamental rights under attack this year, there’s NO room to lose momentum now. **Will you rush a donation to AG James’ campaign now?**
**Here’s the best link to give:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jamesforny-24](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76821604/448549011/-2022193277?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1305-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjZiNWZhZS1jOWFmLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PstqH8vT6pJtmQL9S22-5_iU6_mlX5UKeOMxJgcD4hY=)**
Thank you for being a part of this team,

Kimberley Peeler-Allen
Senior Advisor
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Letitia James**

Subject: My public filling deadline is in just FIVE days

Peter, my first PUBLIC filing deadline of 2024 is in just five days, and I'm humbly asking for your help.
I've said it before: Asking for money is my _least_ favorite part of running a campaign. But if I don't, I won't have the resources to continue standing up for you and holding powerful and corrupt men accountable for their actions.

**So I have to ask:** [**Can you chip in $5 right now so I can continue to fight fearlessly for justice? I still need to raise $25,000 by Friday's PUBLIC filing deadline, and I need your help to close the gap.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76821606/448549013/-2022193277?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1305-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjZiNWZhZS1jOWFmLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PstqH8vT6pJtmQL9S22-5_iU6_mlX5UKeOMxJgcD4hY=)

Peter, I'm not afraid to make enemies. From the moment I became New York's attorney general in 2019, I got to work holding the wealthy, corrupt, and manipulative accountable. I went after Big Pharma, Big Polluters, gun rights activists, landlords – and now, I'm holding one of the most powerful and corrupt men in the nation accountable.
But to be honest, when my fundraising numbers go public, these corrupt (and well-funded) enemies of mine are going to dive deep into my fundraising numbers to find any weaknesses they're able to. They're going to want a fight, and I need to show that I have a powerful team standing with me. That's where you come in, Peter.
**I'm counting on dedicated supporters like you to help us hit our goal and show up strong for my first major public filing deadline of the year. I _know_ that this team is powerful enough to do it, and missing this public deadline is simply _not_ an option. So please:**
**[Can you donate $5 right now so that we can meet our $25,000 goal? After 11:59 p.m. on Jan. 12, my numbers will lock, and we have a lot of ground to make up before then.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76821611/448549018/-2022193277?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1305-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjZiNWZhZS1jOWFmLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PstqH8vT6pJtmQL9S22-5_iU6_mlX5UKeOMxJgcD4hY=)**
