No on certifying President Biden's victory in 2020 **_LGBTQ issues:_**
No on the Matthew Shepard & James Byrd Hate Crimes Prevention Act
No on recognizing gay marriage nationally, and sought to ban it in California
He publicly outed a former Democratic opponent _**Women’s rights: **_
No on the right to Contraception Act
No on the Violence Against Women Act
No on the Equal Rights Amendment
No on the Fair Pay Act _**Sensible gun laws: **_
No on assault weapons ban
No on expanding background checks
No on the Protecting Our Kids Act
Yes to expand conceal and carry laws
Yes to protect firearms manufacturers from lawsuits _**The environment:**_
No on the Inflation Reduction Act which made historic investments in clean energy
No on protecting people from toxic incinerators
No on recovering America’s wildlife
No on investing in transportation and water infrastructure
No on cracking down on oil company price gouging **I've said this before, and I still mean it: Lives are at stake in the coming 2024 elections. LGBTQ+ rights are at stake. Our democracy is at stake. The right to choose is at stake -- and so much more.** [**Stopping the GOP from retaining House control starts by ousting Ken Calvert here in CA-41. That's why I'm all in on electing Will Rollins, and it's why I'm counting on your support. | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: Sam Brown
subject: They blew up my body, but they’ll never destroy my spirit.
body:
You can never take away the heart of a soldier

| |
---
| | | Friend,

**[This was God's message for me.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7p397d8jvtbq4oqrqml7kpb5ku1llhdjahfnus0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cji66p76cth2bs "This was God’s message for me. ")**

I didn't know if I was going to survive -- but I knew if I did, my life would belong to Him forever.

In 2008, a roadside bomb in Afghanistan left me with burns over half my body. This was my vehicle after the explosion.

---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zghdhg33vdujaiu9i82gvmdnc7r8vkqv25b2tja8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cji66p76cth2bs)
---

My path to recovery wasn't easy -- I spent months wondering if my life could ever be the same, asking myself why God spared me that day.

**But that was God 's way of speaking to me, THIS was His message to me...His plan for me.**

Friend, I realized that my life would NEVER be the same, but that was okay. I was alive for one reason:

_**My new life belonged not to me, but to Him.

That's why I've lived every day since with three things in mind: My country, my family, and God Himself. **_

God used the tragedy that resulted in my injuries to tell me something.

Through 3 years of recovery and over 30 surgeries- I was never alone. Not for one second.

God stayed with me through it all and he made it clear to me that I was NOT called to wish for my old life.

**Instead, I was called to live my new life to the fullest in service to Him.**

That's why I spent the last 15 years starting my family, serving fellow veterans through the business I started, and most recently, **[I launched my campaign to become the next U.S. Senator from Nevada.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjfegccq01pt3cc74eep5bar5fc08crovbhhdt2o_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cji66p76cth2bs "I launched my campaign to become the next U.S. Senator from Nevada.")**

America is at a tipping point.

Corrupt leaders are leading us into total madness.

Our border is collapsing.

Parents are being cut-off from their children in schools.

We're spending away our future and the future of our children's children.

I'm running for U.S. Senate to bring a new generation of Conservative leadership to Washington D.C.

But to do that, Friend, I'll need your help.

So I'm hoping that you can help me with 1 or 2 things.
1. Would you please keep me and my family in your prayers as we take on some of the most powerful elites in the world?
2. **[Would you consider sending in $5 or $10 to help fund my campaign?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zv70t9skv6l75ad82vhagolqob9qs319e9psof28_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cji66p76cth2bs "Would you consider sending in $5 or $10 to help fund my campaign?")** I don't come from money and I'm no millionaire- that means that support from people like you will have a real impact on this election.

Asking for help isn't something that comes easy for me. I'm a combat veteran and a man of faith. But God has humbled me enough to know that I can't do this with HIM and without people like YOU.

Duty First,
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpl00tbtcri55qvun6a57qpbmeuafh3act0sl4q0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cji66p76cth2bs)
---

Sam Brown

---
| | [DONATE](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdrga94tqgn6q625to7ft4qpj0vduddv33qvtuk8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31cji66p76cth2bs)
---

clean_body: You can never take away the heart of a soldier | | | | | Friend, "This was God’s message for me. " I didn't know if I was going to survive -- but I knew if I did, my life would belong to Him forever. In 2008, a roadside bomb in Afghanistan left me with burns over half my body. This was my vehicle after the explosion. | My path to recovery wasn't easy -- I spent months wondering if my life could ever be the same, asking myself why God spared me that day. But that was God 's way of speaking to me, THIS was His message to me...His plan for me. Friend, I realized that my life would NEVER be the same, but that was okay. I was alive for one reason: My new life belonged not to me, but to Him. That's why I've lived every day since with three things in mind: My country, my family, and God Himself. God used the tragedy that resulted in my injuries to tell me something. Through 3 years of recovery and over 30 surgeries- I was never alone. Not for one second. God stayed with me through it all and he made it clear to me that I was NOT called to wish for my old life. Instead, I was called to live my new life to the fullest in service to Him. That's why I spent the last 15 years starting my family, serving fellow veterans through the business I started, and most recently, "I launched my campaign to become the next U.S. Senator from Nevada." America is at a tipping point. Corrupt leaders are leading us into total madness. Our border is collapsing. Parents are being cut-off from their children in schools. We're spending away our future and the future of our children's children. I'm running for U.S. Senate to bring a new generation of Conservative leadership to Washington D.C. But to do that, Friend, I'll need your help. So I'm hoping that you can help me with 1 or 2 things. 1. Would you please keep me and my family in your prayers as we take on some of the most powerful elites in the world? 2. "Would you consider sending in $5 or $10 to help fund my campaign?" I don't come from money and I'm no millionaire- that means that support from people like you will have a real impact on this election. Asking for help isn't something that comes easy for me. I'm a combat veteran and a man of faith. But God has humbled me enough to know that I can't do this with HIM and without people like YOU. Duty First, | Sam Brown | | | | | Paid for Sam Brown for Nevada Sam Brown is a retired member of the U.S. Army. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement of the United States Army or the Department of Defense. PO Box 750844 Las Vegas, NV 89136 GOP Presidential 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Joby Bernstein
subject: Can you do me a favor and send one email today?
body:
Send 1 Email I found out today the Jewish Community Center and Jewish Community Relations Council are hosting a candidate forum next week. Good news? Well, it turns out that most candidates (including | | | [](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=659efa333ea7735a53d09d66&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.jobyforcongress.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D659ef8526667201977001380%26ss_email_id%3D659efa333ea7735a53d09d66%26ss_campaign_name%3DCan%2Byou%2Bdo%2Bme%2Ba%2Bfavor%2Band%2Bsend%2Bone%2Bemail%2Btoday%253F%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2024-01-10T20%253A12%253A38Z&w=6514833727955b66bdb4f35b&c=b_659ef8526667201977001380&l=en-US&s=RFacNF_iEmKx7rFU9Wrq0RXuKFU%3D)

## Send 1 Email
---
---
I found out today the Jewish Community Center and Jewish Community Relations Council are hosting a candidate forum next week. _**Good news?**_ Well, it turns out that most candidates (including myself) would **not be allowed to participate** since I have not yet raised $250k. **As the only Jewish candidate, and the candidate who has been most vocal talking about, Israel, antisemitism, and islamophobia, this doesn’t feel right.** **Can you please send an email to JCRC to ask them to invite all candidates.** It costs nothing to them to make more space on the stage. (Contact info below)JCRC also didn’t invite any of the Republicans or Independents in the race. Right now, the only people who get a chance to speak are older establishment candidates, who have held public office before, and have been fundraising for years. Why not let other voices be heard?**I just feel quite disheartened. I love the Jewish community in Silicon Valley that has always welcomed me. This community is where I want to ensure I can be heard. I was raised knowing that Jewish tradition meant always including others. When our political system excludes others, it adds to the problem that we all feel in our gut sometimes that the political world is closed off.** Please email:Jessica Trubowitch: [jtrubowitch@jcrc.org](mailto:jtrubowitch@jcrc.org)Karen Stiller: [kstiller@jcrc.org](mailto:kstiller@jcrc.org)Jeremy Russell: [jrussell@jcrc.org](mailto:jrussell@jcrc.org)If you have time to call that would be even better
Jessica Trubowitch: 415-412-4530Jeremy Russell: 415-977-7417Please do this today, and thank you for the help!
---
|
---

2130 Harvard Street
Palo Alto, CA 94306

name: Torrey Wells
subject: Join the Faith Leaders for Teichert Coalition!
body:
| | | | | Good afternoon,Are you concerned for the spiritual welfare of the next generation? General Teichert is launching the Faith Leaders for Teichert Coalition! This is a growing group of dedicated leaders of faith who want to see a strong leader, not a politician, sent to Washington DC to protect the values and communities of faith across Maryland. The coalition is focused on highlighting the needs and values of faith leaders.**I ask that you please forward this to your pastor or faith leader!**
General Teichert is a committed man of faith who is inviting your community faith leader to join the Faith Leaders for Teichert Coalition!
---
| [Join the Coalition](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdv1p2O2qmQBoE__UPS_NNj_BGnD7cYbQ_CYtnAkAyMmDQrgA/viewform?usp=sf_link)
---
Best regards,Torrey WellsTeichertformaryland.com
|

name: Frank Mrvan
subject: Their plan to replace me with a MAGA extremist is already in motion
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Defeat Republicans PAC (www
body:
|
---
I’ve been working hard to deliver results for Northwest Indiana, from voting to pass legislation like the _Inflation Reduction Act_ which strengthened our economy and lowered prescription drug costs, to introducing the _Safe Recovery Together Act_ , legislation that supports survivors of domestic violence.

But divisive House Republicans are focused more on causing chaos and disorder than finding common ground.

Not to mention the GOP promotes threats to cut popular, crucial programs like Medicare and Social Security.

**I refuse to let them grind our progress to a halt**. That’s why I'm running for re-election and working to win back the House majority so that we can defend our community's values. To do that, I need your help.

[Can you split a donation of $15 today between my campaign and Defeat Republicans? clean_body: | I’ve been working hard to deliver results for Northwest Indiana, from voting to pass legislation like the Inflation Reduction Act which strengthened our economy and lowered prescription drug costs, to introducing the Safe Recovery Together Act , legislation that supports survivors of domestic violence. But divisive House Republicans are focused more on causing chaos and disorder than finding common ground. Not to mention the GOP promotes threats to cut popular, crucial programs like Medicare and Social Security. I refuse to let them grind our progress to a halt. That’s why I'm running for re-election and working to win back the House majority so that we can defend our community's values. name: 2024 Strategy via Our Revolution
subject: Elect Progressives. Transform the Party. Win policy change.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13389?t=1011?refcode=email-20240110&akid=5164%2E5885482%2EBmdnZl ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

When you give to Our Revolution, you're supporting the largest
grassroots-funded progressive political organization in the country. And
here’s what that means,
Peter Willis.

We’re organizing to elect Barbara Lee as the next U.S. Senator from
California (and early voting starts in just a few weeks). We’re fighting
to elect and re-elect Progressive champions to Congress going up against
$100 million of AIPAC money and a Party machine supporting the status quo.
We’re strategizing to make sure insurrectionist Donald Trump stays out of
the White House and the GOP stays out of power.

Your support goes directly to our day-to-day work to make 2024 a winning
year for Progressives and democracy.

We’re building on our inside-outside strategy every day. The heart of the
progressive movement is the solidarity and collective action we engage in
as we pursue the better world we all know is possible. While we help elect
Progressives at all levels of government, we organize just as hard to
pressure decision-makers to win progressive policy change.

Like Bernie said, Not me, Us. Big money floods the pockets of corporate
politicians at the expense of our democracy, but while they have money, we
have people! In 2024, our work continues to pressure lawmakers to support
Medicare for All, raise the minimum wage, fight climate change, and make
positive, material changes to peoples’ lives.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13389?t=1043?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20240110&akid=5164%2E5885482%2EBmdnZl ]When you give to Our Revolution you support this work all across the
country. Chip in now to make 2024 a big year of progressive organizing and
electing Progressives at the local, state, and federal levels.

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13389?t=1035?express_lane=true&amount=12&refcode=email-20240110&akid=5164%2E5885482%2EBmdnZl ]CHIP IN $12 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13389?t=1036?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20240110&akid=5164%2E5885482%2EBmdnZl ]CHIP IN $27

Over multiple election cycles, Our Revolution members and volunteers have
built power and elected more than 1,000 progressives — building power from
the bottom up, even as big right-wing corporate special interests tried to
stop us.

Not only are we hitting the streets, we’re hitting the phones and
investing in massive voter turnout operations in key races across the
country. And that’s going to be absolutely vital in 2024 as we organize
for peace, defend Progressives from $100 million of AIPAC money, and keep
Trump out of the White House.

We have a lot of work to do in 2024, and we 100% rely on our grassroots
supporters to make it possible. With an average donation of just $15.13,
your support (especially your support as a sustaining member) is vital.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13392?t=1047&akid=5164%2E5885482%2EBmdnZl ]The best way to grow our grassroots organizing is to become a member of
Our Revolution with a monthly donation. If you can chip in $5, $10, or $27
monthly, you’ll have the chance to weigh in on Our Revolution
endorsements, 2024 organizing strategy, our policy platform, and much
more. Donate monthly now and get even more involved →

When we organize, we win!

Our Revolution

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: RE: UPDATE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
My day in court in D.C. yesterday...
| | | [ ](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kc1u2zAQhJ-GuslYLn8kH3RoyvriIuktvRkUubY3EClBomLET1_IcHr9ZrCYD-vTNPD5qxPNi0C8clwEolA_BOJRv_x9tcf3o6vNfnitnTX6tqX4UyCWr4n-V59XdpQ8DxttXBU7DC2GUFEnG9B7AGtMde30vo0S4jlK0wfCPtoe2lb13gbcK-Mr7hBQg5QgjQKDO6lsDxp0AA3UqiA03Djv4pj9ED_KvKZpF8ZUDd21lGl5TDoIPCwU1pl2N84zxa2xMf9JtU80c_D1x8i51Oc1x9nzwvlShzElLoVI4IELAVDU0XjbSInSKKEOa0mnRJHXJJR7-toNLuM6BxLKBT75Jws-TZ4vWSj37fSdjLlQLkI5CS1ogfaUB45Cufdyv_-Zpl9L-4CPlyj31vz-LKDf7tXcxenGw8CLbYSGyzZhk_sXAAD___RVjPw)
---
Friend,
I was at the D.C. Circuit Court of Appeals yesterday defending my rights that are under attack by the Biden Special Counsel.
But I was honestly far more outraged when I learned about this attack on _you_ ...
_**...A new report shows that Crooked Joe Biden’s prosecutor Jack Smith spent $7.4 MILLION of YOUR taxpayer money just between April and September alone.**_
The next time you look at your grocery bill, the next time you see a clip of our unsecured southern border getting invaded, remember that Biden’s accomplices are lighting your precious money on fire to try and JAIL their opponent and remain in power.
This is why I could NEVER SURRENDER this battle _no matter what_.
Biden and his left-wing accomplices simply do not care about the United States. They do not care about improving the lives of _our_ citizens. They’d sell out America in a heartbeat to make a quick buck.
But I LOVE America. And I will NEVER, _EVER_ let these sick and twisted people destroy the greatest country in history.
If you’re with me, I ask that you make a contribution to help ensure victory in the FIRST election of 2024 only 5 DAYS from today.

The next time you look at your grocery bill, the next time you see a clip of our unsecured southern border getting invaded, remember that Biden’s accomplices are lighting your precious money on fire to try and JAIL their opponent and remain in power. This is why I could NEVER SURRENDER this battle no matter what. Biden and his left-wing accomplices simply do not care about the United States. They do not care about improving the lives of our citizens. They’d sell out America in a heartbeat to make a quick buck. But I LOVE America. And I will NEVER, EVER let these sick and twisted people destroy the greatest country in history. name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: Reserve Your “Western Heritage” DVD Set
body:
Every Hillsdale College student is required to take a class on the Western heritage in order to graduate.

| | | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38963%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Bm%2fTVW%2fU17jk%2flUHuGYuXg&sysid=1)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Every Hillsdale College student is required to take a class on the Western heritage in order to graduate. And every academic year, I’m reminded of the joy it is to pursue the answers to questions like “ _Does God exist? Can we know God?_ ” with my students.

These questions are at the core of what it means to be human - both in our relationship with each other and with God. [ ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38964%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rn8ocE8w6ebi7L8H9g6%2f9A&sysid=1) Today, I want to offer you that same experience by sending you [**a limited-edition DVD box set of Hillsdale's popular online course, “Western Heritage - From the Book of Genesis to John Locke,”**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38975%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EZHUR5hOyuRsCwVpYjoKcg&sysid=1) as a token of our thanks for a generous contribution in support of Hillsdale's efforts to educate America.

I invite you to study the history of the "big questions" with my colleagues and me.

Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link: **[https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-western-heritage-dvd](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38976%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=eEzyjQ74M0mB3noKoF50CQ&sysid=1)**

More than 2,000 people have already requested theirs, so make sure to get your set before they are all gone.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
---

Your America News
---
_Your America News • 625 First Street #183 • Alexandria, VA 22314_
[Unsubscribe](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c9707%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=cwR21zNku5I2ltSrIJc5qg&sysid=1)
_[**unsubscribe**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38977%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=m24UMlxSoIOMyJWixDUazg&sysid=1)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38978%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qAmEmjLyE3ugLcrQnRBpNw&sysid=1)_

Will you join me?
| | |

| Make no mistake about it, Peter - I love my home state of Minnesota.
I've devoted my life to defend my state and country in the United States Marine Corps.
But here's the truth - under the "leadership" of Democrat politicians like Angie Craig... countless Minnesota families are being left behind right now:

* Life has become unaffordable for far too many thanks to 'Bidenomics'

* Our borders are wide open and exposed - the same radical Islamic terrorists who I fought overseas have even tried to cross!

* Our national debt has skyrocketed to $33 Trillion and counting

* Angie Craig's extreme pals like Ilhan Omar are using their platform to spread propaganda and antisemitism instead of serving the interests of our state

* And weak-on-crime leadership is emboldening criminals in Minnesota - something I've seen firsthand as a prosecutor

After spending most of my life in service, giving back to the communities I love... I can't sit by and watch these politicians now lead our state down the wrong path.
That's why I'm stepping up. I'm running for Congress to FIRE Democrat Angie Craig and FLIP MN-02!
But I know I can't do this alone... So today, Peter - [I'm asking for YOUR help.](https://rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GqajQGPHHUvBMpMUtoalHfmyrInSdbKKtLBw2sFOVKL2tM2LmO4rlHECFzjJ3FILtYNYYv-s0-Y2RFlj4JCSahkIFjzK4KCoiiD5wUIjSXST40brs0z63NHvZAGOec6px5_iT6f0uuSS2bs-USXjGpp4eXHbFjXDOtWIZHlHOiqXMCzb2MP0uHmrT5SJl5d5A46v9_vba_J1FGWm0MxXjhMk5uB2CALEySB5OiuOCHePJcI-sgO7Lin8RqvrF-4GTke2UViMo-bOAqmHt4UHotdll-0LmHSwlFp9dYHs8rQfTHv70sTiCzwPQUWMIz0JSkwj9SZR-Ebf-DSqkhz9LRyKOiojjcodfVzwKo2LTrEz4rgpI1ndkLEEK39_JonhIoprZJzlLc1kKVbAah8ncQ_7f1MUxyozvcH_IO9DVvxlQweS5laDh9QqzJ506hL79qsaXADcJziY7fRCBBkOYDt7UfgtikvQoO83VZBsogM=&c=Jxs5rsNIYUq-jaAN6eSvA6XYRoBRx_NkIyy3v4h6J8B9Qy2W6YGHAQ==&ch=JM2U3V8v4U8jbIRnWuCnQa2YxYHEJoTQ7qi3d6UbAUTUhhkIYXA9Vg==&ses=YmKIjHrB2xuLOd3rbbLTsU5gMj0wqyGjXthONxKkP3uLhSpdZquT-Q==)

| Minnesota's 2nd District is a battleground race - what happens in close elections like this one could even determine control of Congress NATIONWIDE.
With the future of our state and our entire country on the line, I'm asking for the support of patriotic Americans like you to join me in this mission.
Angie Craig is sure to get millions of dollars in checks from her D.C. Democrat mega-donors. But she's only ever won this swing district by single-digit percentage points...
So Peter, here's the simple truth - with enough of an investment from generous folks like you who share my love for Minnesota and America...
...we can compete with Craig's war chest and WIN THIS RACE!
[What do you say - can I count on you to make your Founding Contribution of any amount today and help deliver victory in MN-02?](https://rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GqajQGPHHUvBMpMUtoalHfmyrInSdbKKtLBw2sFOVKL2tM2LmO4rlHECFzjJ3FILtYNYYv-s0-Y2RFlj4JCSahkIFjzK4KCoiiD5wUIjSXST40brs0z63NHvZAGOec6px5_iT6f0uuSS2bs-USXjGpp4eXHbFjXDOtWIZHlHOiqXMCzb2MP0uHmrT5SJl5d5A46v9_vba_J1FGWm0MxXjhMk5uB2CALEySB5OiuOCHePJcI-sgO7Lin8RqvrF-4GTke2UViMo-bOAqmHt4UHotdll-0LmHSwlFp9dYHs8rQfTHv70sTiCzwPQUWMIz0JSkwj9SZR-Ebf-DSqkhz9LRyKOiojjcodfVzwKo2LTrEz4rgpI1ndkLEEK39_JonhIoprZJzlLc1kKVbAah8ncQ_7f1MUxyozvcH_IO9DVvxlQweS5laDh9QqzJ506hL79qsaXADcJziY7fRCBBkOYDt7UfgtikvQoO83VZBsogM=&c=Jxs5rsNIYUq-jaAN6eSvA6XYRoBRx_NkIyy3v4h6J8B9Qy2W6YGHAQ==&ch=JM2U3V8v4U8jbIRnWuCnQa2YxYHEJoTQ7qi3d6UbAUTUhhkIYXA9Vg==&ses=YmKIjHrB2xuLOd3rbbLTsU5gMj0wqyGjXthONxKkP3uLhSpdZquT-Q==)

clean_body: Will you join me? | | | | == | Make no mistake about it, Peter - I love my home state of Minnesota. I've devoted my life to defend my state and country in the United States Marine Corps. But here's the truth - under the "leadership" of Democrat politicians like Angie Craig... countless Minnesota families are being left behind right now: Life has become unaffordable for far too many thanks to 'Bidenomics' Our borders are wide open and exposed - the same radical Islamic terrorists who I fought overseas have even tried to cross! Our national debt has skyrocketed to $33 Trillion and counting Angie Craig's extreme pals like Ilhan Omar are using their platform to spread propaganda and antisemitism instead of serving the interests of our state * And weak-on-crime leadership is emboldening criminals in Minnesota - something I've seen firsthand as a prosecutor After spending most of my life in service, giving back to the communities I love... I can't sit by and watch these politicians now lead our state down the wrong path. That's why I'm stepping up. I'm running for Congress to FIRE Democrat Angie Craig and FLIP MN-02! But I know I can't do this alone... So today, Peter - == | | == | Minnesota's 2nd District is a battleground race - what happens in close elections like this one could even determine control of Congress NATIONWIDE. With the future of our state and our entire country on the line, I'm asking for the support of patriotic Americans like you to join me in this mission. Angie Craig is sure to get millions of dollars in checks from her D.C. Democrat mega-donors. But she's only ever won this swing district by single-digit percentage points... So Peter, here's the simple truth - with enough of an investment from generous folks like you who share my love for Minnesota and America... ...we can compete with Craig's war chest and WIN THIS RACE! == | == | | == | Thank you for taking this important step towards making our state and country a better place. Generous donors like you will be the lifeblood of this mission, helping us buy ads, put up yard signs, and conduct other campaign operations that are essential to a successful campaign. For Minnesota and America, Joe Teirab | | Joe Teirab is a veteran of the U.S. Marine Corps. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the U.S. Marine Corps or the Department of Defense. Joe Teirab is a former federal prosecutor of the U.S. Department of Justice. Use of job title and photographs does not imply endorsement by the U.S. Department of Justice. | == == | | | | | | | Joe Teirab for Congress | PO Box 1894, Burnsville, MN 55337 | | Sent by mailto:info@joeformn2.com

body:
| We’re proud of the broad, diverse coalition of leaders and organizations standing alongside Adam’s campaign for U.S. Senate.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=5003%2E5257348%2EAWity8)
Hi Derek —
Last January, Adam announced he was running to take our fight — for democracy, for justice, for truth — to the U.S. Senate. **_The support he’s received has been nothing short of incredible._**
**[Today, Adam needs to know if you’re all in to win this race. Will you sign on today to personally endorse Adam’s campaign for Senate?](https://act.adamschiff.com/signup/engagement-20240110-endorsement?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240110_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=5003%2E5257348%2EAWity8)**

**We’re proud of the broad, diverse coalition of leaders and organizations standing alongside Adam’s campaign for the U.S. Senate.**
Elected officials, labor unions, community organizations, and hundreds of thousands of grassroots supporters like you are showing the strength and momentum of our campaign.
We’re just a few weeks away from ballots being sent to California voters, and many voters are still making up their minds. We want to hear from you directly:
**[Will you personally endorse Adam’s campaign for the U.S. Senate?](https://act.adamschiff.com/signup/engagement-20240110-endorsement?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240110_AM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=5003%2E5257348%2EAWity8)**

Your support is crucial during these final weeks of the campaign. Thank you for taking the important step of endorsing Adam today.
— Team Schiff

disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Teichert for Senate]()
body:
| | | | |
---

**Endorsements Continue Rolling in for Teichert for U.S. Senate**
**BALTIMORE, Md.** – With endorsements pouring in from state senators, delegates, law enforcement, and more, retired Brigadier General and candidate for U.S. Senate John Teichert is now adding Delegate Stu Schmidt of Anne Arundel County, Former State Senator Ed Reilly, and Delegate Todd Morgan of Calvert and St. Mary's Counties to his list of supporters.
Delegate Stu Schmidt of District 33 shared why he’s supporting the 33-year veteran’s bid for the senate saying, **“As a Maryland Delegate, I proudly support General John Teichert for U.S. Senate. A strong leader and dedicated resident of my district, John's commitment to service for his country and community is unmatched. Endorsing General Teichert for U.S. Senate is an easy choice. Let's send this proven leader to Washington for a better future for all of us."**
Former State Senator Ed Reilly was also eager to endorse the General, stating that he is **"Proud to support General John Teichert for the U.S. Senate. His exceptional leadership, unyielding dedication, and shared American values resonates with all Marylanders. General Teichert is the authentic and driven leader we need at this critical time for our nation."**
These noteworthy endorsements are yet another example of Teichert's growing strength in his Senate campaign. Teichert's strong principles and policy stances serve as a reminder to Marylanders of why he is the only suitable candidate to represent his beloved state of Maryland in the U.S. Senate.
|
---
| | |
---

body:
Time is running out, don't lose your chance to win a rare LEO tribute gift package | | | |
---

# TIME IS RUNNING OUT...
ENTER TO WIN BIG PRIZES & SUPPORT OUR POLICE!!
---
| | | [ ](https://policeofficersdefensecoalition.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9d11f7ea2f59091c97b28f496&id=b369602838&e=bb810f31a7)

|
###
### 3 DAYS LEFT left to enter the raffle to win a Limited Edition Law Enforcement Tribute Rifle & Wooden Thin Blue Line Flag!

Don't miss your chance to own a RARE & limited edition Law Enforcement Tribute set. You can purchase 10 entries for $50 or 20 entries for $75. The raffle will be only be open until **January **, so don’t wait to donate to a great cause AND have the chance to win these rare, USA and hand-made pro-police items!

Enter the raffle at [go.eventgroovefundraising.com/leotribute](https://policeofficersdefensecoalition.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9d11f7ea2f59091c97b28f496&id=2f8caa6f2c&e=bb810f31a7) or text "LEOTribute" to (406) 302- 5086

All proceeds will go to support law enforcement officers that have been charged with a crime after doing their job the way they have been trained. All entry fees and donations raised will go to helping with the defense of these officers and support for their families.

_ABOUT THE PRIZES:_
Henry’s distinctive **Law Enforcement Tribute Edition Rifle** is elegantly festooned with graceful 24K gold-plated engraving patterned by world-renowned engraver Heidi Roos. The bold American-style scrollwork makes this commemorative, heirloom-quality rifle a true functional work of art that pays a fitting tribute to those who have sworn an oath to serve and protect. _Generously donated by Henry Repeating Arms._

The **Wooden Thin Blue Line Flag** is proudly American made and is perfect for your home or office workspace. This flag will show your patriotism and your support for our courageous law
enforcement! _Generously donated by Flags of Valor. _

_Thank you for your support of our mission. Please forward and share with your friends and family!_
---

body:
Did you hear?! A very important date is approaching in 7 DAYS, Peter. Here's what you need to know.
---
| | | | | | | | | | Please see a message from our sponsors. ---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=3c737e56632649e39eb4555b6f13ce98&_e=M5eHVk6uSOViCR3s951b4eGc_xX99jhsl5uF17YbXni5xXOR-H_yUmwlE4l60E8JlHn_5AbzXsV5h3980yDP12eBV3YAru5kMRF9Wwql9et7AGY0Vnn4GGJ1YH5W7Rlbby8RSWeZwKoTlq75ZSLunGvdsKmJWM0cEBHRkb6ZHV2jfreApvlCF1zJLCBLvUHIBApgFb_N0k3iqlFQk8jrCwPCl8E-BpurqrdUOcZZlThm5j2i42i-tymbb1yFU--BQs4gHV_HKK1K-UW5Q9--7__h2_8oVmQnTgXjrwdgwZUZT0eRN01a_xHPLc5w75TzmxtPwbtRzRhXcDEpG-xPFy1QrjarP2Rq6IyGpL0KGnhgJk6igdfgKO4H9yezWBovPuZCRUP_e38_rtZxLSs_rYxVGq1NxLCQfuznrYJgfOA%3D)
Peter! Did you hear?! **WE ARE LESS THAN 6 DAYS AWAY FROM THE IOWA CAUCUS!** You need to see this ASAP! **We have 0 days to waste**. The _entire nation_ will be watching this caucus to see what happens... but we have just over a week to pour every effort into winning this critical Iowa nomination. If there's ever been a time to step up for a candidate,**this is it**. Nothing matters more than supporting the candidate this nation needs NOW. _**Can you help us?**_ **[>>> RUSH IN ANY AMOUNT TO HELP! <<<](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=3c737e56632649e39eb4555b6f13ce98&_e=M5eHVk6uSOViCR3s951b4eGc_xX99jhsl5uF17YbXni5xXOR-H_yUmwlE4l60E8JlHn_5AbzXsV5h3980yDP12eBV3YAru5kMRF9Wwql9et7AGY0Vnn4GGJ1YH5W7Rlbby8RSWeZwKoTlq75ZSLunGvdsKmJWM0cEBHRkb6ZHV2jfreApvlCF1zJLCBLvUHIBApgFb_N0k3iqlFQk8jrCwPCl8E-BpurqrdUOcZZlThm5j2i42i-tymbb1yFU--BQs4gHV_HKK1K-UW5Q9--70B5Oq1NXhYSrugEgFgu1EVCrHtYRGsxevQLGev_alk09aA7zWRQvQdmApXWEPs3lBUo74LzPFlj9uXYF9N6GKi2c4bGjO7sOL6YM5BYw2A9hcZR3dftswUyflFefZ5tFh0fRqztIt29zaJwz0CYm4g%3D ">>> RUSH IN ANY AMOUNT TO HELP! <<<")** \- Lexi Team DeSantis \---------------------------Forwarded Message-------------------------
Hi Peter, We'll cut to the chase. We have just 6 days before we--
* Prove to the radical Left that we have what it takes to win.

* Shock every person who has bought into the fake narratives of the liberal media throughout this race.

* Take a giant leap forward toward winning for the American people.

With your support, we can make sure that January 15th, 2024 goes down as the most incredible day of our campaign yet. _But we only have 6 DAYS to do it._ We promise you, that we are putting in the work to win the Iowa Caucus. However, we're fighting against $40,000,000 that has been spent against Ron DeSantis. **This is where you come in.** What you can give today is what will drive our actions tomorrow and the final 5 days before ballots are cast.
---
| | [CONTRIBUTE NOW!](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=3c737e56632649e39eb4555b6f13ce98&_e=M5eHVk6uSOViCR3s951b4eGc_xX99jhsl5uF17YbXni5xXOR-H_yUmwlE4l60E8JlHn_5AbzXsV5h3980yDP12eBV3YAru5kMRF9Wwql9et7AGY0Vnn4GGJ1YH5W7Rlbby8RSWeZwKoTlq75ZSLunGvdsKmJWM0cEBHRkb6ZHV2jfreApvlCF1zJLCBLvUHIBApgFb_N0k3iqlFQk8jrCwPCl8E-BpurqrdUOcZZlThm5j2i42i-tymbb1yFU--BQs4gHV_HKK1K-UW5Q9--709JY7RB-1dwvh_5iUUXvKID_jPo_E3J1-LzZW6KSKg-Gg2z58CRt08jxmI-8-aOApF08Mq0HktfzGGLSO5Qb8kIn7oCmd1pqWjWhkJtOfBBcPtSiP_79BCbWkewF5Tp7pZ-9QN2csSM1IdfdhFxBmw%3D)
---
We've reached out for your support because WE ARE COUNTING ON YOU to help us take this fight to the finish line. Our 6-DAY SPRINT starts now. Any small amount helps, Peter. Please, **____[_give what you can_](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=3c737e56632649e39eb4555b6f13ce98&_e=M5eHVk6uSOViCR3s951b4eGc_xX99jhsl5uF17YbXni5xXOR-H_yUmwlE4l60E8JlHn_5AbzXsV5h3980yDP12eBV3YAru5kMRF9Wwql9et7AGY0Vnn4GGJ1YH5W7Rlbby8RSWeZwKoTlq75ZSLunGvdsKmJWM0cEBHRkb6ZHV2jfreApvlCF1zJLCBLvUHIBApgFb_N0k3iqlFQk8jrCwPCl8E-BpurqrdUOcZZlThm5j2i42i-tymbb1yFU--BQs4gHV_HKK1K-UW5Q9--7x5o0CE1vXo083tB6RNqcwFd4RqbZzxrtiMFLgEqCra8f5WwaeIB9AkoKQ72UsBjaUmzY2Xl1sKzyDo75leyMXaMcVz2IV4v3J3fAWjqiSUcB81DS3gCI4EotY5hveWwg5j95kRTwSXo0hATLsn4Ujo%3D)____** __ before we take on the caucus. Thank you for your support,
Team DeSantis

---
| | |
_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=3c737e56632649e39eb4555b6f13ce98&_e=M5eHVk6uSOViCR3s951b4eGc_xX99jhsl5uF17YbXni5xXOR-H_yUmwlE4l60E8JlHn_5AbzXsV5h3980yDP12eBV3YAru5kMRF9Wwql9et7AGY0Vnn4GGJ1YH5W7Rlbby8RSWeZwKoTlq75ZSLunGvdsKmJWM0cEBHRkb6ZHV2jfreApvlCF1zJLCBLvUHIBApgFb_N0k3iqlFQk8jrCwPCl8E-BpurqrdUOcZZlThm5j2i42i-tymbb1yFU--BQs4gHV_HKK1K-UW5Q9--71fyi-E81Il7uxZrsAYTdD-oUnbPLsPnakojKEOdHm1XjRXm2LhYLLDlDbhjD09tEERn5VuGpdAlzwUP0tVySGWAfx6CSVJmZP1twu_4HCFHkcURIexPH1A8nyoi1xL5ntwkykyx1a_4KGJi8juNSmw%3D)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=3c737e56632649e39eb4555b6f13ce98&_e=M5eHVk6uSOViCR3s951b4eGc_xX99jhsl5uF17YbXni5xXOR-H_yUmwlE4l60E8JlHn_5AbzXsV5h3980yDP12eBV3YAru5kMRF9Wwql9et7AGY0Vnn4GGJ1YH5W7Rlbby8RSWeZwKoTlq75ZSLunGvdsKmJWM0cEBHRkb6ZHV2jfreApvlCF1zJLCBLvUHIBApgFb_N0k3iqlFQk8jrCwPCl8E-BpurqrdUOcZZlThm5j2i42i-tymbb1yFU--BQs4gHV_HKK1K-UW5Q9--7-P0ZsqS6L8zIwQBtC1z9_0r8SwfCka9vmEyKZ3RkFPgJpjrXVy1LVsAwO_8XsYbz98seFpOy7DqjfWeGgilpzQDdq2N2eWjoljztqrqpNq7bxDFSRejk1RHzVVPPy0i3uX5_JwPArQDWVefKN3ghRc%3D)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
---
| Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
---

Tallahassee, FL 32315

name: Giffords.org
subject: Donald Trump wants us to “get over” gun violence
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We’re outraged
#

**_“It’s horrible to see that happening ... but we have to get over it.”_** \- Donald Trump after last week’s devastating mass shooting at Perry High School in Iowa:
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan24.i9S2EM&refcode=em240110-1-30&t=1&akid=7378%2E3935704%2Epx2voI)
Donald Trump wants survivors to “get over” gun violence.
He wants our communities to “get over” the fact that gun violence kills over 43,000 of our neighbors each year.
He wants us to “get over” the reality that gun violence is the NUMBER ONE cause of death for our nation’s children.
We’re outraged.
The **only** 2024 presidential candidate who is ready to implement real gun safety solutions and stand up to the gun lobby is President Biden. Period. As we enter 2024, our work to reelect President Biden and continue making progress is ramping up. We need your support to make sure he wins the presidential election this November.
[**Will you make a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today to help us make sure we have four more years of gun safety leadership in the White House?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan24.i9S2EM&refcode=em240110-1-30&t=2&akid=7378%2E3935704%2Epx2voI)

_Dear Fellow American,_

Our opponent Bob Ferguson (Attorney General of WA) recently mailed out hundreds of thousands of checks to Washingtonians across the state - money won in a lawsuit brought by the state.

**It just so happens that the recipients of these checks are the very same folks that Ferguson is hoping will vote for him in the 2024 gubernatorial election.**

_An elected official mailing checks signed by the government to voters in an upcoming election doesn’t seem right to us._

Many of you have reached out to our team in an attempt to donate these chicken check funds from Bob Ferguson to our commonsense, conservative campaign.

**We’re pleased to share with you that we’ve opened the Chicken Check Fund just for that purpose.** All donations made to the **Chicken Check Fund** will go toward Reichert campaign operations, knocking doors, tv and radio ads, contacting voters, and more.

**[If you’d like to make a donation toward our fund, click here.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=90fd244645d24a2ebeddfbda48f2bc99&_e=px_CkSSd6y0WIa9lHU1oOld9EnWL4PbUlLyTTp1jDydLJx1CprSBH5TBU0yAzQByqzWoq6ZbRA49yIy1DP_S2KZrygI269fdDx3f8A5lMge96ea8uS8IgaOnzW7rD_xhq6xqEHgmVEFX8jyY1ro39IDnlIeRzZxdlY2xxgika9B2DyCfe52-1gU-EVQ9uJ56fB5qcbbWPNQ4Iv2xcfBaa5dtEAQ_Wv-_POF5nGZhnSGw7jUzTKvjQ_UqpNTpm-C0wPxco0tiOamWBawBznOcPMBGRYZPxtJEOooLFcYOESm11hO4RY39JKRafOslupb_djyWtOCbYnRXRYehrF3-TVt10yfQUES2KWu1LqccYoDoobwWmvcN3Tas6YbfqLXqDH9t1OvR1ci_Rcmygps5rEpLdVBhFai_eQF3xIZ-gPo%3D)**

_Sincerely,_

Team Reichert

name: Josh Hawley
subject: Countdown.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | Peter,
2024 is here, and the countdown till November 5th is on. The stakes are high. The consequences of more Democratic control loom large. How did we get here? Democrats led our country at full speed to the brink of ruin.

And do they change course? No. They defend, double, and triple down on the very policies that led us here.

I've spent my time in the Senate fighting for the interests of the hardworking people of Missouri- and that's upset some of the entrenched swamp creatures hell-bent on consolidating power for themselves.

Democrats are threatened by my unshakable conservative principles, and my refusal to fall in line has angered the establishment Republicans who for years have expanded the size of government and sold out the middle class to China.

In this year, you will see left-wing radicals attack me, and moderate Republicans watch from the sidelines with quiet approval.

**_President Joe Biden called on me to be 'flat beaten’ for a reason._**

Which side are you on? Are you a sideline Republican, or an in-the-fight conservative? There’s too much at stake just to watch America meander down the path toward destruction.

I’m in the fight, but I can’t do it alone. Will you join with me as we fight for a more conservative country? A place where we can raise our families in peace and prosperity? If so, contribute below, or consider becoming a monthly contributor.
---

clean_body: | | | Peter, 2024 is here, and the countdown till November 5th is on. The stakes are high. The consequences of more Democratic control loom large. How did we get here? Democrats led our country at full speed to the brink of ruin. And do they change course? No. They defend, double, and triple down on the very policies that led us here. I've spent my time in the Senate fighting for the interests of the hardworking people of Missouri- and that's upset some of the entrenched swamp creatures hell-bent on consolidating power for themselves. Democrats are threatened by my unshakable conservative principles, and my refusal to fall in line has angered the establishment Republicans who for years have expanded the size of government and sold out the middle class to China. In this year, you will see left-wing radicals attack me, and moderate Republicans watch from the sidelines with quiet approval. President Joe Biden called on me to be 'flat beaten’ for a reason. Which side are you on? Are you a sideline Republican, or an in-the-fight conservative? There’s too much at stake just to watch America meander down the path toward destruction. I’m in the fight, but I can’t do it alone. Will you join with me as we fight for a more conservative country? A place where we can raise our families in peace and prosperity? If so, contribute below, or consider becoming a monthly contributor. In Liberty, Josh Hawley | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | |

name: Trevor Dolan, Evergreen
subject: Starting tomorrow: American Climate Corps listening sessions
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN COLLABORATIVE
body:
The White House wants to hear from you
| | | | | [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/339?t=2&akid=13980%2E53494%2EeCYL-D)
---
| | Friend,

For years, Evergreen and the climate movement fought tirelessly for a Climate Corps. **And last September, the Biden administration took Evergreen's specific recommendations and delivered.** The **American Climate Corps (ACC)** is a true game-changer in the fight against the climate crisis. The program will create 20,000 good-paying jobs for young people in the clean energy economy.

Since President Biden's announcement, nearly 50,000 people from across the U.S. have signed up to learn more about the ACC. Now, the White House is hosting their **first virtual listening session on the ACC.**

Over the course of four listening sessions, the Biden administration wants to hear your ideas about how to make this program a success, **and you can sign up for the first one held tomorrow, Thursday, January 11, 10 a.m. ET/7 a.m. PT.**
---
[SIGN UP NOW](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/5108?t=4&akid=13980%2E53494%2EeCYL-D)
---
I'm definitely going to be there, and if you join me, you'll hear from climate champs like Sen. Ed Markey and Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, learn more about the program, and get to share your ideas on how we can build a successful ACC that delivers for our communities and our climate.

**[This is our chance to ensure this program serves our collective needs and leaves no one behind.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/5108?t=5&akid=13980%2E53494%2EeCYL-D)**

I hope to see you there!

Sincerely,

Trevor Dolan
Industry and Workforce Policy Lead
Evergreen Collaborative
---
|
---
**P.S.** If you're not sure where to start or what to say at a listening session, [you can see some of our recommendations for how the ACC should prioritize a living wage, enlist corpsmembers from diverse backgrounds, and ensure sustainable funding here](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/5109?t=6&akid=13980%2E53494%2EeCYL-D).
---

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: These questions are at the core of what it means to be human
body:
Every Hillsdale College student is required to take a class on the Western heritage in order to graduate.

| | | This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5482640f14be4e69996869bc06d2e5c8&_e=fP1fWVkMJPgGu7ZJoq9AhqC2zR_VwKsmOYR69PDngA_SoV3srsiEy_4Ls7QgVrejcvmEGvq1PPW0gtISJZ5SD8O8SrBGXr1mZF8KsOZCKnveOQppEIPslXZdMqDCn9EDr8Dc3eA1SO6ZjKqaZTQG8WVSnp1U8uehAnOHxxFw_O7NcK1Nm2aWdwrEhePMTHqKQpyGiuXBuQim9WDtoVlx5TiaAPUPatsMNvRy2IQBRP4TUKy25q1HjoY5OPN_qhlCmy94k_Kw7IMhQ5Qb1-Dv5IlXUQevkrJ-XBwMyKZ947uyqk2NPHJmhUeCLl4wPAH1SD9kuQcEdQXDLhZgzkwzYsT1toS0MZDBeHisVLX4cS9hHQZCSD2O_TXPh_GFv20bcT7qn93wO5nApmgAFN7QATa8BHv2Z6bk_C8nuciiZ3Q%3D)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Every Hillsdale College student is required to take a class on the Western heritage in order to graduate. And every academic year, I'm reminded of the joy it is to pursue the answers to questions like "_Does God exist? Can we know God?_ " with my students.

These questions are at the core of what it means to be human - both in our relationship with each other and with God. [ ](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5482640f14be4e69996869bc06d2e5c8&_e=fP1fWVkMJPgGu7ZJoq9AhqC2zR_VwKsmOYR69PDngA_SoV3srsiEy_4Ls7QgVrejcvmEGvq1PPW0gtISJZ5SD8O8SrBGXr1mZF8KsOZCKnveOQppEIPslXZdMqDCn9EDr8Dc3eA1SO6ZjKqaZTQG8WVSnp1U8uehAnOHxxFw_O7NcK1Nm2aWdwrEhePMTHqKQpyGiuXBuQim9WDtoVlx5TiaAPUPatsMNvRy2IQBRP4TUKy25q1HjoY5OPN_qhlCmy94k_Kw7IMhQ5Qb1-Dv5Irkc_6iQckI9ogDym1wplzvNMCYetKxt-8ucnrKhu4NbV7AHv9FVDsDqEMeI0pqSVUNk3WkKD280BkHK6Gup3CWyDvjuDUgzXWmNXBWLg1HK9T3KZpxQkR8yDoJRqWcM0UxWaSkw9YQV-pZfCUATNQ%3D) Today, I want to offer you that same experience by sending you [**a limited-edition DVD box set of Hillsdale's popular online course, "Western Heritage - From the Book of Genesis to John Locke,"**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5482640f14be4e69996869bc06d2e5c8&_e=fP1fWVkMJPgGu7ZJoq9AhqC2zR_VwKsmOYR69PDngA_SoV3srsiEy_4Ls7QgVrejcvmEGvq1PPW0gtISJZ5SD8O8SrBGXr1mZF8KsOZCKnveOQppEIPslXZdMqDCn9EDr8Dc3eA1SO6ZjKqaZTQG8WVSnp1U8uehAnOHxxFw_O7NcK1Nm2aWdwrEhePMTHqKQpyGiuXBuQim9WDtoVlx5TiaAPUPatsMNvRy2IQBRP4TUKy25q1HjoY5OPN_qhlCmy94k_Kw7IMhQ5Qb1-Dv5IghEzuQQJG0efhvHlQXSeTH_feQ8JEtFPSN0KjkxrMJAk5aylQuKJsmP8K829QMzordQ9IrK1J7Ri29k3jKrt11XDfpo4Qnrr1-rH1tcCvHh1Dq5Y-Fvu2zj3ya4Nkaxtw9c0g_LzDZfgXPBCYSKgA%3D) as a token of our thanks for a generous contribution in support of Hillsdale's efforts to educate America.

I invite you to study the history of the "big questions" with my colleagues and me.

Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link: **[https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-western-heritage-dvd](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5482640f14be4e69996869bc06d2e5c8&_e=fP1fWVkMJPgGu7ZJoq9AhqC2zR_VwKsmOYR69PDngA_SoV3srsiEy_4Ls7QgVrejcvmEGvq1PPW0gtISJZ5SD8O8SrBGXr1mZF8KsOZCKnveOQppEIPslXZdMqDCn9EDr8Dc3eA1SO6ZjKqaZTQG8WVSnp1U8uehAnOHxxFw_O7NcK1Nm2aWdwrEhePMTHqKQpyGiuXBuQim9WDtoVlx5TiaAPUPatsMNvRy2IQBRP4TUKy25q1HjoY5OPN_qhlCmy94k_Kw7IMhQ5Qb1-Dv5KDlQPmpa1UA6G-Q1kPB_re9TGJ-4XTCzDwNNMzNZQhQsYb2YECP-eOHIiWDyPRDuXvVQagkDi-OSz0ctM9uAL1mh-MVx-Sv7oQvKA5FH0QAOI7_T0snt70Mq48BMYzjgwnw3vwTD4jjd4TEa2rtsx0%3D)**

More than 2,000 people have already requested theirs, so make sure to get your set before they are all gone.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
---

Conservative Liberty Wire
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: The Courier Team
subject: Trump and Fox News tonight
body:
The Iowa Caucus is in five days and tonight the GOP is holding its final presidential debate.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76833447/448578311/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzFkNWU4OTAtZDVhZi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=AytroGebGy_BQ2My2G4jNIs6wH7xRNgZfW_udLmeBlw=&emci=def4843d-f0ae-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=71d5e890-d5af-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=14016711)
Peter,
For a while now, mainstream media outlets have pushed the idea that there’s a so-called “rift” between Fox News and Donald Trump.
We’ve already told you why that narrative is totally bogus. But here’s more evidence in case you're not convinced:
**Tonight, Fox News is counter-programming the final GOP debate before the Iowa Caucus with an exclusive town hall starring (you guessed it!) Donald J. Trump.**
Skipping the debates may be a shrewd political move. After all, Trump’s lead over his Republican rivals has only grown in recent months.
But shrewd politics aren't always good for democracy. By refusing to debate, Trump is ignoring yet another important democratic norm. And troublingly, he’s telegraphing exactly the dictator President he’s promising to be on the campaign trail.
**Peter, by giving Donald Trump an infomercial just five days before the Iowa Caucus, Fox News is putting all its cards on the table. They will do and say anything to ensure ratings stay high and Trump becomes President again.**
[**We can't let Fox News keep destroying our democracy. If you're ready to fight back, please pitch in $5 today to help us fight back in 2024 and beyond.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76833449/448578313/-2054784284?refcode=em20240110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzFkNWU4OTAtZDVhZi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=AytroGebGy_BQ2My2G4jNIs6wH7xRNgZfW_udLmeBlw=)
Our mission of providing high-quality local news to communities vulnerable to Fox News’ lies and propaganda is informed by our belief that good information is the best antidote to bad information.
As the 2024 cycle picks up, we’re looking to continue to expand into more key battleground states to serve as a bulwark against Fox News and other right-wing misinformation. But we can only continue to grow with your support.
[**Please chip in what you can today to power Democracy's Newsroom.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76833450/448578314/-2054784284?refcode=em20240110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzFkNWU4OTAtZDVhZi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=AytroGebGy_BQ2My2G4jNIs6wH7xRNgZfW_udLmeBlw=)

name: Marsha Blackburn
subject: Two Emails! Three Texts! And NO response???
body:
I still haven’t seen your name come through on my petition to require Voter ID in all 50 states.

| |
---
| | | |
**Petition ID: JV839 - Friend
Attempt 1: FAILED TO RESPOND
Attempt 2: RESPONSE PENDING

_[FINAL CALL: Do you support enforcing voter ID laws in all 50 states?](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38973%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AsRRUlDnciYXkpZbWRLAJA&sysid=1 "FINAL CALL: Do you support
enforcing voter ID laws in all 50 states?")_**
---
| | | [ADD YOUR NAME NOW >>](https://secure.winred.com/btvf/voter-id-petition/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20240110_WG-YAN2.103100_t1433116-1043&ex_tid=20240110_WG-YAN2.103100_t1433116-1043&utm_content=tv-yan-20240110&xunv=tv-yan-20240110 "ADD YOUR NAME NOW >>")
---

Friend,

I’ve emailed you TWICE. And I know my team has sent you at least 3 texts about this!

But I still haven’t seen your name come through on my petition to require Voter ID in all 50 states.

Weeks ago, I began collecting signatures on my petition to enforce voter ID laws in all 50 states. Conservatives across the country stepped up and signed their name to protect our democracy.

But if I don’t receive another 147 signatures before January 31st, I won’t have the grassroots support necessary to protect our democracy and save the integrity of our elections from the Democrats' electioneering scheme.

Friend, four other Republicans in your zip code have already signed their name to secure our elections. _**[Will you add your name now before I pull an updated count first thing tomorrow morning?](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38974%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mk7kZRrYVaXEK6XcNPrNqg&sysid=1 "Will you add your name now
before I pull an updated count first thing tomorrow morning?")**_
---
| | | [SIGN ON: SECURE OUR ELECTIONS](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38985%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LuE1P1H46%2f%2b3qRmm%2fCBSfg&sysid=1 "SIGN ON: SECURE OUR ELECTIONS")
---
Thank you in advance for your attention to this urgent matter!

\- Marsha Blackburn

name: Response Urgently Requested ----------- House GOP
subject: Fox News Reports: 85% of illegal immigrants are being released into the interior of the United States
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Last month shattered the record for the most illegal border crossings in a single month.

| |

---
| | | Our stomachs are in knots.

**Fox News just BLEW THE LID OFF a secret, closed-door meeting with Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas. He reportedly told Border Patrol Agents that over 85% of illegal immigrants are being released into the interior of the United States.**

Take a moment to let that sink in.

Last month shattered the record for the most illegal border crossings in a single month. Now the vast majority are being released into our country. This is a national emergency.

We're on the cusp of a huge vote to impeach Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas. In fact, the first hearing is today - so please answer this right now:

name: Quentin James
subject: become a 2024 Digital Member
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe [click here.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GJFfovgZaqyhL6oVedQTvxqf62j1-674ssdeYZmJRYBzWSHitiKSzbPsrpv-_hwFxmusDClMi_fBQryOBnrEe8Va5HhbGNQt-Xb2hmICXGkXroNWN7Wi-dFn-ACk7Epg2L7IczNePEIgWQ3oAB8UIicu2dptyj15I0dfMCfDB008q04g0aPbMkx8UBqjvpz7xDvfO3HxlIrRpNRiPaTtuU7NgKt4FWLrVHlA4UvdSk3bOl7Epyxs2il2G9YhU1sHmArdpmTyRqj8ZYRFu7W8VD7dYaQlKT4MFsKYqG82HRKCF8Vv-E2nhaq7AZmuHjeHkqxd9FMSxs8frgFzEP0ROo6ZSCsC6ZCOHBOBUvKM5b_JlcO1zGnfU-9F_tONMAT5bOzrJ3vq1HTqi5wy0_-dQsinFY4dzJ-IM50EZbIf2H1yE7s7xiYMFgn5WIbgRcUdI/42v/-LbPgpJwRhC997U6jfw5dQ/h0/kjfOZNN09wYcnyUIa-j1ARKP6LUfAubpU8WqJ7UIuuw)
| | Peter,

There’s so much at stake in 2024, Peter — that’s why here at The Collective PAC, we’re dedicated to electing Black candidates up and down the ballot and across the country.

# ONE OF US- FIGHTING FOR US!
---
---
---
| | | Fellow Patriots,
As you've likely heard, yesterday my Democrat colleagues in the Maine House of Representatives voted 80-60 against opening an impeachment inquiry into Secretary Bellows questionable conduct. This lawfare is unacceptable and has no place in Maine.
I've been in this fight since the beginning and was the only elected official to stand with President Trump and his legal team at the hearing against being barred from the Maine ballot by Secretary Bellows. I will do everything I can to help support President Trump's appeal with both the Maine State and U.S. Supreme Courts.
We are seeing the effects of unchecked one-party Democrat rule in Augusta. We need fighters in Washington, D.C. who will stand up for what's right. I will win back Congressional District 2 for Maine to strengthen the Republican House majority and help re-elect President Trump in November.

### [I need your help to get to DC to watch President Trump's back once he wins in November. Together - we can take back our state and our country. Thank you for investing in our fight and being a part of my team.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001d8MSMfjACMBl7S7WvbYsoqePtvsd-6NuAxads6WhJpTcmL2NmgiB-1xeS7OGET8kuFLQnMXHZZ4x7ZoAzEchy3YLorgZdbfeZMMTt8EbhS5PCx0kjX_qcbrzqVbFWIexKCvPdqtIqeTcAwkV-QhUudpbTPd_omBTlO2cytOqThdsHuz9KAmkyA==&c=2mb-_NBzLlWojDiyQCMq_rFw18YXxrklTBA0kOOGxg7iT4n1ChoorA==&ch=O5CdBkJFk5OtYArIk-6bVMYuBhu7OVzKOlmx_f1VOS0aHIWWNVvT5w==)

For Maine and America,
---
---
Representative Mike Soboleski Republican Candidate for Congress - ME-2

subject: Biden administration weaponizes government agencies
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MDEwLTk1OGZmNGE0NmVhZjRiNjdiZjI5ZTFlZGZkYmRhZjM2IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3d3dy5mcmNhY3Rpb24ub3JnL0QtMjQwMV8zIn0/ga8IKEhyUy30yWbCtaP7dw)

|
---
Friend **The Biden administration has been weaponizing federal agencies—including the FBI, IRS, and Department of Justice—to go after those who dissent from its political agenda.** **[**If you want to STOP government agencies from using their power for political persecution, please sign this petition right away.**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MDEwLTk1OGZmNGE0NmVhZjRiNjdiZjI5ZTFlZGZkYmRhZjM2IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3d3dy5mcmNhY3Rpb24ub3JnL0QtMjQwMV8zIn0/Mi4xgcaiyn9s1Mh6OI5AUg)**
---
[**Stop The Weaponization Of The Government**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MDEwLTk1OGZmNGE0NmVhZjRiNjdiZjI5ZTFlZGZkYmRhZjM2IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3d3dy5mcmNhY3Rpb24ub3JnL0QtMjQwMV8zIn0/_tkV_GSE4hcBPRw_MXwpJQ)
---
| | Parent organizations speaking out against efforts to indoctrinate schoolchildren with radical ideologies have been labeled “hate groups” by the defamatory Southern Poverty Law Center (SPLC). There’s evidence to suggest the author of that SPLC report has met with the White House. **_The IRS has admitted to giving extra scrutiny to groups seeking tax-exempt status if they had words such as “tea party” or “patriots” in their name._** After the “Twitter Files” were released, we learned that the FBI was regularly meeting with Twitter executives to flag content and ask for tweets to be taken down. Fortunately, the newly formed House Select Subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government is examining how this weaponization of federal authority began. **[**Sign this petition today and join me in asking the select subcommittee to determine how this weaponization of the federal government can be prevented from ever happening again.**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MDEwLTk1OGZmNGE0NmVhZjRiNjdiZjI5ZTFlZGZkYmRhZjM2IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjMiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3d3dy5mcmNhY3Rpb24ub3JnL0QtMjQwMV8zIn0/5U1cQLksE8ucZSpMfchZIw)**
---
[**Stop The Weaponization Of The Government**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MDEwLTk1OGZmNGE0NmVhZjRiNjdiZjI5ZTFlZGZkYmRhZjM2IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjQiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3d3dy5mcmNhY3Rpb24ub3JnL0QtMjQwMV8zIn0/J2224F8LcSpvFOq3PkHNeQ)
---
The Select Subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government has:
* Heard from three FBI whistleblowers, examined abuses seen at the Bureau, and learned how the FBI has retaliated against whistleblowers.
* Discussed the federal government’s role in censoring Americans, as well as Big Tech’s collusion with government agencies.
* Learned details about _Missouri v. Biden_ , in which the Fifth Circuit Court of Appeals found that the Biden administration “most likely overstepped the First Amendment” by urging major social media platforms to remove content it deemed misleading or false.

There’s evidence to suggest the author of that SPLC report has met with the White House. The IRS has admitted to giving extra scrutiny to groups seeking tax-exempt status if they had words such as “tea party” or “patriots” in their name. After the “Twitter Files” were released, we learned that the FBI was regularly meeting with Twitter executives to flag content and ask for tweets to be taken down. Fortunately, the newly formed House Select Subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government is examining how this weaponization of federal authority began. name: Officer Harry Dunn (ret.)
subject: January 6th, 2021
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]
Hey – my name is Harry Dunn and three years ago, I defended the U.S. Capitol and our nation’s leaders against a violent insurrection.
Since that day, I vowed to help ensure that never happens again.
That’s why I’m officially running for Congress in MD-03 to be the change I want to see for our country and our democracy. I’d be honored for you to join me and Seth Moulton in jump starting this campaign by chipping in a split donation of $25 or anything you can: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]
BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR: CHIP IN $25 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]
For the last sixteen years, I was a police officer for the United States Capitol where I saw millions of people visit to exercise their rights and lobby their representatives.
And trust me, every political agenda you can think of walked through those doors.
It didn’t matter to me if you were there as a Democrat, Republican, or Independent though, because my job was the same - protect our elected officials and ensure everyone could safely participate in our democracy.
But three years ago, under the Capitol Rotunda that took my breath away each day, I was immersed in a profane mix of sweat, screams, shrieks, anger, death, fear, blood, broken limbs, spit, hatred, horror, racism, bigotry, and heroism for what felt like endless hours alongside fellow officers.
It was unlike anything we had seen before. Sure, there were heated political moments over the years. But this was different.
It was pepper spray, bear spray, and even WD-40 to our faces as we fought back rioters in tactical gear using anything they could as a weapon. It was disorienting chaos as we tried to block every entrance while our elected leaders and capitol staff ran to safety. It was a direct attack on our democracy.
Many people have tried to deny what happened that day – including some of the same people who stood behind us as we protected them. They’ve diluted the story and muddied the facts to preserve their own political agenda.
So I’ve made it a personal mission to share my story, speak truth to power, and work to ensure this never happens again. That’s why a few weeks ago, I retired from the police force, and why I announced my campaign to run for Congress in Maryland’s Third Congressional District.
I’m running because Maryland deserves a Congressman who will put the country above their party, and put the constitution above themselves. This will be a competitive race, so I’ve set an ambitious goal to raise $500,000 within the first week of my campaign. Will you split a donation between my campaign and Seth Moulton to become a Founding Donor and help hit our goal before midnight? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]
BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR: CHIP IN $25 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]
Thank you for reading,
Harry Dunn
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/r_WYy1BSbkmUjvconTI5TQ2?unsubscribedata=XhO7f0hdLcO1egQxjg%2BsfUyFlfaGx0o%2FqOgU%2F9v0jPy347dJ4xg8ZVYHb%2BvcYf9vIT2i%2F8zI3c%2Fog%2BfZZkfAwCcDnHozjtWYeFVm58IkcojEjUac38q%2FDQROIrP37ZmioFe6vaEoanf1bcnnuWxWmAuonezHWuyiuPcUvNtC5udkZxsHNKWva6NUdfB8Z3v1gHzuKN9eTrBqfxqIo%2FyDXEDkON1dYV3jJ8n71G9rusKcMZuZaI0lkTK5MyiYtpB%2FpKAZDDBXCn4LEpgVyvJNVCMvk9Yj6nXFJMYrkJ3Ti6VQNtERdsiVvUlhdvr4LUEuEZbMl%2B6D59lTALcCMD0lEYP8idtyw8d0E%2FjgruYkn3khnffOhQlTiTldDsZVpSAOyOQ%2B6AvtfEBKYafMdZhwd8TUKU0cEMeJdw1HrAm22qk%3D .
Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
Contributions to Seth Moulton For Congress are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. An individual or federal PAC may contribute up to $2,900 per election; $5,800 per cycle. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal government contractors, and foreign nationals (non-citizens without “green cards”) are prohibited. Federal law requires our best efforts to obtain and report the name, address,occupation, and employer of individual contributors.
Seth Moulton for Congress
PO Box 2013
Salem, MA 01970
United States

It was disorienting chaos as we tried to block every entrance while our elected leaders and capitol staff ran to safety. It was a direct attack on our democracy. Many people have tried to deny what happened that day – including some of the same people who stood behind us as we protected them. They’ve diluted the story and muddied the facts to preserve their own political agenda. So I’ve made it a personal mission to share my story, speak truth to power, and work to ensure this never happens again. That’s why a few weeks ago, I retired from the police force, and why I announced my campaign to run for Congress in Maryland’s Third Congressional District. I’m running because Maryland deserves a Congressman who will put the country above their party, and put the constitution above themselves. This will be a competitive race, so I’ve set an ambitious goal to raise $500,000 within the first week of my campaign. Will you split a donation between my campaign and Seth Moulton to become a Founding Donor and help hit our goal before midnight? [] BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR: CHIP IN $25 >> [] Thank you for reading, Harry Dunn Donate [] If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: . Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress Contributions to Seth Moulton For Congress are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. An individual or federal PAC may contribute up to $2,900 per election; $5,800 per cycle. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal government contractors, and foreign nationals (non-citizens without “green cards”) are prohibited. Federal law requires our best efforts to obtain and report the name, address,occupation, and employer of individual contributors. Seth Moulton for Congress PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States

Peter, We’re reaching out one last time because we wanted to make sure you saw Katie’s message yesterday. While we’re sad to say our time at HER Time PAC is coming to a close, we can’t wait to continue this journey with you all at **Her Bold Move.** And trust us, Peter, our shared mission is still the same. Majority-male legislatures continue to pass laws that infringe on the health, safety, and freedoms of women — and that won’t change until more women are seated at the table where decisions are made. **That’s where Her Bold Move, the partner organization HER Time PAC is merging with, comes in. ** Her Bold Move will support progressive women in 2024 and beyond, providing resources to these candidates so that our elected officials can be more representative across the board. To get involved with Her Bold Move and help elect unapologetically pro-choice women who will fight to give us the representation we deserve, check out their \---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Katie Hill** <team@her-time.com>
Date: Tue, Jan 9, 2024
Subject: A personal note from me about the future of HER Time PAC
> I have some exciting news, Peter.
> I’m proud to announce that HER Time is joining forces with [**Her Bold Move**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76837199/448582575/-1746803361?refcode=her-time-merger-email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDY4Mjc4ZWMtZDhhZi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=E4owtrj1Ock33e9YMCGAGJT8wHiEDaHWXccQfc5M15s=&emci=9864fddd-2faf-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=468278ec-d8af-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=1720400), a PAC that uplifts the voices of progressive women nationwide so we can make sure that women have a seat at the table where priorities are set and decisions are made.
> Simply put, we need more women in power, but too many of us with the vision and drive to make lasting change don’t have the resources needed to win elections.
> That’s why I launched HER Time PAC — and I’m proud of the fact that our work has helped women candidates across the country win elections, earn a seat at the table, and break down those final glass ceilings one crack at a time.
> **None of this would have been possible without you, Peter.** Our team relied almost exclusively on donations we received in response to emails like this, and your commitment to supporting women candidates for public office made me more hopeful about the future of our country than ever before.
> **But our work isn’t ending here! **
> Men still make up the vast majority of elected officials across the country — and we’re going to continue the fight to change that.
> That’s why I’m thrilled that we’re merging with [_**Her Bold Move**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76837200/448582576/-1746803361?refcode=her-time-merger-email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDY4Mjc4ZWMtZDhhZi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=E4owtrj1Ock33e9YMCGAGJT8wHiEDaHWXccQfc5M15s=&emci=9864fddd-2faf-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=468278ec-d8af-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=1720400), which has been doing incredible work, and will operate under that name moving forward. With resources spread thin and so much on the line, we know that together, we will be able to accomplish so much more.
> Your support means the world to me — and while our time at Her Time PAC is ending, I’m so proud of everything we achieved together and know that our shared future is filled with hope.
> Thank you for all your support,
> Katie
HER Time PAC
2120 University Ave
Berkeley, CA 94704
United States **[her-time.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76837201/448582577/-1008269585?refcode=her-time-merger-email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDY4Mjc4ZWMtZDhhZi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=E4owtrj1Ock33e9YMCGAGJT8wHiEDaHWXccQfc5M15s=&emci=9864fddd-2faf-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=468278ec-d8af-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=1720400) | [team@her-time.com](mailto:team@her-time.com)** | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

body:
Policy matters but so do our values

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76838587/448585150/215821870?refcode=BLU-KKFC-20230425-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0MDEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGVlZTAwYzItZDlhZi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Rj6L2uZVLr4Oursio_R7C02UA2IxL037KFL4UUQuptY=)
