| Peter,

I am, admittedly, a policy wonk and I think its vitally important we send people to Congress with a deep depth of knowledge around policy solutions. AND, **we also need to send people to Congress that have a basic set of values that can move our country forward.** Throughout my life I’ve dedicated myself to serving others and this work has been predicated on a set of fundamental values: **the belief in the inherent** **goodness in people, the notion of the common good, selfless sacrifice and empathy toward others**.

[_**I'm **_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76838589/448585155/215821870?refcode=BLU-KKFC-20230425-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0MDEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGVlZTAwYzItZDlhZi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Rj6L2uZVLr4Oursio_R7C02UA2IxL037KFL4UUQuptY=)[_**running for Congress because I want to amplify those values in our nation's policies. I want to amplify the values that I know you share with me. That is one step we can take, together, to stop the dark forces of fear, anger, hatred and resentment.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76838593/448585156/215821870?refcode=BLU-KKFC-20230425-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0MDEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGVlZTAwYzItZDlhZi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Rj6L2uZVLr4Oursio_R7C02UA2IxL037KFL4UUQuptY=)

As a Senior Executive at the **American Red Cross** , the Chief Operating Officer of the **Make-A-Wish Foundation of America** and the Chief Operating Officer of **Humanity United**(an organization that worked to end genocides, mass atrocities and human trafficking) I have seen how ordinary people can do extraordinary things to help others in need. I'm humbly asking for your support to send a message of optimism over pessimism, kindness over coldness and caring over cruelty.

clean_body: Policy matters but so do our values | = | Peter, I am, admittedly, a policy wonk and I think its vitally important we send people to Congress with a deep depth of knowledge around policy solutions. AND, we also need to send people to Congress that have a basic set of values that can move our country forward. Throughout my life I’ve dedicated myself to serving others and this work has been predicated on a set of fundamental values: the belief in the inherent goodness in people, the notion of the common good, selfless sacrifice and empathy toward others. = | = As a Senior Executive at the American Red Cross , the Chief Operating Officer of the Make-A-Wish Foundation of America and the Chief Operating Officer of Humanity United(an organization that worked to end genocides, mass atrocities and human trafficking) I have seen how ordinary people can do extraordinary things to help others in need. I'm humbly asking for your support to send a message of optimism over pessimism, kindness over coldness and caring over cruelty. = | | | = | = | = | = | = With gratitude, Kurt * | | = Paid for by Kroemer for Congress Kroemer for Congress PO Box 9413 Phoenix, AZ 85068 United States | | ---|--- = = Email communication is a crucial part of our campaign, but if you no longer wish to receive emails about how you can be a part of the movement to defeat Republican David Schweikert, please

clean_body: It’s no question that Georgia was the deciding factor in Democrats winning control of Congress in 2020. [] Peter — It’s no question that Georgia was the deciding factor in Democrats winning control of Congress in 2020. In 2024, what we achieve in Georgia’s 12th will help us win this Congressional seat for the far too many residents who are potentially disengaged because they remain overlooked and underrepresented. In 2022, Georgia lost a seat in Congress formally held by a Democrat. In 2024, Georgia's 12th Congressional District is the most winnable of the nine Republican seats in Georgia. May I count on you to help me, Elizabeth “Liz” Johnson, win this Congressional seat for The People of Georgia's 12th, Georgia and America? YES ABSOLUTELY [] Warm regards, Elizabeth “Liz” Johnson lizjohnsonforus.com [] $25 [] $50 [] $100 [] $250 [] $300 [] Other [] YOUR VOICE, YOUR SUPPORT, AND OUR FUTURES MATTER! THANK YOU IN ADVANCE FOR YOUR EARLY SUPPORT! [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [ ] Liz Johnson for Us 2024 P.O. BOX 1404 Statesboro, GA 30459 United States Want to change how you receive these emails? You can update your preferences [] or unsubscribe from this list []. [] []

**[I'm now just hours out from taking the debate stage!](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=498af4fd08d943e89dff559654282eb5&_e=Y3XFQ1j_8URYlyeVDrEFu1vUAnCdHb_CeYPIV_uCDv7jfJaHRgKQGcutbG93BVap6sye2jN02RPXgFOB4xBy3m1yRMuxu0zops7WcYRglCAPFb4YjKoKQ0y9rUIZdZw53fn6GjSz0gdHWj1Q7d_3v1UTtkgGhzqIC77INsWrvsBDsSnaoXfMSQnP-n97GjSCZTrNtzUsb_wL-rsj8-w-ILgmPqm-3OGw5gucT04Fcwu_e_U4GAbEwIBPjY9xG9O9lfBJLkVRBtBI-8-BImpeXG1OQyi77CHm29gUNk-AiUzV2yl_BbXcxKLGH-EHluFs-CYUhWo1ZOOV8E2gZVylswU9RP0MI696q0GchCc8A1NBPVmyiczxAkZK3E4gqMau)**

As I prepare for **TONIGHT'S** presidential debate, I've been reflecting on an important moment - one of my very first debates as a gubernatorial candidate. [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=498af4fd08d943e89dff559654282eb5&_e=Y3XFQ1j_8URYlyeVDrEFu1vUAnCdHb_CeYPIV_uCDv7jfJaHRgKQGcutbG93BVap6sye2jN02RPXgFOB4xBy3m1yRMuxu0zops7WcYRglCAPFb4YjKoKQ0y9rUIZdZw53fn6GjSz0gdHWj1Q7d_3v1UTtkgGhzqIC77INsWrvsBDsSnaoXfMSQnP-n97GjSCZTrNtzUsb_wL-rsj8-w-IPo5pPhyCYKIA395swoKs0RGQ204ANAjlQaVMIWD7d7wJoamNJdjloIodt_TxfKWKO_ViRWKNhCBIZdNneiX_XtmAYlm4Tman9B2XJKrAphv9OX0ewZFIHaWRDA3bi06qkeZASMQuepsv9btI5ktJCMvs8Y5_6Oq9ufAgYTXIvBb)
That debate played a huge role in the outcome of my race for governor, and it reminded me of an important story I want to share with you:
_-> I was the underdog when I ran for governor.

-> No one thought I had a shot. But that didn't stop me.

-> I've never lost a race, and I'm NOT starting now. _
I know the **MOST** important parts of running a winning campaign comes down to hard work, determination, and a **STRONG** team of grassroots supporters.

Which is why I'm humbly asking for your support today.

**[My team set a goal of adding 10,000 NEW donations before I take the stage tonight. Can I count you in for one of them?](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=498af4fd08d943e89dff559654282eb5&_e=Y3XFQ1j_8URYlyeVDrEFu1vUAnCdHb_CeYPIV_uCDv7jfJaHRgKQGcutbG93BVap6sye2jN02RPXgFOB4xBy3m1yRMuxu0zops7WcYRglCAPFb4YjKoKQ0y9rUIZdZw53fn6GjSz0gdHWj1Q7d_3v1UTtkgGhzqIC77INsWrvsBDsSnaoXfMSQnP-n97GjSCZTrNtzUsb_wL-rsj8-w-IPJKU0ONQXDwg6Qlv7DRY0tceNemDDW0GqafOAjwbCQ4uOI2CxoHZsNb8yTSemtfyc8kU9BAPc1l0Z_a1e6CF2_TmeBQAEFKSxwS9gBlB10DWliE9LaI59qfYfRttdeTDCPBpS40WliCPAxBhj5FDanGvq1oYdfeNObhbDN24fe2)**

clean_body: Ahead of tonight’s debate | | | | | Hey, Friend, it's Nikki. As I prepare for TONIGHT'S presidential debate, I've been reflecting on an important moment - one of my very first debates as a gubernatorial candidate. That debate played a huge role in the outcome of my race for governor, and it reminded me of an important story I want to share with you: -> I was the underdog when I ran for governor. -> No one thought I had a shot. But that didn't stop me. -> I've never lost a race, and I'm NOT starting now. I know the MOST important parts of running a winning campaign comes down to hard work, determination, and a STRONG team of grassroots supporters. Which is why I'm humbly asking for your support today. | The support we get ahead of this first debate of 2024 will play a key role in making sure we have the resources needed to capitalize on the momentum the moment I step off stage. Tonight's debate will be a critical chance to change the minds of undecided voters and supercharge our efforts to amplify my message ahead of the first votes taking place on Monday. I look forward to making you and our great nation proud! My very best, Nikki R. | | Patriot,

---
On a dark rainy day in our nation’s capital where I appeared in court to face the Biden Special Counsel, I received GREAT NEWS in our ongoing battle to stay on the ballot in all 50 states.
---
**_The case to STRIKE my name from the ballot in the important battleground state of Nevada was_** _**_DISMISSED_**_** _._**
---
That means we REMAIN _**UNDEFEATED**_ in federal court against these cynical efforts to interfere in the 2024 election and STEAL __your__ right to vote.
---
After my very first sham arrest in April of last year, I delivered a speech to the nation saying, _“With a dark cloud over our beloved country, I have no doubt, nevertheless, that we will Make America Great Again.”_
---
And as we continue to rack up wins, I still have COMPLETE and TOTAL FAITH that we will prevail against the vicious witch hunts, we will win back the White House, and we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!
---

clean_body: UNDEFEATED in federal court!| | | | | Patriot, On a dark rainy day in our nation’s capital where I appeared in court to face the Biden Special Counsel, I received GREAT NEWS in our ongoing battle to stay on the ballot in all 50 states. The case to STRIKE my name from the ballot in the important battleground state of Nevada was DISMISSED . That means we REMAIN UNDEFEATED in federal court against these cynical efforts to interfere in the 2024 election and STEAL your right to vote. After my very first sham arrest in April of last year, I delivered a speech to the nation saying, “With a dark cloud over our beloved country, I have no doubt, nevertheless, that we will Make America Great Again.” And as we continue to rack up wins, I still have COMPLETE and TOTAL FAITH that we will prevail against the vicious witch hunts, we will win back the White House, and we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! | | Thank you, Donald J. Trump45th President of the United States | | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. | Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and Save America.

body:

Friend,

It's only going to get worse.

The last time there was a big election, the media showed their true colors, and the far-left instigators traveled America spreading lies, slander, and blatant misinformation out in full force.

These are just a few of our opponents in 2024. The unAmerican, anti-freedom, and anti-God forces will be out in full force this year.

I'll be brutally honest with you. It won't be easy... it never is.

The media and the left have a particular hatred of me because I'm just an everyday person who had enough of the status quo. It's only with the support of people like YOU, Friend that we'll come out on top when the ballots are counted.

America First has an incredible message -- and it's up to us to keep delivering it.

name: Full Mag News
subject: These questions are at the core of what it means to be human
body:
Every Hillsdale College student is required to take a class on the Western heritage in order to graduate.

| | | This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=796396719b2445f29e0b9990e6b03ccc&_e=zYLx8ymoSkHS4YydeK-4KmoeGy1VXwbkocHjOWUKBz1AjCkGKokm0subTVYZl_df8QMMA4eiapdFs51DuoGJky9nC65md_HWmmrCGDe8yZ-7r0091npWudHMkjCWSjLQSvwipIsztt37v6MswCgDG2jhcosR2j7St89CekIT2peyBZ-9nzWjCvAmtPnRacELz_oghLQ_gVXsKyenXoS4d941-dFc86ufuro-g9E_AGh929dW85aAJfLNvy09IFrDyyIK1G_kVl1nFhsELVYi7HDhFo1YvsFq5d9RthWlx_b7p3gpxepjt3U9D59KmtMAjc_Zlx3ToXB0U9XTaeDzdAzpqBoF6dzp__j975upI16Tu8eFaEBx9ZchFel9Tc-voO3nwQh5_SZo130uN1Gu7XOuZwu7bQe8DNgsPgFldRo%3D)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Every Hillsdale College student is required to take a class on the Western heritage in order to graduate. And every academic year, I'm reminded of the joy it is to pursue the answers to questions like "_Does God exist? Can we know God?_ " with my students.

These questions are at the core of what it means to be human - both in our relationship with each other and with God. [ ](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=796396719b2445f29e0b9990e6b03ccc&_e=zYLx8ymoSkHS4YydeK-4KmoeGy1VXwbkocHjOWUKBz1AjCkGKokm0subTVYZl_df8QMMA4eiapdFs51DuoGJky9nC65md_HWmmrCGDe8yZ-7r0091npWudHMkjCWSjLQSvwipIsztt37v6MswCgDG2jhcosR2j7St89CekIT2peyBZ-9nzWjCvAmtPnRacELz_oghLQ_gVXsKyenXoS4d941-dFc86ufuro-g9E_AGh929dW85aAJfLNvy09IFrDyyIK1G_kVl1nFhsELVYi7M0CvQeVeTJoGgEtXC4a2PrGA0tXKSl0jWeAoTaUjjvnJgpSMcGy-bzWpowhSwaHzvAumY-_X9b0ZwI4QNAzFLp3ByAM4Wp6EAYnaf2TUY-WDs8cPdtE6n3lr7PWW-1X7ZxeSovUhO0kcZcMSYgA84A%3D) Today, I want to offer you that same experience by sending you [**a limited-edition DVD box set of Hillsdale's popular online course, "Western Heritage - From the Book of Genesis to John Locke,"**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=796396719b2445f29e0b9990e6b03ccc&_e=zYLx8ymoSkHS4YydeK-4KmoeGy1VXwbkocHjOWUKBz1AjCkGKokm0subTVYZl_df8QMMA4eiapdFs51DuoGJky9nC65md_HWmmrCGDe8yZ-7r0091npWudHMkjCWSjLQSvwipIsztt37v6MswCgDG2jhcosR2j7St89CekIT2peyBZ-9nzWjCvAmtPnRacELz_oghLQ_gVXsKyenXoS4d941-dFc86ufuro-g9E_AGh929dW85aAJfLNvy09IFrDyyIK1G_kVl1nFhsELVYi7HTYYrYo4vbQ6gLCu78vXCC1y2FwIQn25IkUd8EyTDOXcJ-TEF64l_47dFw1BWKHTfLBRkEN6CHnTqLBqyMqzTOHIZ0BS1OrV4tza35YspMxS5JGIFxGB2lzz8laEXeRINms6-C-3QVxfj5rjC0OxrA%3D) as a token of our thanks for a generous contribution in support of Hillsdale's efforts to educate America.

I invite you to study the history of the "big questions" with my colleagues and me.

Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link: **[https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-western-heritage-dvd](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=796396719b2445f29e0b9990e6b03ccc&_e=zYLx8ymoSkHS4YydeK-4KmoeGy1VXwbkocHjOWUKBz1AjCkGKokm0subTVYZl_df8QMMA4eiapdFs51DuoGJky9nC65md_HWmmrCGDe8yZ-7r0091npWudHMkjCWSjLQSvwipIsztt37v6MswCgDG2jhcosR2j7St89CekIT2peyBZ-9nzWjCvAmtPnRacELz_oghLQ_gVXsKyenXoS4d941-dFc86ufuro-g9E_AGh929dW85aAJfLNvy09IFrDyyIK1G_kVl1nFhsELVYi7N-Vxdlq3EKZqa8HcKoNA5KVflG8iDDX1fyKlZn9WQDzrJp2ZMnO4qTFo6kfPYDmVFY8xCTgatQ8zPaBnkQVuhGMWigvEhYb8m3Z5aUJqIt38OFYvPE_G3dEzB7lJOhQa4hBk6d9ng3U782Kyciydj4%3D)**

More than 2,000 people have already requested theirs, so make sure to get your set before they are all gone.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College

subject: America is Fractured: A Candid Discussion
body:
| | | |
---
**FELLOW PATRIOTS:**
A critical question from Martin Etwop sparked a candid and provocative discussion: How can Republicans bridge the deep divides in American society?
The left is strategic... they understand marketing and messaging.
Unfortunately, conservatives don't because it seems they're too concerned with "owning the libs" than influencing people to our cause.
You can [click here](https://jamesonellis.lt.acemlna.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZmYi53YXRjaCUyRnB1VUxJRnhTeDElMkY=&sig=91oxrSb6EK2ZYa9Ga7Gh6eDHPXLFWkmTMvgouudWps6f&iat=1704929727&a=%7C%7C611311006%7C%7C&account=jamesonellis%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=T0td3EZ1pFqhvFAK3gdL5GPxTZGVuSgdey3s5nuNe76e6JG%2F%3Ay3aLAvRWf2jXNycrd4Uv%2F3zUy1K0sKEj&s=cabcbe31a720242486b887158a77876f&i=221A248A1A1975) to watch and share on Facebook and/or watch below on YouTube.

Our team is gearing up for tonight’s FINAL debate before the Iowa caucuses kick off the Republican nominating contests in just five days. | | |
---
| |
---|---
Our team is gearing up for tonight’s **FINAL** debate before the Iowa caucuses kick off the Republican nominating race _next week_. Donald Trump has chosen to forgo another presidential debate, leaving Nikki Haley and Ron DeSantis the only two participants. This is the **last opportunity** to impress a national audience before Republicans start to select their candidate. Although Trump is missing _again_ , we can be sure his opponents will be spewing an extreme agenda to **roll back fundamental rights like abortion, marriage equality, and so much more.** **With our democracy at stake and the final debate before the Iowa caucuses happening TONIGHT, we want to know if you’re tuning in →** | **Are you tuning into CNN’s GOP Iowa Debate tonight?

clean_body: Our team is gearing up for tonight’s FINAL debate before the Iowa caucuses kick off the Republican nominating contests in just five days. | | | | | ---|--- Our team is gearing up for tonight’s FINAL debate before the Iowa caucuses kick off the Republican nominating race next week. Donald Trump has chosen to forgo another presidential debate, leaving Nikki Haley and Ron DeSantis the only two participants. This is the last opportunity to impress a national audience before Republicans start to select their candidate. Although Trump is missing again , we can be sure his opponents will be spewing an extreme agenda to roll back fundamental rights like abortion, marriage equality, and so much more. With our democracy at stake and the final debate before the Iowa caucuses happening TONIGHT, we want to know if you’re tuning in → | Are you tuning into CNN’s GOP Iowa Debate tonight? | | ---|--- Thank you, Team DLCC | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Paid for by DLCC PAC. Dlcc.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Dean Phillips
subject: Fighting Economic Inequality
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dean 24
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dean24-email?refcode=1.9.2024.housing&amount=24 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dean24-email?refcode=1.9.2024.housing&amount=24]
Hi Friend,
Despite whatever the latest headlines say about GDP and the stock market, the reality for most Americans is that the economy isn’t working for them as they struggle to afford food and necessities in the wake of years of inflation.
I’ve heard countless stories from folks trying to make ends meet and fear of the direction we’re headed in. As a part of my Affordability Plan, I’m proud to announce today my policies to fight economic inequality:
*
Raising
the
federal
minimum
wage
to
$15
an
hour.
*
Increasing
antitrust
enforcement
to
end
the
monopolistic
practices
that
allow
companies
to
price
gouge
Americans
for
even
basic
goods.
*
Backing
a
UBI
pilot
to
help
lift
the
floor
for
Americans
in
the
zip
codes
that
need
it
most.
*
Strengthening
Social
Security
so
that
it
doesn’t
run
out
for
future
generations
and
so
that
our
current
retirees
can
better
thrive
in
their
golden
years.
*
Renewing
the
expired
Child
Tax
Credit
to
cut
childhood
poverty
nearly
in
half.
*
Establishing
American
Dream
Accounts
which
would
give
every
American
child
$1000
at
the
start
of
life
invested
in
our
market
and
an
additional
$500
a
year
until
they’re
18
to
give
them
a
foundation
for
starting
their
adult
lives.
*
Creating
a
federal
Paid
Family
Leave
and
Sick
Leave
Policy
to
bring
American
workers
the
same
rights
that
nearly
every
industrialized
nation
has.
An economic agenda that leaves all but the upper class struggling to put food on the table or afford an unexpected $500 bill is an agenda that is failing Americans. As President, I plan to ensure that we pull all the levers possible in government to lower wages and give Americans an economic foundation to build their lives.
We should invest in Americans, with policy that ensures corporate accountability, increased wages, paid leave, and more. Could you help support this with a donation of $27? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dean24-email?refcode=1.10.2024.economy&amount=27]
Learn more about my plan here [http://dean24.com/platform/lower-costs-higher-wages] .
Thanks!

- Dean Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dean24-email?refcode=1.10.2024.economy&amount=27]
Congressman Dean Phillips

clean_body: [] Hi Friend, Despite whatever the latest headlines say about GDP and the stock market, the reality for most Americans is that the economy isn’t working for them as they struggle to afford food and necessities in the wake of years of inflation. I’ve heard countless stories from folks trying to make ends meet and fear of the direction we’re headed in. As a part of my Affordability Plan, I’m proud to announce today my policies to fight economic inequality: Raising the federal minimum wage to $15 an hour. Increasing antitrust enforcement to end the monopolistic practices that allow companies to price gouge Americans for even basic goods. Backing a UBI pilot to help lift the floor for Americans in the zip codes that need it most. Strengthening Social Security so that it doesn’t run out for future generations and so that our current retirees can better thrive in their golden years. Renewing the expired Child Tax Credit to cut childhood poverty nearly in half. Establishing American Dream Accounts which would give every American child $1000 at the start of life invested in our market and an additional $500 a year until they’re 18 to give them a foundation for starting their adult lives. * Creating a federal Paid Family Leave and Sick Leave Policy to bring American workers the same rights that nearly every industrialized nation has. An economic agenda that leaves all but the upper class struggling to put food on the table or afford an unexpected $500 bill is an agenda that is failing Americans. As President, I plan to ensure that we pull all the levers possible in government to lower wages and give Americans an economic foundation to build their lives. We should invest in Americans, with policy that ensures corporate accountability, increased wages, paid leave, and more. Could you help support this with a donation of $27? [] Learn more about my plan here [] . Thanks! [] Volunteer [] - Dean Donate [] Congressman Dean Phillips [] [] [] [] [] Contributions to Dean 24 are not tax deductible. name: Alexandra Rojas
subject: Our first new 2024 endorsement is here →
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Our bloc is growing. Today, I’m proud to announce Justice Democrats’ first
new endorsement of the 2024 election cycle: Rep. Delia Ramirez of
Illinois’ 3rd Congressional District!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240110-dr.RhCvOQ&refcode=em20240110-32758&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=32758%2E1203867%2ERToDqR ]Justice Democrats proudly endorses Delia Ramirez for U.S. Congress
(IL-03)

Delia is a community leader, daughter of Guatemalan immigrants, and
lifelong Chicagoan who became the first and only Latina Congresswoman in
the Midwest when she won this seat in 2022.

Now, she’s up for re-election this November, and we’re working to keep her
fighting for progressive change in Congress. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240110-dr.RhCvOQ&refcode=em20240110-32758&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1002&akid=32758%2E1203867%2ERToDqR ]Will you donate to Delia’s
campaign now to help keep her in the good fight?

During her first term in Congress, Delia has proven to be a progressive
champion for working families. In the last year, she’s cosponsored
legislation to protect student veterans, to guarantee tenants’ right to
organize, and to create a pathway to citizenship for DACA recipients
through the Dream and Promise Act.

She’s also fighting for housing justice, healthcare for all, public
education, safe public spaces, community-centered economic development,
and for the rights and safety of women and the LGBTQ community. Plus, she
was one of the first members of Congress to call for a ceasefire in Gaza.

Delia isn’t taking a cent from corporate donors — her campaign is
people-funded and people-centered, which is why she’s counting on this
progressive movement to have her back this November.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240110-dr.RhCvOQ&refcode=em20240110-32758&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1003&akid=32758%2E1203867%2ERToDqR ]Please, if you can afford to, chip in $3 or more today
to Delia to help re-elect the newest member of our young, diverse,
working-class bloc in Congress!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240110-dr.RhCvOQ&refcode=em20240110-32758&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1022&akid=32758%2E1203867%2ERToDqR ]Contribute $3

Thanks for all you do to help build our movement for justice and progress,

Alexandra Rojas
Executive Director

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20240110-32758-footer&t=1023&refcode2=32758_1203867_RToDqR&akid=32758%2E1203867%2ERToDqR

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=32758%2E1203867%2ERToDqR

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76842387/448595397/535718049?refcode=EM_FL_BAR_20240110_fr_cmintro_cm_kw_90da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjE3MzEwMzgtZTBhZi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cHVyNkygl52KU1Tkg5dJY8nvtj0TpRrE38Td9tIxXNY=)

Greetings Peter — it’s nice to meet you all! 👋 **My name is Annalee Garrity, and I’m the new Campaign Manager for Team Callie. I have been working on campaigns for nearly a decade. Even though I have often been successful, it is never easy, and I was thinking about switching to another field entirely.** **Until I met Callie.** **She knows she can win MI-01, and after our half-hour meeting turned into 90 minutes, I knew she could win too.** **Our ground game has to be strong in order to win a seat that’s this competitive.** My job is to build up our grassroots operation from now until next November. Over the next couple of weeks, **I’m going to be laser-focused on getting to know you all so we can turn the dial up on our organizing ASAP.** [I need you by my side to help kick things into high gear. clean_body: | = Greetings Peter — it’s nice to meet you all! 👋 My name is Annalee Garrity, and I’m the new Campaign Manager for Team Callie. I have been working on campaigns for nearly a decade. Even though I have often been successful, it is never easy, and I was thinking about switching to another field entirely. Until I met Callie. She knows she can win MI-01, and after our half-hour meeting turned into 90 minutes, I knew she could win too. Our ground game has to be strong in order to win a seat that’s this competitive. My job is to build up our grassroots operation from now until next November. name: Hillsdale College via Restore Our Nation
subject: These questions are at the core of what it means to be human
body:
Every Hillsdale College student is required to take a class on the Western heritage in order to graduate.
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| | | This sponsored message Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/A1W-0d8FzI3QZRyNnmIZVA~~/AARclAA~/RgRngYeAP0TCaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL3N1cHBvcnQtd2VzdGVybi1oZXJpdGFnZS1kdmQ_c2M9MDA0NzVOMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlc3Rlcm5oZXJpdGFnZV9kdmQmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Ql9QQS1ST04tMjAyNDAxMTBXA3NwY0IKZZ5L2J5lC9nKp1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Every Hillsdale College student is required to take a class on the Western heritage in order to graduate. And every academic year, I'm reminded of the joy it is to pursue the answers to questions like "_Does God exist? Can we know God?_ " with my students.

These questions are at the core of what it means to be human - both in our relationship with each other and with God. [ ](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/A1W-0d8FzI3QZRyNnmIZVA~~/AARclAA~/RgRngYeAP0TCaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL3N1cHBvcnQtd2VzdGVybi1oZXJpdGFnZS1kdmQ_c2M9MDA0NzVOMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlc3Rlcm5oZXJpdGFnZV9kdmQmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Ql9QQS1ST04tMjAyNDAxMTBXA3NwY0IKZZ5L2J5lC9nKp1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~) Today, I want to offer you that same experience by sending you [**a limited-edition DVD box set of Hillsdale's popular online course, "Western Heritage - From the Book of Genesis to John Locke,"**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/A1W-0d8FzI3QZRyNnmIZVA~~/AARclAA~/RgRngYeAP0TCaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL3N1cHBvcnQtd2VzdGVybi1oZXJpdGFnZS1kdmQ_c2M9MDA0NzVOMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlc3Rlcm5oZXJpdGFnZV9kdmQmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Ql9QQS1ST04tMjAyNDAxMTBXA3NwY0IKZZ5L2J5lC9nKp1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~) as a token of our thanks for a generous contribution in support of Hillsdale's efforts to educate America.

I invite you to study the history of the "big questions" with my colleagues and me.

Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link: **[https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-western-heritage-dvd](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/A1W-0d8FzI3QZRyNnmIZVA~~/AARclAA~/RgRngYeAP0TCaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL3N1cHBvcnQtd2VzdGVybi1oZXJpdGFnZS1kdmQ_c2M9MDA0NzVOMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlc3Rlcm5oZXJpdGFnZV9kdmQmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Ql9QQS1ST04tMjAyNDAxMTBXA3NwY0IKZZ5L2J5lC9nKp1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)**

More than 2,000 people have already requested theirs, so make sure to get your set before they are all gone.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
---

Restore Our Nation

name: Concerned Patriot
subject: Have you seen what’s happened?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Moore for West Virginia
body:
It’s all Biden’s fault

| **_Unrecognizable._**

That’s all I can say about the state of our country. Over the past few years, it’s been truly disappointing to go to places like New York City, Los Angeles, or Washington D.C. and see the cities overrun with crime, homelessness, and blocks of vacant storefronts and office buildings.

This was **Biden’s Build Back Better Plan,** except he didn’t build anything back better. Instead, DC faced nearly fifty carjackings in the first four days of this year. Los Angeles has never seen higher homelessness numbers, with the numbers surging daily. Over 20 massive retailers across the country decided to shut down stores in 2023, amassing to over 2,800 storefronts. Known criminals walk free, confirmed spies serve the U.S. Senate, and pedophiles aren’t punished so long as they conform to the liberal agenda. Jewish families and children are being attacked in schools, in communities, near their homes. **_Nothing is built, nothing is back, and nothing is most certainly better._** | [**STOP THE BIDEN AGENDA**](http://links.eaglecoalition.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=7d15feebaef249e19e94fd0a690bc051&_e=gtwRcnjCwXoPCi6_b3juQ_t3E0tMDIfRWe00vJ2qwCR9Sg9j6LyB6NGaHl-6jzm-Gy_-vltDOVe91dj4Ygfv9UUBYBnzfD5hB6dCeHwKUjv2KhzAkG7RMP1zyL1RvbvRuc9cUwroGw-fFONtpcN5JVAAjbv0ObGSVtSnW-SNUxfDOWYlNloLuGCFyk8jQ9upV2Fsw3xeCk0vVj9n_YvW-uSUzP_g40-IM0bIanHZr8CxC_HVEXbrMcPotpQu_D1_lGl_3TJmQ7mKiDIOS09S7IDAsW5bdp6cJMRfW88VFb6jUIz3NbHxfvUAp7AQ8ncV-WpWgyoUJMDb556PW-W3h8cqQNvAsww4Q138sE9UgKQFmUYWUJ8WeoWFqhGta2jJco-VeC_tS7TK5seCKyZI9Q%3D%3D)
---
We need some serious leadership in the White House, not this “blind leading the blind” mentality we’ve got going on right now. It’s time to fire President Biden and support President Trump’s return to the White House.

If you support a Trump victory in 2024, we need to know. Sign your name at our petition below to demand a change.
[**SIGN YOUR NAME IF YOU STAND WITH TRUMP**](http://links.eaglecoalition.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=7d15feebaef249e19e94fd0a690bc051&_e=gtwRcnjCwXoPCi6_b3juQ_t3E0tMDIfRWe00vJ2qwCR9Sg9j6LyB6NGaHl-6jzm-Gy_-vltDOVe91dj4Ygfv9UUBYBnzfD5hB6dCeHwKUjv2KhzAkG7RMP1zyL1RvbvRuc9cUwroGw-fFONtpcN5JVAAjbv0ObGSVtSnW-SNUxfDOWYlNloLuGCFyk8jQ9upV2Fsw3xeCk0vVj9n_YvW-mLdKXx88EVLjp6yFDsyBUK8C9l4Ur8Mgfi5kV8WltlxGLCgsNVTl8JC2rxYg7r6ZnTUPXS3IGyDd0zmZ_WauzQst5FNXyTSaldoy5o7edtEgUkXa3UZgtmihBguJlbwdOobKPgZwr5FanFDoqllKG2jmDONkWWRbL975JMnq8e8l0i_ZMB7dDpzTXqJKo7a7A%3D%3D)
---
Thanks for your support,

A Concerned Patriot

|
**RILEY MOORE: CONSERVATIVE FOR CONGRESS.**

* * *
Washington is all tied up in putting politics over principle.
It’s time to put a stop to it and start putting PRINCIPLES OVER POLITICS - starting with YOU!

name: Conservatives Give
subject: These questions are at the core of what it means to be human
body:
Every Hillsdale College student is required to take a class on the Western heritage in order to graduate.

| | | This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d8a5b386c24c460f8655ca17842cd849&_e=zNUnoelPCu3FPk5RSTEsQuZ-1hBZLoiC8-eYGSQrOaguHYknugJl8k1hUj8473VEvh660QqxfoR3n7L-xWPHERgsEbhz3OSpCXr--CNfQbFyL1hVcEvwfxT0jb7RZZwiCDnbXloKGSqn2noxCniLT3m8blt1Ax7Wrc78U_PSXs2uJF05jwjTpkwmIbP480tmbttIDqnvyYnELH9HVMxWDInDDXwTcAi0P3MtZOvkDzBz2vIYTOeC7ynljHtxd3D2VAfRVxoSh8p67RgnicOobC5qrQdXWBCIXzr_7Off3A7kIEJaPoeBYi7uVsdT235HLIzZAVc0po0TJwOB_BOoRQea4iUE80gzuTAKvaqjispyw6bT_U2VDoh8vhhPvoF3colIVR2GNGVeUKOVXWfurPYHe0p1Iior1maHKGS7GAM%3D)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Every Hillsdale College student is required to take a class on the Western heritage in order to graduate. And every academic year, I'm reminded of the joy it is to pursue the answers to questions like "_Does God exist? Can we know God?_ " with my students.

These questions are at the core of what it means to be human - both in our relationship with each other and with God. [ ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d8a5b386c24c460f8655ca17842cd849&_e=zNUnoelPCu3FPk5RSTEsQuZ-1hBZLoiC8-eYGSQrOaguHYknugJl8k1hUj8473VEvh660QqxfoR3n7L-xWPHERgsEbhz3OSpCXr--CNfQbFyL1hVcEvwfxT0jb7RZZwiCDnbXloKGSqn2noxCniLT3m8blt1Ax7Wrc78U_PSXs2uJF05jwjTpkwmIbP480tmbttIDqnvyYnELH9HVMxWDInDDXwTcAi0P3MtZOvkDzBz2vIYTOeC7ynljHtxd3D2VAfRVxoSh8p67RgnicOobJYvQLOSjgRIuFZ_82a9CP7XysxdGHpFMJNOcGODYsUuX7daX7o4kL7v1VeFiVIXuKu70MS-6TvfumzuH6hNbv32Ee2AGhkYaA8LGcmTXNIjRxPEobkACxC5XykOWsfT9RPXGonlN7Nq1uLRlo70_PQ%3D) Today, I want to offer you that same experience by sending you [**a limited-edition DVD box set of Hillsdale's popular online course, "Western Heritage - From the Book of Genesis to John Locke,"**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d8a5b386c24c460f8655ca17842cd849&_e=zNUnoelPCu3FPk5RSTEsQuZ-1hBZLoiC8-eYGSQrOaguHYknugJl8k1hUj8473VEvh660QqxfoR3n7L-xWPHERgsEbhz3OSpCXr--CNfQbFyL1hVcEvwfxT0jb7RZZwiCDnbXloKGSqn2noxCniLT3m8blt1Ax7Wrc78U_PSXs2uJF05jwjTpkwmIbP480tmbttIDqnvyYnELH9HVMxWDInDDXwTcAi0P3MtZOvkDzBz2vIYTOeC7ynljHtxd3D2VAfRVxoSh8p67RgnicOobAO5IL8Ol9zn1NDsuEacG_U-Derv-8feD1MBf_1z3Dr7wUWokSek_p6NabIXi5EYQrHZxjOaKyIQtNCG7gGZGHbySxP0WW7-asDr8uJhao99dENy1XiKRfrris8_Lw_uaLdCOs3Z1oki8ZLC_s7Ta_Y%3D) as a token of our thanks for a generous contribution in support of Hillsdale's efforts to educate America.

I invite you to study the history of the "big questions" with my colleagues and me.

Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link: **[https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-western-heritage-dvd](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d8a5b386c24c460f8655ca17842cd849&_e=zNUnoelPCu3FPk5RSTEsQuZ-1hBZLoiC8-eYGSQrOaguHYknugJl8k1hUj8473VEvh660QqxfoR3n7L-xWPHERgsEbhz3OSpCXr--CNfQbFyL1hVcEvwfxT0jb7RZZwiCDnbXloKGSqn2noxCniLT3m8blt1Ax7Wrc78U_PSXs2uJF05jwjTpkwmIbP480tmbttIDqnvyYnELH9HVMxWDInDDXwTcAi0P3MtZOvkDzBz2vIYTOeC7ynljHtxd3D2VAfRVxoSh8p67RgnicOobGYZLAOaoj_Iu2Krk2h0LYh2TowxQZxR82VhtOPvqu24OW-I1oPkRhxLE7_RDCPZTWjjMLQWVPTpZ_CiMnQKpqrnAyrQ9sDXnMELEQ1qdEc-oX9ultDwvo0fkpidp6Sr33XAMc6BoNlQ-MPXW8oAHzE%3D)**

More than 2,000 people have already requested theirs, so make sure to get your set before they are all gone.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College

name: Juanita at United We Dream Action
subject: Asylum rights may be traded away to fund war and genocide.
body:
Help us pressure Congress to protect fundamental human rights. | | | Peter, Congress is running out of time to pass a deal to fund the government and avoid a government shutdown. Here’s the problem: **The deal currently on the table trades fundamental human rights down the river in exchange for funding to support war and genocide overseas.** These aren’t just the typical Republican attacks on immigrants, either. This deal would make it nearly IMPOSSIBLE to apply for asylum in the United States, a fundamental human right. Migrants would be in immense danger, and Black, Brown, Indigenous, and LGBTQ+ immigrants would see the worst of it. Immigrants are tired of being used as a political pawn in Washington. clean_body: Help us pressure Congress to protect fundamental human rights. | | | Peter, Congress is running out of time to pass a deal to fund the government and avoid a government shutdown. Here’s the problem: The deal currently on the table trades fundamental human rights down the river in exchange for funding to support war and genocide overseas. These aren’t just the typical Republican attacks on immigrants, either. This deal would make it nearly IMPOSSIBLE to apply for asylum in the United States, a fundamental human right. Migrants would be in immense danger, and Black, Brown, Indigenous, and LGBTQ+ immigrants would see the worst of it. Immigrants are tired of being used as a political pawn in Washington. We’re applying pressure on Senate Democrats to reject this hateful deal — and instead invest in actual solutions. Will you chip in any amount today to help us mount pressure on Senate Democrats before this deal becomes final and billions more dollars are spent on the deportation machine? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Thanks for your help in this urgent moment. Juanita, United We Dream Action

name: Gloria Johnson
subject: I’m asking for your help today because grassroots support is the only way we can overcome my opponent’s campaign war chest.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee
body:
Defeating Marsha Blackburn won’t be cheap or easy.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76850219/448604506/-849459103?refcode=ea.b56dbe52-e6af-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ms=ea.b56dbe52-e6af-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTZkYmU1Mi1lNmFmLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T1oBHGgOMaVJ-lTiflWE-QhPyf9KxO0l0ddQDiCmla8=&emci=36f5e543-ccaf-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=b56dbe52-e6af-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=46764483)
---
Political pundits will tell you that Republicans in Tennessee, including my opponent, have an iron grip on our state. But then I talk to voters, hearing about your concerns and discussing solutions to the problems facing our state. **It’s beyond clear that folks are sick and tired of Marsha Blackburn and the Tennessee GOP.** And this campaign (that YOU are building alongside me!) is giving them a run for their money. Marsha Blackburn knows that she has a real fight ahead of her. That’s why she hasn’t hesitated to attack our campaign. But it just goes to show that she knows that our dedicated grassroots resistance can overcome her entrenched power. name: Team Fetterman
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
Hey Derek,
From Day One, our team has been people-powered. John’s never taken dirty super PAC money, and instead, we’ve built our movement with one grassroots donation at a time.
**[If you’re ready to keep powering that work in the critical 2024 election year, chip in right away.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240110-1?refcode=em20240110-1-8745&refcode2=8745_434096_jBCLyv&akid=8745%2E434096%2EjBCLyv)**
Here’s the proof: Our average donation last year wound up being just $14.84.
$14.84 may not seem like a lot when we’re facing the million$ spent by the GOP, but one donation after another starts to really add up. It’s how we’re able to keep John in the Senate standing up for Pennsylvania’s working families.
**[So if you’re with us, will you chip in $14.84 – or any amount – today? Your support is critical to powering our work.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240110-1?refcode=em20240110-1-8745&refcode2=8745_434096_jBCLyv&akid=8745%2E434096%2EjBCLyv)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240110-1?amount=5&refcode=em20240110-8745&refcode2=8745_434096_jBCLyv&akid=8745%2E434096%2EjBCLyv)**
We’re glad you’re part of this team.
Together,
Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20240110-8745-footer&t=1&refcode2=8745_434096_jBCLyv&akid=8745%2E434096%2EjBCLyv)**

name: Elissa Slotkin for Michigan
subject: NEW POLL: Trump up by 8 in Michigan
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1013%2E135344%2E58_3u9)

Team,
With just 10 months to go before the election, Donald Trump is leading Joe Biden by 8 points in the state of Michigan, according to a new poll from The Detroit News and WDIV-TV. Take a look:
Joe Biden: 39%
Donald Trump: 47%
Polls this far out from the election should, of course, be taken with a healthy grain of salt. They are, at best, a snapshot in time. But at this point, we’ve seen a few public polls released on the presidential race here in Michigan, and there are some big takeaways:
1. The road to the White House—and ultimately, control of the Senate—WILL run through Michigan. As Michigan goes, so goes the nation.

2. It’s going to be close. That’s just a fact about presidential elections in Michigan. In 2016, Donald Trump won the state by 10,704 votes and then in 2020, Joe Biden won by 154,188 (less than 3%).

3. We have A LOT of work to do to talk to voters over the next 10 months.

There’s a reason we call states like Michigan “swing states.” After all of our success in recent elections, Republicans believe it’s due for a swing in their direction, and they're planning to spend the money to prove it. After all, what happens when you’re in a swing state? You swing.
**That’s why we’re so focused on ensuring our campaign has the resources to introduce Elissa to the ten million people in Michigan and talk to voters as early as possible—the folks who will decide our race, and potentially control of the White House.** 2024 is here, and we’re ramping up our operation right now – which means your support at this moment is more important than ever.
[**The very best time to donate was yesterday, but the second best time is right now. Will you chip in to ensure we have the resources to keep Michigan blue?](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-jan24.--Kpen&refcode=em240110-1-30&t=2&akid=1013%2E135344%2E58_3u9)**

clean_body: Team, With just 10 months to go before the election, Donald Trump is leading Joe Biden by 8 points in the state of Michigan, according to a new poll from The Detroit News and WDIV-TV. Take a look: Joe Biden: 39% Donald Trump: 47% Polls this far out from the election should, of course, be taken with a healthy grain of salt. They are, at best, a snapshot in time. But at this point, we’ve seen a few public polls released on the presidential race here in Michigan, and there are some big takeaways: 1. The road to the White House—and ultimately, control of the Senate—WILL run through Michigan. As Michigan goes, so goes the nation. 2. It’s going to be close. That’s just a fact about presidential elections in Michigan. In 2016, Donald Trump won the state by 10,704 votes and then in 2020, Joe Biden won by 154,188 (less than 3%). 3. We have A LOT of work to do to talk to voters over the next 10 months. There’s a reason we call states like Michigan “swing states.” After all of our success in recent elections, Republicans believe it’s due for a swing in their direction, and they're planning to spend the money to prove it. After all, what happens when you’re in a swing state? You swing. That’s why we’re so focused on ensuring our campaign has the resources to introduce Elissa to the ten million people in Michigan and talk to voters as early as possible—the folks who will decide our race, and potentially control of the White House. 2024 is here, and we’re ramping up our operation right now – which means your support at this moment is more important than ever. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | | | | | | | | ** Thank you, Team Slotkin PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN P.O. Box 4145 East Lansing, MI 48826

name: Gene Karpinski, LCV
subject: Please read: Peter's 2024 LCV membership status
body:
__Your support will go three times as far for a limited time. |
---

| Peter -- our 2024 Membership Drive is officially LIVE -- and this is important: How many members pitch in determines how big our campaigns can go to defend our planet and our democracy for _all_ of 2024.**__**

_**This is going to be one of the most critical years for the environment and our democracy in our lifetimes. And your membership can have a huge impact -- right now -- as soon as this week. Here's the situation:**_

Led by "MAGA Mike" Johnson, House Republicans have just returned to Washington, D.C. intent on forcing a negotiation over **poison pill riders to halt critical clean energy programs and environmental protections.** Congress only has a few days to avert a government shutdown, which means that there's _enormous_ pressure on legislators to reach a compromise that could do serious damage to our air, water, and climate.

The best thing YOU can do to stop them right now: help fund our hard-hitting environmental campaigns to demand that legislators support strong environmental policies and do no harm. [Renew your LCV membership today for just $5 and 3X your impact.](https://links.messages.lcv.)

**It 's up to LCV members like you to determine how hard we can fight to protect our planet and our democracy this year. _Please review your membership status below, Peter_ :**

| | **
** **JUST ANNOUNCED:
League of Conservation Voters
2024 Membership Drive**

**Supporter Record:** Peter Willis
**Match Status:** [TRIPLE MATCH ACTIVE](https://links.messages.lcv.)
****
**Deadline:** January 31, 2024**
Fundraising Goal:** $35,000

**Member Status:** [Renew your membership today for just $5 >>](https://links.messages.lcv.) |
---|---|---

It's critical that we win both this battle and the larger fight for our Earth, Peter. Republican legislators and their Big Oil allies are plotting to exploit the threat of a government shutdown to unravel _years_ of hard-won progress to tackle climate change, curb pollution, and address environmental racism and injustice. **Everything we 've achieved -- _it could all be on the chopping block_.**

We can defend environmental progress if we get active, stick together, and campaign as hard as we can until our voices are heard. LCV's skilled teams are meeting with key legislators every day. We're driving thousands of letters and messages into Capitol Hill and rallying the public to **oppose any attempts to turn back the clock on climate action.

We are running out of time to tackle the climate crisis. How big our campaign can go depends on the support of our members. We need to pull out all of the stops.** So we're asking: [renew your LCV membership today for just $5. For a limited time, a group of generous donors will TRIPLE every gift.](https://links.messages.lcv.)

Thank you for standing with us at this important moment in this critical year.

Onward,

Gene Karpinski
President
League of Conservation Voters
__
__

---

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=10450236&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTkwMDIwMTQwOAS2&spReportId=MTkwMDIwMTQwOAS2). body:
There's something seriously deranged about what Joe Biden is doing to our country. I'm taking our fight to the debate stage tonight. This can't wait.
---

[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=9943c6b2c0be4d92a513572d4d3f720d&_e=H31aSUKoOAhpprfAQ93msTx1j7xg7IpkabUJK_kuKA3IDsvOsIJ9-ACDJrqEIClIzPJuVrAb4u2UE-rYoJw8SiJbQQF0XfNvGi1arr8fu-LynqgAta7RMfYX_VgEcFgMRNV_BzE8ki5NZ5HQyYRRSosyAb-ke3BBPwM2oiTDV_bH6dFHOX0_e81FIzAd5owEhT4naZgN0QuBqoG7S9_pLdLy4_lrKWLbg1x6Nq3AGwli-tNh7vhig-Cnxx3l7O2mj3m2ZEexZa3DuTgiKScgrDXoSKj2Lobi0tfJmSVCIzZgeB-cbp79w0ugkXo5BfTW5zi8_9p71MTwcA3RcIWd22ilOTIF99ks9bkwpcoTr4Lv7u1_sXlWfx9tK8J0cHG48k0udV5U-tDJuKYD2MhkhVYtLKeIDDFGl6NgONhp_sA%3D)
Peter, Do you remember when we could be proud of our government and all that it stood for? When we could trust our elected officials and candidates to be transparent with the people they serve? _**We have strayed so far, we have a candidate like Nikki Haley running for President who has broken promise after promise to her supporters and constituents, sold out to the highest bidder, welcomed the Chinese Communist Party to her state, and flip-flopped on so many positions, it's hard to determine where she stands on anything.** _ **I am fighting tonight at the debate --and every day--to restore the freedom and glory that our country used to stand for. **Back then, we could ask young men and women to stand up and fight in our proud Armed Forces, and they would volunteer to do it. _What are we asking these young Americans to fight for now?_ A country full of so much woke indoctrination that children are being told genders aren't real and their dad may be their mom? Being taught to question whether they want to stay in the bodies they were born in?**It's disappointing and outrageous.** I'm not okay with it, Peter. I am stepping up on that debate stage tonight to fight against it with everything I've got. If there's one point I'll **never** compromise on, it's the annihilation of sanity in my children's future.**I need your help to fight back.**
---
| | [$20.24 DONATION](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=9943c6b2c0be4d92a513572d4d3f720d&_e=H31aSUKoOAhpprfAQ93msTx1j7xg7IpkabUJK_kuKA3IDsvOsIJ9-ACDJrqEIClIzPJuVrAb4u2UE-rYoJw8SiJbQQF0XfNvGi1arr8fu-LynqgAta7RMfYX_VgEcFgMRNV_BzE8ki5NZ5HQyYRRSosyAb-ke3BBPwM2oiTDV_bH6dFHOX0_e81FIzAd5owEhT4naZgN0QuBqoG7S9_pLdLy4_lrKWLbg1x6Nq3AGwli-tNh7vhig-Cnxx3l7O2mMeOYroyl23Zgv-zvdUOXc8Ne13aASKRb3yQyTPGIHond93kLl1Q49bJaL542FmmtlhWIkAvZOxng5yl1mFrz6Sm-ZThRC4O-kKc3qCcHL0vUis-IbMmqCrn3310WARdFiNRaJPiONqn9S54W65AqnCJzFXOXWPkrYZhGdhZrtMLgtrA8bo32j-uoOuiRWR9A)
---
I've got the winning record--and that's why Nikki Haley and the establishment are so terrified. **THIS DEBATE IS CRITICAL to enacting real, necessary change for everyday Americans,** and we're the team that's going to walk off the stage stronger and more ready to get it done than ever.**We are sending a message, and it won't get delivered without our strongest show of support yet. Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=9943c6b2c0be4d92a513572d4d3f720d&_e=H31aSUKoOAhpprfAQ93msTx1j7xg7IpkabUJK_kuKA3IDsvOsIJ9-ACDJrqEIClIzPJuVrAb4u2UE-rYoJw8SiJbQQF0XfNvGi1arr8fu-LynqgAta7RMfYX_VgEcFgMRNV_BzE8ki5NZ5HQyYRRSosyAb-ke3BBPwM2oiTDV_bH6dFHOX0_e81FIzAd5owEhT4naZgN0QuBqoG7S9_pLdLy4_lrKWLbg1x6Nq3AGwli-tNh7vhig-Cnxx3l7O2mj3m2ZEexZa3DuTgiKScgrKhFRu-_li7gjeSSlhFeOlipW2Q9k8F2kXKTcn-1gIr5EmF_qc9UMuwutP1ZZXHtImItnVikTcGN4djRg1_B_RX182R_D-p-XvKPkSwj9RNtSfgWTMSHGP0LENqrUhYo0hiqhLKcPLwqpzoq6i3XW0A%3D)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](http://links.primaryupdate.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=0b6ab799a208447498ad0fca9d602844&_e=z0k8ziZlVFsuwBFcZnUdUF774B6jjmxsHs81Bc4Eyj99_JLvsq5YqUXf-UAdsQogBGFjcs1Ec0OG1SAWQTG12w8v-VUdWOS9tpa-HNDb2ohjwIglGodHT20tp3g238Dd7Q5Y4ttg9iRVBeH0MAKY_Zuqe_cDdEPfQNNdZ7T5IdBbYw2A7yQ2VzbToS_-Tu_Ou36IiRRYEhLjrNyoqiPxVEg-MOil-ehgYDKrloIJZhQgrKi6X3yQmZ9GsIs6RafaKOp8GmBa6mKwsnZ0ISF9ofk58ijTGpxG6mpEVWnIPvONiXmcUzKEpp12dDNqWqzNWTzC5aV9WzxpiTbVdhgcHyClD2fKrlWg8Z1rZS3gSfttumrGhYTeVRU6PGR5efPuRNaF0uDgxGrLdDO2rd_gtDf4t45r70AUjn6WR7cf5SrQTOnRo-iJMXtyD7v62552)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---
|

When we could trust our elected officials and candidates to be transparent with the people they serve? We have strayed so far, we have a candidate like Nikki Haley running for President who has broken promise after promise to her supporters and constituents, sold out to the highest bidder, welcomed the Chinese Communist Party to her state, and flip-flopped on so many positions, it's hard to determine where she stands on anything. I am fighting tonight at the debate --and every day--to restore the freedom and glory that our country used to stand for. Back then, we could ask young men and women to stand up and fight in our proud Armed Forces, and they would volunteer to do it. What are we asking these young Americans to fight for now? A country full of so much woke indoctrination that children are being told genders aren't real and their dad may be their mom? Being taught to question whether they want to stay in the bodies they were born in?It's disappointing and outrageous. I'm not okay with it, Fellow American. name: Matt Cartwright for Congress
subject: Matt is helping bring money, jobs, and new projects to PA-08

body:
Since coming to office, Matt’s top priority has been delivering results for the people of PA-08. He’s gotten a lot done – so we wanted to take a moment to highlight some of Matt’s successes in securing federal funding to help create economic growth right here in PA-08.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76853758/448607541/1790176412?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzgyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDJjNTNhYi1lOWFmLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w8fbyXS9nxkHMcFUxWF-bVQiFjRmsffc_OblDXice8U=&emci=acec6f29-31af-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=242c53ab-e9af-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=23311593) | Peter,

Since coming to office, Matt’s top priority has been delivering results for the people of PA-08. He’s gotten a lot done – so we wanted to take a moment to highlight some of Matt’s successes in securing federal funding to help create economic growth _right here in PA-08._

In 2023 alone, Matt helped secure over **$50 MILLION** in federal funds directed to our district. This investment is a testament to Matt’s commitment to our district and the knowledge and experience he brings to Congress.

One of our major wins was securing $16.6 million for the construction of a workforce development facility at the University of Scranton. This project will create opportunities, foster innovation, and pave the way for a stronger, more prosperous future for our community.

**Matt is committed to ensuring that every penny of our fair share of federal tax dollars comes back home to northeastern Pennsylvania. These funds are critical for our growth, job creation, and ensuring our region remains competitive in today’s economy.**

But our work isn’t done yet. There’s more we can achieve, more projects to support, and more opportunities to create. As a tenured member of Congress, Matt is prepared to continue this momentum and **deliver more success for our community.**

[**Will you stand with Matt and help ensure PA-08 continues on this path? name: Team DeSantis
subject: 🚨 Last Call
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
We know what's coming after this debate; we really need your help to stay ahead. This is the tipping point.
---
| | | | | | | | | | [ ](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=5d93edbd4df55cca4c9ab552ffaa369c827f4616b69f8410b26a77312bf4a385983cb7dc3b20bd4e89e982fabad5ef19ffa1fd633bfce6f4)
---
_One final debate before the Iowa Caucus._ _Two candidates on stage._ _Ron DeSantis is preparing to make you proud TONIGHT._
Friend... The GOP debate between Ron DeSantis and Nikki Haley kicks off _tonight_ at 9:00 pm ET on CNN. With just two candidates on stage and a fight to the finish ahead of us... you CANNOT miss this night. **After the debate, we have 5 DAYS to take our momentum straight to the ballot boxes at the Iowa Caucuses. The next phase of this campaign starts NOW.** _The race has tightened._ _The stakes_** _could not_** _be higher._ The target on our backs is bigger than ever. _We are expecting a full barrage of attacks on that debate stage._ _We are the one to beat._
---
| | | | [](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=5d93edbd4df55cca4c9ab552ffaa369c827f4616b69f8410b26a77312bf4a385983cb7dc3b20bd4e89e982fabad5ef19ffa1fd633bfce6f4)
---
| |
We cannot let Ron DeSantis take that stage without every supporter backing him. _**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [ ](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=5d93edbd4df55cca4c9ab552ffaa369c827f4616b69f8410b26a77312bf4a385983cb7dc3b20bd4e89e982fabad5ef19ffa1fd633bfce6f4)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=5d93edbd4df55cca4c9ab552ffaa369c827f4616b69f8410b26a77312bf4a385983cb7dc3b20bd4e89e982fabad5ef19ffa1fd633bfce6f4)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---
|
---

subject: WSJ: “Republicans have a great chance to retake the Senate”

body:
let’s break down the numbers

|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76853837/448607720/937741241?refcode=mw_em_240110_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjZlNWZiOC1lOWFmLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cKJlFSonxHnN2lHKqe0Ac-AKkJWOyhJ4IXyh0wp47pY=) Derek, Political pundits are saying that the GOP has an edge in the battle to take back Senate control this November. There are 34 Senate seats up for grabs this year. Democrats are defending _double_ the amount of seats as Republicans, with almost half of those being rated competitive and many of them in states that Trump won in 2020. Meanwhile, Republicans are only defending one competitive seat. That means we have a lot of work ahead of us. **__[Can you pitch in $3.40 today to fuel Senator Warner’s efforts to help Democrats secure as many of these open Senate seats as possible so we can protect and expand our majority in November?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76853838/448607721/937741241?refcode=mw_em_240110_1&amount=3.40&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjZlNWZiOC1lOWFmLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cKJlFSonxHnN2lHKqe0Ac-AKkJWOyhJ4IXyh0wp47pY=)__** We aren’t afraid to admit that the numbers don’t look good, Derek. But we can’t let the numbers scare us. Democrats have been in this position before and still managed to prevent a GOP takeover. Mark knows that we just have to invest in the tactics that work: Expanding our ground game in competitive states, utilizing every GOTV tool at our disposal, making sure every American is armed with the information they need to vote, and clearly laying out the stakes of what a Republican majority would look like for reproductive freedom, voting rights, gun control, and more. Anything you donate today supports Mark’s work to invest in these tactics early so we’re not playing catch up to the GOP. **__[Please, if you are able, donate now to help Senator Warner elect Democrats across the country and keep Republicans from flipping the Senate>>> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76853839/448607722/937741241?refcode=mw_em_240110_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjZlNWZiOC1lOWFmLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cKJlFSonxHnN2lHKqe0Ac-AKkJWOyhJ4IXyh0wp47pY=)__** Thank you, Team Warner ********[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76853840/448607723/937741241?refcode=mw_em_240110_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjZlNWZiOC1lOWFmLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cKJlFSonxHnN2lHKqe0Ac-AKkJWOyhJ4IXyh0wp47pY=)********

name: Lucas Kunce HQ
subject: Josh Hawley’s record, in his own words
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
[1]Lucas Kunce for U.S. Senate

Peter — instead of
telling you about why we need to defeat Josh Hawley this year, we’re
letting Hawley tell you himself:

He’s led the charge to criminalize abortion access in all 50 states.

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42476?refcode=em20240110-4582&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=4582%2E614464%2E3D6FN7 ]Quote from Josh Hawley in an article on LifeSite: 'I would support any
restriction on abortion... And I would vigorously defend such laws in
court, all the way to the Supreme Court if necessary.'

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42476?refcode=em20240110-4582&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=4582%2E614464%2E3D6FN7 ]DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY

He’s attacked workers and actively opposed pro-labor legislation.

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42476?refcode=em20240110-4582&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=4582%2E614464%2E3D6FN7 ]Excerpts from Business Insider: And Hawley, who previously supported
right-to-work legislation in Missouri and once called for an 'end to
union-backed candidates' in his party, said that the Protecting the Right
to Organize Act would 'hurt workers more than it helps.'

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42476?refcode=em20240110-4582&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=4582%2E614464%2E3D6FN7 ]DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY

He’s doubled down on his infamous cowardice on January 6th.

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42476?refcode=em20240110-4582&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1005&akid=4582%2E614464%2E3D6FN7 ]National Review headline: Hawley Defends January 6th Fist Pump: 'I
Don't Regret Anything I Did That Day'. Photo of Hawley raising his fist
outside the Capitol on January 6, 2021.

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42476?refcode=em20240110-4582&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1006&akid=4582%2E614464%2E3D6FN7 ]DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY

He’s celebrated the endorsement of Citizens United, the organization that
led the effort to corrupt our elections with dark money — and took their
campaign checks.

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42476?refcode=em20240110-4582&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1007&akid=4582%2E614464%2E3D6FN7 ]Tweet from Josh Hawley: Citizens United is dedicated to restoring our
government to citizens' control. I'm proud to have their endorsement.

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42476?refcode=em20240110-4582&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1008&akid=4582%2E614464%2E3D6FN7 ]DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY

And he’s even started sending panicked emails to his top supporters
begging for their help in what multiple polls have already shown is a
neck-and-neck race.

name: Governor Ron DeSantis
subject: What are we asking people to fight for?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
There's something seriously deranged about what Joe Biden is doing to our country. I'm taking our fight to the debate stage tonight. This can't wait.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=197506023a5d484ea6270f7dd343ada1&_e=mhyy5P0bYCKJPNQDW7WPE8CvqdsKiPpyUxdJmEytJ7PHTS7QHWZzSdC2HIzj-838C7Nh996dBPOZgoC5pCNBLDogct2C3ohSEiy-2cGr6xcwbcR-sJznLCpG3RIBuGMXu9G-SPmANGb-WWeaS-e2IBg9pM_H4hseQ7TiwnXuCzLQvJ4ckxhXLebqVMj03GExxkTFBAkuM3PbfN2esnee8KG13RogyLKPyPqdBOiSQXRkPNIdoki6I7qH8m1ngl4xBGV3OZQdqFQkiLs7mU_pVTij18_6RnuxdYp6320jwBOj0guXUDdx1wgIrbXnI7PNFwkZnxysNGlBruajgydEH67dnRRuPhj-8bHgOdCIK2BwpwvgXB1bhf5nlbldwD6yo_ojIRoaSdaabLHq9arQYdeKTqahcX-_GPUmDuXPeHGdkWg07_16Dynq9LKgWhFW)
---
Friend, Do you remember when we could be proud of our government and all that it stood for? When we could trust our elected officials and candidates to be transparent with the people they serve? _**We have strayed so far, we have a candidate like Nikki Haley running for President who has broken promise after promise to her supporters and constituents, sold out to the highest bidder, welcomed the Chinese Communist Party to her state, and flip-flopped on so many positions, it's hard to determine where she stands on anything.** _ **I am fighting tonight at the debate --and every day--to restore the freedom and glory that our country used to stand for. **Back then, we could ask young men and women to stand up and fight in our proud Armed Forces, and they would volunteer to do it. _What are we asking these young Americans to fight for now?_ A country full of so much woke indoctrination that children are being told genders aren't real and their dad may be their mom? Being taught to question whether they want to stay in the bodies they were born in?**It's disappointing and outrageous.** I'm not okay with it, Friend. I am stepping up on that debate stage tonight to fight against it with everything I've got. If there's one point I'll **never** compromise on, it's the annihilation of sanity in my children's future.**I need your help to fight back.**

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

subject: Far right judges just overturned another one of California’s strong gun laws

body:
Until we get a Constitutional amendment on guns, no law is safe

Friends —
The far right-wing dystopian vision for America is a place where everyone in all places is a threat and people should be armed to the teeth just in case.
That includes our playgrounds, libraries, and hospitals.
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/3104?t=1&akid=1766%2E4767699%2EisGgee)
Until we get a Constitutional amendment on guns, no law — no matter how many lives it saves, no matter how reasonable or how much sense it makes — is safe.
\- Gavin Newsom
* * *
🛟 Hi. Please don’t click away just yet. 🇺🇸
All across the country, rights are being rolled-back in real-time by Republicans with a zest for demonization. We are going to go on the road and on offense — in red states too — and take the fight to statehouses, local communities, and electoral battlegrounds to save our democracy.
If everyone reading this donated just $20, we could support every “Red State” party across the country and give Democrats a chance to win EVERYWHERE. That includes our playgrounds, libraries, and hospitals. Until we get a Constitutional amendment on guns, no law — no matter how many lives it saves, no matter how reasonable or how much sense it makes — is safe. \- Gavin Newsom 🛟 Hi. Please don’t click away just yet. 🇺🇸 All across the country, rights are being rolled-back in real-time by Republicans with a zest for demonization. We are going to go on the road and on offense — in red states too — and take the fight to statehouses, local communities, and electoral battlegrounds to save our democracy. If everyone reading this donated just $20, we could support every “Red State” party across the country and give Democrats a chance to win EVERYWHERE. If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | | **

body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/edd14fbe1c2a/petition-season-fast-approaching-12671414?e=131e83a3c2)

# Rob for PA Weekly Update

Welcome to our Team Bresnahan Weekly Update!
We hope everyone had a fantastic Holiday season, and I’d like to wish you all a very Happy New Year!
Our year is off to a great start! We obtained endorsements from a variety of nationally and locally recognized elected officials, visited the Pennsylvania Farm Show with the PA Congressional Delegation, and worked tirelessly to get Northeast PA a representative who truly represents them in Washington.
We secured endorsements from US House Speaker Mike Johnson, House Leadership, PA State Representatives Aaron Kaufer and Alec Ryncavage, as well as local leaders from across the district. I am profoundly grateful for all the support my campaign has received, which serves as a great first step in our movement for the men and women of Northeast PA.
[](https://robforpa.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4aaa9665caa590d8638bb435d&id=b0f9ebdc51&e=131e83a3c2)
|
---
Together with the PA Republican Congressional delegation, Rob visited the Pennsylvania Farm Show in Harrisburg over the weekend. Rob is committed to supporting our hardworking farmers in Pennsylvania's 8th Congressional District. Witnessing the impressive Pennsylvania farming industry was inspiring, and it reinforced his dedication to strengthening Northeast PA's farming industry. Not to mention, the show had some of the best milkshakes on Earth!

Thank you for your continued support. We look forward to working closely with you to put Northeast PA back on track!
Best Regards,Team Rob
