Big news on the campaign front, we're live on TV!
[](https://substack.com/redirect/2dead7fd-06dc-447e-a623-3dcdec1eaa48?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
It's always challenging to get a campaign's entire message into a 30 second ad. **So today, I 'm going beyond the ad and breaking down my actual plan to shake up the Senate:**
1. **Ban Federal Lobbyist Contributions:** For every industry and company who makes your life more difficult, price gouges you, or stands in the way of real progress--you can bet they have an army of lobbyists to do their bidding. **Total federal lobbying spending surpassed $4 billion in 2022 alone, the highest annual spend we 've seen since 2010, adjusted for inflation.** Right now I'm one of just 11 (out of 435) Members of the House who reject federal lobbyist money.

2. **Ban Corporate PAC Donations:** Throughout the 2022 election cycle, **business PACs made $341.3 million in federal contributions** --five times more what labor PACs (like those run by the Teamsters) gave. Whether it's about tax policy or the transition to clean energy, it's no surprise that politicians side with corporations time and time again. We have to fundamentally change our campaign finance system.

3. **Eliminate Pet-project Funding for Politicians, also known as Earmarks:** Earmarks are a way of politicians directly giving funding to a certain project or entity. They were banned under President Obama because they consistently lead to waste and fraud. Earmarks also tend to benefit whiter, wealthier, more conservative areas rather than communities that could most benefit from federal funding. When Congress brought back earmarks in 2021, I was the only Democrat to oppose them.

4. **Ban Congressional Stocks Trading:** Right now, loopholes allow Members of Congress to trade stock based on information we learn in private briefings. I've already introduced the STOCK ACT 2.0, which would create an enforceable and effective ban on these trades for both Members and their spouses. **A 2022 New York Times analysis found that nearly a fifth of Congresspeople report a stock trade that revealed a potential conflict of interest.**

5. **Abolish the Filibuster and Ban Singular Holds on Nominations:** The filibuster stands in the way of so many real reforms--including codifying the right to an abortion. And we should change the rules so that a single Senator doesn't have the power to hold up important military promotions for political gain, the way Alabama Senator Tommy Tuberville did last year.

6. **Increase Transparency:** I publicly release a list of every single official meeting I take. Every Congressperson should do the same. I'm also fighting for more transparency of when, where, and why top government officials--including members of the House and Senate--travel on the taxpayers' dime.

The first step to enacting this plan is getting elected to the U.S. Senate. Right now, we're in the final stretch of the primary campaign, so I do have an ask for you: **Can you share this Substack?** So many people will choose who they vote for in this race based on what ads or posts come across their screen.
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2052568&post_id=140557955&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQwNTU3OTU1LCJpYXQiOjE3MDQ5MTQxMzUsImV4cCI6MTcwNzUwNjEzNSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTIwNTI1NjgiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.nSWtMvaER0xr2tAinBtNCKYANaU5JUHoJKaYlY9Kz7g)
We're also short on the money we need to really ramp up this ad across the state. **So if you can spare a few bucks,[I'd be so appreciative of anything you can chip in.](https://substack.com/redirect/23c664bd-ca02-4fc9-9aa7-af95b1df7fea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[Donate](https://substack.com/redirect/9f507f11-5b5f-4455-b58b-eef5cf7d1709?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Register to Vote](https://substack.com/redirect/1d12fbe8-23b9-4a9a-8f0a-6267796cf22e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Many thanks for reading, and for your support!
Katie

| | Wishing you a Happy New Year! We're kicking off the year at full speed. In January, we're in the process of forming our advisory group, and we're incredibly thankful to those who've generously devoted their time and expertise to steer us toward the future. We look forward to the moment when we can introduce them to you. Our primary focus remains on the pro-Democratic messaging campaign, and we're delighted with the deeply satisfying results thus far. Stay tuned for more updates as we continue to share information about the transformative impact the messaging campaign is making on Central Washington.
---
| | |
---
| | Meet Murray and Cantwell's Staffers Poll
---
| | Thank you for participating in our district-wide survey. Your input is incredibly valuable and will shape our ongoing initiatives. We're working closely with the offices of Senators Murray and Cantwell to arrange a virtual Q/A session for all constituents in Central Washington. The data below indicates a strong interest in learning more about the commendable work our Senators are doing in Congress. Keep an eye on your inbox for further details.

| | Starting our 3rd month!

| | |

| | What keeps me going: For those unfamiliar, my father, a retired plumber from the Plumbers & Steamfitters Local 598 in Hanford, instilled in me invaluable lessons from his years of experience. Among the numerous teachings, he emphasized three fundamental principles:
1. Hate is the heaviest burden a person can carry.
2. Shit runs downhill.
3. Water finds its level.

I added a fourth, equally crucial tenet:
4. Listen to what people say; it is important to listen. However, also watch what they do because, more often than not, therein lies the truth.

When questioned about how I maintain my optimism and tenacity, I consistently refer to these four straightforward statements. This is why I firmly believe that Rural America holds the key to saving American Democracy.
The weight of hate becomes painfully evident within the Republican Party, especially as party members align closer with MAGA, resulting in heightened chaos. Trump finds himself deeply entangled in legal battles, and the Republican House members are engaging in internal conflicts. The intricate web of lies, deceit, and corrupt conduct has reached such completeness that they are swiftly disavowing their own, throwing each other under the bus at an alarming rate. This all-encompassing hate becomes a paralyzing force, diverting attention away from essential tasks such as effectively governing a country. Currently, the count stands at five Republican members of Congress leaving. Despite its simplicity, the enduring truth remains: goodness will ultimately triumph, as hate proves to be unsustainable.
---
| | |
---

subject: Your voice matters on this campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jared Moskowitz For Congress P
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76856894/448614275/1141962486?refcode=header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTA5NmQ5Zi1lY2FmLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wBj5IgsN_bazJ3jMzZRyCLRaA__serD-bmxWMzuo34o=)

With 2024 officially here, Jared is gearing up to make his way across our district and fight for the issues that matter to **_you._** But with a New Year, sometimes new priorities come. name: Conservative Alerts
subject: Dave McCormick's Journey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Renewal PAC
body:
| |
---
| | | Friend,

We want to share the incredible journey of a man whose life story embodies the essence of service, resilience, and the American dream. It's a story that begins with humble roots, charts a course through moments of sacrifice and bravery, and is now poised to shape a brighter future for our nation.

Dave McCormick, a man of extraordinary character and dedication, was raised by two hard-working teachers in the heart of Pennsylvania. His childhood was filled with the simple joys of deer hunting in winter and helping to trim Christmas trees on the family farm during summers. However, it was on the wrestling mat in high school that Dave's true journey began. Wrestling ignited his passion and paved the way for life-altering opportunities, including an invitation to attend West Point.

At West Point, Dave's unwavering commitment to his passion for wrestling was matched only by his dedication to serving our great nation. He trained relentlessly, earning the esteemed rank of a paratrooper and climbing the ranks to become a 2nd Lieutenant. Little did he know that his path would soon lead him to the Gulf War as part of Operation Desert Storm.

The chaos and secrecy surrounding the mission meant that soldiers like Dave couldn't bid farewell to their families. Communication was limited to handwritten letters, which he diligently sent to his parents whenever possible. Remarkably, those cherished letters remain preserved in a box at his mother's home.

Maintaining contact with home was no easy task due to stringent security restrictions. But in a heartwarming turn of events, an extraordinary package arrived at their desert camp just before Christmas. To everyone's astonishment, it contained a Christmas tree personally chosen by Dave's father from their family farm. There in the Saudi desert, Dave and his fellow soldiers experienced a moment of Christmas joy and a poignant reminder of their roots. It was an unexpected blessing that brought smiles to even the most battle-hardened hearts.

We share Dave McCormick's incredible journey because it embodies the American spirit - from the Pennsylvania Christmas tree farm to West Point, from the Gulf War to becoming a job creator, to seeking public office. Dave has always been driven to serve.

_**Now, Dave is embarking on a new mission - to be the next U.S. Senator of Pennsylvania. **_

---
| | | [STAND WITH DAVE](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=831186ef652646fdb0b16f95819f8015&_e=TyLjvoiAr62fF0l3a0jA_6xafstTN-kLP-9xYK2yM64y8nxJiRxpMO7rREUSOSrs8PhUThjtcHsNKsdn3jKWGH5NcHNkRp-RsyED4tTK116g4qOJ6u8yMBwNy1qiHqE5HMkbjf8P4iabgL_HIDpNH_y58M-4guSj2SKnsgSKjEoKncy4201AXnVVa0ZJ13TiY_M4VrDAlTAQ6ECV3i4bK4FQa8xbGKZIl2w5KrvFAdVhjkYESMs-tTjOHJDwZHg3379OmxW8lCKdv7YM1CFnKYuvJvyb4Pw741kStJ2EmBHKzcWT9XfD8Y0k6awEtdgzULJymST2yhuowOh4i2fV6DwrSGeRvAJxEUbaudu5uwy-syj2PWFqZLuj31K5xEtEVb1DQq2zWXo_tK7ynsHgsCml5qhiHa9cz8CBFyX_NWM%3D)
---
Our nation is at a critical crossroads, and we need strong conservative leaders who will stand and fiercely defend the values that make America great. We need leaders like Dave McCormick.

_**[By supporting Dave, you're backing a true leader with a unique blend of military experience, business acumen, and an unwavering dedication to serving our great nation. By chipping in even just a single dollar, you can be on the ground floor of the movement to renew our country!](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=831186ef652646fdb0b16f95819f8015&_e=TyLjvoiAr62fF0l3a0jA_6xafstTN-kLP-9xYK2yM64y8nxJiRxpMO7rREUSOSrs8PhUThjtcHsNKsdn3jKWGH5NcHNkRp-RsyED4tTK116g4qOJ6u8yMBwNy1qiHqE5HMkbjf8P4iabgL_HIDpNH_y58M-4guSj2SKnsgSKjEoKncy4201AXnVVa0ZJ13TiY_M4VrDAlTAQ6ECV3i4bK4FQa8xbGKZIl2w5KrvFAdVhjkYESMs-tTjOHJDwZHg3379OmxW8lCKdv7YM1CFnKfCmaBaIbCZ4MKu9-WH22HBQI9Z6ngYZGNjAyG3cUcv7PCO1f8W_T_6a_bJ3CnCtvBQ_kOkysWUkGkgy4wcZ4NyXNk8rm_EShznGJXR9jjQqA9KrDCW4bxhKyV_9VfkNo4lzAK-7bca8YDWIDpLYYhQ%3D "By supporting Dave, you're backing a true leader with a unique blend of military experience, business acumen, and an unwavering dedication to serving our great nation. By chipping in even just a single dollar, you can be on the ground floor of the movement to renew our country!")**_

Together, we can empower Dave McCormick to be a powerful voice in the U.S. Senate, fighting for conservative principles and ensuring our voices are heard.

Thank you for considering our heartfelt request. Your dedication to renewing America's strength is deeply appreciated, and your support is invaluable as we work together to secure a brighter future for all Americans.

Conservative Alerts

_P.S. We encourage you to share this message with your friends, family, and fellow conservatives who share our passion for a stronger, more prosperous America._

body:
Ahead of tonight’s debate | |

Hey, Peter, it's Nikki.

**[I'm now just hours out from taking the debate stage!](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=e25fbac083ed4e2a8c04356e6b8bd4c1&_e=Z6KTEJipOlnvYS5AGmVzyZj_njcIvgAUeRO0K6wPU_FEExDEG_XZK2tH8igkFhpB64JyD2mzpmZe7smzw3dkNAAZ913MZRC0ZAmFHwnVsGvWR5PLZDbpQ0Bu1DXzsTueqDMVWBPqMLUz8V9lqrGQKtPRw9xqx6VehU5mtOVYvt5OQYIM4HpiDteNXpcYpn2FmSzHqNV0OWtGEmKklO0Wwd4IDckRUC9oZESX0IXfiDEb48FhivCn0ckCIa7a-M8gm7kBByBwmvEg0satFrbrswFLs2AqAfHP8gJSBHAA9gzGyAlRt09gtDOW902uwbxpJhed8df10vok5Mlf9ATszB40P8esxJbpYaZIR5y8uM5OU0llyj9hSO4a5i44K9sd)**

As I prepare for **TONIGHT'S** presidential debate, I've been reflecting on an important moment - one of my very first debates as a gubernatorial candidate. [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=e25fbac083ed4e2a8c04356e6b8bd4c1&_e=Z6KTEJipOlnvYS5AGmVzyZj_njcIvgAUeRO0K6wPU_FEExDEG_XZK2tH8igkFhpB64JyD2mzpmZe7smzw3dkNAAZ913MZRC0ZAmFHwnVsGvWR5PLZDbpQ0Bu1DXzsTueqDMVWBPqMLUz8V9lqrGQKtPRw9xqx6VehU5mtOVYvt5OQYIM4HpiDteNXpcYpn2FmSzHqNV0OWtGEmKklO0Wwcfr9txs43IGO4IQm6WkNGWAG1vimPfgYwBi7YY1yhFyT-dEA2LMowYX-B6hVC51Z66vTp2ANnQvJgFQatrTteel-TJNK5qmulkybMV7n_1A51ca4gWviR44TRBh5DL4P-ji5THIg3jlVVv7miUbuv3ZH1azh-JPOkK1E-B5VoCU)
That debate played a huge role in the outcome of my race for governor, and it reminded me of an important story I want to share with you:
_-> I was the underdog when I ran for governor.

-> No one thought I had a shot. But that didn't stop me.

-> I've never lost a race, and I'm NOT starting now. _
I know the **MOST** important parts of running a winning campaign comes down to hard work, determination, and a **STRONG** team of grassroots supporters.

Which is why I'm humbly asking for your support today.

**[My team set a goal of adding 10,000 NEW donations before I take the stage tonight. Can I count you in for one of them?](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=e25fbac083ed4e2a8c04356e6b8bd4c1&_e=Z6KTEJipOlnvYS5AGmVzyZj_njcIvgAUeRO0K6wPU_FEExDEG_XZK2tH8igkFhpB64JyD2mzpmZe7smzw3dkNAAZ913MZRC0ZAmFHwnVsGvWR5PLZDbpQ0Bu1DXzsTueqDMVWBPqMLUz8V9lqrGQKtPRw9xqx6VehU5mtOVYvt5OQYIM4HpiDteNXpcYpn2FmSzHqNV0OWtGEmKklO0WwSJztsQmW22D9nontS7fP95t7h3cJrhqoQTk49Ru18_C7zQqciQ_wN8rVfxB9Ahwka1QUBMPju3iPV7y9WbTSmCofa7UXcpKaSOs7GldRqLj_MWphRZ2bCH2xLtC17aZJXY40kwrrFptQ8dF9N7iYN6JKM8PKEWzRZl265_t6vSt)**
| [RUSH SUPPORT NOW](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=e25fbac083ed4e2a8c04356e6b8bd4c1&_e=Z6KTEJipOlnvYS5AGmVzyZj_njcIvgAUeRO0K6wPU_FEExDEG_XZK2tH8igkFhpB64JyD2mzpmZe7smzw3dkNAAZ913MZRC0ZAmFHwnVsGvWR5PLZDbpQ0Bu1DXzsTueqDMVWBPqMLUz8V9lqrGQKtPRw9xqx6VehU5mtOVYvt5OQYIM4HpiDteNXpcYpn2FmSzHqNV0OWtGEmKklO0WwTVpYa7gdJpQDD_5CrKMaSNxEkODNJHeMe99VxQ8EmhCG-FgbHUsMFGskAgjHa_TYnnANgSfApqQwipbWA7mBBSwSlEPTDPJ3TsXvpDVGBNnCtwK5-zexlLOBx8nmeizsm9YcG_noacnNh5aG6R0lR7ZYCGagmPBKLMGePbHTv_0)

The support we get ahead of this first debate of 2024 will play a key role in making sure we have the resources needed to capitalize on the momentum the moment I step off stage.

Tonight's debate will be a critical chance to change the minds of undecided voters and supercharge our efforts to amplify my message ahead of the first votes taking place on Monday.

clean_body: Ahead of tonight’s debate | | | | | Hey, Peter, it's Nikki. As I prepare for TONIGHT'S presidential debate, I've been reflecting on an important moment - one of my very first debates as a gubernatorial candidate. That debate played a huge role in the outcome of my race for governor, and it reminded me of an important story I want to share with you: -> I was the underdog when I ran for governor. -> No one thought I had a shot. But that didn't stop me. -> I've never lost a race, and I'm NOT starting now. I know the MOST important parts of running a winning campaign comes down to hard work, determination, and a STRONG team of grassroots supporters. Which is why I'm humbly asking for your support today. | The support we get ahead of this first debate of 2024 will play a key role in making sure we have the resources needed to capitalize on the momentum the moment I step off stage. Tonight's debate will be a critical chance to change the minds of undecided voters and supercharge our efforts to amplify my message ahead of the first votes taking place on Monday. I look forward to making you and our great nation proud! My very best, - Nikki R. name: Bob Casey
subject: When at the PA Farm show…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1647%2E552475%2ExS5vu5)
Hi Peter, it’s Bob.
This past weekend, I was at the 108th Annual Farm Show in Dauphin County, meeting with folks who are leading Pennsylvania agriculture into the future...and a few cows.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240110-1?refcode=em20240110-1&refcode2=1647_552475_xS5vu5&akid=1647%2E552475%2ExS5vu5)
Agriculture is Pennsylvania’s top industry, and our farmers play an essential role in feeding families across the Commonwealth and the Nation.
Fun fact: 48 of Pennsylvania’s 67 counties are rural, and I’ve proudly fought to secure critical funds for all of them — because where you live in PA shouldn’t determine the quality of your education, access to health care, or ability to complete your job.
[**I want to keep fighting on the side of working people across the Commonwealth, in big towns and small towns. I hope you’ll join me by chipping in a few dollars to my re-election campaign today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240110-1?refcode=em20240110-1&refcode2=1647_552475_xS5vu5&akid=1647%2E552475%2ExS5vu5)
I’ve secured critical funding to increase high-speed internet access for our rural communities, spur economic development, and ensure rural hospitals are equipped.
I’ve helped pass provisions in the PACT Act to improve recruitment and retention of health care professionals at rural VA facilities.
I’ve fought to make sure the Farm Bill works for Pennsylvania farmers so our agriculture industry can continue to thrive.
And I’m not finished yet, because there is still more to do to support our rural communities.
[**You can bet I’ll keep fighting for Pennsylvania farmers with everything I’ve got, but I need your help to hold this seat. Can I count on you to make a donation today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240110-1?refcode=em20240110-1&refcode2=1647_552475_xS5vu5&akid=1647%2E552475%2ExS5vu5)
With gratitude,
Bob
P.S. If you haven’t already, you should check out the Farm Show’s famous butter sculpture.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240110-1?refcode=em20240110-1&refcode2=1647_552475_xS5vu5&akid=1647%2E552475%2ExS5vu5)

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=1647%2E552475%2ExS5vu5)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=1647%2E552475%2ExS5vu5)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

body:
| | | I wanted you to see the email I just got from my staff.

I’ve attached it below, and I think it’s important.

**Right now, we’re behind on January fundraising numbers.**

I understand that there’s a lot going on in the world right now.

_But I also know that the only way to bring security and peace back to the globe is with strong, American leadership - and right now, we have nothing but weakness in the White House._

**Together, we can restore America’s true place as the leader of the free world - but we can’t do that if the Left is in power for much longer.**

clean_body: | | | I wanted you to see the email I just got from my staff. I’ve attached it below, and I think it’s important. Right now, we’re behind on January fundraising numbers. I understand that there’s a lot going on in the world right now. But I also know that the only way to bring security and peace back to the globe is with strong, American leadership - and right now, we have nothing but weakness in the White House. Together, we can restore America’s true place as the leader of the free world - but we can’t do that if the Left is in power for much longer. | | In Service, Col. Friend,
Donald Trump is running out of options in his Georgia election interference criminal case. That means his top attack dog, Jim Jordan, is freaking out and stepping up his vendetta against law enforcement officers like Fulton County DA Fani Willis. **
****Jim Jordan is abusing his post as the Chair of the House Judiciary Committee to launch personal attacks against Willis, a Black woman and the first woman to EVER serve in her role.**
But Jordan’s relentless attacks of Willis and the judge in Trump’s federal election interference case, Tanya Chutkan, reveal a lot about his weaknesses: the “sit down and shut up” attitude Jordan has toward these two strong Black women who are upholding law and order is not sitting well with the good people of Ohio, who overwhelmingly support women’s rights and the rule of law.
And it doesn’t sit well with me, either. **If anyone needs to sit down and shut up, it’s Jim Jordan.**
****I could recite a thousand examples of Jordan yelling on Fox News, repeating bogus and false claims, or amplifying Trump’s garbage. Instead, I will simply say:[**I am going to shut Jim Jordan up this election—and I want your help to do it.**](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMTAwMTE0OTMxODgxMDk2ODgsXCJyXCI6MTEwMDExNTQxMTk4MjEwMjk2fSIsInMiOiJlYzFiYWEwMmFiNDkxODY5In0)
This is a contest that will test the soul of America and our resolve to remain a free and democratic nation of laws. name: Sharice Davids
subject: Right at the start of the election year
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Hi team,

Three years after the violent insurrection at the U.S. Capitol, ensuring our elections remain free and fair amidst the rising threats against them is essential to our democracy.

That’s why right at the start of this critical election year, I need to know my supporters agree:

**_[Will you sign on today to support our election integrity? I’m looking for 5,000 responses before the end of the week to show just how galvanized Team Sharice is on this issue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76859115/448617525/1836576975?source=EM_NBI_SD_20240109_PT_1.1_0_1MO_candidate_NA_NA_electionintegrity&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGYxMGY2OC1lZmFmLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H6SdcOmvLeHHcS1bci68PFThCkFs8lpbG9Ny20sXvDQ=&emci=faff5c18-e1af-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=f8f10f68-efaf-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=22117458)_**

Gerrymandering, voter suppression, disinformation, deep pocketed mega donors and corporations.... These are only a few of the tactics that extremists use to try and weaken the foundation of our country.

**These attacks will not stop. Which is why we can’t stop fighting back.**

Just a few years ago, I voted for legislation to protect our freedom to vote and ensure equality at the ballot box.

As your representative, I will always defend our individual rights and freedoms— _and stand up for our democracy._ But without control of the House, we know real action to protect our elections from these attacks aren’t going to become law.

**And with more attacks coming against the Voting Rights Act this year, we know anti-democracy extremists are not going to let up.**

Protecting our rights and elections this year will come down to each and every one of us. Will you sign on today to stand up for our elections? | **[Sign On](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76859117/448617526/1836576975?source=EM_NBI_SD_20240109_PT_1.1_0_1MO_candidate_NA_NA_electionintegrity&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGYxMGY2OC1lZmFmLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H6SdcOmvLeHHcS1bci68PFThCkFs8lpbG9Ny20sXvDQ=&emci=faff5c18-e1af-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=f8f10f68-efaf-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=22117458)**

clean_body: | Hi team, Three years after the violent insurrection at the U.S. Capitol, ensuring our elections remain free and fair amidst the rising threats against them is essential to our democracy. That’s why right at the start of this critical election year, I need to know my supporters agree: Gerrymandering, voter suppression, disinformation, deep pocketed mega donors and corporations.... These are only a few of the tactics that extremists use to try and weaken the foundation of our country. These attacks will not stop. Which is why we can’t stop fighting back. Just a few years ago, I voted for legislation to protect our freedom to vote and ensure equality at the ballot box. As your representative, I will always defend our individual rights and freedoms— and stand up for our democracy. But without control of the House, we know real action to protect our elections from these attacks aren’t going to become law. And with more attacks coming against the Voting Rights Act this year, we know anti-democracy extremists are not going to let up. Protecting our rights and elections this year will come down to each and every one of us. Will you sign on today to stand up for our elections? | Thank you, Sharice * | = Click here to from Sharice Davids' email list. name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: Judicial Watch: Records Show Joe Biden Used Email Alias in Correspondence which Included Hunter Biden and James Biden; Signed Off on Brief Cessation of Secret Service Protection for Hunter and Natalie Biden
body:
Judicial Watch announced today it received 426 pages of records in a
Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit from the National Archives
and Records Administration (NARA) that show then-Vice President Joe
Biden’s use of an email alias to correspond with family members,
including son Hunter and brother James; and that Joe Biden signed off
on the cessation of Secret Service protection for Hunter Biden and
Beau Biden’s daughter Natalie during an August 2016 trip to Kosovo.

[alt_text]

[*****]
January 10, 2024

Judicial Watch announced today it received 426 pages of records
in a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit from the National
Archives and Records Administration (NARA) that show then-Vice
President Joe Biden’s use of an email alias to correspond with
family members, including son Hunter and brother James; and that Joe
Biden signed off on the cessation of Secret Service protection for
Hunter Biden and Beau Biden’s daughter Natalie during an August
2016 trip to Kosovo.

subject: You've been selected → Team Ilhan 2024 Issues Survey
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
It's so important we know where our movement's priorities lie this year
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=848%2E791427%2ERdoin0)

Friend,
Every so often, Ilhan likes us to check in with our top supporters directly to ask a simple question: **_What's on your mind?**_
That's why — with the New Year underway and this election season about to enter full-swing — we've put together our official 2024 Team Ilhan Issues Survey, and we're hoping for a LOT of responses today.
[**Can you submit your answer? This survey won't take more than 2 minutes of your time, and your feedback is so important to Ilhan and our entire team.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/io-em240110-issues-survey/?source=em240110-1-t2&refcode2=848.791427.Rdoin0&akid=848%2E791427%2ERdoin0)**
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/io-em240110-issues-survey/?source=em240110-1-t2&refcode2=848.791427.Rdoin0&akid=848%2E791427%2ERdoin0)**
With so much going on in the world today, the answers we get back from these surveys change nearly every time we ask.
The more responses we receive, the better Ilhan is able to continue fighting for the critical issues our progressive movement cares about most.
Whether it's Medicare for All, combating the climate crisis, canceling student debt, ending endless wars, or something else entirely — we'd really appreciate your response today.
So please:
[**Can you use this link and let us know what's on your mind as we enter this critical election year? We promise this won't take long.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/io-em240110-issues-survey/?source=em240110-1-t2&refcode2=848.791427.Rdoin0&akid=848%2E791427%2ERdoin0)**
We'll be sharing the responses with Ilhan later this week, so thanks in advance for sharing.
In solidarity,
Team Ilhan
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/io-em240110-issues-survey/?source=em240110-1-t2&refcode2=848.791427.Rdoin0&akid=848%2E791427%2ERdoin0)**

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=2&akid=848%2E791427%2ERdoin0)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=3&akid=848%2E791427%2ERdoin0)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=4&akid=848%2E791427%2ERdoin0)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=848_791427_Rdoin0&akid=848%2E791427%2ERdoin0)**.
Ilhan for Congress

name: Sam Brown
subject: They blew up my body, but they’ll never destroy my spirit.
body:
You can never take away the heart of a soldier

| |
---
| | | Friend,

**[This was God's message for me.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b800d1ec71c24c78a12a0daf66ddfb38&_e=A0dL7xFYJKvwd6OJE-3iTCjUi1RC3EHOCLlB-QAy_SEO2sRKz-TPjSb2GYU8n4csPSPuhdEvmR-BGYPnvs-l3zZcgPrh0By4M3hjDGs2jPAPbWsr7OS5uls6OQYTaHUfI7G55ZxeiCpIbKfoRBHO2jdprjkmFqNWf2Krdrw3GogDIJHc6JdGgrLsjFEYe56PG2m4QSbjQ5JKh85K7slc9ygUMnVQxWBNAuiI5hD2_zW8CVTprBqX0YIoms0JvFujFremy5gcCo2olCJ7nF1RBCigmwljFlcOqwWUC384ffIPVru41MBuUroKwA5iUXqCZbO5IAM-nmIv5xlqxLo_aVqr19PKP5gy0pALoudm6c0PpLFJ5FMpdi9GaVfzFxaOmg-L-DsrDCeD-f7k0Ky9-A%3D%3D "This was God’s message for me. ")**

I didn't know if I was going to survive -- but I knew if I did, my life would belong to Him forever.

In 2008, a roadside bomb in Afghanistan left me with burns over half my body. This was my vehicle after the explosion.

---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b800d1ec71c24c78a12a0daf66ddfb38&_e=A0dL7xFYJKvwd6OJE-3iTCjUi1RC3EHOCLlB-QAy_SEO2sRKz-TPjSb2GYU8n4csPSPuhdEvmR-BGYPnvs-l3zZcgPrh0By4M3hjDGs2jPAPbWsr7OS5uls6OQYTaHUfI7G55ZxeiCpIbKfoRBHO2jdprjkmFqNWf2Krdrw3GogDIJHc6JdGgrLsjFEYe56PG2m4QSbjQ5JKh85K7slc9ygUMnVQxWBNAuiI5hD2_zWq9FIknVDFo20C-QPT64EfccP66lMG8upoKimObu-efuMFlXk5AIur5C2pv_3ft77KxuL4jriIWOGUkFjaXBu8q15mTrMbA7cB74foO5nHUyx0LkGTRmaXAVLudp7XXA1N6qj3ePjl3NDK1tgtqLIFkZQEaxFsLuiJDoX3HuqyPQ%3D%3D)
---

My path to recovery wasn't easy -- I spent months wondering if my life could ever be the same, asking myself why God spared me that day.

**But that was God 's way of speaking to me, THIS was His message to me...His plan for me.**

Friend, I realized that my life would NEVER be the same, but that was okay. I was alive for one reason:

_**My new life belonged not to me, but to Him.

That's why I've lived every day since with three things in mind: My country, my family, and God Himself. **_

God used the tragedy that resulted in my injuries to tell me something.

Through 3 years of recovery and over 30 surgeries- I was never alone. Not for one second.

God stayed with me through it all and he made it clear to me that I was NOT called to wish for my old life.

**Instead, I was called to live my new life to the fullest in service to Him.**

That's why I spent the last 15 years starting my family, serving fellow veterans through the business I started, and most recently, **[I launched my campaign to become the next U.S. Senator from Nevada.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b800d1ec71c24c78a12a0daf66ddfb38&_e=A0dL7xFYJKvwd6OJE-3iTCjUi1RC3EHOCLlB-QAy_SEO2sRKz-TPjSb2GYU8n4csPSPuhdEvmR-BGYPnvs-l3zZcgPrh0By4M3hjDGs2jPAPbWsr7OS5uls6OQYTaHUfI7G55ZxeiCpIbKfoRBHO2jdprjkmFqNWf2Krdrw3GogDIJHc6JdGgrLsjFEYe56PG2m4QSbjQ5JKh85K7slc9ygUMnVQxWBNAuiI5hD2_zVfvW8Y20vq0kgX7pd5uFHyDBYPS-Alp6hrELs3F6lcSXwOM0eM3j1OLbXgkV8n7_mAdRJb-BZOCPNW5ZdKny9jYIwmzCUegFcSdUboJ8Djic-QZf6jIxEvm5HpyviNyZPK9NtCDv-ikEf5i18yo1rmhCn9H2rMA7N0CVG6PfVjMw%3D%3D "I launched my campaign to become the next U.S. Senator from Nevada.")**

America is at a tipping point.

Corrupt leaders are leading us into total madness.

Our border is collapsing.

Parents are being cut-off from their children in schools.

We're spending away our future and the future of our children's children.

I'm running for U.S. Senate to bring a new generation of Conservative leadership to Washington D.C.

But to do that, Friend, I'll need your help.

So I'm hoping that you can help me with 1 or 2 things.
1. Would you please keep me and my family in your prayers as we take on some of the most powerful elites in the world?
2. **[Would you consider sending in $5 or $10 to help fund my campaign?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b800d1ec71c24c78a12a0daf66ddfb38&_e=A0dL7xFYJKvwd6OJE-3iTCjUi1RC3EHOCLlB-QAy_SEO2sRKz-TPjSb2GYU8n4csPSPuhdEvmR-BGYPnvs-l3zZcgPrh0By4M3hjDGs2jPAPbWsr7OS5uls6OQYTaHUfI7G55ZxeiCpIbKfoRBHO2jdprjkmFqNWf2Krdrw3GogDIJHc6JdGgrLsjFEYe56PG2m4QSbjQ5JKh85K7slc9ygUMnVQxWBNAuiI5hD2_zUkyOf79O02-ZUtBD4oIOSh6uxQcwrpGCp_ubT3tImYclVqmJ94lpA18hKEKwyP1nvZ8wbCnyLEudCeAJO5n_yYz4lAPjzN5jM2XdlUtIQUkcBFdHKOhE5ZOLYLvrAIyZISh6lsjDjS6uvBhUt21FeXAdBgVh4_cC6DwFQ3xqdn8Q%3D%3D "Would you consider sending in $5 or $10 to help fund my campaign?")** I don't come from money and I'm no millionaire- that means that support from people like you will have a real impact on this election.

Asking for help isn't something that comes easy for me. I'm a combat veteran and a man of faith. But God has humbled me enough to know that I can't do this with HIM and without people like YOU.

Duty First,
---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b800d1ec71c24c78a12a0daf66ddfb38&_e=A0dL7xFYJKvwd6OJE-3iTCjUi1RC3EHOCLlB-QAy_SEO2sRKz-TPjSb2GYU8n4csPSPuhdEvmR-BGYPnvs-l3zZcgPrh0By4M3hjDGs2jPAPbWsr7OS5uls6OQYTaHUfI7G55ZxeiCpIbKfoRBHO2jdprjkmFqNWf2Krdrw3GogDIJHc6JdGgrLsjFEYe56PG2m4QSbjQ5JKh85K7slc9ygUMnVQxWBNAuiI5hD2_zURrhXSWSbD5EtVmddZ6YlbgNROf4ICkXYtX6qPdp11c6JvrtUWrjoSOB6VSPJDc0hkupJeVJz_ZSBj0QHnzBNHC0vPLkGKDf1LIZL5T2b1RjQncU-bO-neGyNCvWWfOEwbwgqaeZ00viSToXV3RlsgC9_x2OpXSZznb8cNQIdPOw%3D%3D)
---

Sam Brown

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: We don’t want this kind of dry January
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Donate to your favorite former bartender in Congress this “dry” January.
#
So far, January has been a pretty dry month for us.
Not dry as in no alcohol — dry as in slow for our fundraising. Truth be told, we’re $46,617 behind where we were on this same day last month.
[ To help us break this “dry” January, can you pitch in $8 (about the cost of a beer or mocktail) to your favorite former bartender in Congress?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240110.Mprz1V&refcode=em20240110-5616-P_FND_MMF_MIS&t=1&akid=5616%2E2526796%2Ec5yWoB)
**[CHIP IN $8🍺](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240110.Mprz1V&refcode=em20240110-5616-P_FND_MMF_MIS&t=2&akid=5616%2E2526796%2Ec5yWoB)**
_Every dollar goes toward Alexandria’s campaign and our movement to support working families._
January is all about setting goals and starting the New Year strong. We want to set the tone for this election year that Alexandria and our Squad in Congress are thriving and growing more powerful by the day.
**Fundraising plays a big part in that and allows us to set ambitious goals for the New Year.** We started this year out slower than expected, but we know we can get back on track.
[If you’re able to, please pitch in $8 today and together we can make this dry January a bit more liquid.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240110.Mprz1V&refcode=em20240110-5616-P_FND_MMF_MIS&t=3&akid=5616%2E2526796%2Ec5yWoB) 😉
Cheers,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20240110?refcode=em20240110-5616-P_FND_MMF_MIS&t=4&refcode2=5616_2526796_c5yWoB&akid=5616%2E2526796%2Ec5yWoB)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20240110-5616-P_FND_MMF_MIS&t=5&akid=5616%2E2526796%2Ec5yWoB)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=6&akid=5616%2E2526796%2Ec5yWoB) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=7&akid=5616%2E2526796%2Ec5yWoB) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=8&akid=5616%2E2526796%2Ec5yWoB)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=9&akid=5616%2E2526796%2Ec5yWoB)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=5616%2E2526796%2Ec5yWoB)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

name: Lori Chavez-DeRemer
subject: 2023: The Year of Results
body:

clean_body: | | | | Looking back... Peter, I can’t believe that 2023 is already over. I wanted to take a quick moment to reflect on all we’ve accomplished - because we couldn’t have done it without YOU! We’ve accomplished so much due to your continued support. We’ve fought tirelessly to: Sponsor the Most Bipartisan Bills in Oregon's Congressional Delegation Back legislation to protect our communities from the fentanyl crisis Respond to and help thousands of Oregonians with their constituent needs Peter, I’ll be honest with you - it wasn’t easy, and the radical left has been there to try to stop us every step of the way. I’m proud to have you on my team to restore Oregon for our future generations. Now we’re just getting started! With your help, we’ll make sure we come out on top in 2024 and secure another victory for Oregon and America. | | | | | If you can’t contribute today all I ask is that you stay in touch with us via email or socials. | | | | Thank you, Lori Chavez-DeRemer Congresswoman OR-05 | | | | | | | | Even as a Congresswoman, Lori’s most important title is mom. That’s how she knows the issues your family faces, and that’s why she fights everyday to make life better for every Oregon family, and every American. Aside from that, all you need to know are the issues she’s fighting for in Congress: If that sounds like the kind of agenda you can get behind, If you’d prefer to give by check, please use the below address: Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Congress 13203 SE 172nd Ave Suite 166 #399 Happy Valley, OR 97086 Forward This message to FIVE FRIENDS AND FAMILY to spread the word on how to achieve a better future for Oregon and America → Also text “LORI” to 71800 or click here to receive all of Lori’s messages | | | | Lori Chavez-DeRemer 13203 SE 172nd Ave, Suite 166 #399, Happy Valley, OR 97086 \- =

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: These questions are at the core of what it means to be human
body:
Every Hillsdale College student is required to take a class on the Western heritage in order to graduate.

| | | This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a674bf7326024f1e8a0a27fa8bc3d213&_e=bGUvuUEFQlunYXXj0b8oLqolAaUIo8194BqaAPhmDP6mUMfuto5j2p_qzyZs_Vq5GtFWkEDJBIc8K2xA8Jz7o11MSreL1QzrnxknTPR8xBJ1w_aN18ZRZzrPomoyE5GgRfEWEhbEUJSHlwS1flNLv0aLTSseK9T4Jju6EhmXJRS1TvDQcmfqX6g3ax5ybzviJboon3jNc9oepUsxsMgyvoHXdX3xPMejCOrZGMSyaSRAvUUFZ2dwI1Iv1OD-ljjvkA1s7X9lGCXGJD7zO4vQudy4jWCrpvoJJt9p38njPX_81hG1BXoizXEQyhIz-hN42AV006Q1p2fSSEd-9XCUf-ZQzhYIsHLvXrZeB_aPKwVBKwr1wUEtYNq6vFaHCH34JN1jLlmo3dMV4b68DekFuPhLllsjhH4QCf_UWZQznLY%3D)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Every Hillsdale College student is required to take a class on the Western heritage in order to graduate. And every academic year, I'm reminded of the joy it is to pursue the answers to questions like "_Does God exist? Can we know God?_ " with my students.

These questions are at the core of what it means to be human - both in our relationship with each other and with God. [ ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a674bf7326024f1e8a0a27fa8bc3d213&_e=bGUvuUEFQlunYXXj0b8oLqolAaUIo8194BqaAPhmDP6mUMfuto5j2p_qzyZs_Vq5GtFWkEDJBIc8K2xA8Jz7o11MSreL1QzrnxknTPR8xBJ1w_aN18ZRZzrPomoyE5GgRfEWEhbEUJSHlwS1flNLv0aLTSseK9T4Jju6EhmXJRS1TvDQcmfqX6g3ax5ybzviJboon3jNc9oepUsxsMgyvoHXdX3xPMejCOrZGMSyaSRAvUUFZ2dwI1Iv1OD-ljjvkA1s7X9lGCXGJD7zO4vQuYmlXjwilLDdDvpljsa-8AuLi9IZQ8xI5sIkCGbGXf3VC0_i1qQfiCKkwzaV4C95XPimnkKedO1zaFg3QFwWYagAs4WZKZGrfsE4-cJ57ivioqp7-ixIxvW0Fk6-_CjMPJMWAyPJfwIUpdrw7kbzm0g%3D) Today, I want to offer you that same experience by sending you [**a limited-edition DVD box set of Hillsdale's popular online course, "Western Heritage - From the Book of Genesis to John Locke,"**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a674bf7326024f1e8a0a27fa8bc3d213&_e=bGUvuUEFQlunYXXj0b8oLqolAaUIo8194BqaAPhmDP6mUMfuto5j2p_qzyZs_Vq5GtFWkEDJBIc8K2xA8Jz7o11MSreL1QzrnxknTPR8xBJ1w_aN18ZRZzrPomoyE5GgRfEWEhbEUJSHlwS1flNLv0aLTSseK9T4Jju6EhmXJRS1TvDQcmfqX6g3ax5ybzviJboon3jNc9oepUsxsMgyvoHXdX3xPMejCOrZGMSyaSRAvUUFZ2dwI1Iv1OD-ljjvkA1s7X9lGCXGJD7zO4vQuX8ks7bEcZVW7VzL50RYaTqjHeeW0MNUtDg9z2VNsPE3pC7Pbhyxq58TglFytP5V5lVvpJ-P3zi8ZUH9umj2w64ZNFjK2oO9XDfAzVkGjHqmay0oDvBP18mPEdAI6V8SeS2jIMOHwkD8IqhN5My3l5A%3D) as a token of our thanks for a generous contribution in support of Hillsdale's efforts to educate America.

I invite you to study the history of the "big questions" with my colleagues and me.

Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link: **[https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-western-heritage-dvd](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a674bf7326024f1e8a0a27fa8bc3d213&_e=bGUvuUEFQlunYXXj0b8oLqolAaUIo8194BqaAPhmDP6mUMfuto5j2p_qzyZs_Vq5GtFWkEDJBIc8K2xA8Jz7o11MSreL1QzrnxknTPR8xBJ1w_aN18ZRZzrPomoyE5GgRfEWEhbEUJSHlwS1flNLv0aLTSseK9T4Jju6EhmXJRS1TvDQcmfqX6g3ax5ybzviJboon3jNc9oepUsxsMgyvoHXdX3xPMejCOrZGMSyaSRAvUUFZ2dwI1Iv1OD-ljjvkA1s7X9lGCXGJD7zO4vQuU2JrbBEo2EOMryzTvz5lALDuDyD1701XQvftuRRJfpU8LYQMhbEEzQSHEwTwcQZNWc19pHtxoY6WL7SJX-cg6Jsc7u55prbFHML-oV4XFU_-XQZe4QsEIDWPD5opxd3I9EbiAJX1GVnfTD81s7_E1I%3D)**

More than 2,000 people have already requested theirs, so make sure to get your set before they are all gone.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
---

Reclaiming American Freedom
---

name: Sam Brown
subject: They blew up my body, but they’ll never destroy my spirit.
body:
You can never take away the heart of a soldier

| |
---
| | | Friend,

**[This was God's message for me.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8ac1f290d184438fb56fff7faa4be1f1&_e=41h_zWZ3-9W5j7Fqo72YhcCINvS-yXZN0ZyrF00vrkpSEkSQTsYS-NeJ4BNRa4bFzfZhH_faDHvY5p7OXeMYiOy-JgCBMPNnZHxUOAXK5QXO8C2PPWEF-KQBcxe7EAiWcgl3c7s1944hszMF70XTle_0oUCWj0aBCBx_OTlzs_BH9Fv48vlmrtXFDS2htVLbGe29Hr5hubBwD--9888qD0XZUoHYVNhjAYCwBA9MwdaKC3m1BStU9o2Tgcq4WvvEEaqx-PR2TqsBUQvWtCzu-qj4urma6ARHgbdiYy7TxIgRrrNcxfgjA04WVp2kGlWF6ybCz-FbEx70tScIIfyo5ie_GhhcuMebDRuL1PI91hotyRlozbNpu-Ai9nDc9U6T0IxcoENH_R3h-7wY4pqMXQ%3D%3D "This was God’s message for me. ")**

I didn't know if I was going to survive -- but I knew if I did, my life would belong to Him forever.

In 2008, a roadside bomb in Afghanistan left me with burns over half my body. This was my vehicle after the explosion.

---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8ac1f290d184438fb56fff7faa4be1f1&_e=41h_zWZ3-9W5j7Fqo72YhcCINvS-yXZN0ZyrF00vrkpSEkSQTsYS-NeJ4BNRa4bFzfZhH_faDHvY5p7OXeMYiOy-JgCBMPNnZHxUOAXK5QXO8C2PPWEF-KQBcxe7EAiWcgl3c7s1944hszMF70XTle_0oUCWj0aBCBx_OTlzs_BH9Fv48vlmrtXFDS2htVLbGe29Hr5hubBwD--9888qD0XZUoHYVNhjAYCwBA9Mwday0m3ewzldZDw3QvidCmj_-92Xq9G1rZTPFoV98Yd4xuEgIlNHejnYHqR2pYVo2hnze10XsTjqQw3BIqNNhh6FkJ9x8p-Awhltpks-tVHljUuUcc07pAwyLG6NU-6OZlu5nzfjnyrfQ8eB-1qZ41G6miTxQlvWopa2PE3Re7IBoQ%3D%3D)
---

My path to recovery wasn't easy -- I spent months wondering if my life could ever be the same, asking myself why God spared me that day.

**But that was God 's way of speaking to me, THIS was His message to me...His plan for me.**

Friend, I realized that my life would NEVER be the same, but that was okay. I was alive for one reason:

_**My new life belonged not to me, but to Him.

That's why I've lived every day since with three things in mind: My country, my family, and God Himself. **_

God used the tragedy that resulted in my injuries to tell me something.

Through 3 years of recovery and over 30 surgeries- I was never alone. Not for one second.

God stayed with me through it all and he made it clear to me that I was NOT called to wish for my old life.

**Instead, I was called to live my new life to the fullest in service to Him.**

That's why I spent the last 15 years starting my family, serving fellow veterans through the business I started, and most recently, **[I launched my campaign to become the next U.S. Senator from Nevada.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8ac1f290d184438fb56fff7faa4be1f1&_e=41h_zWZ3-9W5j7Fqo72YhcCINvS-yXZN0ZyrF00vrkpSEkSQTsYS-NeJ4BNRa4bFzfZhH_faDHvY5p7OXeMYiOy-JgCBMPNnZHxUOAXK5QXO8C2PPWEF-KQBcxe7EAiWcgl3c7s1944hszMF70XTle_0oUCWj0aBCBx_OTlzs_BH9Fv48vlmrtXFDS2htVLbGe29Hr5hubBwD--9888qD0XZUoHYVNhjAYCwBA9MwdbQGBRVhv9L_O0zuw_TjqKgqV6tsDwlIu_NutdDPjIGfOHbLyd_Mhln-j-dawpbVstxHPRK08W-cFrY3cx8KLyLBIqkBlKyag-d8kZLC2H2LMLtmrIrB0o7BFl2N-vS2MiullmTicpjPTghjje2WtS20rzex_imTnzael8NbHhGXA%3D%3D "I launched my campaign to become the next U.S. Senator from Nevada.")**

America is at a tipping point.

Corrupt leaders are leading us into total madness.

Our border is collapsing.

Parents are being cut-off from their children in schools.

We're spending away our future and the future of our children's children.

I'm running for U.S. Senate to bring a new generation of Conservative leadership to Washington D.C.

But to do that, Friend, I'll need your help.

So I'm hoping that you can help me with 1 or 2 things.
1. Would you please keep me and my family in your prayers as we take on some of the most powerful elites in the world?
2. **[Would you consider sending in $5 or $10 to help fund my campaign?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8ac1f290d184438fb56fff7faa4be1f1&_e=41h_zWZ3-9W5j7Fqo72YhcCINvS-yXZN0ZyrF00vrkpSEkSQTsYS-NeJ4BNRa4bFzfZhH_faDHvY5p7OXeMYiOy-JgCBMPNnZHxUOAXK5QXO8C2PPWEF-KQBcxe7EAiWcgl3c7s1944hszMF70XTle_0oUCWj0aBCBx_OTlzs_BH9Fv48vlmrtXFDS2htVLbGe29Hr5hubBwD--9888qD0XZUoHYVNhjAYCwBA9MwdZw9syFB033RPGq8llFtaAARXeyH2nI6pcadnn3MUg51IC15pQXlz0wCBYBbi5IEO1rR-2GCJbDpz_445aXbboDOAKXQhF7_uqNlb4B8gM69Mmf7hiH-ZHJND7UsnTPmByc8hTAvVqNJRQjiXt3Ut5I4kbjk8UK3k-Q_v7b4Q9aYw%3D%3D "Would you consider sending in $5 or $10 to help fund my campaign?")** I don't come from money and I'm no millionaire- that means that support from people like you will have a real impact on this election.

Asking for help isn't something that comes easy for me. I'm a combat veteran and a man of faith. But God has humbled me enough to know that I can't do this with HIM and without people like YOU.

Duty First,
---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8ac1f290d184438fb56fff7faa4be1f1&_e=41h_zWZ3-9W5j7Fqo72YhcCINvS-yXZN0ZyrF00vrkpSEkSQTsYS-NeJ4BNRa4bFzfZhH_faDHvY5p7OXeMYiOy-JgCBMPNnZHxUOAXK5QXO8C2PPWEF-KQBcxe7EAiWcgl3c7s1944hszMF70XTle_0oUCWj0aBCBx_OTlzs_BH9Fv48vlmrtXFDS2htVLbGe29Hr5hubBwD--9888qD0XZUoHYVNhjAYCwBA9MwdbvEya_l4DENQEij-5PK_mACJ2rjXpi2ZxAdPNi0OCP5hdoKxveHCCTJy120rAMcUj3i4gWiAswWf4AScbhs7yDyvtmLtQ1jjObUUm8VW2tIi0muFPbt_mdAdc0Re48d9CL1pBHaOCx50uOLdQ-QXWFe-CXyJRCY3Dn53DMskaEdA%3D%3D)
---

Sam Brown

---

---

name: Ritchie Torres
subject: Food Pantry in The Bronx Needs Our Help.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
body:
Let's do something about it

| Peter, a food pantry here in the Bronx needs our help.

**News broke yesterday that the Albanian American Open Hand Association is currently facing bare shelves for the _first time in 10 years._** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76863021/448622954/-1382624262?donatePageId=63f7c3c9dabf0056d0e6e9b4&refcode=RTFC_20240110_EMINFO_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjRkZmU5NC1mM2FmLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wCVZTc3RvMiEtQRMU9Mo1Der42HTxIb8FZbAqAMawCc=&emci=18d4425b-e2af-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=1f4dfe94-f3af-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=34594689) | [CONTRIBUTE TO THE BRONX FOOD PANTRY HERE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76863024/448622956/-1382624262?donatePageId=63f7c3c9dabf0056d0e6e9b4&refcode=RTFC_20240110_EMINFO_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjRkZmU5NC1mM2FmLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wCVZTc3RvMiEtQRMU9Mo1Der42HTxIb8FZbAqAMawCc=&emci=18d4425b-e2af-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=1f4dfe94-f3af-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=34594689)
---
An estimated 1.2 million New York City residents struggle with food insecurity, the Bronx being the hardest hit borough.

I know the struggle of food insecurity firsthand. My mom was a single working mother to me and my brother, and we lived in public housing. She worked incredibly hard to put food on the table, and it breaks my heart to think of another family like mine going through that today.

With food insecurity at an all time high, organizations like the Albanian American Open Hand Association desperately need our help.

[Peter, I’m asking if you’ll join me in chipping in $5 — or whatever you can — to help urgently restock the shelves and give our neighbors a helping hand. »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76863025/448622958/-1382624262?donatePageId=63f7c3c9dabf0056d0e6e9b4&refcode=RTFC_20240110_EMINFO_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjRkZmU5NC1mM2FmLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wCVZTc3RvMiEtQRMU9Mo1Der42HTxIb8FZbAqAMawCc=&emci=18d4425b-e2af-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=1f4dfe94-f3af-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=34594689)
[CONTRIBUTE TO THE BRONX FOOD PANTRY HERE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76863029/448622959/-1382624262?donatePageId=63f7c3c9dabf0056d0e6e9b4&refcode=RTFC_20240110_EMINFO_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjRkZmU5NC1mM2FmLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wCVZTc3RvMiEtQRMU9Mo1Der42HTxIb8FZbAqAMawCc=&emci=18d4425b-e2af-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=1f4dfe94-f3af-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=34594689)
---
Thank you so much,

_Ritchie_
| | Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
www.torres.nyc

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

Click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.torres.nyc/p/laK8o_Kc50iR9tBbFwhZxw2?unsubscribedata=saWiPdmdJvHUbWT%2Fk5AKTTxhAkfNzuqncokYuFu1uh2yYCC8SdkYPb7KPDdCHA51y5lq0DGlegUAGLMU%2BpZaNoACJFf1mEfckIV5c5SfCK8D6q5D1ZQppJRBiApq87t7b6Kwm9SKSN8Hl5rDOtwcXw8OWGUWfwv%2Bo4XK%2Fn3j2%2BmPTG%2BNlhVxinhkiwcGp9NA%2BZtIuFkum7fGJu0ndToFlDGm6T6shDapv69cCjpA%2BpBmtuiY7iaznZohYqwoJKg2mxWC3D5OVZanKZgUn%2FyE8MbSZg9A76Ul9jCvtPmXCHZ6H0CG9UIk5G9OQYlinVC%2B0QuYlZiS883El%2FXzru5WJS2s13V6K46BC%2BgmFA5MdTmti37azV03uBxRNGP%2B4l8GAg5zGuNMlSNaUpywA4uVRiwBdpcxJhFPVDDgcJw26eccCbYZTkSWV%2FJaEiK%2BkfIP).

Friend,

This is very simple:

If you can’t tell only ONE candidate has YOUR interests in mind.

Ron DeSantis is stopping at NOTHING to protect you, your family, and our way of life from the malign influence and hostile takeover of the Chinese Communist Party, the radical Left, and every threat to our democracy. He knows you’re worth fighting for.

On the other hand, Nikki Haley is running for her donor’s issues and Donald Trump is running for his issues.

We need a President with the focus, drive, energy, and integrity to move this country in the right direction. Ron DeSantis is the only leader we can trust to put the American people first once and for all.

Before he gets off the stage at the GOP debate against Nikki Haley, will you rush in your support for the ONLY leader in this race who has proven he will put you first? We need our team to come together to raise as much as possible before the Iowa Caucus in just 5 DAYS.

Team DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=6a1e87ea9222bb2635f3a09e2e443ac8ca1b35c950f090e0b7d5e2288c8703ca7d8ba5b76b400710ae60656b033d90833eda71a17e8c3cf3a203a494b6a491cd
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=6a1e87ea9222bb26ea44f25df7be5017fb8ad7c89efc81d388860753dab2fd99843d72c8657227cf3a14b0bebe3179d5bcc9c5b3fd72c3c725daf7cc66eff75b

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=6a1e87ea9222bb26ea44f25df7be5017fb8ad7c89efc81d388860753dab2fd99843d72c8657227cf3a14b0bebe3179d5bcc9c5b3fd72c3c725daf7cc66eff75b

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Contribution rules

subject: Have You Ever Wondered Where Did Cain's Wife COME FROM???
body:
Where Did Cain's Wife Come From? On Wednesday nights at Sheridan.Church, I have been doing LIVE Q&A; sessions with questions rolling in from in-person
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5262598.1794.1.e02c00170f6a3687fb674a297fa583fa) |
---
## Where Did Cain's Wife Come From?
---
On Wednesday nights at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5262598.1795.1.354aef608d7e61635ae4bfdc01704148), I have been doing **LIVE Q &A sessions** with questions rolling in from in-person attendees as well as online viewers. Last week, I was asked an _interesting question_... **"If Adam & Eve had Cain & Able then where did Cain's wife come from in Genesis 4?"** I have an opinion on this question but decided not to answer last week and instead save it for tonight. The reason I decided to hold off a week is because **Dr. Randy Caldwell** will be joining me for a **LIVE Q &A session** tonight and the first question we will address is where Cain's wife came from. You can join us at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5262598.1796.1.cbe56f1a97d194f7ce67a850848d41a5) 7901 E 41st St Tulsa, OK at **7pm CT** or online at [https://www.youtube.com/@sheridanchurch](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5262598.1797.1.98ee7bfbab973a40e92f15dc5a37ec95) You can also participate in asking a question tonight by opting in to our text service. To opt-in just text the word **New2Sheridan** to **97000** and you will be able to text in your question. Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer Follow me on [TruthSocial](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5262598.1798.1.f56968c7616217911a52fbb29ba2bf7b), GAB, [Facebook](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5262598.1799.1.50fdd7fb46fd626839f57b936f46ea35), [Instagram](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5262598.1800.1.7c61d0d300023591d1f267af46bee6b9), [Twitter](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5262598.1801.1.385f534de66f7cb2b6012d5ddc9fc5b2), [Telegram](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5262598.1802.1.c2cb566182746147d98941437e8331b9), GETTR & [YouTube](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5262598.1803.1.99f4b4f928410f9413dea0e5485682d1)). [www.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5262598.1804.1.0147510fd0a07a7754a1c8190af0ea7d)

## Upcoming Event Hosted At Sheridan.Church
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5262598.1806.1.6ccb946282973b027fe870e95f294b77)
---
For 60 years people have asked: **WHO REALLY KILLED JFK?** _Movies_ , _books_ , _blogs_ and _government reports_ have all tried to answer the daunting question. One person who has put forth more evidence than anyone I know in answering this question is **Roger Stone** who has written a **New York Times Bestseller** answering who really killed JFK. **Roger Stone** is coming to Tulsa, OK for a _SPECIAL 2 Hour Event_ to lay out the evidence of who he believes killed JFK. There will also be a **LIVE Q &A session with Mr. Stone**. **When** : Thursday, February 1 | 6:30 pm **Where** : [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5262598.1807.1.657580165e8812d0f98cd831ea02cccd) | 7901 E 41st St Tulsa, OK 74145 **MUST RSVP** : [www.sheridan.church/events](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5262598.1808.1.dc781e9454ecdddca9ba5c520f514f2f)
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5262598.1809.1.c108523d9ff3e6c340756dfe5ac209dc) Roger J. Stone
---
**Roger Stone** is a seasoned political operative, speaker, pundit, and New York Times Bestselling Author featured in the **Netflix documentary Get Me Roger Stone**.
**Richard Nixon** , **Ronald Reagan** , and **Donald Trump** —all of these Presidents relied on **Roger Stone** to secure their seat in the Oval Office. In a 45-year career in American politics, Stone has worked on over 700 campaigns for public office.
| | [ Click Here For Tickets To The Roger Stone Event ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5262598.1810.1.13156b93b09b9c70086291cbe3d425ec)

## What To Do To Be Ready For 2024
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5262598.1811.1.4d054a66b2cb360317735095a7c057a8)
---
I am _not a prophet neither the son of the prophet_ but I am willing to bet the farm that 2024 will be **WILD**! The **Deep State Globalists** will pull out all the stops in this upcoming election year just like in 2020. The question then becomes: **what should we do to be ready for 2024?** I preached about this subject on Sunday at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5262598.1812.1.cc327f55993ef3be7fb79f50dbc81aa0) and I encourage you to check it out because it will help prepare you for what is coming. Watch the [sermon](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5262598.1813.1.2e0143b72b47c8fc4c82f0164b0c7f77) here: [https://youtube.com/live/YG782xgZ_y8?feature=share](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5262598.1814.1.867061f9da84ddf9b29f4cee6ad754a8) If you are looking for a church in 2024 know that you are invited to join me at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5262598.1815.1.57457b074d4f0be762d77986ead4c1dc) Tulsa & OKC **Sundays @10am | 7901 E 41st St Tulsa, OK** **Sundays @6pm | 3100 N Meridian OKC, OK** Let's start 2024 _STRONG_! You can also partner with [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5262598.1816.1.4d8503363e44cfa9e1fec94f23c5907c) by making a donation at [www.sheridan.church/give](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5262598.1817.1.d98d87213ce841df2f23545ff2b9ec97)

## This Will Benefit You More Than You Know!
---
Right now, **Biblical ILLITERACY** is at an _all-time high_ in America. Fewer than half of all adults can name the four Gospel writers. In a recent **LifeWay Research** study, the Bible reading habits among church attendees was shocking:
\- 19% read the Bible everyday
\- 26% read the Bible a few times per week
\- 14% read the Bible once a week
\- 22% read the Bible once a month
\- 18% read the Bible rarely or never In general, American Christians have a poor foundation in the Word of God. This is a major problem and is the reason why I decided to launch [Sheridan Bible College](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5262598.1822.1.a1746a13650927a5262a591aa7857d00). I want to encourage you to consider [Sheridan Bible College](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5262598.1823.1.95ea34050a95556ff66db41b91c933cc) as a means for you to grow in your faith and go from a convert to a true disciple. [Sheridan Bible College](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5262598.1824.1.54183876f6f0350eb33626db8f765b23) is a 2 year intensive program consisting of 24 courses divided between 4 semesters. Classes are offered in-person & online (you can LITERALLY watch anytime from anywhere). _"Study to show yourself approved to God, a worker who does not need to be ashamed, rightly dividing the word of truth"_ \- **2 Timothy 2:15** Enrolling in [Sheridan Bible College](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5262598.1825.1.ec194f064409468f90134924e51007e1) is not something you will regret. We have intentionally made tuition VERY inexpensive: $300 per semester. **Spring 2024 Semester Courses** :
\- Hebrews & The General Epistles
\- 5-Fold Ministry
\- 7 Churches Of Revelation
\- Pentateuch (First 5 Books of the Bible)
\- Johannine Literature (Gospel & Letters of John)
\- Helps Ministry Classes for the Spring 2024 Semester begin January 18. Enroll today at [www.sheridan.church/biblecollege](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5262598.1826.1.f50acb1d2ffbbb24984e75dd6f5d280c)

body:
But I have other plans. | | | [](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=c89f954c951d4c40845d9a4ec6e335e9&_e=7XQ7Xx9pu6zexCAFEIPh0CR8ZM5d9GOQ8TYZ-vHKfXttWLkQTTzNqAsvyeayphg2FY9cdUN8WNvzaYumg3R6Q8gSOikotDGPmOrLjwTXJfak_L5x7lApqfslfHQvm17yBuY7S4IeNca2P_m9Zf8RCba9CXQOLYFfPFlunC3loZQCukvx2YxiQ61SHfqXXp1fEIARkvMP-ENPwa8VLj9HTjBPyKVIUNez5niHTo1IZBJuqic3QD6oCSLlFGrr80lb6jFHigpHN-M-lyFWCznDP4XqCDeew2c_wVjjMKFJuPfmCSQFov1MfOZAooxXkdBebwA--n_V5WgzXXYrkPf06zvMNmRbFZXzpQ9jjqwrrzLNaflrviwtbXBt1v4I6k1K4iPpjpO33Eeb35gwUxlYwMijV6CYdysr8c3l97YnV-3-szKEPublu7CqOhBOurJT)
---
Friend, I was raised to never cower down to a bully. To never let someone else define who you are. And to never, _EVER_ give up.

Growing up the kid of a firefighter, you learn pretty quickly that you are only as good as the team around you.

And when you are running into a burning building, you have to be able to count on the men and women by your side to know that they have your back, and are just as invested in getting the job done as you are.

That's the same mentality that I am bringing to the House of Representatives. And as the newly-elected Speaker, **[I am working overtime to ensure that I have a team of reliable, steadfast conservatives who will push forward and fight with all that they have to maintain and grow our Republican House majority.](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=c89f954c951d4c40845d9a4ec6e335e9&_e=7XQ7Xx9pu6zexCAFEIPh0CR8ZM5d9GOQ8TYZ-vHKfXttWLkQTTzNqAsvyeayphg2FY9cdUN8WNvzaYumg3R6Q8gSOikotDGPmOrLjwTXJfak_L5x7lApqfslfHQvm17yBuY7S4IeNca2P_m9Zf8RCba9CXQOLYFfPFlunC3loZQCukvx2YxiQ61SHfqXXp1fEIARkvMP-ENPwa8VLj9HTjBPyKVIUNez5niHTo1IZBJuqic3QD6oCSLlFGrr80lb6jFHigpHN-M-lyFWCznDP4XqCDeew2c_wVjjMKFJuPcSvcbczuLmJ3RMlU4qg90chtMXqFzjhQG1qiEkrHx10nZ3oq3uI9aQFihVdVGgLKRraAPVDeqeFhtDEWZvW3gjxkc5VFAzDQd9vmxRKpcY-DgFiX5HH32duNQ5p19RnWXYjYZKtt7e-hRpN9iHx3jw)**

Let me lay the groundwork: Right now, Republicans have the thinnest of majorities in the House. And the Democrat Machine smells blood in the water.

They think we are weak. That we are vulnerable. That we are ineffective.

**But they 've got it all wrong. **

While they are spending their time pointing fingers and poking fun, House Republican leadership is putting our heads down and getting to work for the American people -- to ensure that our conservative majority stays intact. **[And we'd love to have you on our team, Friend.](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=c89f954c951d4c40845d9a4ec6e335e9&_e=7XQ7Xx9pu6zexCAFEIPh0CR8ZM5d9GOQ8TYZ-vHKfXttWLkQTTzNqAsvyeayphg2FY9cdUN8WNvzaYumg3R6Q8gSOikotDGPmOrLjwTXJfak_L5x7lApqfslfHQvm17yBuY7S4IeNca2P_m9Zf8RCba9CXQOLYFfPFlunC3loZQCukvx2YxiQ61SHfqXXp1fEIARkvMP-ENPwa8VLj9HTjBPyKVIUNez5niHTo1IZBJuqic3QD6oCSLlFGrr80lb6jFHigpHN-M-lyFWCznDP4XqCDeew2c_wVjjMKFJuPckBdNXVAltVuWAFkYbLltsqcpy32vA3m0KvDUh8JvPpf6fY4STgNk1bS8hyFJm-leQWthPWQmN2gxO86aV320FWqaAAHKaBQIDjHn2H5ZvgMS3jc2ZuGUcvZidAy7bFBzh99I3CFf0YmrZC125aIuG)**
Look, I'm not the kind of leader to scream into the void and use scare tactics to try and force a donation from you. I know times are tough.

But I am the kind of leader to tell you the truth -- **the whole truth. ** **[And the truth is, if we as conservatives don't start putting up serious fundraising numbers, you'll be referring to a radical leftist as Speaker this time next year.](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=c89f954c951d4c40845d9a4ec6e335e9&_e=7XQ7Xx9pu6zexCAFEIPh0CR8ZM5d9GOQ8TYZ-vHKfXttWLkQTTzNqAsvyeayphg2FY9cdUN8WNvzaYumg3R6Q8gSOikotDGPmOrLjwTXJfak_L5x7lApqfslfHQvm17yBuY7S4IeNca2P_m9Zf8RCba9CXQOLYFfPFlunC3loZQCukvx2YxiQ61SHfqXXp1fEIARkvMP-ENPwa8VLj9HTjBPyKVIUNez5niHTo1IZBJuqic3QD6oCSLlFGrr80lb6jFHigpHN-M-lyFWCznDP4XqCDeew2c_wVjjMKFJuPe90wNNp71ExyInB2s6yANg6cRxlqQ7i7YYV_laS_3XuLLnCrqXr636TG0AUedVqz74G9Gj_hHzttgW6Su7Sinzo-AUgi3J6wXBuFjeQmoV43PIzoJhaRo0-1d5BaNLjeUkxAYMXJksjKiq7Gr-Gwci)**
So, as I said at the beginning. I've never been one to cower to a bully, allow others to define me, or back down from a fight.

And I'm not going to start now.

**[Serving as Speaker of the House is the honor of a lifetime-- and it would be an honor to know that I have earned your support as well.](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=c89f954c951d4c40845d9a4ec6e335e9&_e=7XQ7Xx9pu6zexCAFEIPh0CR8ZM5d9GOQ8TYZ-vHKfXttWLkQTTzNqAsvyeayphg2FY9cdUN8WNvzaYumg3R6Q8gSOikotDGPmOrLjwTXJfak_L5x7lApqfslfHQvm17yBuY7S4IeNca2P_m9Zf8RCba9CXQOLYFfPFlunC3loZQCukvx2YxiQ61SHfqXXp1fEIARkvMP-ENPwa8VLj9HTjBPyKVIUNez5niHTo1IZBJuqic3QD6oCSLlFGrr80lb6jFHigpHN-M-lyFWCznDP4XqCDeew2c_wVjjMKFJuPfB5o528ExXAIf8csEbWniRx7I6eVQ3hhdUksWXPC9k4qFbs6GBQDcsbLVIPxumvmCvBatggCANo-O1UefWfDcNMg1HvaKWzfGP6efOXJfoTWNuHSF9z5gbRsq1OhFPxLKg0ufsKQ3M9Atb0Kythvyn)**
---
[**JOIN TEAM JOHNSON TODAY**](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=c89f954c951d4c40845d9a4ec6e335e9&_e=7XQ7Xx9pu6zexCAFEIPh0CR8ZM5d9GOQ8TYZ-vHKfXttWLkQTTzNqAsvyeayphg2FY9cdUN8WNvzaYumg3R6Q8gSOikotDGPmOrLjwTXJfak_L5x7lApqfslfHQvm17yBuY7S4IeNca2P_m9Zf8RCba9CXQOLYFfPFlunC3loZQCukvx2YxiQ61SHfqXXp1fEIARkvMP-ENPwa8VLj9HTjBPyKVIUNez5niHTo1IZBJuqic3QD6oCSLlFGrr80lb6jFHigpHN-M-lyFWCznDP4XqCDeew2c_wVjjMKFJuPfNj4URaoPbLX7y3zgU5phBmxUpHxL-N73al94LFL_Xb82ZDhMy1XUZ59dDJ7VJ6fMkdo5UbYS_A7kyRoVjYlVJzpv_Qlfg4GJIHJdunWwR2i2Yqm5r_Ff3IRplrm1qQRgTlELoSLd3etg7DElRQ7BN)
---
Thank you for your time,
---

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Clarence Thomas is the worst

|

Peter —

A groundbreaking report by _ProPublica_ revealed:

**Far-right Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas suggested to a Republican member of Congress that he might resign if Congress didn’t increase Supreme Court justices’ salaries.**

After that conversation in 2000, Republican megadonors lavished Clarence Thomas with “ _**a stream of gifts from friends and acquaintances that appears to be unparalleled in the modern history of the Supreme Court,”**_ from luxury vacations to tuition payments.

After Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump conspired to stack the Court with three far-right justices, the result for our country has been disastrous.

From abortion bans and the end of affirmative action, to environmental degradation, repealing gun safety measures, blocking student loan relief, and more, the Supreme Court is the most extreme it has been in generations, and far from the fair, just, impartial judicial body the framers intended it to be.

**That’s why I’ve led the efforts to pass legislation to expand the Supreme Court and institute term limits and a code of ethics, so that the open corruption we’ve suffered from does not continue.**

[That’s what I’ll fight for in the U.S. Senate, where California’s next Senator will be responsible for casting votes to confirm or deny Supreme Court justices. name: Biden-Harris Dems
subject: $1 before tonight’s MAGA Republican debate:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
The donation we’re asking you to make before Republicans take the stage tonight. | | |
---
$1. That is the contribution Joe Biden and Kamala Harris are asking you to make before the start of tonight's Republican debate. Yes, just $1. $1 for every time you've been grateful Joe Biden beat Donald Trump in the 2020 election. $1 to make sure we defeat the MAGA Republican nominee in the next election, whether they are on the debate stage tonight or not. $1 because while we are facing many millions in attack ads, it's your individual donations that allow us to fight back. It may not seem like $1 can make a difference in an election as expensive and competitive as this one will be but by the time you get to this point in the email, a few folks have already chipped in their $1. | | Friend, do you want to be a part of something truly groundbreaking? Keep reading – because we are about to tell you a little bit about Lateefah Simon's campaign for Congress. You might already know a little (or a lot!) about Lateefah and her campaign, but if you don’t here’s what you need to know: This campaign is special. And in this first week of the new year (the ELECTION YEAR no less) we wanted to take a moment to re-introduce ourselves. You will hear more about this campaign from us, [**but we hope that you will step up today and pitch in whatever you can – be it $10 or $25, every single donation makes a difference.**](http://numerolinks.lateefahsimon.com/f/a/Np7De-122grrW6Po2QSEvg~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRngYczP0Q7aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2xzLWVtYWlsP3JlZmNvZGU9SmFuMDktMjRXA3NwY0IKZZ44Ap9lHAbChFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAABE~) Lateefah has always been a trailblazer. She's not one to accept the status quo or bend to the way things have “always” been. From her years of advocacy to her commitment to rejecting corporate PAC money, she's showing us what better looks like. And she’s just getting started. But here's the thing: Trailblazing takes more than just courage;[**it takes resources.**](http://numerolinks.lateefahsimon.com/f/a/Np7De-122grrW6Po2QSEvg~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRngYczP0Q7aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2xzLWVtYWlsP3JlZmNvZGU9SmFuMDktMjRXA3NwY0IKZZ44Ap9lHAbChFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAABE~) That's where you come in. [**By making a donation today, you're not just supporting a campaign, YOU are becoming a trailblazer for change. And you are joining Team Lateefah.**](http://numerolinks.lateefahsimon.com/f/a/Np7De-122grrW6Po2QSEvg~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRngYczP0Q7aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2xzLWVtYWlsP3JlZmNvZGU9SmFuMDktMjRXA3NwY0IKZZ44Ap9lHAbChFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAABE~) Your contribution will fuel our movement, from organizing grassroots events to reaching out to voters. Thank you for being a part of this extraordinary journey. Together, Team Lateefah
