| | Peter,
---
|
* Legislative Update January 10th, 2024
* Unicameral Rules
* Election Accountability & Voter Verification
* TAXES
* Justice Reform
* Economy
* Education
* NEGOP Updates

---
|
---
|
## Legislative Update January 10th, 2024
---
| Welcome to another year at the Unicameral. This is the 2nd year (60 Days) of the 108th legislative cycle for Nebraska. This means that bills that were carried over from 2022 will be the focus in 2023. New legislation in 2024 is being written, but this session is primarily a continuation of 2023 introduced legislation. Let’s dig in...
---
|
## Unicameral Rules
---
| Of the 7 priorities in our 2023 legislative plan, 5 of our 7 planks obtained significant wins. Income tax reductions, Second Amendment rights, pro-life advancement, child protections, and government transparency issues moved forward. Two items did not win. Those two items were rules and election integrity. We are pleased to announce one of our priorities will be first up in 2024 under the guidance of the Rules Chair - Senator Steve Erdman. At the same time, we are looking at more challenges in election integrity that will have a generational impact if not addressed. This issue remains our top concern because it will affect ALL Constitutional, Conservative, and Republican issues (in that order) if they remain unaddressed. Let’s start with these two problems as well as taxes, justice, education, and the economy. We will close with a general update of the party. **Rules - NEGOP Focus** 1) _Reduce the number of bills one senator can introduce._ (wasting precious time) As we have seen from the last session introducing numerous, often frivolous legislation is detrimental to the process causing lack of thoughtful legislation and more government. 2) _Change the filibuster rules._ Again, as we have seen from the previous session 2-4 people hindered, subverted and generally disrupted the business of the legislative body through their unfettered attempt to control the proceedings by the current filibuster rule. We believe there should be a rule allowing an end to the filibuster upon the vote of a "variance" to the 2⁄3 of the body standard. New rules would change the vote Total if Present, Not Voting occurs. However, we must also understand that there is a geographical concern to Rural vs. Urban Senator ratio and must be cognizant of the balance. 3) _Ending Secret Votes _\- This is Unconstitutional and against the State Revised Statutes. The Public has a Constitutional Right to know how Senators vote. We encourage you to testify, write, and engage on the rules of the Nebraska legislature. We must always SHOW UP & KNOW THE RULES.
---
|
---
|
## Election Accountability & Voter Verification
---
| Election Integrity tops our most important legislation for the session. The interpretation of Voter ID is not what the voters voted for and we would like to see a revisit, rewrite and implementation of the Voter ID law as soon as possible. Our most recent survey asked a very specific question to understand the definition of what respondents thought Photo Voter ID was & what **SPECIFICALLY 65.45% of Nebraskans** voted FOR in 2022.
83.6% of the respondents BELIEVED that in 2022 when there was a Ballot Initiative to enact Photo Voter ID in Nebraska, they BELIEVED the intent was that **"A qualified NEBRASKA resident, PRESENTS to an election official a valid PHOTO ID as they CAST a ballot"**. An unsecured election is likely this fall if we cannot monitor the ballot box from invalid ID’s to no ID check immediately before casting a ballot. This will not only affect all elections, it will **_likely lead to an[ "Abortion on Demand"](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=6dac8eb596&e=25844e23a8) petition passing_**. It is the Senators job to prescribe the rules to the Secretary of State. Citizens who do not value election integrity, but put issues like #2A, life, or taxes as a HIGH PRIORITY will have to learn the hard way that the _ballot box will lead to the erosion of their key issue_ if not addressed. The left has routinely pushed issues to the ballot box because they cannot win in the legislative and executive halls. The executive branch does not and should not have control over our elections. In addition to Voter ID, we are looking at bills to create more secure ballots and giving control to local counties to conduct elections as they see fit, such as hand counting. If we don’t address voter ID which is at the heart of mail in ballot problems, Nebraska will have big failures in November. Reacting in November of 2024 to an issue that can be solved in January of 2024 will not be the fault of the NEGOP. **This is our message to put out to elected officials who impact election bills.** They will need to take accountability for November 2024 if they do not act TODAY.
---
|
---
|
## TAXES
---
| Governor Pillen has created committees to address the property tax crisis. After last year, many locales DID NOT pass on property tax relief to the citizens after the state absorbed many of their local expenditures via the property tax relief bill. The result was more total combined state and local spending (in those locales declining to alter their budgets dollar for dollar) without a relief in property taxes. Many proposals from the Governor and special committee have leaked into the forum for discussion. One idea was to raise sales tax and move these funds into property tax relief proposals. Other ideas from the committee pertain to raising cigarette taxes or removing exemptions from sales tax collection like legal/accounting services and trade in vehicles. The NEGOP’s Governing body remains committed to the [EPIC tax](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=c8ef86cdca&e=25844e23a8) as expressed in two separate votes at two separate meetings. These petitions for [EPIC](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=3237dbdaf0&e=25844e23a8) are being signed across Nebraska and should be available with your local county chairs. The petition is the best option because the votes are not there in the Unicameral. The issue will have to be addressed by petition if this is a desire of Nebraskans for an overhaul to the system. The NEGOP governing body doesn’t believe tax shifting is the long term solution to taxes in Nebraska. An entire overhaul of the system is in order. Seniors leaving or being taxed out of their home and generational farms/ranches being forced to sell are some of the dire consequences being cited by governing body members across the state. Our most recent Priority Poll on Taxation gave insight into the respondents thoughts on Taxation.

Capturing sales tax from visitors, illegals, and those doing illegal businesses would be a large benefit to offset costs of law abiding Nebraskans. Furthermore, permanently owning your land without threat of confiscation from the government and competing with states with zero income tax are also big benefits. The biggest fear is usually the fear of the unknown. We encourage all Nebraskans to take time on this issue to really understand the Truth in Taxation in Nebraska. In the end, this “How” to tax issue has many Republicans divided. However, Republicans remain committed to lower taxes and spending at the state house. What is certain, is these levels of property taxes are HURTING Nebraskans.
---
|
---
|
## Justice Reform
---
| Last year Senator Wayne along with [half the Republicans and Governor passed LB50](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=eb967a4541&e=25844e23a8). In essence this shortened the years law breakers would have to serve in jail. The NEGOP, 50% of the Republicans, and the County Attorney association opposed this bill. We are seeking a strong approach to crime. Law and Order remains a priority of our Legislative Plan. Emboldened by last year, Senator Wayne is seeking two big changes to the criminal justice system this year. The first is a bill that would eliminate elected county attorneys and deputy attorneys. Those roles would become district attorneys assigned by the state’s Attorney General. This proposal would also move the costs of those positions to the state level. Our party remains committed to local control. We feel centralizing most any function is a bad idea and believe law and order power should be decentralized and closer to local citizens. In addition, Senator Wayne has pushed forward a proposal to return the power of the state correctional system to the legislature from the Governor’s office. He is citing Constitutional concerns and reasserting the power of the legislative body. The party is neutral on this proposal. However, after discussion with our committee we do believe the legislature needs access to critical information at a minimum to determine funding, confirm appointments, write corrective laws, etc. In the end, both the Executive and Legislative branches have roles to play in this operation and we need better cooperation between the bodies. Child welfare and mental health remains the top concern of this party based on reports leaking out of the state system.
---
|
---
|
## Economy
---
| Workforce, workforce, workforce. This is the drumbeat among the lobbyists and interest groups. The issues around workforce are numerous; **Housing** We don’t have enough. Taxes are too high in housing. Insurance premiums are dramatically rising. Costs to build are prohibitive. A lack of housing is holding many economies back across the state. The housing bill was vetoed by the Governor last year. The party remains split on this issue. Some believe housing is not the job of the government. Others believe the issue is so critical to their district that the government should be involved. Funding of apartment communities from public sources are being discussed to increase housing stock. **Schools**. We need stronger academic, curriculum-driven schools. Parents are evaluating the educational systems before they move for a job. With Iowa launching $7000 in School Choice vouchers, labor has options in other states to send their kids to better schools. Furthermore, trade school discussions continue. Balancing the emphasis of a four year degree demand with trade school demand continues to be discussed. Senator Armendariz has some thoughts she is moving forward on these ideas to attack poverty. **Affordable Childcare**. Talk around childcare has centered on offering incentives to businesses who provide childcare. We have not been privy to what those incentives are; we will be seeking clarity as the session progresses on what this might entail. **Broadband**. Broadband is key to the economy. Trying to expedite the expansion to curb the digital gap remains a focus. Most of this legislative work was done in 2023. However, executing the plan is still in motion.
---
|
---
|
## Education
---
| Legislative bill 1064 was introduced to remove tenure power from the University of Regents. We support. Call your Senators to support this bill. We are in need of large reforms at post secondary institutions. Guaranteed employment for life causes a lack of holding our state educational employees accountable to the actions they are taking. LB 575 the Sports and Spaces Act is seeing opposition from Democrats but surprisingly a few moderate Republicans. The desire for ‘less noise’ is causing some Republicans to back down from consensus issues of 80% of Republicans (and many Independents and Democrats). Most Nebraskans believe bathrooms should not be shared and women’s sports should be reserved for women. Please call your Senator to support this issue. This is a hot topic for many school boards and takes lots of time across all our local school districts. Our legislature addressing this issue will save time among the multitude of school districts being forced to wrestle with this issue.
---
|
---
|
## NEGOP Updates
---
| I worked in the off-season to put together the [“Toddcast”](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=e59a7396e5&e=25844e23a8). The party and conservative Nebraska has struggled to find a commonsense voice in the media. Conservative talk show hosts were targeted, retired, or removed in Omaha, Lincoln, and even the panhandle in 2024. Finding a commonsense conservative voice has been tough in a culture seeking to limit or end the free speech of Republicans/Conservatives from traditional public forums. Furthermore, our representatives often have their opinions, thoughts, and ideas spun for the worse in the media. We felt our Republican representatives needed a platform that wasn’t focused on spinning or killing their ideas. We look to bring their thoughts directly to you without spin/edit/or selective quoting. The Toddcast can be found for your consumption at [ne.gop/toddcast/](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=918001ad3a&e=25844e23a8) In other news, the state party took center stage again as the second special prosecutor ruled against criminal prosecution for the break in and destruction of party premises and materials the night of the GOP party leadership change in 2022. While many find this issue frustrating, we remain committed to discovering the truth. Law and order, transparency and accountability, are all bedrock values of this administration. New legal issues continue to present themselves that are affected by this break in. We will keep pushing forward for justice. Third, do these updates help? Did you like the change of direction in the Unicameral in ‘23? If the answer is yes...we need your [donations to continue this valuable work](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=4a7561b325&e=25844e23a8). These benefits come at a cost. Help us help you by financially supporting the NEGOP. [Logon and give a donation today](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=8e24864850&e=25844e23a8)! Finally, the 2024 Election slate continues to be finalized. We still have some unfilled Legislative and local race seats we are working to fill in the Western Lancaster and Fremont areas. There are numerous openings that remain in Eastern Douglas county. Please contact the state party if you know a qualified Republican ready to run. ********** We will write the next newsletter after the conclusion of the January 19th session. Be sure to sign up at ne.gop to receive the newsletter (if this was forwarded to you by a friend). We will continue to send out alerts when a critical issue presents itself.
---
|
---
| Todd Watson
Political Director
NEGOP

name: Team Cornel West 2024
subject: Brother Martin Luther King’s Work And Legacy
body:
Take part in a day of selfless service to honor Brother Martin's contributions to our movements today

| | | [ ](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240110mlk_day_of_service&n=1)
---
My Dear and Precious Siblings, It’s almost unbelievable that in one week the United States and the entire world will be celebrating what would have been the 95th Birthday of Brother Martin Luther King Jr. And while we’ve heard it many, many times before, this year’s celebration is different as it calls for massive introspection of this pivotal moment in the story of these United States. Many of you are aware that I take great umbrage with the deodorizing, sanitizing, and Santa Clausification of Brother Martin - you’ve heard me speak on it*, you’ve read my words on it**, and this year you are bearing witness to me doing something about it and much more as an Independent candidate for President of the United States. As I have frequently noted, the major threat to Brother Martin’s legacy is both spiritual and moral. Additionally, as we approach his eponymous national holiday we run the risk of further adulterating the courageous and compassionate lessons he provided and gave his life for that deracinate the mendacious and dominant liberal soul-craft of organized greed, endless war, baleful bigotry and racism, execrable levels of poverty, and runaway climate change driving us to ecocide.
---
| [](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/mlk_day_of_service?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240110mlk_day_of_service&n=2 "Click Here to Take Part in Our Love Warriors MLK Day of

Selfless Service ") [Click Here to Take Part in Our Love Warriors MLK Day of Selfless Service ](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/mlk_day_of_service?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240110mlk_day_of_service&n=3)
---
[ ](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/mlk_day_of_service?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240110mlk_day_of_service&n=4)
---
This year we can undercut the specious and superficial lip service offered every year by conservatives, liberals, and even so-called progressives who too often act as stewards of the derelict duopoly rather than shepherds and servants of the people. I am humbly asking all of you to take part in our Love Warriors MLK Day of Selfless Service in ways that embody Brother Martin’s sage aphorism, “Everybody can be great because anyone can serve.” [**Click here to view our toolkit and take part in this special day.**](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/mlk_day_of_service?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240110mlk_day_of_service&n=5) Our Love Warrior Day of Action toolkit includes numerous acts you can take part in that demonstrate King’s radical departure from the status quo of the dominant and spiritually obscene values of hyper capitalism, individualism, and materialism. You each have an opportunity to also demonstrate the highest aspirations of our people-driven campaign and movement in the spirit of Brother Martin - true democracy, collective justice, and people-centered human rights. While there are some for myriad reasons who may not be able to directly take part in the Love Warrior MLK Day of Service, there are still many ways that you can be involved by spreading the word, taking pictures and videos, and even by simply sharing the special piece of art for this day created by our brilliant and enigmatic campaign artist, Brother Fish. Most importantly, I beseech you all to resist the empty rhetoric, hand picked and subjective Brother Martin quotes blathered by the derelict duopoly to serve itself rather than you and the true, radical legacy of Martin King. For we, as Love Warriors know that through service we can collectively demonstrate what a community driven day of truth, justice, and love looks like. We have a chance to collectively communicate that like this campaign is a moment in a movement, the Love Warrior MLK Day of Service is one of many more that we need to bring ourselves and our nation together, indivisible, under God or whatever spiritual or moral force that calls to and through you. I truly can't wait to see you all in action and appreciate you for all you are and all you do. With Love Supreme, Brother Cornel West
##### * [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=yX5r3lFTKqY](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRZb6-HL8S4WgYE2uzN1dPSf&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240110mlk_day_of_service&n=6)
** [https://www.theguardian.com/commentisfree/2018/apr/04/martin-luther-king-cornel-west-legacy](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/r?u=FECXgvVBAH18GBWRCy8D9STfn5_obmJT_ymll8hPaHLLnRdFBHOYeJg0KqdBC4FxmpHjFJZ2coROCR9rXz0m4aJPZIVAO2PjD9gMDciQQnf8ZPUCevr1ICwkLO4QyOxV&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240110mlk_day_of_service&n=7)
---
Cornel West for President · 420 N McKinley St, Ste 111-512, Corona, CA 92879, United States

Additionally, as we approach his eponymous national holiday we run the risk of further adulterating the courageous and compassionate lessons he provided and gave his life for that deracinate the mendacious and dominant liberal soul-craft of organized greed, endless war, baleful bigotry and racism, execrable levels of poverty, and runaway climate change driving us to ecocide. | "Click Here to Take Part in Our Love Warriors MLK Day of Selfless Service " This year we can undercut the specious and superficial lip service offered every year by conservatives, liberals, and even so-called progressives who too often act as stewards of the derelict duopoly rather than shepherds and servants of the people. I am humbly asking all of you to take part in our Love Warriors MLK Day of Selfless Service in ways that embody Brother Martin’s sage aphorism, “Everybody can be great because anyone can serve.” Our Love Warrior Day of Action toolkit includes numerous acts you can take part in that demonstrate King’s radical departure from the status quo of the dominant and spiritually obscene values of hyper capitalism, individualism, and materialism. You each have an opportunity to also demonstrate the highest aspirations of our people-driven campaign and movement in the spirit of Brother Martin - true democracy, collective justice, and people-centered human rights. While there are some for myriad reasons who may not be able to directly take part in the Love Warrior MLK Day of Service, there are still many ways that you can be involved by spreading the word, taking pictures and videos, and even by simply sharing the special piece of art for this day created by our brilliant and enigmatic campaign artist, Brother Fish. Most importantly, I beseech you all to resist the empty rhetoric, hand picked and subjective Brother Martin quotes blathered by the derelict duopoly to serve itself rather than you and the true, radical legacy of Martin King. For we, as Love Warriors know that through service we can collectively demonstrate what a community driven day of truth, justice, and love looks like. We have a chance to collectively communicate that like this campaign is a moment in a movement, the Love Warrior MLK Day of Service is one of many more that we need to bring ourselves and our nation together, indivisible, under God or whatever spiritual or moral force that calls to and through you. I truly can't wait to see you all in action and appreciate you for all you are and all you do. With Love Supreme, Brother Cornel West Cornel West for President · 420 N McKinley St, Ste 111-512, Corona, CA 92879, United States

Did you hear the question they just asked at the CNN debate?! The radical Left has completely stripped the rights of women and girls to compete fairly in sports, feel safe in society, and enjoy simple access to private spaces like bathrooms and locker rooms.

Ron DeSantis is watching his two daughters grow up in an America where they’re cast aside by elected leaders who prioritize confused, “transgender children” being pushed into mutilation surgeries before they’re old enough to vote by the woke mob.

He is not okay with this being their reality for the next four years, and neither are we.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=d3e2e5b8b5efb08f87bc3516d55349ce107079f95931a402fa3f2fbc79412091b000ccea1c17051621f3b395cd20f3f88534bc70b8918c3c07e2987b393cd096

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=d3e2e5b8b5efb08f87bc3516d55349ce107079f95931a402fa3f2fbc79412091b000ccea1c17051621f3b395cd20f3f88534bc70b8918c3c07e2987b393cd096

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

The radical Left has completely stripped the rights of women and girls to compete fairly in sports, feel safe in society, and enjoy simple access to private spaces like bathrooms and locker rooms. name: Team DLCC
subject: 2024 is the year of the states
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DLCC PAC
body:
To ensure that we’re meeting our goals and spotlighting key objectives through 2024 – the year of the states – we developed a detailed roadmap, and we want to share it with our top supporters, like you. | | |
---
| |
---|---
2024 is the _most_ consequential year for state politics and state legislatures in history. With so many important battles being fought at the state level – including issues like reproductive rights, voting rights, and gun laws, **the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee has been leading the fight to hold and flip state legislatures for Democrats across the country.** After winning over 30 special elections in 2023 and overperforming in specials by an average of six points, our top priority is to keep our momentum going in 2024. That’s why we’ve announced our first wave of initial investments in six key battleground states: | **DLCC Initial Battleground Investments**
---
**Michigan** | **$82,000**
**Arizona**
| ****$70,000** **
**New Hampshire**
| ****$50,000** **
**Pennsylvania**
| **$30,000**
**Wisconsin**
| **$24,000**
**North Carolina**
| **$15,000**
That money doesn’t grow on trees. It comes from hardworking grassroots donors who chip in $7 and $25 at a time. Those donations added together help power Democrats to victory – [and you can click here to add a donation today to fund our work for 2024 and beyond.](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xuG0DIvBkTCI0Lr6bZYKgpl2gOxhUzXPMSwByOSES6PpykBTdvn1JN1NgH19rRhN94bX9VtT4wTUtvGQJ5yA0MvI5exirqlwvkThlGpy1ur4go3lMyKYDao4Sn0s3Wbo6O_PCA0N-0Iqw9JJ1mgBl7ouYLnT3osMWgME3r3j88DDPxtYOH2AYA7u1T95N3ZAlLhzCt5wgSWuwliFG54hkvrVamH6utD3GQDLhIaiXh-plZ8bLOTEn8NxaJdu-WImr9KwEo4bw8Yg2Vw0hvy6fwBt4J9bn1c8Lv7XhIMG0J9rYfalewLee478k4U8M_959Ysr_gtUWhnqkyqcisJTg4g398RoLmQynswswQSG-80soyVmgMJKXwChko9ORlD6Do9Z2SpWjMFjiYC-8OI2Vn/42v/UyRozBYbQACRpQRZ-U-EDQ/h0/fxcGO4KfmOHqSNOWIprb4XSNa1IH-09FBu3rCCVymRs)
To ensure that we’re meeting our goals, we’ve developed a roadmap for 2024 – because we can’t leave anything up to chance when our fundamental freedoms are being fought for and defended at the state level.
**Here’s our plan to ensure victory in 2024:**
* **Compete and win** in key special elections _this month_ in Florida and New Hampshire
* **Support our caucuses** as legislative sessions start in January and early February
* **Defend our majorities** in tie-breaking special elections in Pennsylvania next month and in Michigan in April
* **Highlight the differences** between Democrats fighting for our fundamental rights and Republicans’ MAGA agenda
* **Recruit talented candidates** to win in November and beyond
* **Illustrate the importance** of state-level elections around August’s Democratic National Convention
* **Launch ads, spread our message, mobilize voters, and set the stage for a successful final sprint ahead of polls closing on November 5th**

**We don't have to tell you, the clock is already ticking and the first month of 2024 is almost halfway over. We're up against the most extreme Republican Party in history, and they’re determined to continue fighting to strip away our fundamental freedoms.**
[Knowing that we have a year of hard work ahead, will you commit to owning a piece of this fight with an early donation of just $7 or whatever makes sense to you? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xuG0DIvBkTCI0Lr6bZYKgpl2gOxhUzXPMSwByOSES6PpykBTdvn1JN1NgH19rRhN94bX9VtT4wTUtvGQJ5yA0MvI5exirqlwvkThlGpy1ur4go3lMyKYDao4Sn0s3Wbo6O_PCA0N-0Iqw9JJ1mgBl7ouYLnT3osMWgME3r3j88DDPxtYOH2AYA7u1T95N3ZAmIKLjnSFLHRgI36PV4d5c-w_4NOjiBZh1xbXPNJMX8scJbbQ0twNHU_0viQef7PtmYz3IJZ_XT7t0U51by9zV-tTMu4Xs4_Tl3H90nxLpbV19fU7gPJdRQakqciM9fDqA2ED6NkZaJgHtveWmWyFW5vckwK2TLU3nVQnP5FNT46pdEO857iBaR-R4zjkmUHeQfdr0gzxeAJ25ElgnfwBmq/42v/UyRozBYbQACRpQRZ-U-EDQ/h1/L7W9O1UZN5fhGVZ5yP9RkJ4N1BnwBM72A9yK2cTgCPw)
If you’re still curious, we invite you to take a look at our roadmap. And buckle up for the year of the states because, with your support, we can make our vision a reality.
[Check out our 2024 roadmap »](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0uX8dsPRccdgrQRhaQEmkSHXX0EwyfNZzx1Y1No3OTgS_ktQgHabJIKRNRhGnegkqsYXjN6diSW0n7tZrTs5ybFtfx76s-YUlY-REKThEN_eNrOtDYpP_2w4NCI9iF-WmpauMtumOso4xK9RDpGikYjdMQDtIsf3lYdpqmwWL0MkvypsHt_cCAkGla-Mq9plknuV5lqaFfBCDfsSGv9Nqn0l0MJvWpWdFilv8R_gsYygvUnhOgsyUF21eYRfQyYgc6Bz5pcfo98e_d_fOTxLI-Rp-CMhOPtoVFhRO1DXbplnERpKuJb5Lq6TgpsXL_EY3PpyZIFi0zcG_2Go9Qbbq51bnTOia39Uvdw6ycFU2G0WIvNWoavtsuXFluotNa0CKU3WjX6LaPYwK0R0hkQasbk/42v/UyRozBYbQACRpQRZ-U-EDQ/h2/KztEeC-wlw2F9F2GmW_03rKnFl01_BHIPMR9IeMsFMc) [Donate to help elect state dems »](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xuG0DIvBkTCI0Lr6bZYKgpl2gOxhUzXPMSwByOSES6PpykBTdvn1JN1NgH19rRhN94bX9VtT4wTUtvGQJ5yA0MvI5exirqlwvkThlGpy1ur4go3lMyKYDao4Sn0s3Wbo6O_PCA0N-0Iqw9JJ1mgBl7ouYLnT3osMWgME3r3j88DDPxtYOH2AYA7u1T95N3ZAmlPvqY8zhH5UK39YMlk4wl_Bpd1UwU2ESdCA3VqMWJhDkRZmrx0Ad71wmNNQmlYZk39r4ALiMeFyvYiN7zMqcplNzt8yEqcsXXO9LQFlz31JNUbggYuKGPguncVt7TmpqHnjpQjf5bGLZQZ5Rt-G3kksZ1uBFh9sORbSO9kS0jvKFBCx5gTxmO4T81yh86lER2bjy6MogHJjQ01qbwochw/42v/UyRozBYbQACRpQRZ-U-EDQ/h3/0xYG6Mbqn0onbAxhp17HxwyPLJAUktofqfUz7AMVNSc)

Thanks for being on this team. We couldn’t do it without you.
Team DLCC

|

This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network.

Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our supporters. Please add us to your address book or safe senders list to ensure timely election updates.

We're fighting to elect Democrats and advance a progressive vision in the states. Our success depends on grassroots donors like you. Ninety-eight percent of our donors give less than $200, and two-thirds give less than $20. name: Mazie Hirono
subject: I want to make sure I can hear from you, Peter
body:
|
#
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76869592/448634017/1515611947?contactdata=suJX4h2CRygjFCmqxdmlD2+EPj8CnrfvDD8PsWA1Hh6RS18kLlaGwwOeNzBNNhVnc4b35uLbVoz9zl5Ch8pUOWyItWYY88xy2LuANqpMQfq/JmejfigQfJ7oCfKIYgrSshOqdG6FzHtlli8bWqfcrq5meTf2B9o6xhiZ+jv2ByU=&refcode=AU_MKH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20240110_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNmIxZmZmMC1mY2FmLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G1MiMTAs6FVV5c_lO1XW1RgyMh2mGp9l08p0PUxQRaQ=&emci=81526bd5-f9af-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=26b1fff0-fcaf-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=23190490) Aloha Peter, I hope you had a restful, restorative, and joyous holiday season — and I hope your new year is off to a great start. I was grateful to welcome the new year with my ohana and celebrate over Hawaii’s delicious New Year’s dishes. My personal favorite is sashimi! As the Senate heads back into session and my team gets ready to kick off this election year, I want to make sure I hear directly from you about what issues you care about. **[Will you take a moment to complete my Official 2024 Priorities Survey today? body:
| Knowing I can count on your support makes all the difference.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1835%2E35263%2EFC3dWU)
Peter — Election Year is here, so we’re building a grassroots team that will be the foundation of our campaign to defend Wisconsin’s toss-up Senate seat and keep the Senate majority out of Mitch McConnell’s hands. **I need to know if you’re all-in to defend this battleground seat — _and our Democratic Senate majority along with it._ [Will you sign on today to personally endorse my reelection campaign?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2401_endorsetammy/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20240110_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1835%2E35263%2EFC3dWU)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2401_endorsetammy/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20240110_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=1835%2E35263%2EFC3dWU)

Elections in Wisconsin are won and lost by narrow margins and this November’s election is shaping up to be my most competitive — _and expensive_ — one to date.
We can’t win this toss-up Senate seat without your help, not when TWO right-wing megamillionaires with the ability to self-fund their campaigns are gearing up to enter our race.
**[So I need to know: Will you add your name to personally endorse my reelection campaign today?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2401_endorsetammy/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20240110_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=1835%2E35263%2EFC3dWU)**

— Tammy

name: Becca Balint
subject: 10 years later
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont
body:
The letter I wrote to myself in 2014

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76869699/448634389/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjdjYWU3Yi1mZGFmLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RkNsd0G3iJK-JORN0xxyFZzesXW7BeS4rNsCAupdTF0=&emci=ab4ba4b9-f4af-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=d67cae7b-fdaf-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=43402272) | Peter, 10 years ago, I wrote a letter to myself when I was preparing for my very first campaign for State Senate. I knew that many challenges would lie ahead, so I wrote this as a way to remind myself why I was choosing to run for office in the first place. _Why am I going to run?

To improve people’s lives. To bring jobs, economic prosperity, and hope for the future to my community. To push people to be their best selves.

To get people more engaged. To make lasting positive change. To change minds, to tweak beliefs about what is possible, to elevate the discussion. To bring more compassion and understanding.

To change the way we engage with ideas. To push people to look beyond easy answers. To make the political arena safe for nuance. To help us find the overlap. To move away from demonizing each other. To build coalitions.

To teach about give and take. To fulfill a calling. To use my gifts and talents to serve others. To enjoy the challenge of a very difficult job. _ A decade later, every word of this letter still rings true. clean_body: The letter I wrote to myself in 2014 | | Peter, 10 years ago, I wrote a letter to myself when I was preparing for my very first campaign for State Senate. I knew that many challenges would lie ahead, so I wrote this as a way to remind myself why I was choosing to run for office in the first place. Why am I going to run? To improve people’s lives. To bring jobs, economic prosperity, and hope for the future to my community. To push people to be their best selves. To get people more engaged. To make lasting positive change. To change minds, to tweak beliefs about what is possible, to elevate the discussion. To bring more compassion and understanding. To change the way we engage with ideas. To push people to look beyond easy answers. To make the political arena safe for nuance. To help us find the overlap. To move away from demonizing each other. To build coalitions. To teach about give and take. To fulfill a calling. To use my gifts and talents to serve others. To enjoy the challenge of a very difficult job. A decade later, every word of this letter still rings true. From first running for State Senate to now representing Vermonters in our nation’s capital, my guiding principles remain the same. I want to improve people’s lives, Peter. And while Republicans in DC try to sow fear and division in our country, I believe that when we turn towards one another, there’s nothing we can’t achieve. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, Peter. name: Jared Lovelace
subject: Campaign Volunteering
body:
Howdy everyone,

To those of you who have donated, THANK YOU. To those of you who have
volunteered to help, THANK YOU. I am so grateful for your support.

The most updated calendar for volunteer opportunities is on the events
section of the Facebook page: Jared Lovelace for Congress | Facebook
<https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61552188285159&sk=events>. If you
plan to come to any of these, please confirm within the Facebook event, so
I know about how many people to plan on.

I will send out a volunteer email each week with the finalized details. *There
will be no canvassing event this coming Saturday.* Instead, we will be
having a Meet & Greet in Flatonia (see fb event for details). The next
canvassing event will be next Saturday, January 20th in Brenham.

Thanks everyone!

-Jared

There will be no canvassing event this coming Saturday. Instead, we will be having a Meet & Greet in Flatonia (see fb event for details). The next canvassing event will be next Saturday, January 20th in Brenham. Thanks everyone! -Jared

_**“The Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee is set to invest eight figures in building out a ground game this fall to aid the reelection bids of Sens. Jon Tester (D-Mont.) and Sherrod Brown (D-Ohio), according to information shared first with POLITICO.”**_
Fellow Conservative,

THIS IS BIG.

The Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee has announced an eight-figure **[minimum $10,000,000]** initial investment to prop up my liberal opponent, Jon Tester, in what analysts say will be the race that decides the Senate majority. This initial investment is a _**massive sum of money**_ to inject into this race, and it’s just the beginning.

Today, one thing is clear: Democrats are playing to win. In 2020 – the last time Montana was home to a U.S. Senate race, Democrats spent more than $100,000,000 on their candidate’s race. _**I guarantee they are ready to spend at least twice that amount in the lead-up to November**_.

We can’t ignore this as some minor development. Folks from Montana to DC will be watching to see how we respond.

[**HELP US STOP DC DEMOCRATS IN MONTANA
CONTRIBUTE TO OUR DEFENSE FUND TODAY->** ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=32db03d27225485bbf71910a0f554d29&_e=qGlYARRw0LRtf6EYbpjmGJNeNK3iW1Pzr0occWPobnIfj7X31kLoV6NhVQzC6u_11_br0U_iQdO4mEOdgOc6CUPzkBLLIJ8t8-7vvEWhZNSv9D5e_RpGer23d_NexxU-cffl-Z51OzpcFj7VVGORXjiu_bh-IMOuI5i2h8ViRNJ3PeFFCbZUA5mGhhfzw5n1iEikITgT143W3Bq_0mIvDWi5Y3NhSph5dsHRWsz9Uak5NDjtsTlx_qSMX1AiRMrz4qBfa4bn2D3tpSww6M4zM72JC4yD2s2HlFLWknkcmjorZzWtYMus5hT0g182dP-asQ5Bum-axDLRmDzbRALlqRwb5ZmWiY6nhZqiI8ZXyyXnsgjBEbXchL4SEP06luYtB1gv5lfxcM4ZCuaM_ITUtVT-pwxXApgMB8_NKiCSXNQ%3D)

While my opponent may vote like he’s New York’s third senator, we can’t let an actual New Yorker meddle in Montana’s Senate race. **[_I need your immediate help to stop Chuck Schumer dead in his tracks today._](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=32db03d27225485bbf71910a0f554d29&_e=qGlYARRw0LRtf6EYbpjmGJNeNK3iW1Pzr0occWPobnIfj7X31kLoV6NhVQzC6u_11_br0U_iQdO4mEOdgOc6CUPzkBLLIJ8t8-7vvEWhZNSv9D5e_RpGer23d_NexxU-cffl-Z51OzpcFj7VVGORXjiu_bh-IMOuI5i2h8ViRNJ3PeFFCbZUA5mGhhfzw5n1iEikITgT143W3Bq_0mIvDWi5Y3NhSph5dsHRWsz9Uak5NDjtsTlx_qSMX1AiRMrzwQa1etuc9b83TFXgX9yTbvLmLdks5Ff93C_Krkv8UCNeJ6JJ5J9o71Pe47oy5TtDfV0R6c_bwiLukRmCdTkBuoIXhSUPgmAnlayQh6aBPKJtrS8AMOspBmDTcSkF5cjLaKFjhm5SPE_nfOTA5CHERGl-JkAvoeyVTJuzXKm5iDk%3D)**

Right now, we have a lot going for us. We’re getting our message to voters, introducing them to our campaign, and highlighting how out-of-step Jon Tester is with Montanans after 18 years in Washington.

**I need to make sure voters know that as a former U.S. Navy SEAL who deployed to Iraq, Afghanistan, South America, and the Pacific Rim, I’ve seen the dangers of the world and am prepared to confront them head-on; Montanans deserve more than a career politician who has chosen to lead from behind for the last 17 years.**

But this eight-figure spend in Montana and Ohio threatens to derail my campaign. We don’t have millions of dollars to counter the narrative Schumer and Washington Democrats are weaving. We are not relying on massive contributions from a few wealthy donors but relatively _**[small contributions from many concerned Americans like you.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=32db03d27225485bbf71910a0f554d29&_e=qGlYARRw0LRtf6EYbpjmGJNeNK3iW1Pzr0occWPobnIfj7X31kLoV6NhVQzC6u_11_br0U_iQdO4mEOdgOc6CUPzkBLLIJ8t8-7vvEWhZNSv9D5e_RpGer23d_NexxU-cffl-Z51OzpcFj7VVGORXjiu_bh-IMOuI5i2h8ViRNJ3PeFFCbZUA5mGhhfzw5n1iEikITgT143W3Bq_0mIvDWi5Y3NhSph5dsHRWsz9Uak5NDjtsTlx_qSMX1AiRMrzndb7Dx2Bmi1maq4li2NBY4F7Wg6SE1q9-tEz2uhmbMtl6Grd23wfgj-68Ukw0vr1f_7Bjn-RHV6YeC4NzYmyOjm6AnQzXfquHi0te-RJj_tAE663hQp8SvaC7z6YgIOtsC-ZxDBDpuYy6__lQq2CFo3YvbzIgZv0yqhOE6HCYaE%3D)**_

So please be as generous as you can today when contributing **[$10, $15, $25, $50](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=32db03d27225485bbf71910a0f554d29&_e=qGlYARRw0LRtf6EYbpjmGJNeNK3iW1Pzr0occWPobnIfj7X31kLoV6NhVQzC6u_11_br0U_iQdO4mEOdgOc6CUPzkBLLIJ8t8-7vvEWhZNSv9D5e_RpGer23d_NexxU-cffl-Z51OzpcFj7VVGORXjiu_bh-IMOuI5i2h8ViRNJ3PeFFCbZUA5mGhhfzw5n1iEikITgT143W3Bq_0mIvDWi5Y3NhSph5dsHRWsz9Uak5NDjtsTlx_qSMX1AiRMrzjqAn_NFEz7mrrOao3925Ktjhktq_3voIAoiFe6cn1qCzN43rNV59H5GexX8l3Xj3b1Mpgp_4YSdxyeql7g2jWkIirJHlEJ6IORU-b1CsObZZxSp8jWE9ZvVZML8AnGTETRJmDkqTlZK2pMJL9yWPNd43pNt3C7WIw3XyqV0MNzc%3D)** , or more to my campaign for U.S. Senate.

[**CHIP IN $15 ->** ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=32db03d27225485bbf71910a0f554d29&_e=qGlYARRw0LRtf6EYbpjmGJNeNK3iW1Pzr0occWPobnIfj7X31kLoV6NhVQzC6u_11_br0U_iQdO4mEOdgOc6CUPzkBLLIJ8t8-7vvEWhZNSv9D5e_RpGer23d_NexxU-cffl-Z51OzpcFj7VVGORXjiu_bh-IMOuI5i2h8ViRNJ3PeFFCbZUA5mGhhfzw5n1iEikITgT143W3Bq_0mIvDWi5Y3NhSph5dsHRWsz9Uak5NDjtsTlx_qSMX1AiRMrzlcVxKEbd863YEr50cLAZ5ClVj9pgVqeV4RRbu1VsJ2Ryg8gtVrYCGeMojcMI760i62eJiZeUpjtsFaXQ1R9iGCQUiAZmLkfl1d0Fyy8ZUp-QQtHCU0hahDyENynPL6oPdpBvS87gHjhhx5WzSxH2sOrX-FpWtUb-Vhp8SdqJESA%3D)

For America's Future,

Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL
Republican for U.S. Senate

|
* * *

"
"I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL."

[ ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=32db03d27225485bbf71910a0f554d29&_e=qGlYARRw0LRtf6EYbpjmGJNeNK3iW1Pzr0occWPobnIfj7X31kLoV6NhVQzC6u_11_br0U_iQdO4mEOdgOc6CUPzkBLLIJ8t8-7vvEWhZNSv9D5e_RpGer23d_NexxU-cffl-Z51OzpcFj7VVGORXjiu_bh-IMOuI5i2h8ViRNJ3PeFFCbZUA5mGhhfzw5n1iEikITgT143W3Bq_0mIvDWi5Y3NhSph5dsHRWsz9Uak5NDjtsTlx_qSMX1AiRMrzUJ5KVgcqKYAEttkqTEdtzDBKrEcMdBA8fpsGoXGGyfvjkMI5bzSqH8b54V-kejaALpVeAuRBZ3xVPScAuNBllWgveAY0EQdITnAUcjBO8ZQoggJ3zA_4J9xUZNi3ZzxHLrIqCilKHMgSBJp3Vifndq22vHiKUnhPobtKt3kce2o%3D)

* * *

Beating Boebert in November will be more entertaining than anything streaming on TV. | | [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w89kKB5u2yVtf13KRofeKJNoAYFQI2-EbFvAXH13iDvWLsX2aeuU37DtUlBjUSDJkq-J0ZG3xFKWiGW01aGV07hXzgeBFLHvUk6RJOKDAc2VejRJp5HJ1oz_OXRjqtdgPH0z4tanpXtJDadFFfBNyk8Y0WJabEgQk-70lK_hIjxx5nB7bKVm7VXNgvL5VXJX5Nrm2EShv8FX2Srjazq32J5qMYz8Y2r469S-rm6ewoS5UIOo6AoT2bIglM0UW2kgazfYmu1Gf6Evsec2Nx7MXU/42v/3qPAKUzfRn6hLBY7n6eEyA/h0/6J1xBEY3PuzXhYI4UFrWeBR-CD56SfRoXmaUY0iRdA8)

Friend, When Trump lost reelection in 2020, the scenes of jubilation across America were unforgettable: normal, everyday people dancing in the streets, embracing one another, shouting, honking, crying. For my part, I will certainly never forget the feelings of relief, joy, and the release of years of anxiety and fear with Trump in the White House and the prospect of 4 more years. I want you to think about that feeling, and keep another in mind: the way it will feel when I defeat Lauren Boebert this year, the same Boebert who calls LGBTQ+ folks “groomers” while forcing her own young children to pose for pictures holding AR-15 semiautomatic rifles. Boebert, the woman who lectures us about Christian values while engaging in sex acts in a crowded theater during a showing of Beetlejuice—with kids nearby trying to take in the show. But Boebert is no ordinary politician: she is one of the most divisive, dangerous, and toxic MAGA hypocrites our country has ever seen. Delivering her an utterly embarrassing defeat this election is worth at a minimum the cost of a subscription to Netflix—beating Boebert as she seeks to evade accountability for her sins by abandoning her constituents and running in my district would be infinitely more entertaining than anything you can stream online. **[So, Friend, if you can, please chip in $15.50 or more—the cost of a monthly Netflix subscription—to bring Boebert’s trainwreck of a political career to an abrupt and entertaining end:](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w89kKB5u2yVtf13KRofeKJvS8y7oKFECGHRZFp3eKcaBq-Q-ghlQQrIfzeKKTDOeQpbRi0WwB68wVzxm1e7GlkxM9iYEQDuNKaMlYNb51KPJKWCiSGqCoQ_khcMr847ONAxlDgB_a0R_OLb4UbiSqSdDJhd_0v0BMw8c5LStYakj9O7m275bbQiswqr_-pQejYEFzoCHXYuzuEx_gI434cGfh1KCigawfRT9aRq4jP2JuMQPyOGax5YXVgwLMAfhe1bWFoHIJXZ1E4FO51wPZT2WHuZCoKfb8IQtNLuy58fwPoD0sWE_6LJ7xy_HdbRLg/42v/3qPAKUzfRn6hLBY7n6eEyA/h1/2gr1ijCe5a8m2DqLyJig0gD11xbPd6nnQ0-T_4VijCQ)**

clean_body: Beating Boebert in November will be more entertaining than anything streaming on TV. | | Friend, When Trump lost reelection in 2020, the scenes of jubilation across America were unforgettable: normal, everyday people dancing in the streets, embracing one another, shouting, honking, crying. For my part, I will certainly never forget the feelings of relief, joy, and the release of years of anxiety and fear with Trump in the White House and the prospect of 4 more years. I want you to think about that feeling, and keep another in mind: the way it will feel when I defeat Lauren Boebert this year, the same Boebert who calls LGBTQ+ folks “groomers” while forcing her own young children to pose for pictures holding AR-15 semiautomatic rifles. Boebert, the woman who lectures us about Christian values while engaging in sex acts in a crowded theater during a showing of Beetlejuice—with kids nearby trying to take in the show. But Boebert is no ordinary politician: she is one of the most divisive, dangerous, and toxic MAGA hypocrites our country has ever seen. Delivering her an utterly embarrassing defeat this election is worth at a minimum the cost of a subscription to Netflix—beating Boebert as she seeks to evade accountability for her sins by abandoning her constituents and running in my district would be infinitely more entertaining than anything you can stream online. Thank you—and stay tuned. This race is going to heat up in no time. -Ike | | Our mailing address is: Ike McCorkle for Congress , | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Ike for Congress, please .

name: Adam Frisch
subject: what Dad taught me about abortion
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Adam for Colorado
body:
Every time I see a new attack on abortion rights and women’s reproductive freedoms, I think of my dad.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76870093/448635769/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYmRjODU0Yy0wMGIwLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lkW_ykWMt2QyrHwlDzzm7OtPXfe3Jx3s0QeeQNf0Alc=&emci=dcd9aa6d-ffaf-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=ebdc854c-00b0-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=19445147)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76870094/448635770/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYmRjODU0Yy0wMGIwLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lkW_ykWMt2QyrHwlDzzm7OtPXfe3Jx3s0QeeQNf0Alc=&emci=dcd9aa6d-ffaf-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=ebdc854c-00b0-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=19445147)
Hello,
Every time I see a new attack on abortion rights and women’s reproductive freedoms, I think of my dad.
For the first few years of my life, my family lived on an Indian reservation in Northern Montana. Dad was an OB-GYN – in the years before _Roe v. Wade_ ...
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76870095/448635771/1610638071?refcode=em20240110pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=ebdc854c-00b0-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYmRjODU0Yy0wMGIwLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lkW_ykWMt2QyrHwlDzzm7OtPXfe3Jx3s0QeeQNf0Alc=)
Years later, Dad recounted how he saw patients that came from all walks of life. Black, brown, and white. Younger and older. Rich and poor. And just as many Republicans walked through his doors as did Democrats.
Looking back, having a father who provided women with access to health care – especially at a time when so many were being denied the right – really shaped how I think about the issue.
My dad is in his 80’s and retired now, but for years, he helped train the next generation of health care providers at Planned Parenthood. And my sister, who later also became an OB-GYN, is continuing on his legacy.
**Extremists like Lauren Boebert want you to think that women having the freedom to make their own medical decisions is some extreme idea. It’s not.**
What’s extreme is pushing a bill in Congress that would make all abortions illegal – including in cases of rape or incest – and wanting to ban a medication that’s been approved for decades for abortions and miscarriages.
Boebert’s views are a fringe one – supported by people who think that the government should be dictating women’s medical decisions, instead of allowing women the freedom to make choices with their doctor.
I would have thought that after almost losing her seat in Congress last year, Lauren Boebert might have at least pretended to moderate on this issue. But she’s only doubled down on the extreme.
**Only 546 votes separated Lauren Boebert and me in 2022, and I’m ready to finish the job in 2024 by replacing her in Congress.**
[**Please, if you’re able to, will you consider chipping in to my campaign today to help me replace Lauren Boebert in Congress? Our race was the closest in the country, but I’m not taking money from corporate PACs. I’m counting on grassroots donors like you if I’m going to win.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76870096/448635772/1610638071?refcode=em20240110pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=ebdc854c-00b0-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYmRjODU0Yy0wMGIwLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lkW_ykWMt2QyrHwlDzzm7OtPXfe3Jx3s0QeeQNf0Alc=)

clean_body: Every time I see a new attack on abortion rights and women’s reproductive freedoms, I think of my dad. Hello, Every time I see a new attack on abortion rights and women’s reproductive freedoms, I think of my dad. For the first few years of my life, my family lived on an Indian reservation in Northern Montana. Dad was an OB-GYN – in the years before Roe v. Wade ... = Years later, Dad recounted how he saw patients that came from all walks of life. Black, brown, and white. Younger and older. Rich and poor. And just as many Republicans walked through his doors as did Democrats. Looking back, having a father who provided women with access to health care – especially at a time when so many were being denied the right – really shaped how I think about the issue. My dad is in his 80’s and retired now, but for years, he helped train the next generation of health care providers at Planned Parenthood. And my sister, who later also became an OB-GYN, is continuing on his legacy. Extremists like Lauren Boebert want you to think that women having the freedom to make their own medical decisions is some extreme idea. It’s not. What’s extreme is pushing a bill in Congress that would make all abortions illegal – including in cases of rape or incest – and wanting to ban a medication that’s been approved for decades for abortions and miscarriages. Boebert’s views are a fringe one – supported by people who think that the government should be dictating women’s medical decisions, instead of allowing women the freedom to make choices with their doctor. I would have thought that after almost losing her seat in Congress last year, Lauren Boebert might have at least pretended to moderate on this issue. But she’s only doubled down on the extreme. Only 546 votes separated Lauren Boebert and me in 2022, and I’m ready to finish the job in 2024 by replacing her in Congress. = Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you for letting me share some of my story with you. With gratitude - Adam ** Paid for by Adam for Colorado. Adam for Colorado PO Box 1240 Glenwood Springs, CO 81602 United States Contributions or gifts to Adam for Colorado are not tax deductible.

name: Hill Harper
subject: Big news!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILL HARPER FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.hillharper.com/go/130?refcode=em2024110&t=1&akid=820%2E62735%2E772ebe)
Peter, I’m so excited to share some big news with you.
Throughout my life, I’ve been fortunate enough to be surrounded by folks who uplifted and supported me. Including my own parents and grandparents, my peer Barack Obama at Harvard, my Alpha brothers, teachers, _and more._
I know: **I would not be where I am today without those who came before me.**
Running for U.S. Senate in Michigan wouldn’t be possible with the progressive leaders who came before me.
That includes leaders like Warren C. Evans — Wayne County Executive and a dedicated lifelong public servant who has led Michigan’s most populous and diverse county with a steadfast hand and a heart for the people.
**And that’s why I’m so excited to share his endorsement of our campaign!**
[****](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20240110?amount=5&refcode=em20240110-820&refcode2=820_62735_772ebe&akid=820%2E62735%2E772ebe)

It’s beautiful to watch our movement continue to grow and strengthen. And with your help, I KNOW we can win this race and bring long overdue change to Michigan.
Thank you for your support,
Hill 💙

New Op-Ed: Why Biden Must Collide With the Democratic Party on Immigration by Mike Madrid | Guest Essay on the New York Times

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/latinos/thelatinovote-oped-biden-immigration-6160776?e=5bd167f239)
https://latinos.vote/

** Happy New Year from Chuck, Mike, and the Latino.Vote familia! With the 2024 elections right around the corner, we are firing up the podcast again this month to bring you the top Latino news stories.
------------------------------------------------------------

**
------------------------------------------------------------

** Today, Latino.Vote cohost Mike Madrid pens a New York Times Op-Ed on Biden's Immigration Challenges and Opportunities.
------------------------------------------------------------
Today's Headlines:

Why Biden Must Collide With the Democratic Party on Immigration (https://www.nytimes.com/2024/01/10/opinion/immigration-politics-biden-democrats.html) By: Mike Madrid | Guest Essay on The New York Times

Trump suggests unauthorized migrants will vote. The idea stirs his base, but ignores reality (https://apnews.com/article/trump-migrants-border-voter-fraud-campaign-40bbf5748615a3b1f6087ff920f59278) By: AP News

UCLA’s Latino Data Hub explores causes of disparities in Latino communities (https://dailybruin.com/2024/01/09/uclas-latino-data-hub-explores-causes-of-disparities-in-latino-communities) By: Daily Bruin

Mexican president demands $20B, work permits for 10M Hispanics in exchange for immigration help (https://www.foxnews.com/politics/mexican-president-demands-20-billion-work-permits-10-million-hispanics-exchange-immigration-help) By: FOX News

Dems announce major cash to court Black, Latino and AAPI voters (https://www.axios.com/2024/01/09/democrats-2024-funds-black-latino-aapi) By: Axios

Democrats face tough choices in border vs. shutdown scenario (https://thehill.com/latino/4392233-democrats-border-shutdown-immigration/) By: The Hill

Retiring Rep. Cárdenas leads Hispanic Democrats in endorsing a successor (https://thehill.com/homenews/house/4391313-retiring-rep-cardenas-leads-hispanic-democrats-in-endorsing-a-successor/) By: The Hill

Latino Senate hopeful says Hispanic voters being ‘blindsided’ by Dem policies, aims to flip border seat red (https://www.foxnews.com/politics/latino-senate-hopeful-hispanic-voters-blindsided-democrat-policies-aims-flip-border-seat-red) By: FOX News

A fraying coalition: Black, Hispanic, young voters abandon Biden as election year begins (https://www.usatoday.com/story/news/politics/elections/2024/01/01/biden-trump-poll-odds-black-hispanic-young-voters/72072111007/) By: USA Today

2024 election dates to know: Joe Biden, Donald Trump and other White House hopefuls face off (https://www.usatoday.com/story/news/politics/elections/2024/01/03/2024-presidential-election-key-dates/72077633007/) By: USA Today

Trump’s “poisoning the blood” remark could see Latino evangelical backlash (https://www.axios.com/2024/01/02/trump-latino-vote-evangelical-immigrants) By: Axios

Trump gaining ground among Latino voters, poll shows (https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2024/jan/01/trump-biden-latino-voters-poll) By: The Guardian

New Rochelle swears in Mayor Yadira Ramos-Herbert, first Latina elected mayor of top ten city in New York (https://www.cbsnews.com/newyork/news/new-rochelle-mayor-yadira-ramos-herbert-sworn-in-westchester-county-politics/) By: CBS News

Biden’s Ukraine aid deadline falls prey to rapidly shifting U.S. immigration politics (https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/congress/bidens-ukraine-aid-immigration-talks-ongoing-missed-deadline-rcna129565) By: NBC News

============================================================
________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________

New Op-Ed:

** Why Biden Must Collide With the Democratic Party on Immigration (https://latinos.vote/why-biden-must-collide-with-the-democratic-party-on-immigration/)

By Mike Madrid
** Featured on the New York Times (https://www.nytimes.com/2024/01/10/opinion/immigration-politics-biden-democrats.html)

The negotiations on Ukraine funding and stricter border protections have exposed a ** growing rift (https://www.nytimes.com/2023/11/30/us/democrats-asylum-ukraine-israel.html)
between President Biden and his own party. Republican hard-liners have demanded a bill that mirrors policies advanced during the Trump administration, especially ones related to asylum seekers, increased border security and the mandate that companies institute ** the E-Verify employment eligibility system (https://www.e-verify.gov/about-e-verify)
.

Democrats such as Representative Pramila Jayapal called the proposals “cruel, inhumane and unworkable,” but Republicans believe they have found solid ground with voters. Recent polling suggests the Republicans are right. A ** CBS News/YouGov poll (https://www.cbsnews.com/news/cbs-news-opinion-poll-americans-border-crisis/)
released on Sunday found that 68 percent of Americans disapprove of Mr. Biden’s handling of border security.

There are many, both inside and outside his party, who believe that by agreeing to the Republican deal, Mr. Biden would be surrendering too much moral high ground and any future policy leverage. But in fact, this is a chance for him to make meaningful border-security policy changes and redefine his party as the home of an aspirational multiethnic, working-class coalition.

Securing the borders of a sovereign state isn’t racism — it’s among the first responsibilities of government. And many voters, including Democrats, are demanding that the Biden administration do a better job with that responsibility. A recent Fox News poll showed that fully ** 22 percent (https://www.foxnews.com/official-polls/fox-news-poll-republicans-preferred-top-issues-inflation-security)
of Democrats favor Republican candidates on border security.

More than any other group, Latinos have political views that correlate with — indeed, are racially and ethnically defined by — the immigrant experience. Yet even these voters are conveying growing concerns about border security. According to an April 2021 ** survey (https://www.pewresearch.org/short-reads/2021/04/20/most-latinos-say-u-s-immigration-system-needs-big-changes/)
by the Pew Research Center, about 44 percent of Hispanics and 48 percent of respondents overall think illegal immigration is a major problem, an increase of more than 15 percentage points since June 2020.

** To Continue Reading This Op-Ed Click Here (https://latinos.vote/why-biden-must-collide-with-the-democratic-party-on-immigration/)

Thank You

Thank you for taking the time to read our updates. If you have any news to share, comments to make, or corrections for us, feel free to ** email us (mailto:info@latinos.vote)
anytime.

Best,

The ** The Latino Vote (https://latinos.vote/)
Team

subject: quick survey for you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress [unsubscribe](https://support
body:
|
---
| | Peter,

With the start of a new year comes the opportunity for new changes. I want to hear directly from you on what your top priorities are in 2024 and what you hope to see Congress focus on this year.
**[Take Our Survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76870256/448636591/147149925?refcode=EM_NBI_MT_20240109_SV_2024Priorities_0_3MO_MikeThompson_NA_NA_Priorities&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjY5NWIxYy0wMmIwLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y1zHR6g6XNJn3uMT0gDe5BtaBp5lG5uOCdmC6l_Q19k=&emci=06c5b52f-25af-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=7b695b1c-02b0-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=2678920)**
From investments in infrastructure to the creation of new affordable housing developments, we accomplished a lot together last year

I am so grateful to have you on our team and your support has been invaluable. I always strive to amplify your voice, but, for me to continue to do so in 2024, I need to know what issues you would like to see prioritized.

_**[So, will you click here to complete our 2024 Priorities Survey and let me know what you would like me to focus on for our community this year?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76870257/448636592/147149925?refcode=EM_NBI_MT_20240109_SV_2024Priorities_0_3MO_MikeThompson_NA_NA_Priorities&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjY5NWIxYy0wMmIwLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y1zHR6g6XNJn3uMT0gDe5BtaBp5lG5uOCdmC6l_Q19k=&emci=06c5b52f-25af-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=7b695b1c-02b0-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=2678920)**_

name: Dr. Paul Gosar
subject: Hunter Biden Runs from Congress
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GOSAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | | Hunter Biden Runs from Congress | [](https://tk.paulgosaraz.com/ga/click/2-57929-1-19-34-27-8045e8d101-es926a6d70)
---
**Dear Fellow Patriot,**

As a committed fighter for accountability and transparency in government, I want to share with you a pivotal development in our ongoing battle for justice and integrity. The events of this week are not just crucial; they are a stark reminder of the urgent need for Patriots to take action.

**Hold Hunter Biden in Contempt of Congress!**

This week, the House Oversight and Accountability Committee, of which I am a proud member, is marking a significant stride in our pursuit of justice. We will mark up a resolution to hold Hunter Biden in contempt of Congress. This action is in direct response to Hunter Biden's flagrant defiance in complying with a congressional subpoena last month, requiring his presence for deposition.

As detailed in my previous communications, Hunter Biden's resistance to legal processes is not just an isolated issue. It gains further gravity with the revelation that President Joe Biden had advanced knowledge of Hunter’s intentions to defy these legal demands.

**Hunter Biden's Lawbreaking and the Evident Double Standard!**

Hunter Biden's refusal to appear before the committee isn't merely a breach of protocol; it's a serious legal violation. This situation is deeply intertwined with the mounting evidence pointing towards Joe Biden’s alleged involvement in corruption and influence peddling schemes. The disregard for a Congressional subpoena by Hunter Biden showcases a troubling selective application of the law.

**Joe Biden's Obstruction of Justice!
**
The gravity of the situation is further compounded by Joe Biden's obstruction of justice. _It has come to light that Joe Biden was aware in advance of Hunter’s decision to defy the subpoena and even attempted to impede the proceedings of the House Oversight and Accountability Committee_.

This act of conspiracy to obstruct a proceeding of Congress is not only illegal but, in my opinion, constitutes an impeachable offense.

**Hunter Biden's Recent Conduct in Congressional Hearing!**

The recent events during the congressional hearing on Capitol Hill have further escalated the situation. Hunter Biden's dramatic exit from the building, particularly when Georgia GOP Congresswoman Marjorie Taylor Greene was set to question him, is not just disrespectful but indicative of his disdain for the legal process. His actions during the Oversight and Judiciary Committees hearing - where he left abruptly as Congresswoman Greene was given the microphone - speak volumes about his attitude towards this investigation.

**Your Support is More Crucial Than Ever!
**
In light of these recent developments, your support becomes even more vital. Our fight against Biden corruption, and for upholding the principles of justice and accountability, is at a critical juncture.**[We rely on the power and support of good folks like you, who stand ready to face evil head-on](https://tk.paulgosaraz.com/ga/click/2-57929-1-19-34-27-8045e8d101-es926a6d70)**.

**[I urge you to make a contribution today to help us fight back in Congress. Your support is instrumental in our relentless pursuit to bring those who flout the law to justice](https://tk.paulgosaraz.com/ga/click/2-57929-1-19-34-27-8045e8d101-es926a6d70)**.

Thank you for your steadfast support and commitment to holding both Hunter and Joe Biden accountable. Together, we stand for freedom and integrity in our government.

**For Freedom,**

Congressman Paul A. Gosar, D.D.S. | [ DONATE >> ](https://tk.paulgosaraz.com/ga/click/2-57929-1-19-34-27-8045e8d101-es926a6d70)
---
View as a Web Page

PAID FOR BY GOSAR FOR CONGRESS

Copyright © 2023 Gosar For Congress, All rights reserved.

You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

Our mailing address is:
Gosar For Congress
3104 E Camelback Rd # 2889
Phoenix, AZ 85016-4502

---

Thank you for your steadfast support and commitment to holding both Hunter and Joe Biden accountable. Together, we stand for freedom and integrity in our government. For Freedom, Congressman Paul A. Gosar, D.D.S. | View as a Web Page PAID FOR BY GOSAR FOR CONGRESS Copyright © 2023 Gosar For Congress, All rights reserved.

body:
It’s now been a few months since we launched this campaign, but I wanted to remind all of you why I’m running for Governor of Virginia and what’s at stake next year.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76870412/448636929/1993432125?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2024-01-10_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmUxZTU5NmMtMDJiMC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=RmauGmiJ2kDjVrj6pabOJkVObvsETGQm_caXoiSoK5w=)

| Peter,

It’s now been a few months since we launched this campaign, but I wanted to remind all of you why I’m running for Governor of Virginia and what’s at stake next year.

I’m running because we need a Governor who brings people together to support our schools, keep our communities safe, protect our fundamental rights – including the right to choose, and get things done!

We’ve seen the dangers of a Governor who wants to move the Commonwealth backward and who’s stoked divisions in our communities, our classrooms, and our capital.

I know that Virginians are ready for change, and I’m prepared to bring that when we flip this seat in 2025.

[_**This election will be a tough one, so will you please consider a contribution to my campaign to ensure we have a strong start to 2024?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76870413/448636930/1993432125?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2024-01-10_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmUxZTU5NmMtMDJiMC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=RmauGmiJ2kDjVrj6pabOJkVObvsETGQm_caXoiSoK5w=)

name: Team Schiff
subject: Just 4 weeks away
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| We need to respond now, while Californians are starting to decide who to vote for.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4967%2E5257348%2E14yhV7)
Derek — With less than 4 weeks until voters fill out their ballots across California’s 58 counties, here’s the state of the race:
**Republican millionaire Steve Garvey is surging in recent polls — including _Politico_ ’s latest poll, which has California’s Senate race in the _single digits_.**
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em.zPsl9O&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240110_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=4967%2E5257348%2E14yhV7)
Steve Garvey has been a celebrity for decades and is a wealthy candidate — and he won't hesitate to pour money into this race, tear down Adam’s record of public service, and make this election even closer than expected.
With Trump’s MAGA loyalists turning out to vote for him in the presidential primary the same day as our election, it could give Garvey the boost he needs.
We need to respond now, while Californians are starting to decide who to vote for.
**[We’re increasing our organizing efforts from now through March 5. We’ll need more donations to help buy yard signs, target persuadable voters in swing counties, and get Californians out to vote. Will you pitch in $3 to help supercharge our efforts today?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em.zPsl9O&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240110_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=5&akid=4967%2E5257348%2E14yhV7)**

body:
| | | Fellow American,
---
Today I was endorsed by one of our country’s great conservatives, Governor Mike Huckabee. It’s an honor and privilege to have the support of Governor Mike Huckabee, a courageous conservative and consistent voice for our values, our heritage, and our freedom. I am humbled to receive his endorsement, and look forward to hitting the campaign trail with him soon! Mike and I are building an A-Team to win for real conservatives this November, and we need your help. **[Will you stand with us today to put our mission to save America into action?](http://links.patharriganforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d400fe4f8ca24360a0914af7db39ca7b&_m=1d1983ea7f3d4085bbdb6fbe14359dcc&_e=cUjfR0BdVPOW7S5PVgd2nsKDCo5-Oeaiz1msb6bMow8J1iNoXnIk2B4XPQsnnCvJVINoA_K9n4IrPcH03dY5080pv1uvFFtuMxvjfvotM7ToT03oEzapPBwiD39iyRErgyB6bEiw8ypKFePYOfkh9c2B5UFwxVqD0wmc-GcdeZ_l0Vrfjlm9L3-jvk2O7nV0-_yNYrEr6G5D7hf6wKnlg9IO3tYpgooFhxgcXH4fof95i2GNKclE30mFLK0HHFGzKvMZtWNsNXypDF9iEFzrfZEeYKDaLgto-ZsA54IQGMhWtw5tAMDSHggr0x2oPDolwH3l_2I0rLCT2siuZvsyzbKaDq1XqJICNU9_t6bwGgDFF_fg5fSAqNAGp3DZGdif45Wtvad9k0D_bPHew2JY3g%3D%3D)**

clean_body: | | | Fellow American, Today I was endorsed by one of our country’s great conservatives, Governor Mike Huckabee. It’s an honor and privilege to have the support of Governor Mike Huckabee, a courageous conservative and consistent voice for our values, our heritage, and our freedom. I am humbled to receive his endorsement, and look forward to hitting the campaign trail with him soon! Mike and I are building an A-Team to win for real conservatives this November, and we need your help. Having conservative voices like Governor Huckabee in my corner shows me we have the support to win this thing in November. American children are suffering the consequences of the Biden Administration's disastrous border policies.
**Students at James Madison High School are being forced into remote learning because nearly 2,000 migrants were moved into their school building. **
Our children and their education should come first.
We have no choice but to fight back, get our kids in school, and put an end to the border crisis. __**

clean_body: | | | | Peter, we need to put a stop to this | Peter, American children are suffering the consequences of the Biden Administration's disastrous border policies. Students at James Madison High School are being forced into remote learning because nearly 2,000 migrants were moved into their school building. Our children and their education should come first. We have no choice but to fight back, get our kids in school, and put an end to the border crisis. | | | | | | | | Thank you, | | Mike Lawler Congressman, NY-17 | | | | | | Mike Lawler is a Republican running for reelection in New York’s 17th Congressional District. He is passionate about standing with law enforcement and making our communities more safe, protecting Social Security and Medicare, fixing our crumbling roads and bridges, and restoring the SALT deduction to lower taxes and make New York more affordable. | | USE THE ADDRESS BELOW TO CONTRIBUTE BY CHECK LAWLER FOR CONGRESS PO BOX 87 SOUTH SALEM, NY 10590 GET YOUR MIKE LAWLER, NO CUOMO MERCH No New Yorker wants to call our Tappan Zee Bridge the “Governor Mario M. Cuomo Bridge”. Proudly send the message that you want the bridge restored as the Tappan Zee. | Are you interested in staying up-to-date on Mike Lawler's reelection battle? Don't miss out on the latest news and updates from his campaign! By texting "Lawler" to 85007, you can receive regular updates on Mike's campaign, upcoming events, and important news about the race. Text "Lawler" to 85007 today and join the fight for a brighter future for New York! Do you know someone who would be interested in supporting Mike Lawler’s reelection campaign for Congress? Don't keep it to yourself! Spread the word and remind your friends and family to join the fight for America’s future. Simply forward this message to five of your friends or family members who you think would be interested in staying up-to-date with Mike's campaign. FORWARD THIS EMAIL As we get closer to the 2024 election, Mike Lawler is more motivated than ever to continue our journey toward a better future for all New Yorkers. To stay up-to-date with our latest news and events, we encourage you to text "Lawler" to 85007 and follow us on social media, where we share updates, thoughts, and news about our progress. You can also opt others in by providing their email address and we will send them regular updates and important news about the campaign. | go.txting.io/7jAGfc Let's work together to ensure that Mike Lawler has the support he needs to make a real difference for New York! | | | | | \- =

Peter,
November 5th may be 10 months away but Republican primaries, including mine, are in just **2 short months.**

I’m sure I don’t need to remind you what’s at stake:

* _Ending Antisemistm and Supporting Our Israeli Allies_

* _Securing Our Southern Border_

* _Ensuring the Integrity of American Elections_

* _Holding Crooked Politicians Accountable _

Completing this list will be no small task – and I can’t do it alone...
