Roger Williams is a Christian, conservative, pro-life, and second amendment supporter taking Texas values to Washington, D.C. He is a small business owner with over 45 years of experience and is running for Congress to create economic growth, jobs, and provide strong leadership. Roger worked alongside President Trump to fight against high taxes, rising energy prices, and soaring healthcare costs. His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. Roger serves on the Board of Trustees for the Bush School of Government and Public Service at Texas A&M University, the Texas Christian University Board of Trustees, and the National Football Foundation and College Football Hall of Fame Board of Directors.

clean_body: | | | | You are mission-essential Peter, November 5th may be 10 months away but Republican primaries, including mine, are in just 2 short months. I’m sure I don’t need to remind you what’s at stake: Ending Antisemistm and Supporting Our Israeli Allies Securing Our Southern Border Ensuring the Integrity of American Elections Holding Crooked Politicians Accountable Completing this list will be no small task – and I can’t do it alone... So I’m inviting you to join me, as an Official Member of my American Defenders. **To cover the costs of your membership please make a $5 contribution Your membership won’t just help me out – it will ensure I’m able to support like-minded conservatives in Congress and protect the Republican majority in November. This is THE BEST way to impact such a critical and historical election. | I am deeply honored to invite you to join this elite group of American fighters, and I sincerely hope you accept my invitation! Best, Rep. Roger Williams TX-25 | | Roger Williams is a Christian, conservative, pro-life, and second amendment supporter taking Texas values to Washington, D.C. He is a small business owner with over 45 years of experience and is running for Congress to create economic growth, jobs, and provide strong leadership. Roger worked alongside President Trump to fight against high taxes, rising energy prices, and soaring healthcare costs. His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. Roger serves on the Board of Trustees for the Bush School of Government and Public Service at Texas A&M University, the Texas Christian University Board of Trustees, and the National Football Foundation and College Football Hall of Fame Board of Directors. | "Facebook" | "Twitter" ---|--- | | ⬇DONATE BY CHECK⬇ ROGER WILLIAMS FOR U.S. CONGRESS 10 N. name: Team Gallagher
subject: Mike’s take on Taiwan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Gallagher for Wisconsin
body:
did you catch Mike’s latest appearance on Fox News? He talked about the latest threat from Xi Jinping. | | | Fellow American, President Joe Biden will have you believe that Xi Jinping is likely to avoid invading Taiwan because of the economic downturn China is facing. As Mike said, that's simply**NOT** the case.
---
| | [](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=e764b4a2434846feba21156160a5cedd&_e=K7Cawbge_EbUaL8Zm_XTFlWmp4agpR_t0BJw_uz5bx_cSqSN8IcsMFr5KbU91epgJ0ftXA7dQmfXFWCjGWEoVssm2GxL8_ILoQL8qssN2tzIn4ygV3_chNRKb1N3ruV6S26gCH90ci88S0b3rNVRzp5rZMHeci8ljk3mX_KZLylusGE_vgzJNpyxqlAlO4VX3lpE2af4SMiWsaCZyM6Cu_LiZaA8t5xBg8emJfuHXmHtfVXiS0EYFyiTenqkat253HZlqzmP9GdmOrRCzbKz9H0PgwUu6mCaJNT3HaY8lhnD3R3k0G6j7dDg6Kgs5Z_pvlrYpPyf6Rc15jtrSHd5kvHSjU3z-OkfaSgmLcHJ200%3D)
---
"_It 's possible that Xi will survey the world, see that the U.S. looks weak, that we're consumed with two regional wars, and that he may never get a better chance to achieve his life-long ambition of taking Taiwan." _
---
[**WATCH THE CLIP**](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=e764b4a2434846feba21156160a5cedd&_e=K7Cawbge_EbUaL8Zm_XTFlWmp4agpR_t0BJw_uz5bx_cSqSN8IcsMFr5KbU91epgJ0ftXA7dQmfXFWCjGWEoVssm2GxL8_ILoQL8qssN2tzIn4ygV3_chNRKb1N3ruV6S26gCH90ci88S0b3rNVRzp5rZMHeci8ljk3mX_KZLylusGE_vgzJNpyxqlAlO4VXEtdYbtqO6nmCjICxaNhjvW2cY2yJaHFZwijdkFHfa7UmrDC2fqE5RFQTgzAMzwv9LIpOpK_N7dHfdOSzmYRUiHXICrDnWFkwJTpm16DjUZ00GZIPHyK4rL9Tj72NGRQiSwGYexdNHcYSAyhz6pdUaxNXmyby2TVW4me8JIa9Vwg%3D)

It's something we've failed to do for far too long and, because of it, we exude weakness. _**[We can't continue down this path.](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=e764b4a2434846feba21156160a5cedd&_e=K7Cawbge_EbUaL8Zm_XTFlWmp4agpR_t0BJw_uz5bx_cSqSN8IcsMFr5KbU91epgJ0ftXA7dQmfXFWCjGWEoVssm2GxL8_ILoQL8qssN2tzIn4ygV3_chNRKb1N3ruV6S26gCH90ci88S0b3rNVRzp5rZMHeci8ljk3mX_KZLylusGE_vgzJNpyxqlAlO4VX__dEqjxgCzg1IluER2JpPbIa2ueL-afzxOFiE_i5C9U4MdqMd3Swh9nosUEp25BrYBGqb8bj9lKawZiH-HsVUDHMokm6pR1My92O7g_WIxgsQFjm6ssut1ozVvN-mhI4HZw5IRFU2Ai7zOEu4rwQZCPfq_zMF8PxKFir9oW6acs%3D)**_ -Team Gallagher

name: The Long Run PAC
subject: Republicans will do everything they can to disqualify votes this November
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
#
Team,
Yesterday, a Wisconsin judge ruled the use of mobile absentee voting sites is illegal — siding with Republicans who opposed the use of a voting van arguing it increased chances of voter fraud and was used to bolster Democratic turnout.
**We’ll be clear: This lawsuit was nothing but another political ploy by Republicans to make it harder to vote and amplify their voter fraud conspiracies.**
Since 2020, Republicans have been vocally opposed to the process of absentee voting. Now that their heavily gerrymandered maps have been struck down, Republicans are going to do everything they can to push their voter fraud narrative in 2024 in an attempt to disqualify legitimate Democratic votes.
So we must do everything in our power to ensure voters have complete voting guidelines and the resources to make it to the polls this April and November so their votes are counted. And Mandela is leading that charge with Power to the Polls Wisconsin to do just that.
**[Will you please split a $5 contribution between Power to the Polls and The Long Run today? Every donation will help us get Democrats the resources they need to vote during the primary and the general elections.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-power2thepolls-split.vXbZtT&refcode=em240110-1-t2&t=1&akid=5138%2E196590%2EWn01Xl)
Power to the Polls Wisconsin is already knocking on voters’ doors, showing up in the community to listen to voters’ concerns, and building the foundation necessary to ensure Democratic voters reach the polls this April and November.
Wisconsin proved the power of high voter turnout last April when Justice Janet Protasiewicz won the Wisconsin Supreme Court race. And in 2024 we will do it again. Because without it, we lose the White House and Senate majority. But we know that when we organize we win.
It's no secret that the voters we reach now will make all the difference. And if we continue to work together to get out the vote, we can ensure President Biden, Tammy Baldwin, and every Democrat on the ballot win in November.
But first, Power to the Polls needs our support to continue to talk with voters about the issues that matter most to them and empower them to show up to the polls on Election Day.
**[So, we are asking: can you please split a $5 contribution or whatever you can afford between Power to the Polls and The Long Run today? Every donation will help us keep Wisconsin Blue.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-power2thepolls-split.vXbZtT&refcode=em240110-1-t2&t=2&akid=5138%2E196590%2EWn01Xl)
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split between Power to the Polls Wisconsin and The Long Run immediately:_
[Express Donate: $5](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1271?c0=longrunpac-em-power2thepolls-split.ADME7Q&amount=5&refcode=em240110-1-t2&t=21&akid=5138%2E196590%2EWn01Xl)
[Express Donate: $25](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1273?c0=longrunpac-em-power2thepolls-split.l1zvmy&refcode=em240110-1-t2&t=22&akid=5138%2E196590%2EWn01Xl)
[Express Donate: $50](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1274?c0=longrunpac-em-power2thepolls-split.0iRyiC&refcode=em240110-1-t2&t=23&akid=5138%2E196590%2EWn01Xl)
[Express Donate: $100](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1275?c0=longrunpac-em-power2thepolls-split.3owE8C&refcode=em240110-1-t2&t=24&akid=5138%2E196590%2EWn01Xl)
[Express Donate: $250](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1266?c0=longrunpac-em-power2thepolls-split.44g3gi&refcode=em240110-1-t2&t=25&akid=5138%2E196590%2EWn01Xl)
[Or donate another amount](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-power2thepolls-split.vXbZtT&refcode=em240110-1-t2&t=26&akid=5138%2E196590%2EWn01Xl)
Thank you,
The Team at the Long Run

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=27&akid=5138%2E196590%2EWn01Xl). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=28&akid=5138%2E196590%2EWn01Xl)
The Long Run PAC is funded by grassroots donors giving what they can, when they can. [**Make a contribution to The Long Run PAC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longrunpac-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=29&refcode2=5138_196590_Wn01Xl&akid=5138%2E196590%2EWn01Xl)
Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=30&akid=5138%2E196590%2EWn01Xl)
Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P.O. Box 597
Milwaukee, WI 53201, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: Team Emerge
subject: It’s simple: Defend Abortion. Defend Democracy. But we must act now, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America This email was sent by Emerge America
body:
If the GOP gets their way this year, we could see a national abortion ban. | | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76871183/448639752/-1986725772?amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1399-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNlMTY1MzVlLTA0YjAtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=BCnHJm__h88ti6ZmGiTWybMBJvJCgXO4hJr3hmZyTTA=)
---
We’ll be blunt, Peter. If the GOP gets their way this year, we could see a national abortion ban. So we’re doubling down in the fight to protect reproductive rights in every state – and we need you with us.
Because abortion is on the ballot in the critical elections this fall, we can’t take any race for granted. We need bold leaders who will speak out and defend our rights in the courts, in state legislatures, and in the U.S. Congress. **That means we need MORE Emerge women in office. **
**With the stakes so high, we can’t afford to miss a single fundraising goal and fall short of the resources we need to power the fight ahead.[So please, before our next big deadline at midnight: Donate $10 or more to help Emerge recruit, train, and empower more Democratic women to run for office and win in the 2024 elections and continue the fight for rights in every state.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76871184/448639753/-1986725772?amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1399-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNlMTY1MzVlLTA0YjAtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=BCnHJm__h88ti6ZmGiTWybMBJvJCgXO4hJr3hmZyTTA=)**

The struggle to protect abortion access is linked to ALL our essential rights, Peter. When the ultra-right SCOTUS majority overturned Roe v. Wade, they put all our communities on notice. But here’s the reality: **The current SCOTUS majority and far-right Republicans across the country do NOT represent the American majority. That’s why it’s so urgent to bring in new voices at every level of office. **
By empowering more women – Black, Brown, and Indigenous women and women of color, as well as LGBTQ+, young, and unmarried women – to run for office and WIN, Emerge is helping to build a real representative government for the FIRST time in our nation’s history. **Without these voices in office, ALL our rights will continue to be at risk. **
**The good news is** that Emerge has a winning strategy. We’ve proved it before, and we can do it again. name: Rush for Congress
subject: Help Defeat MAGA Republicans
body:
Flip the district blue

| | |
---
Dear Friend Exciting news! Carolyn Rush, a dynamic force for change, is stepping up to challenge Congressman Van Drew in the upcoming election. We believe in Carolyn Rush's vision for a more progressive and inclusive future – and we need your support to make it happen. Here's why Carolyn Rush deserves your backing: 🌟 Fresh Perspective: Carolyn Rush brings fresh ideas and a new perspective to the table, offering innovative solutions to the challenges our community faces. 🌈 Proven Commitment: Carolyn Rush has a track record of commitment to issues that matter, from healthcare and climate change to environmental justice and women’s rights. 💪 Unwavering Dedication: Carolyn Rush is dedicated to representing the people, not the political establishment. Her campaign is fueled by grassroots support, and she won't be swayed by special interests. Now, we need your help to ensure Carolyn Rush can run a successful campaign. Your donation will:
* Boost Visibility: Fund essential campaign activities, such as advertising and outreach efforts, to ensure Carolyn Rush can connect with voters across the district.
* Empower Grassroots Movements: Support the ground game by providing resources for volunteers and community organizers who are working tirelessly to promote Carolyn Rush]'s message.
* Challenge the Status Quo: Help Carolyn Rush overcome the influence of entrenched interests and bring about positive change in our district.

Your contribution, no matter the size, will make a real impact on Carolyn Rush's campaign. Support the movement for change and be a part of shaping a brighter future for our community. Thank you for standing with Carolyn Rush and being a vital part of the movement for progress!

---
| [](https://rush.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzsZ7yn9XYR0z33rx2hCsxounsIy2fjMAKdEhs8tXFuFsXaZP0mNqjuFtBZdas6JEss&e=aade65d4f40795ff17612d049c394e5d&utm_source=rush&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e&n=1 "DONATE") [DONATE](https://rush.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzsZ7yn9XYR0z33rx2hCsxounsIy2fjMAKdEhs8tXFuFsXaZP0mNqjuFtBZdas6JEss&e=aade65d4f40795ff17612d049c394e5d&utm_source=rush&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e&n=1)
---

---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com · [Unsubscribe](https://rush.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=aade65d4f40795ff17612d049c394e5d&utm_source=rush&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e&n=2) Created with [NationBuilder](https://rush.nationbuilder.com/r?u=8ZU0Lizkf4ldaLE4eHvP4jrdVLeo6TMxn9HZ_FOKnho&e=aade65d4f40795ff17612d049c394e5d&utm_source=rush&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e&n=3). Build the Future.

name: Mike Rogers
subject: What on Earth???
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rogers for Senate
body:
Leftists have turned the military into a wokeness machine| | |
---
[](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=3017b4e410804f1884f04dfb09f07f93&_e=r8CC039JTXEptu6U5OFEzAnWeCtzIw25WOyGk2mE5DRszLvXHAPB50lXlWFzPhozPOQr12u6k23y2yFG1QzKJMe920VuB_RKkvbF2oyzULvrUDv8b5LH2oycxF6QzGITRUDZY6l_aVw6w_WtgsX6lb6FW4D2H1Ko0iABsXs62EfRQQJjlup4zoopLFeI1q1WGDXVfuF6ZSSz4Ox2p1ubJzd_pGvuan722Ng4zZGoGtPksiXBtq-tfwZlgwYpceFzjwlYlZPZVozQmtCpVAs7SO8fPOS73vGV9kaCFcS8esVXUUmYmalDev3ZGhnXI0cHgW2W6I-HN3fIy2rcAkR6ENxUveVSFlXmbvKTblTqv_tE7DJavGv6426vT3qu8GiulFb01MzygXlI8O4aUvCX4A%3D%3D)
---
Friend, What on earth is going on here? _70% of new prospects can’t read well enough to join the military._ _In 2023, the military fell short of their recruiting goals by 20%._ **And the leftists in charge are looking around wondering what the problem is... The truth is all they need to do is look in the mirror.** After all, they’ve turned the military into a woke machine. **[Well, Friend, I know what needs to be done to restore our military:](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=3017b4e410804f1884f04dfb09f07f93&_e=r8CC039JTXEptu6U5OFEzAnWeCtzIw25WOyGk2mE5DRszLvXHAPB50lXlWFzPhozPOQr12u6k23y2yFG1QzKJMe920VuB_RKkvbF2oyzULvrUDv8b5LH2oycxF6QzGITRUDZY6l_aVw6w_WtgsX6lb6FW4D2H1Ko0iABsXs62EfRQQJjlup4zoopLFeI1q1WGDXVfuF6ZSSz4Ox2p1ubJzd_pGvuan722Ng4zZGoGtPksiXBtq-tfwZlgwYpceFzqfY8oDb81g8mZM0x1IaPIPaFW6FL-cQW-WzLkDHdoOsVPG6APRePxDMS-fpHaCsEnxAu4j59p5UiLmCyq0HCKUxUf9keVrIVXKjUZoSC5wEz0h99DFhfrzwwZzXJ3QO--aqNms7XLJJv8jGEyDuRWQ%3D%3D)**
---
[**CHIP IN TO RESTORE OUR MILITARY**](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=3017b4e410804f1884f04dfb09f07f93&_e=r8CC039JTXEptu6U5OFEzAnWeCtzIw25WOyGk2mE5DRszLvXHAPB50lXlWFzPhozPOQr12u6k23y2yFG1QzKJMe920VuB_RKkvbF2oyzULvrUDv8b5LH2oycxF6QzGITRUDZY6l_aVw6w_WtgsX6lb6FW4D2H1Ko0iABsXs62EfRQQJjlup4zoopLFeI1q1WGDXVfuF6ZSSz4Ox2p1ubJzd_pGvuan722Ng4zZGoGtPksiXBtq-tfwZlgwYpceFzcXhRPVkZXN7HpfmvosvZwhilQYYMZk_70tSFTH6i3W0SHIuIMarU554cWSyHH4rPbSV1yTyHnIPEL0rpcbv5Nn8OPW-Nj4iphDhmKxJm5y8iC8pdZrOSwGABx1_WJTSqfjTEqeukL98DGvKd2XlQ-Q%3D%3D)
---
My name is Mike Rogers, and I’ve spent my entire life serving this country — in the Army, in the FBI, and in Congress. And in all my years, I have **NEVER** seen a more clueless bunch of leaders. First and foremost: Our education system is utterly **FAILING** Americans. So much so that over 56% of high school graduates can’t even read at the sixth grade level. Second: Our military has been turned into a woke social experiment. Soldiers are being given sensitivity training rather than **COMBAT** training. They’re being trained to fight culture wars, not REAL wars. When I’m elected to the U.S. Senate, it’ll be my **TOP** priority to increase literacy standards and take a sledgehammer to the woke agenda of the Biden administration. Friend, it’s impossible for one man to do all that needs to be done to save our military. That’s why I’m asking you to step up and join my team. If you’re ready to build our military back into the strongest, smartest fighting force in the world, I’d be honored if you could **[contribute any amount to help me out!](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=3017b4e410804f1884f04dfb09f07f93&_e=r8CC039JTXEptu6U5OFEzAnWeCtzIw25WOyGk2mE5DRszLvXHAPB50lXlWFzPhozPOQr12u6k23y2yFG1QzKJMe920VuB_RKkvbF2oyzULvrUDv8b5LH2oycxF6QzGITRUDZY6l_aVw6w_WtgsX6lb6FW4D2H1Ko0iABsXs62EfRQQJjlup4zoopLFeI1q1WGDXVfuF6ZSSz4Ox2p1ubJzd_pGvuan722Ng4zZGoGtPksiXBtq-tfwZlgwYpceFzg0IPjdzS79VCoLDRlL8ebEAiO2bfTZ1ax5SEi_6x-NHaGj2o8PpN_Ou09wQWEFeLYYubCzbCO8pQm4I7mtet53EaS9krOn1wOJ9_awZf9aSfPDrN-1bEMKPhsq_eohfJooggYmkZhWBnsdy6HJVqqQ%3D%3D)**
---
[**SAVE OUR MILITARY**](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=3017b4e410804f1884f04dfb09f07f93&_e=r8CC039JTXEptu6U5OFEzAnWeCtzIw25WOyGk2mE5DRszLvXHAPB50lXlWFzPhozPOQr12u6k23y2yFG1QzKJMe920VuB_RKkvbF2oyzULvrUDv8b5LH2oycxF6QzGITRUDZY6l_aVw6w_WtgsX6lb6FW4D2H1Ko0iABsXs62EfRQQJjlup4zoopLFeI1q1WGDXVfuF6ZSSz4Ox2p1ubJzd_pGvuan722Ng4zZGoGtPksiXBtq-tfwZlgwYpceFzFHrTsDv04AmEbXXoOI3SAeHA6z-OI9G3ZXaeIDGC0rpZwdqoQlNhY280Kw7CzNte0vyQMkPbYTEKutAc74pDEHRjYa5HFrjwrcJvQvU16ApsB4k5F2PiUoItYLQgIvOSaRYpfHlmM987OHQC4i3Mow%3D%3D)
---
Friend, thank you for being a patriot, and thank you in advance for your support. Sincerely,

Sincerely, Mike Rogers Paid for by Rogers for Senate.

Fellow Conservative,

THIS IS BIG.

The Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee has announced an eight-figure **[minimum $10,000,000]** initial investment to prop up my liberal opponent, Jon Tester, in what analysts say will be the race that decides the Senate majority. This initial investment is a _**massive sum of money**_ to inject into this race, and it’s just the beginning.

Today, one thing is clear: Democrats are playing to win. In 2020 – the last time Montana was home to a U.S. Senate race, Democrats spent more than $100,000,000 on their candidate’s race. _**I guarantee they are ready to spend at least twice that amount in the lead-up to November**_.

We can’t ignore this as some minor development. Folks from Montana to DC will be watching to see how we respond.

[**HELP US STOP DC DEMOCRATS IN MONTANA
CONTRIBUTE TO OUR DEFENSE FUND TODAY->** ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=1107d66b327342ae935f085ac281d55b&_e=K1fMperxC4mSXwD9EMmZeK2vbW_0YsJGSqrbQGDZOO7_Gk9etcP_e2QHcVvPXtlCrjF2GeQgIZePH3BJdWSYay94MFFKdAhbjhiyKxZY_I2dyo0qCjvFwYKW_KPHg-DG39fTsJerKbEQs74eAaexZ455Z4sJrOxIRJtFwDbIJY-YiZTnErYNHfMOxiAYMx-D5AYfzxQkIySqxtm6fqkfIONm5erEbLDCtwMc1q-5JlpgWzgrGm44wSuo_sr1YnJKuPeEsbJQm8Fuiimf1jW8py6JaMKD4Flr0o2CIIpjCbZQwB0JoorDRfOjdcWllaKB9TpHcS4agsQdrvqJvHKaTrMiQ5ElWKavo2cleaBCfBSsqU-8myrurnK24SMBts1gW_5YXxevyr7gfcUKlPs7zlorz3KL2ImmQOqUNsSIx44%3D)

Right now, we have a lot going for us. We’re getting our message to voters, introducing them to our campaign, and highlighting how out-of-step Jon Tester is with Montanans after 18 years in Washington.

**I need to make sure voters know that as a former U.S. Navy SEAL who deployed to Iraq, Afghanistan, South America, and the Pacific Rim, I’ve seen the dangers of the world and am prepared to confront them head-on; Montanans deserve more than a career politician who has chosen to lead from behind for the last 17 years.**

But this eight-figure spend in Montana and Ohio threatens to derail my campaign. We don’t have millions of dollars to counter the narrative Schumer and Washington Democrats are weaving. We are not relying on massive contributions from a few wealthy donors but relatively _**[small contributions from many concerned Americans like you.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=1107d66b327342ae935f085ac281d55b&_e=K1fMperxC4mSXwD9EMmZeK2vbW_0YsJGSqrbQGDZOO7_Gk9etcP_e2QHcVvPXtlCrjF2GeQgIZePH3BJdWSYay94MFFKdAhbjhiyKxZY_I2dyo0qCjvFwYKW_KPHg-DG39fTsJerKbEQs74eAaexZ455Z4sJrOxIRJtFwDbIJY-YiZTnErYNHfMOxiAYMx-D5AYfzxQkIySqxtm6fqkfIONm5erEbLDCtwMc1q-5JlpgWzgrGm44wSuo_sr1YnJKOS_reiMY1wFHACCEV6IpGf2vQvVVWvwe9FCwRFEwXMXe_6LUYRxRksOX0qUGyMLNQP_00cSmTFR2UrHyTvQQhHmQAqkVoH_qD03kf-svPNy2m_jGVw-SYajfnhqGDwNHoHiCsIMMQ4ACHJiUP7YQtpEIevwF-EfhP4NVxuQtjIQ%3D)**_

“Perpetrators of genocide rarely express their intentions as directly as Israeli state leaders and senior army officers have done after October 7,” said experts supporting South Africa’s case.
As Palestinian American human rights expert Noura Erakat explained: “The purpose of the Genocide Convention is to prevent it from happening, not merely to punish it after the fact.”
As the biggest funder of Israel’s military, the U.S. government has leverage to stop the violence.
Instead, Biden keeps blocking international efforts for a ceasefire. He keeps sending U.S. bombs to the Israeli military, to use against Palestinian civilians who are trapped in one of the most densely populated places in the world.
With U.S. support, the Israeli government has killed more than 23,000 Palestinians in Gaza, forcibly displacing 2 million people within the small Gaza strip.
Hundreds of thousands are sick from infectious diseases and malnutrition in overcrowded refugee camps. And Israel’s government continues to deprive Palestinians of their basic needs for survival like food, water, shelter, sanitation, and medical assistance.
According to the Genocide Convention, genocide involves “intent to destroy, in whole or in part, a national, ethnical, racial or religious group.”
Genocidal acts include mass killings and “deliberately inflicting on the group conditions of life calculated to bring about its physical destruction in whole or in part.”
[**Sign now to demand U.S. officials name this as a genocide, and do all they can to stop it.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmQip0KI8h0I2D6ae1eIF_QxBogkBDr6lviWdhgjvyINIGPZFtsKbsW4DlrIxua1WQks3dK3SVPvZhoseGgCFuzpgEz9b2NbdHi0MgaY0G8csr4IFb9PzVwSkSLggIWo_qEKpPP05jt1D3beyGb0Y8CwkFReSnxzelCVvkfVrI7AaZM4gtq_Wlr6rHDrKj-CgQGKTiMqyU47bx7pK6rKPFt6tSVz4y4VomMlAh99qNy5frNv6ctyi0YhFFHOwuLnWgXUVMmhiYfyvzcbMzFOHdUjGEyLmJ99EFrxRAT0nKTDrXszWF8LrE1cqPmYIPpKMGHjS8xODVFmjwybaP_OFOgkMETkkN_36zdNJS6C120J8wBWhNV2Eoc2zFBY6b0bbUCY6m4vRrQde6yhbhJ7FsO_D-9mlBsr-i4E-SPISDwdEop4A-GID1lgOaeFY9RtIxSnJMBWwsR46MGMVJqsZKBCjzt49DWM5f9N4WijQvmLHwwJ1EWwWmKS70mahUrn2ZF0LBkLkC7XhEDumOGRO-xtTTXUHlwoMOgnHIfUofwwBy4Dhl3wyv9OspTsKuqGlM/42v/dRJAFWk0TjCI0lcOIWdg7Q/h3/_vb1VLg367X3FuT7I6XvZLIRUawEKERXVfg2hMTpM7s)

body:
They’re willing to do anything in their power to slow our progressive movement.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20240110-3377-footer&t=1&akid=3377%2E420207%2E1hKyKi)
Peter, we aren't happy to write this, but you should know that very powerful Republicans are coming for our campaign.
The same GOP mega-donors who give to Donald Trump, Ron DeSantis, and Ted Cruz have given to AIPAC to challenge progressive Democrats across the country. **_They have put Pramila on their target list._**
We know their gameplan:
1. Take money from Republican mega-donors
2. Target progressive, working-class candidates of color — including Pramila
3. Spend millions of Republican dollars on misleading attack ads in Democratic primaries

AIPAC has endorsed over 100 Republicans who defend the January 6th insurrection. They’re willing to do _anything_ to slow our progressive movement. **Even if it means undermining our democracy.**
**It’s shameful, and we absolutely cannot stand by and let it continue.**[**Chip in today to help us fight back against AIPAC and their millionaire donors to ensure that progressive leaders like Pramila can continue fighting for our values in Congress.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240110.q3vNwt&refcode=em20240110-3377&t=2&akid=3377%2E420207%2E1hKyKi)

Team Pramila

name: Project 47
subject: Pick the cabinet: Vice President, Attorney General, Secretary of State, and more >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
The 47th President needs your input...| | | Peter,[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=28de1ee65f654f7d8923db04f8a17106&_e=MRUYUpjDPFvq-XDUsJrHdGl_FVahT7sSnmSRlg5xEsjG57_844m_kYObu2otbI4fNkflsQXm5qokUfQEWMiiuO2F38ARN54fpmqi0LrECXGqFC81xSnl5rdxgrEe7IDk5kSvlecMi3vq85Mn-YTmvoiTezG8fzuCVhoMWaWH6Z2oeaL5VJZ7YqmCrAYD_GopJH3QjSQ30hnFsoxssw9-3X8e1eIDrFKMRAkysEyd6-avSJdN4RqwDCfl4bqBl5UhLC08dUsRyKzRYcmRs_UE9E416xH5oxwBJK4Qpdw10eVfcZ71_I_tNti8M_LhQ2s9Ow8gWKNhI78TK1aYfgCfnV8s9Rk5eCddSWW6nI6mJ0Y2f91Ick8PKTzNAqLkyrYS7oKwLaxq_XlEijqUWbrhe0OynQpZB_5Wtusma8lNDdjJjn6wm2wN-QtXqAx8DpAD) Defeating Joe Biden is priority #1. _**[But priority #2 is staffing a Republican administration full of true America First patriots.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=28de1ee65f654f7d8923db04f8a17106&_e=MRUYUpjDPFvq-XDUsJrHdGl_FVahT7sSnmSRlg5xEshBG8-N_MYZl694HUvgibzJ8bddnnhUC0Rv8R-Vk-nIYKwH9fxp4XKU1CfZHI8XmxHoUq5s1OabE_hjocIbYxZr2tjDPu2mUFSXqGyHD8rTtrT70EsrWvHAuaONcx2v9de2bIoUP8R31U26Wk_trLviCtCHaM69zdIrRUodDoN1Vv9gT53hVYsTr-FoHVSytq4xdGDZqnDXaRDYifa0VolSFRtlK8pO1jTqH1YbErmJQw4WRKl_9aG6DSTTNng_-7aaWQMi5E5Er-cUu_R7Fmi8t6_3tY5fikFDyhrCGfer1Q4CS0l5R7asfA6-ZjE4msr9ud-7TEFDtPObQMPa2zCZEDn31f2LApLuDBK1rR0emojxK3hk4Cld9VBwuu2N-SCVuuIpCrJg_1f7h9AqSGf6)**_ The 47th President’s cabinet must be composed of individuals who _understand the destruction the radical Left has caused to America_ and are committed to reversing the damage by any means necessary. The necessary qualifications to serve in the next White House are as follows:
---
[— Unconditional love of our country and its Constitution](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=28de1ee65f654f7d8923db04f8a17106&_e=MRUYUpjDPFvq-XDUsJrHdGl_FVahT7sSnmSRlg5xEshBG8-N_MYZl694HUvgibzJ8bddnnhUC0Rv8R-Vk-nIYKwH9fxp4XKU1CfZHI8XmxHoUq5s1OabE_hjocIbYxZr2tjDPu2mUFSXqGyHD8rTtrT70EsrWvHAuaONcx2v9de2bIoUP8R31U26Wk_trLviCtCHaM69zdIrRUodDoN1Vv9gT53hVYsTr-FoHVSytq4xdGDZqnDXaRDYifa0VolSFRtlK8pO1jTqH1YbErmJQ1pZTrna7eSzNiPPA8_rtceqUptPS2Bx5GqrKD3Zm8xxGNyMQChLmE6nUpGlzxsMEwBsW8StZDRgaTWn5YKTzQ7ZU7O8Z4SQhTYYkdtbntiNw31MGu6y9k6Ma7De6VND-mnyXwXENmQRRQukbpe5o6nWkoDX6pCftFcwDS7vBzHo) [— Loyalty to the 47th President and his or her agenda](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=28de1ee65f654f7d8923db04f8a17106&_e=MRUYUpjDPFvq-XDUsJrHdGl_FVahT7sSnmSRlg5xEshBG8-N_MYZl694HUvgibzJ8bddnnhUC0Rv8R-Vk-nIYKwH9fxp4XKU1CfZHI8XmxHoUq5s1OabE_hjocIbYxZr2tjDPu2mUFSXqGyHD8rTtrT70EsrWvHAuaONcx2v9de2bIoUP8R31U26Wk_trLviCtCHaM69zdIrRUodDoN1Vv9gT53hVYsTr-FoHVSytq4xdGDZqnDXaRDYifa0VolSFRtlK8pO1jTqH1YbErmJQwtClMHvhh8h5c8cEUPtdVEDT1V8UevM4S5RR-SA2GPer0FEKAOnwa408D5ZDk9LGmfPmsTl1lxrt9g9SZdvtJ3KXVs_z7rycRniPBV53yegl0V7QzW491cQiqBwllMEQdMr46lZgypGBAnKnnKqa9BodrekKPslRVf3vG0d41Sl) [— Conservative bona fides and a proven dedication to America First principles](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=28de1ee65f654f7d8923db04f8a17106&_e=MRUYUpjDPFvq-XDUsJrHdGl_FVahT7sSnmSRlg5xEshBG8-N_MYZl694HUvgibzJ8bddnnhUC0Rv8R-Vk-nIYKwH9fxp4XKU1CfZHI8XmxHoUq5s1OabE_hjocIbYxZr2tjDPu2mUFSXqGyHD8rTtrT70EsrWvHAuaONcx2v9de2bIoUP8R31U26Wk_trLviCtCHaM69zdIrRUodDoN1Vv9gT53hVYsTr-FoHVSytq4xdGDZqnDXaRDYifa0VolSFRtlK8pO1jTqH1YbErmJQzpIA25hYD5WU0AIH6CaitmomwfIq5z6V4OOD1gHZLX3O0UX3kwXqF6HvRKou7tvcUy-aP5y6QUiwCL000fJL7tkNjH4SskS_Z6386JLANSo8TqFKRgiAKS1XFy6wAENp3WBnkvszfJzyuAS7jE8_dnQbyPdcg-14YvUxlLc92_a)

Fellow Conservative,

We hope this email finds you well. Thank you for your dedication to the Conservative cause and for standing up for America.

As you know, the midterm elections did not go as planned. We did not see the red wave we expected. We did take back the House majority, but we did not flip the Senate.

clean_body: We need your input | Fellow Conservative, We hope this email finds you well. Thank you for your dedication to the Conservative cause and for standing up for America. As you know, the midterm elections did not go as planned. We did not see the red wave we expected. We did take back the House majority, but we did not flip the Senate. Given the results of the midterm elections, we are curious to know what you think about the 2024 Presidential Election. | We would love to hear your thoughts. Thank you for your time and consideration. Sincerely, GOP Alerts Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2022 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.

Kat Cammack is serving her second term representing the people of Northeastern Florida in Congress. She won the seat on a conservative platform of growing jobs, securing our southern border, standing up for law enforcement, defending our Second Amendment, promoting fiscal responsibility, and defending life.
Congresswoman Cammack sits on the House Committee on Energy and Commerce and House Committee on Agriculture, where she is the only Florida Republican serving the Sunshine State's farmers, ranchers, and producers. She was also appointed to the Select Subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government.
Kat and her husband Matt, who is a firefighter, paramedic, and SWAT medic, proudly call Gainesville, Florida home.

Dear Peter,
**We are officially on the ballot in Utah!**
This was an amazing show of strength as we accomplished it during an icy December snowstorm and inclement weather.
Thousands of Utahns enthusiastically signed our petition for ballot access, removing gloves and mittens as they did so!
**_This was a historic win_** as we won a lawsuit extending the filing deadline, then we turned in twice the number of required signatures to appear on the ballot.
And as thousands add their name to our petition across the nation, we are simultaneously building a grassroots army of activists who will fight for our campaign — they will attend events, work polls, canvass, and make phone calls.
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=utah_1_10_24_email_1_1_nd&n=2)
Our [2024 Battleground Ballot Map](https://www.kennedy24.com/ballot-access?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=utah_1_10_24_email_1_1_nd&n=3) lays out our strategy moving forward.
Garnering ballot access in all 50 states is going to take all hands on deck — _and it’s going to take contributions to keep our campaign moving as we do this._
[So please, Declare Your Independence and help us get RFK Jr. on the ballot in all fifty states!](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=utah_1_10_24_email_1_1_nd&n=4)

clean_body: This was an amazing show of strength. | | | | This was an amazing show of strength. | Dear Peter, We are officially on the ballot in Utah! This was an amazing show of strength as we accomplished it during an icy December snowstorm and inclement weather. Thousands of Utahns enthusiastically signed our petition for ballot access, removing gloves and mittens as they did so! This was a historic win as we won a lawsuit extending the filing deadline, then we turned in twice the number of required signatures to appear on the ballot. And as thousands add their name to our petition across the nation, we are simultaneously building a grassroots army of activists who will fight for our campaign — they will attend events, work polls, canvass, and make phone calls. Our lays out our strategy moving forward. Garnering ballot access in all 50 states is going to take all hands on deck — and it’s going to take contributions to keep our campaign moving as we do this. Thank you, Team Kennedy | to put a Kennedy back in the White House — Elect Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. as President to unite America in 2024! Make sure to join us on Social Media to help spread our campaign's message and put Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. in the White House! | | PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY

Newsom and his army of radical California Democrats, including Nancy Pelosi and Kamala Harris, are hell-bent on making America more like California.

| | Peter, we’ll keep this quick. In 2020, Democrats won Georgia by just 0.23% of the votes cast. It was enough to stop Donald Trump, but the reality is, the 2024 presidential election is going to be even closer.

Polls already show a tied race in Georgia, and it’s clear that it’s all going to come down to turnout. If we are able to reach more of our voters than the GOP can, then we’ll win and stop Trump again. But that means we need to build the biggest field operation Georgia has ever seen.

[**_Will you invest right now in our field team to help us reach Democratic voters across Georgia and make sure they’re getting out to vote this year?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76872940/448645739/710125701?refcode=20240110.2_GADems_1M&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTA3ZDdkZC0wY2IwLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zeOnVeiLVcRsk-tr_XehmhuFssq9oRYubCkLZm1ooMY=)

Thank you,

GA Dems

clean_body: | | | Peter, we’ll keep this quick. In 2020, Democrats won Georgia by just 0.23% of the votes cast. It was enough to stop Donald Trump, but the reality is, the 2024 presidential election is going to be even closer. Polls already show a tied race in Georgia, and it’s clear that it’s all going to come down to turnout. If we are able to reach more of our voters than the GOP can, then we’ll win and stop Trump again. But that means we need to build the biggest field operation Georgia has ever seen. = Thank you, GA Dems | | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.georgiademocrat.org | Democratic Party of Georgia P.O. BOX 89202 Atlanta, GA 30312 United States

subject: Bad News in Arizona
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
In a poll released today — the first Arizona poll of the Election Year — Ruben Gallego is down by 1 point against Kari Lake in a head to head match-up.
#

Peter, this is not the news we were hoping to share today.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-jan24.RCwesN&refcode=em240110-2-30&t=1&akid=1700%2E734936%2EsMOQ35)
In several consecutive polls, Ruben has been down against Kari Lake.
In a poll released today — the first Arizona poll of the Election Year — Ruben Gallego is down by 1 point against Kari Lake in a head to head match-up.
That’s bad news.
It’s bad because our fundraising is off to a slow start this month.
It’s bad because any sign of weakness from our campaign is just what Kari Lake needs to amp up her own support.
It’s bad because important people and organizations are looking to endorse and support us — and polls like this don’t help.
And it’s especially bad because Kari Lake only lost her last campaign by less than a percent of the total vote. And if this result holds, she will take Arizona’s seat.
So Ruben needs his strongest supporters today. We need you to make your first online donation to this campaign today.
[**Can we count on you? Make a donation of $3 and help us turn this around. We really need your help today.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-jan24.RCwesN&refcode=em240110-2-30&t=2&akid=1700%2E734936%2EsMOQ35)

name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: please take a moment to read this email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kristen for Michigan
body:
I’m going to get straight to the point

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76873167/448646463/1433120897?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMmQ4MTMyMC0wZmIwLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0ErCFD6L0CfqmKN1ctggzMMW61wr4tPJbfyumPvO2rY=) I’m going to get straight to the point, friend. **I’m running for Congress to restore what I call The Michigan Dream: that if you work hard, you can own a home, pay your bills, put a little away for retirement, and have the chance to drive your family to Disney World every now and then.** But that dream is becoming out of reach for too many Michiganders. And extremists are making us less safe by trying to take away women’s right to abortion and refusing to address the epidemic of gun violence. It’s clear that we need to elect real leaders to D.C. who we can trust to solve the challenges our community faces. **That’s why I’m sending this email to you today, and that’s why I’m running for Congress.** Our campaign could really use your help. We know National Republicans are going to be laser-focused on flipping this __**tossup seat**__ , and we need all the help we can get to protect it. [_**Every donation, no matter the size, is a powerful statement of belief in this vision and our shared values. Can I count on your support today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76873168/448646464/1433120897?refcode=email_011024_Michigan-dream&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMmQ4MTMyMC0wZmIwLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0ErCFD6L0CfqmKN1ctggzMMW61wr4tPJbfyumPvO2rY=) | | [Donate Now →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76873169/448646465/1532741920?refcode=email_011024_Michigan-dream&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMmQ4MTMyMC0wZmIwLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0ErCFD6L0CfqmKN1ctggzMMW61wr4tPJbfyumPvO2rY=)

body:
| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=1891%2E4032634%2EAZFmfA)
---
With 2024 in full swing, I know that everyone has elections on the top of their minds. But there’s something else I’m paying attention to this year, and that’s gratitude. My New Year’s Resolution this year is to write down three things I’m grateful for every night before I go to bed. And I’ve stuck to it so far! There are big things, like the organizers fighting to secure abortion rights at the state level, all the members of our grassroots movement strengthening our team, and all the Americans saving hundreds of dollars a month on insulin because of action Democrats took. And there are things like going on a long walk with Bruce and Bailey, enjoying a well-brewed cup of tea. There’s a lot to be grateful for, and keeping it all in mind gives us strength for the fights ahead. (It’s a lot more constructive than doom-scrolling.) [**I’m wondering — what are you grateful for today? Please feel free to share with me here, and I’d love the chance to share back later on what all this community is grateful for.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-gratitude/?source=EMZ18V_ENG_E_20240110_V1S1&t=8&akid=1891%2E4032634%2EAZFmfA) I’m grateful for you. Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth

---

Team: Polls show the presidential race is _neck-and-neck,_ **and according to our records, you are currently _undecided_ between President Biden and Donald Trump!**

_The contrast in this election couldn't be clearer:_ Trump wants to make health care unaffordable, eliminate reproductive rights, and tear down _democracy itself_. Meanwhile, President Biden wants to protect our freedoms and fight for _real_ progress.

name: Hillary Scholten
subject: an indefatigable optimist

body:
Political divisions have made public service bitter to an extent that few can remember it being so bad.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76873241/448646901/591366051?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2024-01-10_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDQ1MmYzZi0xMGIwLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gQTiyNxMwTgoTQDSF47I8NpwdhOLZ0yPtomunEphjE8=)
---
| _**I’ve been described as an indefatigable optimist. I wear it like a badge of honor. I find the positive. I look on the bright side. I don’t give up. **_ But I’ll be honest, it’s a challenging time to serve right now. Political divisions have made public service bitter to an extent that few can remember it being so bad. Owing to massive Republican failure of leadership, we lost nearly a month of planned time back in the district–with our families and with our constituents. Republicans aren’t focused on governing but on messaging. So nothing gets done. As a result, we’re watching a massive exodus from the House like we’ve never seen. It’s tough to stay in this role. _**So, why stay in a job that’s so divisive and ugly and has real and serious threats to my safety?**_ **Honestly, it’s pretty easy to answer–because quality leadership matters.** Because I fear what would happen to our country if representatives with integrity and common sense were driven away by the chaos. Because we don’t back down to bullies like Trump. We keep at it. When an optimist like me sees the country slipping closer and closer to fascism, I don’t despair. I get to work. It’s officially 2024, and we need all hands on deck. [_**Will you contribute today to help us win big in November and ensure West Michiganders have the quality representation they deserve?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76873243/448646902/591366051?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2024-01-10_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDQ1MmYzZi0xMGIwLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gQTiyNxMwTgoTQDSF47I8NpwdhOLZ0yPtomunEphjE8=)

body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1015%2E135344%2EbQRIIy)

Friends -
[**A new Detroit News poll just dropped](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/2012?t=2&akid=1015%2E135344%2EbQRIIy)** and the results show why this is going to be one of the most contested races in the country this cycle:
**Elissa Slotkin: 37.5%
Republican Mike Rogers: 37.5%

Elissa Slotkin: 36.3%
Republican Peter Meijer: 35.7%

Elissa Slotkin: 35.5%
Republican James Craig: 37.8% **
This poll confirms exactly what we’ve been feeling on the ground: this is going to be one of the most competitive races in the nation. We are within the margin of error (-\\+ 4%) against all three Republicans in their primary, and this comes the day after a poll showing Trump ahead by 8% over President Biden in Michigan as well.
So what does this mean for our campaign? It confirms we have our work cut out for us. It means we have to fight for every last vote in this election – to hold both the slimmest of Senate majorities, and White House.
And when a race is as close as this one, it means even a small act of support can make a huge difference.
We've received tens of thousands of donations to our campaign so far, but these poll numbers make it clear that Elissa needs you in this fight as well.

* First, we have to get our ads running ASAP. This will make sure voters know there is an election happening. In our district, it’s vital to have ads running in Spanish too.

* Second, we need to send campaign mailers before voters start receiving their ballots. That means we only have a few weeks to design, print, and get these in the mail!

* Third, our volunteers will need resources to to knock on doors - including pens, clipboards, campaign literature, and even ponchos in case it rains.

**[It’s going to cost $10,000 to execute our get-out-the-vote plan, so I’m hoping I can count on you to put our plan into action. Will you chip in as much as you can towards our Get Out the Vote fund today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76873599/448647881/753479076?&refcode=E5914-20240110-GOTVPlan-SL-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjk2MTRkNWItMTFiMC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=rw7o-xKe4SUhYbzDO95TG5SA3Q5SkyTaFeB-ozU3ONw=)** _If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately:_ | **[**DONATE $10 →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76873600/448647882/753479076?express_lane=true&&refcode=E5914-20240110-GOTVPlan-EG-CampaignNews&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjk2MTRkNWItMTFiMC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=rw7o-xKe4SUhYbzDO95TG5SA3Q5SkyTaFeB-ozU3ONw=)** | **[DONATE $25 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76873601/448647883/753479076?express_lane=true&&refcode=E5914-20240110-GOTVPlan-EG-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjk2MTRkNWItMTFiMC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=rw7o-xKe4SUhYbzDO95TG5SA3Q5SkyTaFeB-ozU3ONw=)**

name: Angela Alsobrooks
subject: We’re opening an office in Montgomery County, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
|
---
[ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2092?t=1&akid=922%2E52803%2EcxIK2R)

| | Peter, This is it. It’s now 2024 and we have just around four months left until election day. Before then, we have to reach hundreds of thousands of voters. And we need to come together to do it. **That’s why I wanted to personally invite you to our office opening in Silver Spring this week.** We’re going to come together and celebrate the progress we’ve made so far, and kickoff our organizing efforts. **We need all hands on deck to win this race.** **[Our field office is opening this Saturday in Silver Spring — can you join us?
RSVP here to get all the details you need to be there.](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/9440?t=7&akid=922%2E52803%2EcxIK2R)** | | | [I'm in!](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/9440?t=8&akid=922%2E52803%2EcxIK2R)
---
**What:** Montgomery County Office Opening and Donation Drive
**When:** January 13th at 4:30 PM
**Where:** 8455 Colesville Rd, #202, Silver Spring, MD 20910
**What to bring:** Canned food
This race is about our communities, and making sure we have one of us, fighting for us in the Senate. **That’s why, we are also hosting a canned food donation drive at our office opening.** If you can spare some canned food, please bring them to our office so we can donate them to our neighbors.
**[RSVP for our Montgomery County Office Opening here.](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/9440?t=9&akid=922%2E52803%2EcxIK2R)** Can’t make it to the office opening? Sign up to volunteer **[here](https://alsobrooks.actionkit.com/signup/volunteer-form?t=10&akid=922%2E52803%2EcxIK2R)** and an organizer will let you know when our next events are.
Together we will organize, turn out our communities, and win this race.
See you soon,
Angela Alsobrooks
**[P.S. We need folks to help furnish our offices. Do you have any spare furniture or office supplies you can donate? Let us know and we’ll be in contact with you.](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/9436?t=11&akid=922%2E52803%2EcxIK2R)**

body:
Save money on your next concert.

**[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76873702/448648185/-1346134463?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzg1MzMzIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU2MjAzNGEyLTExYjAtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=S0TVQBlgtZI-1QljiaPf7VYLYoXBl4b64TCPQBmzsgA=)** Peter, If you purchased a ticket to Taylor Swift’s Era’s Tour or Beyonce’s Renaissance Tour, you probably paid a bunch of outrageous fees from companies like Ticketmaster. **A new bipartisan bill called the “TICKET Act” will improve transparency by cracking down on fake tickets, requiring refunds for canceled or postponed events, and requiring all ticket sellers to display the total price for a ticket, including fees.** [**Will you add your name as a citizen co-sponsor of the TICKET Act and call on new Speaker Mike Johnson to bring this legislation up for a vote?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76873704/448648188/-272915673?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzg1MzMzIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU2MjAzNGEyLTExYjAtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=S0TVQBlgtZI-1QljiaPf7VYLYoXBl4b64TCPQBmzsgA=&emci=e0976ba9-10b0-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=562034a2-11b0-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=25540290) clean_body: Save money on your next concert. = Peter, If you purchased a ticket to Taylor Swift’s Era’s Tour or Beyonce’s Renaissance Tour, you probably paid a bunch of outrageous fees from companies like Ticketmaster. A new bipartisan bill called the “TICKET Act” will improve transparency by cracking down on fake tickets, requiring refunds for canceled or postponed events, and requiring all ticket sellers to display the total price for a ticket, including fees. This bill will bring much-needed transparency to the music industry and prevent consumers from getting scammed on tickets. We can get this done! \- Future Forum PAC | Future Forum PAC is a coalition of young democratic members of Congress focused on issues and opportunities for the next generation. =** = =

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76873735/448648278/-1524658983?refcode=odp_em_240110_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmExZDEzMi0xMmIwLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ga0EygTm7C0ijyplN0lJpYKiXsDKGyvNUm-9hhzN99g=) Team, **Last night, the news broke that a federal judge upheld restrictive, sweeping election laws that Ohio Republicans put in place, making it even more difficult for Ohio voters to make their voices heard.** **Let’s tell Ohio Republicans we refuse to sit back and allow them to silence our voices during a crucial election year.** [SIGN OUR PETITION NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76873736/448648279/1203224288?refcode=odp_em_240110_1&ms=odp_em_240110_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmExZDEzMi0xMmIwLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ga0EygTm7C0ijyplN0lJpYKiXsDKGyvNUm-9hhzN99g=&emci=897cc5c7-feaf-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=ffa1d132-12b0-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=25291327) These election laws include:
* Strict new photo ID requirements.
* Drop box restrictions – including limiting the number of ballot drop boxes to only _one per county._

And let's not forget that (thanks to Ohio Republicans) we have one of the most restrictive voter registration laws in the entire country: No new voters can register in the 30 days before an election. So they’re further rigging the rules in their favor with one of the worst anti-voter bills in the entire country. Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

> Hi team,
> It’s Jason Crow. As one of my top supporters, I wanted you to be the first to know: **I’m running for re-election in Colorado’s 6th district.**
> I am so proud of our work to defend democracy, fight extremism, and protect women’s reproductive rights — but our fight is just beginning. Our country has a big decision to make in November: Will we choose to let our worst instincts dictate our decisions, or will we lead by example by being a beacon of hope and optimism?
> You know my answer. I’ve always gone where the fight is, and I’m ready to continue bringing servant leadership to the halls of power.
> **One of the most important ways to show early support is by endorsing our campaign from Day One.**

> ---
> Even before serving in Congress, my career has been grounded in the spirit of servant leadership.
> I served three combat tours in Iraq and Afghanistan. Even as I rose up the ranks to be Captain, I never forgot what it was like to walk in the boots of a Private.
> We looked out for each other. Every single day.
> **That’s the spirit I’m working to bring to Congress. We need leaders willing to step above politics, find common ground, and take action on the hard issues. That work continues.**
> **[If you’re all in, I hope you’ll become a Day One Endorser of my campaign today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76873843/448648674/-240320482?refcode=AU_JC_EG_GEN_PET_AC30_20240109_PM1_V1_S1&ms=AU_JC_EG_GEN_PET_AC30_20240109_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZWI2Y2U1OC0xMmIwLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nsjtqiqYQojhUMJCJUU-KLbSLF4kbR97e6UmmPUnYRM=&emci=6c172c1b-c4af-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=1eb6ce58-12b0-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=29801744)**

> I will continue to fight for our shared priorities including protecting our democracy, passing gun safety legislation, addressing the climate crisis, and codifying the right to an abortion.
> Thank you for trusting me with your support. Now let’s continue our work, together.
> — Jason Crow

**_Defense Secretary Austin needs to resign effective IMMEDIATELY._**
The American public deserves more from our public servants, especially from the man in charge of the world's most powerful military.

These are dangerous times. We cannot afford to have the Pentagon adrift. Our men and women in uniform deserve leadership. If Secretary Austin cannot do the job, he should step aside and focus on his health. If he sacrificed national security for his vanity, he should resign in disgrace. Either way, it's time for him to go.

And where was Joe Biden? Asleep at the switch, of course. The President is so checked out he had no idea his Secretary of Defense was in the hospital. It's disgraceful.

**_The engine is running but no one is behind the wheel. We should all be terrified of what 's to come if Biden and his corrupt administration of incompetent cronies get another four years in office. _** | [**WATCH MY TAKE HERE**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=40f23f8d068f4915b0bb2d03268139dc&_e=iELCDyBatZd5s720N1nc9L1s1UFnfSLltIFlqQ_mtPbkYkC3PLCAr1vpIAH8KzgAJCznIUmFEERXvNDUqbzf4rMEwQjZhbpiZHtVSW-65VgejCvsw0QQLYrKF9_N7LOf1NTPKSdI15dwDc1iOVaYdo9tIxqwCaNYxzCCL2EDkmsG1EhgOzz4EwARMsjcuZT1UWca4xP94jhe9Wp74u3xPaAod9yeOQSEJCDxeN9qC4yYffqiSQZpJr9fkZ4ILDGi9DgjsKX_SvxbLBWyqjr2YzL4nnUlbJQW63KlpoGJeOqTKEdBqW3Tqwhzrk-Oicg9)
